en: Use row planting with a spacing of 20cm between rows instead of broadcasting to increase yield and reduce seed waste.
Ensure the seedbed is very fine and firm because teff seeds are tiny and require shallow planting (about 1-2cm deep).
Apply recommended DAP or NPS fertilizer at the time of sowing to provide essential nutrients for early growth.
am: ምርትን ለመጨመር እና የዘር ብክነትን ለመቀነስ በብተና ከመዝራት ይልቅ 20 ሳ.ሜ ርቀት ባለው መስመር መዝራትን ይጠቀሙ።
የጤፍ ዘር በጣም ጥቃቅን ስለሆነ እና ጥልቀት በሌለው ቦታ (ከ1-2 ሳ.ሜ) መዘራት ስላለበት እርሻው በሚገባ መለስለሱን እና መስተካከሉን ያረጋግጡ።
ለተክሉ የመጀመሪያ እድገት አስፈላጊ የሆኑ ንጥረ ነገሮችን ለማግኘት በሚዘራበት ወቅት የሚመከረውን የ DAP ወይም NPS ማዳበሪያ ይጠቀሙ።
om: Oomishtummaa dabaluufi bifa qusannaa qabuun facaasuu dhiistanii fageenya sarara gidduu sentimeetira 20n sararaan facaasuu fayyadamaa.
Sanyii xaafee baay'ee xixinnoo waan ta'aniif akkasumas gadifageenya gabaabaa (sentimeetira 1-2) irratti facaafamuu waan qabaniif lafti qulqulluu fi lallaafaa ta'uu isaa mirkaneeffadhaa.
Guddina jalqabaatiif soorata barbaachisaa ta'e argachuuf yeroo facaafanitti xaa'oo DAP yookiin NPS gorfame fayyadamaa.

en: How much teff seed do I need per hectare for row planting?

Select young rams (6-12 months old) from local breeds like Horro or Blackhead Ogaden, as they respond well to intensive feeding.
Provide a balanced diet consisting of high-quality roughage and protein-rich concentrates such as noug cake or wheat bran.
Ensure all sheep are dewormed and vaccinated against common respiratory and local diseases before starting the fattening cycle.
am: ለተጠናከረ አመጋገብ ጥሩ ምላሽ የሚሰጡ እንደ ሆሮ ወይም ኦጋዴን ጥቁር ራስ ያሉ የአገር በቀል ዝርያ ያላቸውን ከ6-12 ወራት የሆኑ ወጣት ጥቦቶችን ይምረጡ።
ከፍተኛ ጥራት ያለው ድርቆሽ እና እንደ ኑግ ኬክ ወይም የስንዴ ፋጉሎ ያሉ በፕሮቲን የበለፀጉ የተከማቹ መኖዎችን ያካተተ የተመጣጠነ ምግብ ያቅርቡ።
የማድለብ ሂደቱን ከመጀመርዎ በፊት ሁሉም በጎች የትል መድኃኒት ማግኘታቸውን እና ለተለመዱ የመተንፈሻ አካላት እና አካባቢያዊ በሽታዎች መከተባቸውን ያረጋግጡ።
om: Hoolota qubsumaaf filataman kormaa umrii ji'a 6-12 ta'an sanyii biyya keessaa kan akka Horroo yookiin Blackhead Ogaden filadhaa.
Soorata madaalawaa kan akka hancufa qulqulluu fi nyaata dabalataa pirootinii qaban kan akka 'noug cake' yookiin 'wheat bran' dhiyeessaa.
Adeemsa gabbisuu jalqabuun dura hoolonni hundi qoricha mimmittii (worm) fudhachuu fi dhukkuboota naannoo fi sombaa ittisuuf talaallii fudhachuu isaanii mirkaneeffadhaa.

Only select combs that are at least 75% capped with white wax to ensure the honey is ripe and won't ferment during storage.
am: ማር መሰብሰብ ያለብዎት ማሩ በሚበስልበት እና የእርጥበት መጠኑ በሚቀንስበት በደረቅ ወቅት (ብዙውን ጊዜ ግንቦት-ሰኔ ወይም ጥቅምት-ህዳር) መሆን አለበት።
ንቦቹን ለማረጋጋት እንደ ደረቅ የላም ኩበት ወይም የጥድ ቅጠል ያሉ ተፈጥሯዊ ነገሮችን በመጠቀም ጭስ ይጠቀሙ፤ ነገር ግን የማሩን ጣዕም እንዳይቀይረው ከመጠን በላይ ጭስ አይጠቀሙ።
ማሩ መበሰሉን እና በሚቀመጥበት ጊዜ እንደማይበላሽ ለማረጋገጥ ቢያንስ 75% በነጭ ሰም የታሸጉ የማር እንጀራዎችን ብቻ ይምረጡ።
om: Yeroo damma sassaaban yeroo gogaa (yeroo baay'ee Caamsaa-Waxabajjii yookiin Onkoloolessa-Sadaasa) damma bilchaateefi jiidhinni isaa gadiaanaa ta'etti ta'uu qaba.
Kaniisa tasabbeessuuf kaniisa aarsituu (smoker) kan akka faldana loonii yookiin qola mukaa fayyadamaa, garuu mi'aa dammaa akka hin jijjiirreof aara baay'isuu irraa of qusadhaa.
Dammi bilchaachuu isaa fi yeroo kuusaa akka hin badne mirkaneeffachuuf gagura dammaa yoo xiqqaate %75 gilaala (wax) adbiidhaan cufame qofa filadhaa.

en: What are the best methods to separate honey from the wax combs?

am: ትክክለኛ ናሙና ለማግኘት በእርሻዎ ላይ ከ10-15 በሚሆኑ የተለያዩ ቦታዎች ላይ በዚግዛግ መንገድ የአፈር ናሙናዎችን ይሰብስቡ።
ለጥራጥሬ ሰብሎች ናሙናውን በ20 ሳ.ሜ ጥልቀት ይውሰዱ፤ ነገር ግን ውጤቱን ሊያዛቡ ከሚችሉ እንደ አጥር ጥግ፣ ከዛፍ ስር ወይም ከኩበት ክምር አጠገብ ያሉ ቦታዎችን ያስወግዱ።
ናሙናዎን ለክልላዊ የአፈር ምርመራ ላቦራቶሪዎች ያስረክቡ ወይም አፈርዎ የአሲድነት ማከሚያ (ኖራ) የሚያስፈልገው መሆኑን ለማወቅ የኤቲኤ (ATA) የአፈር ካርታን ያማክሩ።
om: Bakka bu'ummaa sirrii argachuuf maasii keessan keessaa bakka 10-15 ta'u irraa bifa 'zigzag' tiin deemuun qommoo kutaalee lafaa adda addaa irraa walitti qabaa.
Midhaan calayaatiif qommoo gadi fageenya sentimeetira 20 irraa fudhadhaa; garuu naannoo dallaa, jala mukaa, yookiin tuullaa xaa'oo uumamaa irraa fagaadhaa.
Qommoo keessan laaboratoorii qorannoo biyyee naannootiif kennaa yookiin biyyen keessan 'nuuraa' barbaaduu isaa adda baasuuf kaartaa biyyee ATA ilaalaa.

am: ከፍተኛ ምርት እና ነጭ ቀለም ለማግኘት እንደ 'ቁንጮ' ያሉ ወይም በተለያዩ አካባቢዎች የተሻለ ምርት የሚሰጡ እንደ 'ኮራ' ያሉ ምርጥ ዘሮችን ይምረጡ።
ዘሩ ወጥ የሆነ እድገት እንዲኖረው ከእንክርዳድ፣ ከአቧራ ወይም ከተሰባበሩ ዘሮች የጸዳ እና የተረጋገጠ መሆኑን ያረጋግጡ።
ዘሩን ከመዝራትዎ በፊት 100 ዘሮችን እርጥብ ጨርቅ ላይ በመነስነስ የመብቀል አቅሙን ይፈትሹ፤ ከ85 በታች ከበቀሉ ሌላ የዘር ምንጭ ይፈልጉ።
om: Oomishummaa olaanaafi bifa adii argachuuf sanyii fooyya'aa kan akka 'Qunchoo' yookiin naannoo adda addaatti kan danda'u 'Kooraa' filadhaa.
Sanyiin sun kumiin, biyyee fi sanyii haramaa irraa qulqulluu ta'uu isaa fi waraqaa ragaa qabaachuu isaa mirkaneeffadhaa.
Sanyii 100 huccuu jiidhaa irratti facasuun dandeettii biqiluu isaa madaalaa; yoo 85 gadi biqile sanyii biraa barbaaddadhaa.

om: Dhibee kana ittisuuf sanyiiwwan dhibee kana dandamatan kan Wiirtuu Qorannoo Qonnaa Jimmaatiin ba'an dhaabaa.
Akka qilleensii fi ifni aduu gahaa ta'e galuuf mukeen bunaa yeroo yeroon muree qulqulleessaa (pruning), kun dhibeen kun akka hin babal'anne gargaara.

am: ቁስሉ እንዳይመረቅ በአፋጣኝ በንጹህ ውሃ እና በሳሙና በመታጠብ አፈርን፣ ቆሻሻን ወይም ኬሚካሎችን ያስወግዱ።

Yoo madaaan sun meeshaa sibiilaa waayee'een yookiin biyyee xuraawaan dhufe ta'e, talaallii 'tetanus' fudhachuuf gara buufata fayyaa deemaa.

om: Anniisaa fi aanan gahaa argachuuf nyaata madaalawaa kan akka kudraafi muduraa, killee fi aannan soorachuu qabdu.

am: በቂ ዝናብ በሚጀምርበት ወቅት ቢያንስ ሁለት 'አይኖች' ወይም ብቅ ያሉ ክፍሎች ያሏቸውን ጤናማ ዝንጅብሎች ከ5-10 ሳ.ሜ ጥልቀት ላይ ይትከሉ፡፡

በተለይም በደቡብ ምዕራብ ኢትዮጵያ ከፍተኛ ዝናብ በሚኖርባቸው አካባቢዎች የዝንጅብል ስር እንዳይበሰብስ የአፈር የውሃ ፍሳሽ የተስተካከለ መሆኑን ያረጋግጡ።
om: Jalqaba waqtii roobaa irratti jinnjibiloota fayyaalessa ta'anii fi ija (buds) yoo xiqqaate lama qaban gadi fageenya sentimeetira 5-10tti dhaabaa.
Inni jiidha akka hin dhabneefi aramaa ittisuuf akkuma dhaabdaniin marga gogaa yookiin baalaan irra uffisaa (mulching).
Keessattuu naannoolee rooba jabaa qaban kan akka Kibba-Lixaa Itoophiyaatti kofli jinjibilaa akka hin rimeenyef bishaan dhangala'uuf karaa qabaachuu isaa mirkaneeffadhaa.

om: Saliitni yeroo baalli isaa gara keellootti jijjiiramuufi kofli isaa inni jalaa gara dunaatti jijjiiramu sassaabamuu qaba, garuu sanyiin akka hin dhangalaaneef utuu kofli hin banamin dura ta'uu qaba.

om: Akka hin rimeenyefi dhibee 'Aflatoxin' irraa eeguuf, qaraasasicha kallattiin lafa irratti gogsuu dhiistanii meeshaa ol-ka'aa (racks) yookiin kofia qulqulluu irratti gogsaa.

om: Biyyeen keessan 'nitrogen' uumamaa akka argatuuf, keessattuu utuu boqqoolloo hin dhaabin dura soyibiinii maasii keessatti jijjiiraa dhaabaa (crop rotation).
Humni isaa 'nitrogen' maddisiisuu akka dabaluuf, utuu hin dhaabin dura sanyicha xaa'oo baayolojikaalaa 'Rhizobium' jedhamuun walitti makuu fayyadamaa.
Biyyeen akka gabbatuuf, erga callaa sassaabdanii booda hambaa soyibiinii (baalaafi jirma) maasii keessatti dhiisaa akka riqu godhaa.

om: Oomisha guddaa argachuufi gabaa alaatiif fudhatama qabaachuuf sanyiiwwan fooyya'an kan akka 'Awaash-2' yookiin 'Naasiir' fayyadamaa.

Modern hives produce pure liquid honey that earns a higher price in the export and premium markets compared to the mixed-wax honey from traditional hives.
am: ዘመናዊ ቀፎዎች (እንደ ዛንደር ያሉ) በዓመት ከ20-30 ኪ.ግ ማር ሊሰጡ ይችላሉ፤ ይህም ከባህላዊ ቀፎ ከሚገኘው ከ5-8 ኪ.ግ እጅግ የላቀ ነው።
ዘመናዊ ቀፎዎች የማር እንጀራውን ሳይሰብሩ ወይም ንቦቹን ሳይገድሉ የንብ መንጋውን ለበሽታ እና ለተባይ ለመመርመር ያስችላሉ።
ዘመናዊ ቀፎዎች የሚሰጡት ማር ንጹህ በመሆኑ ከባህላዊ ቀፎ ከሚገኘው ሰም ከተቀላቀለበት ማር ይልቅ በውጭ እና በሀገር ውስጥ ገበያ የተሻለ ዋጋ ያወጣሉ።
om: Gagurri ammayyaa (kan akka Zander) callaa dammaa kiilogiraama 20-30 kenna; kunis gagura aadaa kan callaa 5-8 kennaa irra baay'ee caala.
Gagurri ammayyaa gagura utuu hin cabsiin kaniisota dhibee fi kukkubiirraa to'achuuf isin gargaara.
Dammi gagura ammayyaa irraa argamu qulqulluu waan ta'eef, gabaa biyya keessaa fi alaatti damma gagura aadaa irraa gatii ol-aanaatti gurgurama.

Separate new birds from your existing flock for at least 14 days to ensure they are not carrying the virus.
am: ዶሮዎችዎን ከጅምላ ሞት ለመታደግ በየ 3-4 ወሩ HB1 ወይም LaSota የተባሉ ክትባቶችን በመጠቀም መደበኛ የክትባት መርሃ ግብር ይከተሉ።
ወደ ዶሮ ቤት የሚገቡ ሰዎችን በመገደብ እና በበሩ ላይ የጫማ መርገጫ ኬሚካል (disinfectant) በመጠቀም ጥንቃቄ ያድርጉ።
አዲስ የሚገዙ ዶሮዎች ቫይረሱን አለመሸከማቸውን ለማረጋገጥ ከነባር ዶሮዎች ጋር ከመቀላቀልዎ በፊት ቢያንስ ለ14 ቀናት ለይተው ያስቀምጡ።
om: Lukkuuwwan du'a wal-irraa hin cinne irraa eeguuf, talaallii HB1 yookiin LaSota ji'a 3-4tti kennuun sagantaa talaallii hordofaa.
Namoota gara mannee lukkuu seenan daangessuufi balbala irratti qoricha dhibee ittisu (footbath) fayyadamuun qulqullina eeggadhaa.
Lukkuuwwan haaraa bitaman dhukkuba qabaachuu dhiisuu isaanii mirkaneeffachuuf guyyoota 14f addatti baasaa tursiisaa.

am: የአይን ዝንቦችን የሚስቡ ፈሳሾችን ለማስወገድ በቀን ቢያንስ ሁለት ጊዜ የህፃናትን ፊት በንጹህ ውሃ እና በሳሙና ይታጠቡ።

በሽታውን የሚያስተላልፉ ዝንቦች የሚራቡባቸውን ቦታዎች ለመቀነስ የሰው እና የእንስሳት ቆሻሻን በአግባቡ በሽንት ቤት ያስወግዱ።
om: Tidii ijaa kan titiisa ijaa hawwatan dhabamsiisuuf guyyaatti yoo xiqqaate si'a lama bishaan qulqulluu fi saamunaadhaan fuula ijoollee dhiqaa.
Tooftaa SAFE (Baqaqsanii yaaluu, Qoricha farra baakteriyaa, Qulqullina fuulaa fi Fooyya'iinsa naannoo) jedhamu fayyadamuun dhibee tiraakoomaa hawaasa keessaa dhabamsiisaa.
Titiisni dhibee kana dabarsan akka hin rimeenyef xurii namaa fi beeyladaa sirnaan boolla xuriitti gataa.

am: ሁሉንም የግብርና ኬሚካሎች ከምግብ፣ ከእህል እና ከውሃ ምንጮች ሙሉ በሙሉ በተለየ ሊቆለፍ በሚችል ቁምሳጥን ወይም ቤት ውስጥ ያስቀምጡ።

om: Keemikaalota qonnaa hunda nyaata, callaa fi maddeen bishaanirraa fageessuun saanduqoota yookiin mana cufamaa (funguramee) keessa kaa'aa.
Qoricha farra aramaa fi ilbiisotaa akka dhugaatii yookiin zayita nyaataatti hin shakkamneef, meeshaa ittiin bitamee fi mallattoo isaa wajjin tursiisaa.
Akka tasaa balaan summii akka hin uumamneef, bakki kuusaa qilleensa gahaa qabaachuu isaa fi ijoollee fi loon irraa fagaachuu isaa mirkaneeffadhaa.

am: ለፈጣን እድገት እህሎችን፣ ጥራጥሬዎችን፣ ፍራፍሬዎችን/አትክልቶችን እና የእንስሳት ተዋጽኦዎችን (ስጋ፣ እንቁላል ወይም ወተት) የያዘ 'ባለ አራት ኮከብ' ምግብ ያቅርቡ።

ከተለያዩ ምግቦች የሚገኙ አስፈላጊ ቪታሚኖች እና ማዕድናት የልጁን የአንጎል እድገት እና በትምህርት የመሳካት ብቃቱን ያሻሽላሉ።

Sooranni madaalawaan guddina ijoollee hammatamuu (stunting) fi huqqachuu irraa ittisa; kunis rakkoo fayyaa ijoollee naannoo baadiyyaa Itoophiyaati.

om: Hir'ina dhangala'aa qaamaa beekuuf gubbaa mataa (taasuu) fi iji mucaa gadi fagaachuu isaa to'adhaa.
Mucaan sun yoo garmalee nuffe, hirribni itti baay'ate, yookiin afaan gogee imimmaan malee booyu ta'e dhibee kanaan qabamuu isaa madaalaa.
Mallattolee kana yoo argitan hatattamaan ashaboo fi sukkaara bishaanitti makuun (ORS) kennuun gara buufata fayyaa geessaa.

am: በክረምት ወቅት የሚመጣውን ዝናብ ወደ በርሜሎች ወይም የከርሰ ምድር ታንኮች ለመሰብሰብ እና በደረቅ ወራት ለመጠቀም በቆርቆሮ ክዳን ላይ የውሃ መውረጃ ቦይ (ጉተሮች) ይገጥሙ።

om: Bishaan roobaa waqtii gannaa sassaabuuf qorqorroo irratti ujummoo (gutters) hidhuun barmeelota yookiin taankii lafa jalaa keessatti kuusaa.

Place the sacks in a sunny area near the kitchen to make use of greywater (from washing vegetables) for daily irrigation.
am: ያገለገሉ ማዳበሪያዎችን በለም አፈር እና በኮምፖስት ድብልቅ ይሙሉ። ውሃ በደንብ እንዲገባ ለማድረግ መሃል ላይ ቀዳዳ ያለው ቱቦ ወይም ጠጠር ያድርጉ።
በአነስተኛ ቦታ ላይ ብዙ ምርት ለማግኘት በማዳበሪያው ጎኖች ላይ ትናንሽ ቀዳዳዎችን በመቅደድ እንደ ቆስጣ ወይም ጎመን ያሉ ተክሎችን ይትከሉ፡፡
ዕለታዊ ውኃ ለማጠጣት እንዲመችዎ ማዳበሪያዎቹን ለፀሐይ ብርሃን በሚጋለጥ እና ከኩሽና አቅራቢያ ባለ ቦታ ላይ ያስቀምጧቸው።
om: Keeshaalee (shillaala) callaa tajaajila kenne biyyee gabbataa fi xaa'oo uumamaatiin guutaa; jidduu isaa immoo ujummoo qulqulluu bishaan itti naqan kaa'aa.
Bakka dhiphaa keessatti oomisha baay'ee argachuuf maddii keeshaa sanaa irratti qoollaa baasuun raafuu yookiin mijuu garaagaraa dhaabaa.
Guyyaa guyyaatti bishaan dhiqannaa kudraalee irra hafuun obaasuuf manatti dhiyeessanii bakka aduu argatutti kaa'uun ni danda'ama.

en: What type of soil mix is best for sack gardening?

Mix one tablespoon of mild soap with one liter of water and spray it directly on the aphids to suffocate them without harming the plants.
Create a natural spray by soaking crushed garlic and hot chili peppers in water overnight; strain the liquid and spray it on infested leaves.
Check under the leaves regularly and use a strong stream of water to wash away aphids before their population grows too large.
am: አንድ የሾርባ ማንኪያ መለስተኛ ሳሙና ከአንድ ሊትር ውሃ ጋር በመቀላቀል ተክሉን ሳይጎዱ ተባዮቹን ለማጥፋት በቀጥታ በተባዮቹ ላይ ይርጩ።
የተፈጨ ነጭ ሽንኩርት እና የሚቃጠል ቃሪያ በአንድ ሊትር ውሃ ውስጥ በአንድ አዳር ዘፍዝፈው በማሳደር ጭማቂውን በተጠቁ ቅጠሎች ላይ ይርጩ።
የተባዮች ቁጥር ከመጠን በላይ ከመጨመሩ በፊት ሁልጊዜ ከቅጠሎች ስር በመፈተሽ በከፍተኛ የውሃ ግፊት በማጠብ ያስወግዷቸው።
om: Kuduraa keessan osoo hin miidhin ilbiisota kana balleessuuf, saamunaa lallaafaa fal'ana tokko bishaan liitira tokkoon makuun irra facaasaa.
Qullubbii adii fi qaraasisaa erga daaktanii booda bishaan keessa bulchanii dhimbiibuun baala ilbiisni qabe irratti facaasaa.
Baala jala yeroo hunda to'achuun osoo isaan hin baay'atin humna bishaaniitti fayyadamuun dhiqanii gatuun ni danda'ama.

en: Will garlic spray affect the taste of my vegetables?
How often should I apply soap spray to completely remove aphids?
Are there beneficial insects that eat aphids in Ethiopia?
Avoid planting the same crop (like maize) on the same plot every year; instead, follow it with a nitrogen-fixing legume like beans or peas.
Divide your field into four sections and rotate crops in a cycle: cereal, legume, root crop, and fallow or green manure.
Rotation breaks the life cycle of pests and diseases that live in the soil, reducing the need for expensive chemical pesticides.
am: በየአመቱ አንድ አይነት ሰብል (ለምሳሌ በቆሎ) በአንድ ማሳ ላይ ከመዝራት ይቆጠቡ፤ በምትኩ ናይትሮጅን በሚተኩ እንደ ቦሎቄ ወይም አተር ባሉ ጥራጥሬዎች ይተኩት።
ማሳዎን በአራት ቦታ በመክፈል ሰብሎችን በፈራቃ ይዝሩ፡ ለምሳሌ ጥራጥሬ፣ እህል፣ ስርወ-አትክልት እና መሬቱን እንዲያርፍ ማድረግ።
የሰብል ፈራቃ በአፈር ውስጥ የሚኖሩ ተባዮችን እና በሽታዎችን የእድገት ዑደት በማቋረጥ ውድ የሆኑ ኬሚካሎችን አስፈላጊነት ይቀንሳል።
om: Waggaa hunda maasii tokko irratti gosa midhaan tokkoo (fkn boqqoolloo) dhaabuu dhiisaa; bakka isaa sanyii niitrojinii deebisan kan akka daangulee dhaabaa.
Maasii keessan bakka afuritti qooduun midhaan callaa, daangulee, kudraalee jirmaa fi lafa boqochiisuun wal-jijjiiraa dhaabaa.
Midhaan wal-jijjiiruun ilbiisotaa fi dhibeewwan biyyee keessa turan balleessee gatii keemikaalaaf baasani ni hir'isa.

en: Which crops are considered the best 'soil improvers' in Ethiopia?
Can I use crop rotation in a very small backyard garden?
How many years should a full rotation cycle last?
Use hermetic bags (like PICS bags) to store maize, wheat, or teff; these bags block oxygen, which naturally kills insects and weevils.
Dry the grain thoroughly (below 13% moisture) before sealing the bag to prevent mold growth and maintain grain quality for over a year.
Check the bags for any punctures or holes caused by rodents, as even a small hole allows oxygen in and permits insects to survive.
am: በቆሎን፣ ስንዴን ወይም ጤፍን ለማከማቸት አየር የማያስገቡ ከረጢቶችን (ለምሳሌ PICS) ይጠቀሙ፤ እነዚህ ከረጢቶች ኦክስጅንን በመከልከል ተባዮችን በተፈጥሮ ያጠፋሉ።
የሻጋታ እድገትን ለመከላከል እና የእህሉን ጥራት ከአንድ አመት በላይ ለመጠበቅ እህሉን ወደ ከረጢቱ ከመክተትዎ በፊት በሚገባ (ከ13% እርጥበት በታች) ያድርቁት።
ከረጢቶቹ በአይጥ ወይም በሌላ ነገር አለመቀደዳቸውን ያረጋግጡ፤ ምክንያቱም ትንሽ ቀዳዳ እንኳን አየር እንዲገባ ስለሚያደርግ ተባዮች እንዲራቡ ያደርጋል።
om: Boqqoolloo, qamadii yookiin xaafee kuusuuf korojoo qilleensa hin galchine (PICS) fayyadamaa; kun qilleensa dhorkuun ilbiisota uumamaan ajjeesa.
Midhaan sun akka hin rimneefi qulqullinni isaa akka eegamuuf, utuu hin naqin dura jiidhinni isaa %13 gadi ta'uu isaa mirkaneeffadhaa.
Hantuunni akka hin nyanne to'adhaa; qoollaan xiqqoon yoo uumame qilleensi galee ilbiisota deebisee uumuu danda'a.

en: Where can I buy certified PICS bags in my local market?

How can I test if my grain is dry enough for hermetic storage?
Use vine tip cuttings about 30cm long; tip cuttings grow faster and are less likely to carry pests compared to the older middle parts of the vine.
Plant vines on ridges or mounds (30-40cm high) to provide loose soil for tuber expansion and to prevent waterlogging during heavy rains.
Insert the cutting at a 45-degree angle with at least 3-4 nodes buried in the soil to ensure strong root development and high tuber yield.
am: ወደ 30 ሳ.ሜ ርዝመት ያላቸውን የጫፍ ቅርንጫፎች ይጠቀሙ፤ የጫፍ ቅርንጫፎች በፍጥነት ያድጋሉ እንዲሁም ከቅርንጫፉ መካከለኛ ክፍል ይልቅ በተባይ የመጠቃት እድላቸው አነስተኛ ነው።
ድንቹ እንዲወፍር እና በከባድ ዝናብ ወቅት ውሃ እንዳይቋጠር ቅርንጫፎቹን ከ30-40 ሳ.ሜ ከፍታ ባላቸው ቦዮች ወይም ድልድል ላይ ይትከሉ፡፡
ጠንካራ ስር እንዲኖረው እና የተሻለ ምርት እንዲሰጥ ቅርንጫፉን በ45 ዲግሪ ዘንበል አድርገው ቢያንስ ከ3-4 የሚሆኑ መገጣጠሚያዎች (nodes) በአፈር ውስጥ እንዲቀበሩ ያድርጉ።
om: Mutiin inchinnicha mi'aawaa (sweet potato) kan fiixee irraa murame sentimeetira 30 ta'u fayyadamaa; kun hatattamaan biqila, ilbiisotaanis hin qabamu.
Dinnichi sun akka furdatuufi bishaan akka hin ciisneef, tuullaa biyyee (ridges) sentimeetira 30-40 ol-ka'aa ta'e irratti dhaabaa.
Mutiin sun hundee jabaa akka baasuuf, koflee digrii 45n gadi garagalchuun mormi isaa (nodes) 3-4 biyyee keessa akka lixu godhaa.

en: How long does it take for sweet potatoes to be ready for harvest?
What are the best orange-fleshed sweet potato varieties for nutrition?
How do I store sweet potato vines if I am not ready to plant them immediately?
Only plant cassava cuttings from healthy-looking mother plants that show no leaf yellowing or curling to avoid starting with infected material.
Obtain disease-resistant varieties developed by the Ethiopian Institute of Agricultural Research (EIAR) which can withstand the mosaic virus.
Uproot and burn any plants that show symptoms early in the season to prevent whiteflies from spreading the virus to healthy neighboring plants.
am: በበሽታው የተጠቃ ተክል ላለመጠቀም ቅጠላቸው ያልተጠመዘዘ ወይም ያልቢጫነ ጤናማ ከሆኑ እናቶች ተክሎች ላይ ብቻ ቀንበጦችን ይውሰዱ።
የኢትዮጵያ የግብርና ምርምር ኢንስቲትዩት (EIAR) ያወጣቸውን እና ቫይረሱን መቋቋም የሚችሉ ዝርያዎችን ተጠቅመው ይዝሩ።
ነጭ ዝንቦች ቫይረሱን ወደ ጤናማ ተክሎች እንዳያሰራጩ ለማድረግ የበሽታ ምልክት የታየባቸውን ተክሎች ነቅለው ያቃጥሉ።
om: Dhibee kanaan akka hin qabamneef, mormii (cuttings) kaasaavaa mukeen baalli isaanii hin dacha'iniifi hin keelloofne irraa qofa fudhadhaa.
Sanyiiwwan dhibee kana danda'an kan Wiirtuu Qorannoo Qonnaa Itoophiyaatiin (EIAR) fooyya'an fayyadamaa.
Titiisni adiin dhibee kana akka hin babal'ifneef, mukka mallattoo dhibee agarsiise hatattamaan buqqisuun gubaa.

en: What do whiteflies look like and how can I control them naturally?

Never apply fresh manure directly to crops; allow it to decompose (rot) for at least 3-6 months to kill pathogens and weed seeds.
Mix manure with dry leaves or straw and keep it moist in a shaded pit to create high-quality compost that releases nutrients slowly.
Apply well-rotted manure during land preparation, mixing it into the top 15cm of soil to improve both fertility and water retention.
am: ትኩስ የእንስሳት ኩበትን በቀጥታ በተክሎች ላይ አይጠቀሙ፤ በሽታ አምጪ ተህዋሲያንን እና የአረም ዘሮችን ለማጥፋት ቢያንስ ለ 3-6 ወራት እንዲበሰብስ ያድርጉ።
ኩበትን ከደረቅ ቅጠሎች ወይም ከሣር ጋር በመቀላቀል እና ጥላ ባለው ጉድጓድ ውስጥ እርጥበቱን ጠብቆ እንዲበሰብስ በማድረግ ጥራት ያለው ኮምፖስት ያዘጋጁ።
የአፈርን ለምነት እና ውሃ የመያዝ አቅምን ለማሻሻል በሚገባ የበሰበሰውን ኩበት መሬት በሚዘጋጅበት ወቅት ከላይኛው 15 ሳ.ሜ አፈር ጋር ቀላቅለው ይጠቀሙ።
om: Dhoqqee loonii haaraa kallattiin midhaan irratti hin naqinaa; akka rimeenyuufi sanyii haramaa balleessuuf ji'a 3-6 tursiisaa.
Dhoqqee sana baala gogaa yookiin cidii wajjin makuun bakka gaaddidduu qabuun jiisuun xaa'oo uumamaa (compost) qulqulluu qopheessaa.
Xaa'oo rimeenye kana yeroo lafa qopheessitan biyyee gubbaa sentimeetira 15 wajjin walitti makuun gabbina lafaa dabalaa.

en: Which animal manure (cattle, sheep, or chicken) is the richest in nitrogen?
How can I tell when my compost pile is fully ready to use?
Is it better to use manure as a liquid fertilizer (manure tea) for vegetables?
Cover the soil surface around plants with a 5-10cm layer of dried grass, straw, or crop residues to block direct sunlight and reduce evaporation.
Avoid using fresh weeds with seeds as mulch, as they will sprout and compete with your crops for water and nutrients.
During the dry season in Ethiopia, mulching helps maintain a stable soil temperature and provides food for beneficial earthworms.
am: የፀሐይ ብርሃንን ለመከላከል እና ትነትን ለመቀነስ በተክሎች ዙሪያ ያለውን አፈር ከ5-10 ሳ.ሜ ውፍረት ባለው ደረቅ ሣር፣ ጭድ ወይም የሰብል ተረፈ-ምርት ይሸፍኑ።
ዘር ያላቸውን አረሞች ለሽፋን (mulch) አይጠቀሙ፤ ምክንያቱም በቀላሉ በቅለው ከሰብሉ ጋር ውሃ እና ንጥረ ነገር ሊሻሙ ይችላሉ።
በደረቅ ወቅት የአፈርን ሙቀት ለመጠበቅ እና ጠቃሚ ለሆኑ የምድር ትሎች ምግብ እንዲሆን አፈርን መሸፈን (mulching) በጣም አስፈላጊ ነው።
om: Adduu irraa ittisuufi jiidha biyyee eeguuf, hundee biqilaa jala sentimeetira 5-10 marga gogaa yookiin hancufaan uffisaa.
Harama sanyii qabu haguuggiif (mulch) hin fayyadaminaa; kun biqilee midhaan keessan jalaa bishaan soorata fixa.
Waqtii gogaa Itoophiyaa keessatti, haguuggiin (mulching) ho'a biyyee madaaluufi raammoo lafaatiif soorata ta'uun biyyee gabbisa.

en: Can mulching attract pests like termites or rodents to my field?
Is it necessary to remove the mulch before applying fertilizer?
Which crop residues are best for mulching in highland areas?
Healthy soil is usually dark in color, has an earthy smell, and crumbles easily; sick soil may look pale, smell sour, or stay in hard dry clumps.
Look for the presence of earthworms; seeing more than 5 earthworms in a single spade of soil is a sign of high organic matter and health.
Observe plant growth: stunted plants with yellowish leaves in a well-watered field often indicate soil nutrient exhaustion or high acidity.
am: ጤናማ አፈር አብዛኛውን ጊዜ ጥቁር ቀለም አለው፣ ጥሩ መዓዛ አለው እንዲሁም በቀላሉ ይፈረፈራል፤ የታመመ አፈር ግን የገረጣ፣ ጎምዛዛ ሽታ ያለው ወይም ደረቅ እና ጠንካራ ሊሆን ይችላል።
የምድር ትሎች መኖራቸውን ያረጋግጡ፤ በአንድ አካፋ አፈር ውስጥ ከ5 በላይ ትሎችን ማግኘት የአፈሩ ለምነት እና ጤናማነት ምልክት ነው።
የተክል እድገትን ይመልከቱ፡ በቂ ውሃ ባለበት ቦታ ተክሉ ካልደገገ ወይም ቅጠሉ ከቢጫነ የአፈር ንጥረ ነገር መሟጠጥን ወይም የአሲድነት መጨመርን ያሳያል።
om: Biyyeen fayyaa qabu bifa gurraacha, foolii gaariifi lallaafaa dha; biyyeen dhukkubsate immoo bifa adii fakkaatu, foolii badaa yookiin jabaa dha.
Raammoo lafaa (earthworms) to'adhaa; yoo qommoo tokko keessatti raammoo 5 ol argattan biyyichi gabbataa fi fayyaa ta'uu isaati.
Guddina midhaanii hordofaa: bishaan gahaa utuu qabuu yoo midhaan biqiluu dide yookiin baalli keelloofne, sooratni biyyee keessaa dhumeera jechuudha.

en: How can I fix soil that has become too hard and compacted?

Construct elevated slatted floors (locally called 'Kot') to allow manure and urine to fall through, keeping the goats dry and reducing hoof rot.
Ensure the house has adequate ventilation to prevent respiratory diseases, but protect goats from direct cold winds and rain.
Provide at least 1.5 square meters of space per adult goat to prevent overcrowding and the rapid spread of external parasites like lice and mites.
am: ፍየሎቹ ደረቅ እንዲሆኑ እና የግርጌ መበስበስን ለመከላከል ኩበት እና ሽንት ወደ ታች የሚወርድበት ከፍ ያለ የቆጥ ወለል ይገንቡ።
ለመተንፈሻ አካላት በሽታዎችን ለመከላከል ቤቱ በቂ አየር እንዲኖረው ያድርጉ፤ ነገር ግን ፍየሎቹን ከቀጥታ ቀዝቃዛ ነፋስ እና ከዝናብ ይጠብቁ።
የመተፋፈግን እና እንደ ቅማል ያሉ ተባዮች ስርጭትን ለመቀከላከል ለአንድ ትልቅ ፍየል ቢያንስ 1.5 ስኩዌር ሜትር ቦታ ይስጡ።
om: Reeonni gogaa akka ta'anii fi dhibee faanaa (hoof rot) irraa eeguuf, bakka dhoqqeenii fi fincaan jalaan dhangala'u 'Qooxii' ol-ka'aa ijaaraa.
Dhibee sombaa ittisuuf manni sun qilleensa gahaa qabaachuu isaa mirkaneeffadhaa; garuu bubbee qabbanaawaa fi rooba irraa eegaa.
Wal-irra bu'iinsaa fi dhibee akka 'injiraan' dhabamsiisuuf, reee ga'eesssa tokkoof yoo xiqqaate bakka bal'ina 'square meter' 1.5 qabu qopheessaa.

en: What are the best local materials for building a low-cost goat house?

Cross-bred offspring (hybrids) grow faster and reach maturity earlier than local breeds, allowing for quicker returns on investment.
Hybrids combine the high productivity of exotic breeds with the heat and disease resistance of local Ethiopian cattle.
am: የአገር በቀል የዘቡ ዝርያዎችን እንደ ሆልስታይን-ፍሪዥያ ካሉ ዝርያዎች ጋር ማዳቀል ዕለታዊ የወተት ምርትን በከፍተኛ ሁኔታ ይጨምራል።
የተዳቀሉ ዝርያዎች ከአገር በቀል ዝርያዎች በበለጠ ፍጥነት ያድጋሉ እንዲሁም ለምርት ዝግጁ ይሆናሉ፤ ይህም ኢንቨስትመንቱን በፍጥነት ለመመለስ ይረዳል።
ድቅል ዝርያዎች የውጭ ዝርያዎችን ከፍተኛ ምርታማነት እና የሀገር በቀል ዝርያዎችን የአየር ንብረት እና የበሽታ መቋቋም አቅም በአንድ ላይ ይይዛሉ።
om: Sa'a biyya keessaa (Zebu) sanyii alaa kan akka 'Holstein-Friesian' wajjin wal-makuun oomisha aannanii guyyaa guyyaatti argamu baay'ee dabala.
Sanyiiwwan wal-makuun dhalatan sanyii biyya keessaa caalaatti hatattamaan guddatu; kunis bu'aa ariitiin argachuuf gargaara.
Sanyiin wal-makuun dhalatan dandeettii oomishummaa sanyii alaa fi dandeettii dhibee dandamachuu sanyii biyya keessaa walitti qabatu.

Mix local energy sources like maize or sorghum with protein concentrates like soybean meal or noug cake to maintain steady egg-laying.
Ensure laying hens have access to clean water at all times, as even a short period without water can stop egg production for several days.
am: ጠንካራ የእንቁላል ቅርፊት እንዲኖር እና ዶሮዎቹ የገዛ እንቁላላቸውን እንዳይበሉ እንደ ተፈጨ የእንቁላል ቅርፊት ወይም የኖራ ድንጋይ ያሉ በካልሲየም የበለፀጉ ምግቦችን ያቅርቡ።
ቋሚ የእንቁላል ምርት እንዲኖር እንደ በቆሎ ወይም ማሽላ ያሉ የሃይል ምንጮችን እንደ አኩሪ አተር ወይም የኑግ ኬክ ካሉ የፕሮቲን መኖዎች ጋር ቀላቅለው ይመግቡ።
እንቁላል ጣይ ዶሮዎች ሁልጊዜ ንጹህ ውሃ ማግኘታቸውን ያረጋግጡ፤ ምክንያቱም ለጥቂት ጊዜ እንኳን ውሃ ማጣት ለቀናት የእንቁላል ምርትን ሊያቋርጥ ይችላል።
om: Qola hanqaaquu jabaa argachuufi lukkuun hanqaaquu ofii akka hin nyaanneef, soorata kaalsiyamii qaban kan akka qola hanqaaquu daakamee kennuufii barbaachisa.
Oomisha hanqaaquu wal-irra hin cinne argachuuf, soorata annisaa (boqqoolloo/mishinga) fi pirootinii (soyibiinii/nuugii) walitti makuun kennaa.
Lukkuun hanqaaquu buustu yeroo hunda bishaan qulqulluu argachuu qabdi; bishaan dhabuun guyyoota hedduuf oomisha hanqaaquu dhaabsiisuu danda'a.

am: በድንገት የሚታዩ የባህሪ ለውጦችን ልብ ይበሉ፤ ለምሳሌ በውሾች ላይ ከፍተኛ ጠበኝነት ወይም በዱር እንስሳት እና በከብቶች ላይ ያልተለመደ የባህሪ መለወጥ።
ከመጠን በላይ ምራቅ መዝለብዘብ እና ለመዋጥ መቸገርን ልብ ይበሉ፤ ይህም ብዙውን ጊዜ እንስሳቱ መብላት ወይም መጠጣት እንዲያቆሙ ያደርጋል።
የእብድ ውሻ በሽታ ገዳይ እና ወደ ሰው ሊተላለፍ የሚችል ነው፤ ጥርጣሬ ካለዎት እንስሳውን ወዲያውኑ ለይተው ያስቀምጡ እና ለእንስሳት ህክምና ባለሙያ ያሳውቁ።
om: Jijjiirama amalaa tasaa hordofaa; fakkeenyaaf saree irratti garmalee loluu yookiin beeyladoota biraa irratti amala kanaan dura hin beekamne agarsiisuu.
Gorora garmalee dhangalaasuu fi nyaata liqimsuu dadhabuu to'adhaa; kunis beeyladni sun akka nyaata fi bishaan dhiisu godha.
Dhibeen kun nama ajjeesuu fi gara namatti darbuu danda'a; yoo shakkii qabaattan beeylada sana kophatti baasuun ogeessa fayyaa beeyladaa qunnamaa.

Bury the carcass at least 2 meters deep and far away from water sources (wells, rivers) to prevent contaminating the community's water.
Cover the carcass with lime (Nora) before filling the hole with soil to speed up decomposition and kill harmful bacteria or spores.
Avoid skinning or opening a dead animal of unknown cause, as this can release infectious diseases like Anthrax into the air and soil.
am: የማህበረሰቡን ውሃ እንዳይበክል የሞተውን እንስሳ ቢያንስ 2 ሜትር ጥልቀት ባለው ጉድጓድ ውስጥ እና ከውሃ ምንጮች (ጉድጓዶች፣ ወንዞች) ርቆ ይቅበሩ።
የበሰበሰውን ሬሳ በአፈር ከመሙላትዎ በፊት በኖራ ይሸፍኑት፤ ይህም ሬሳው በፍጥነት እንዲበሰብስ እና ጎጂ ባክቴሪያዎችን እንዲገድል ይረዳል።
በምን ምክንያት እንደሞተ የማይታወቅን እንስሳ ቆዳ አይንኩ ወይም አይክፈቱ፤ ምክንያቱም እንደ ቁርባ (Anthrax) ያሉ ተላላፊ በሽታዎችን ወደ አየር እና አፈር ሊያሰራጭ ይችላል።
om: Maddeen bishaanootaa akka hin xuroofneef, reeffa beeyladaa gadi fageenya meetira 2 boolla qotanii bakka bishaan irraa fagaatetti awwaalaa.
Boolla sana biyyee itti deebisuun dura 'nuuraa' (lime) irratti naqaa; kun akka hatattamaan riquufi baakteriyaa akka ajjeesu gargaara.
Beeylada sababa hin beekamneen du'e gogaa irraa hin baasinaa yookiin hin baninaa; kun dhibee akka 'Abba-Sanga' (Anthrax) qilleensa keessatti facaasuu danda'a.

Eat red teff injera regularly, as it contains significantly higher iron levels than white teff, helping to prevent anemia during pregnancy.
Consume animal products like liver, kidney, and lean meat at least once a week to provide highly absorbable heme-iron for the developing baby.
Combine iron-rich plant foods like kale (gomen) or lentils with Vitamin C sources like oranges or lemons to increase iron absorption.
am: በእርግዝና ወቅት የደም ማነስን ለመከላከል ነጭ ጤፍ ካለው የብረት ማዕድን ይልቅ ከፍተኛ የብረት ማዕድን ይዘት ያለውን ቀይ ጤፍ አዘውትረው ይመገቡ።
ለጽንሱ እድገት የሚረዳ እና በሰውነት በቀላሉ የሚመጠጥ የብረት ማዕድን ለማግኘት እንደ ጉበት፣ ኩላሊት እና ስጋ ያሉ የእንስሳት ተዋጽኦዎችን ቢያንስ በሳምንት አንድ ጊዜ ይመገቡ።
የብረት ማዕድን መምጠጥን ለመጨመር እንደ ጎመን ወይም ምስር ያሉ ምግቦችን ከቪታሚን ሲ ምንጮች (እንደ ብርቱካን ወይም ሎሚ) ጋር አጣምረው ይመገቡ።
om: Ulfa keessatti hir'ina dhiigaa ittisuuf injera xaafee diimaa sooradhaa; xaafeen diimaan xaafee adii caalaa sibiila (iron) baay'ee qaba.
Guddina mucaatiif sibiila qaaman salphaatti fudhatamu argachuuf, torbanitti si'a tokko tiruu, kalee yookiin foon soorachuun baay'ee barbaachisaadha.
Sibiilli akka qaama keessatti madaalamuuf, nyaata akka raafuu fi misiraa 'Vitamin C' (ብርቱካን yookiin loomi) wajjin walitti makuun sooradhaa.

Always boil water for at least one minute and let it cool before mixing it with infant formula to kill harmful bacteria and parasites.
Use only clean, protected water sources; never use untreated river or pond water, which can cause severe diarrhea and dehydration in babies.

am: ጎጂ ባክቴሪያዎችን እና ጥገኛ ተህዋሲያንን ለመግደል ውሃውን ከህጻናት ወተት ጋር ከመቀላቀልዎ በፊት ቢያንስ ለአንድ ደቂቃ ያፍሉት እና እንዲቀዘቅዝ ያድርጉ።
ንጹህ እና የተጠበቁ የውሃ ምንጮችን ብቻ ይጠቀሙ፤ በህጻናት ላይ ከፍተኛ ተቅማጥ እና የፈሳሽ እጥረት ሊያስከትሉ የሚችሉ ያልታከሙ የወንዝ ወይም የኩሬ ውሃዎችን በፍጹም አይጠቀሙ።
ጀርሞች እንዳይዛመቱ ለመከላከል ከእያንዳንዱ አጠቃቀም በኋላ ሁሉንም የወተት ጠርሙሶች እና የጡት ማጥቢያዎችን በፈላ ውሃ ውስጥ በማፍላት ያፅዱ።
om: Baakteriyaa fi ilbiisota miidhaa geessisan ajjeesuuf, bishaan sana aannan mucaa wajjin makuun dura daqiiqaa tokkoof danफisanii qabbaneessuun barbaachisaadha.
Maddeen bishaan qulqulluu qofa fayyadamaa; bishaan lagaa yookiin haroo mucaa irratti dhibee garaa kaasaa fiduu danda'u matumaa hin fayyadaminaa.
Jarmiin akka hin babal'anneef, erga fayyadamanii booda ujummoo aannanii fi meeshaalee biroo bishaan danfeen qulqulleessaa.

en: How long can mixed infant formula be kept at room temperature?
What is the risk of using 'soft' or 'hard' water for baby formula?

Watch for high fever accompanied by shivering or chills, which often occur in cycles and are major indicators of malaria.
Look for unusual tiredness (lethargy), poor feeding, and vomiting, especially in children living in low-altitude or swampy areas of Ethiopia.
Seek immediate medical attention at the nearest health post if a child shows signs of severe headache or yellowing of the eyes.
am: በተደጋጋሚ የሚከሰት ከፍተኛ ትኩሳት እና መንቀጥቀጥ ልብ ይበሉ፤ እነዚህ ዋነኛ የወባ ምልክቶች ናቸው።
ባልተለመደ ሁኔታ ድካም፣ ምግብ እምቢ ማለት እና ማስታወክ በተለይም በቆላማ ወይም ረግረጋማ የኢትዮጵያ አካባቢዎች ለሚኖሩ ህፃናት ትኩረት ይስጡ።
ልጁ ላይ ከፍተኛ ራስ ምታት ወይም የአይን ቢጫ መሆን ምልክቶች ከታዩ በአቅራቢያው ወደሚገኝ ጤና ጣቢያ በአፋጣኝ ይውሰዱ።
om: Ho'a qaamaa olaanaafi rommoo (shivering) yeroo hunda deddeebi'ee dhufu mallattoo dhibee weerraraa (malaria) waan ta'eef hordofaa.
Dadhabbiin garmalee, nyaata diduu fi haqqisiisuun, keessattuu ijoollee naannoo gammoojjii Itoophiyaa jiraatan irratti yoo mul'ate xiyyeeffannaa kennaa.
Yoo mucaan bowwoo mataa cimaa yookiin iji isaa keelloofne, hatattamaan gara buufata fayyaa geessaa.

en: How can I distinguish between a common cold and malaria in a toddler?
Are mosquito nets provided for free at local health posts in Ethiopia?
What is the best way to clear mosquito breeding sites around the home?
Always wash hands with soap and flowing water before touching any food, especially before preparing traditional meals like 'Doro Wot' or handling raw meat.
Wash hands thoroughly after handling soil, animal waste, or dirty farm tools to prevent transferring germs to the family's meals.
Scrub under fingernails and between fingers for at least 20 seconds to ensure all invisible bacteria are removed before serving food.
am: ማንኛውንም ምግብ ከመንካቱ በፊት በተለይም እንደ 'ዶሮ ወጥ' ያሉ ባህላዊ ምግቦችን ከማዘጋጀትዎ ወይም ጥሬ ስጋ ከመያዝዎ በፊት ሁልጊዜ እጅዎን በሳሙና እና በፈሳሽ ውሃ ይታጠቡ።
ጀርሞችን ወደ ቤተሰብ ምግብ እንዳያስተላልፉ አፈር፣ የእንስሳት ቆሻሻ ወይም የቆሸሹ የግብርና መሣሪያዎችን ከነኩ በኋላ እጅዎን በሚገባ ይታጠቡ።
ምግብ ከማቅረብዎ በፊት የማይታዩ ባክቴሪያዎች መወገዳቸውን ለማረጋገጥ ቢያንስ ለ20 ሰከንድ የጥፍርዎን ስር እና በጣቶችዎ መካከል በደንብ ይሹ።
om: Nyaata qopheessuun dura, keessattuu foon dheedhii yookiin ittoo 'Doro Wot' hojjachuun dura, yeroo hunda harkaa keessan saamunaafi bishaan yaa'aadhaan dhiquu qabdu.
Biyyee, xurii beeyladaa yookiin meeshaa qonnaa xuraawaa erga tuqanii booda, jarmiin gara soorata maatiitti akka hin darbne harkaa keessan dhiquadhaa.
Osoo nyaata hin dhiyeessin dura, qeensaa gadii fi quba gidduu sekondii 20f sirriitti dhiqachuun baakteriyaa ijaan hin mul'anne qulqulleessaa.

en: What can I use to wash my hands if soap is not available in the field?
Is it safe to use ash instead of soap for hand washing?
How can I set up a low-cost 'Tippy-Tap' for hand washing on my farm?
For adults and children, stand behind them and perform 5 back blows followed by 5 abdominal thrusts (Heimlich maneuver) until the object is forced out.
For an infant, lay them face down on your forearm and give 5 gentle but firm back slaps, followed by 5 chest thrusts with two fingers.
If the person becomes unconscious, lay them on the floor and call for emergency medical help immediately while checking their airway.
am: ለአዋቂዎች እና ለህፃናት፣ ከጀርባቸው በመቆም 5 ጊዜ ጀርባቸውን ይምቱ፤ በመቀጠልም የገባው ነገር እስኪወጣ ድረስ 5 ጊዜ ሆዳቸውን በመጫን (Heimlich maneuver) ይርዱ።
ለህጻናት፣ በክንድዎ ላይ በደረት በኩል በማስተኛት 5 ጊዜ ጀርባቸውን በዝግታ ይምቱ፤ በመቀጠልም በሁለት ጣቶች 5 ጊዜ ደረታቸውን ይጫኑ።
ሰውየው ራሱን ካሳተ፣ ወለል ላይ ያስተኙት እና የአየር መንገዱን እየፈተሹ በአቅራቢያው ወደሚገኝ የጤና ባለሙያ በአፋጣኝ ይውሰዱ።
om: Namoota gurguddaa fi ijoolleef, duuba isaanii dhaabbachuun dugda isaanii si'a 5 erga dhooftanii booda, hamma meeshaan sun bahutti garaa isaanii si'a 5 hirkisanii qabuu (Heimlich maneuver).
Mucaa xiqqaaf, harka keessan irra gara gadiitti ciibsuun dugda isaa si'a 5 laaffisanii dhuunfachuun, itti aansuun quba lamaan qoma isaa si'a 5 dhiibaa.
Yoo namni sun of wallaale, lafa irratti ciibsuun hatattamaan gara buufata fayyaa geessaa.

en: How can I prevent small children from choking on common foods like roasted barley (kolo)?

Use local sieves or graders to separate grains by size; uniform grain size is often required for premium export or brewery markets.
Manually remove broken kernels, discolored seeds, and stones to increase the purity percentage and attract higher-paying buyers.
am: የገበያ ዋጋን የሚቀንሱ አቧራዎችን፣ ገለባዎችን እና ቀላል ቆሻሻዎችን ለማስወገድ እህሉን በንፋስ ወይም በደጋን በሚገባ ይዘርቅቁት (ያፅዱት)።
እህሎችን በየመጠናቸው ለመለየት የአገር ውስጥ ወንፊቶችን ይጠቀሙ፤ ወጥ የሆነ የእህል መጠን ለኤክስፖርት ወይም ለቢራ ፋብሪካዎች ገበያ አስፈላጊ ነው።
የንፅህና ደረጃን ለመጨመር እና የተሻለ ዋጋ የሚያወጡ ገዢዎችን ለመሳብ የተሰባበሩ፣ ቀለማቸው የተለወጠ እህሎችን እና ጠጠርን በእጅ በመለቀም ያስወግዱ።
om: Gatii gabaa kan hir'isan dhukkee, kumiin fi xuriiwwan salphaa ta'an callaa keessaa baasuuf qilleensa uumamaa yookiin meeshaa biroo fayyadamaa.
Guddinni midhaanii wal-fakkaataa akka ta'uuf gingilchaa fayyadamaa; kun gabaa alaatiifi warshaalee biiraatiif baay'ee barbaachisaadha.
Qulqullina callaa dabaluufi gatii gaarii argachuuf, midhaan caccabe, bifa jijjiirrateefi dhagaa harkaan guuruun keessaa baasaa.

Cover the drying food with a thin white cloth or netting to protect it from flies and direct bird contact while still allowing sunlight through.
am: አትክልትና ፍራፍሬዎች በአንድ ጊዜ እንዲደርቁ እና ውስጣቸው እንዳይበላሽ ቀጫጭን እና እኩል መጠን ያላቸው ቁርጥራጮች አድርገው ይክተፉ።
ከስር የአየር ዝውውር እንዲኖር እና ምግቡን ከአፈርና ከእንስሳት ንክኪ ለመጠበቅ ከመሬት ከፍ ያሉ የመድረቂያ መደርደሪያዎችን ይጠቀሙ።
የፀሐይ ብርሃን እንዲገባ እየፈቀዱ ከዝንብና ከአእዋፍ ንክኪ ለመጠበቅ የሚደርቀውን ምግብ በቀጭን ነጭ ጨርቅ ወይም መረብ ይሸፍኑ።
አትክልትና ፍራፍሬዎች በአንድ ጊዜ እንዲደርቁ እና ውስጣቸው እንዳይበላሽ ቀጫጭን እና እኩል መጠን ያላቸው ቁርጥራጮች አድርገው ይክተፉ።
om: Kuduraa fi muduraan bifa wal-fakkaatuun akka goganiifi keessisaanii akka hin rimneef, haphii fi qixxee godhanii makuu (slice) barbaachisaadha.
Qilleenssa gahaa akka argatuufi dhukkee lafaa fi beeyladoota irraa eeguuf, meeshaa ol-ka'aa (racks) irratti gogsaa.
Titiisaa fi simbirroota irraa ittisuuf, utuu ifni aduu galuu danda'u huccuu adii haphii ta'een irra uffisaa.

Write down every sale made, including the quantity of crop sold and the price per kilo, to understand your total seasonal income.
At the end of the harvest, subtract your total expenses from your total income to calculate your real profit and plan for the next year.
am: የምርት ወጪዎን በትክክል ለመከታተል በዘር፣ በማዳበሪያ እና በጉልበት ሠራተኞች ላይ የወጣውን ገንዘብ በየቀኑ በማስታወሻ ደብተር ላይ ይመዝግቡ።
ጠቅላላ የወቅቱን ገቢ ለመረዳት የተሸጠውን የሰብል መጠን እና የኪሎውን ዋጋ ጨምሮ እያንዳንዱን ሽያጭ ይጻፉ።
ከመከር በኋላ ትክክለኛውን ትርፍ ለማወቅ እና ለቀጣዩ አመት እቅድ ለማውጣት ከጠቅላላው ገቢ ላይ ጠቅላላ ወጪዎን ይቀንሱ።
om: Baasii oomishtummaaf baasani beekuuf, guyyaa guyyaatti maallaqa sanyii, xaa'oo fi humna namaatiif baasani galmeessaa.
Galiin keessan hangam akka ta'e beekuuf, midhaan gurguramee fi gatii isaa qophiitti galmeessanii qabachuun barbaachisaadha.
Dhuma irratti bu'aa dhugaa beekuufi bara itti aanuuf karoorfachuuf, galii walii-galaa irraa baasii walii-galaa hir'isaa.

Place larger and heavier eggs at the bottom of the container and smaller ones on top to prevent crushing.
Secure the egg containers firmly in the vehicle or on the donkey to minimize vibrations and sudden movements on rough rural roads.
am: እንቁላሎችን በካርቶን ወይም በፕላስቲክ ሳጥኖች ውስጥ ያሽጉ፤ እነዚህ ከሌሉ ለስላሳ ደረቅ ገለባ ወይም መሰንጠቂያ በለበሰ ቅርጫት ውስጥ ያስቀምጡ።
እንቁላሎቹ እንዳይሰበሩ ትላልቅ እና ከባድ እንቁላሎችን ከስር፣ ትናንሾቹን ደግሞ ከላይ ያድርጉ።
በገጠር ሸካራ መንገዶች ላይ ንዝረትን ለመቀነስ የእንቁላል ማጠራቀሚያዎችን በተሽከርካሪው ወይም በአህያው ላይ አጥብቀው ያስሩ።
om: Hanqaaquu sanduuqa kaartoonaa yookiin pilaastikaa keessa kaa'aa; yoo kun hin jirre, qoraa cidii lallaafaa yookiin daakuu mukaa qabu fayyadamaa.
Hanqaaquun akka hin cabinneef, warra gurguddaa jalaan, warra xixinnoo imሞo gubbaan kaa'aa.
Daandii baadiyyaa irra yeroo deemtan akka hin rurukkutamneef, meeshaa hanqaaquu qabu koraattii yookiin harree irratti jabeessanii hidhuu barbaachisa.

en: What is the average percentage of egg breakage during transport in Ethiopia?

Mix the seeds with clean, dry wood ash (about 1 part ash to 5 parts seed) to create a physical barrier and dehydrate the weevils.
Use airtight (hermetic) containers or multi-layer plastic bags to suffocate insects by cutting off their oxygen supply during storage.
Add dried and crushed Neem leaves or Melia azedarach (Dimmits) seeds to the storage container as a natural repellent against grain borers.
am: ተባዮችን ለመከላከል ዘሩን ከደረቅ እንጨት አመድ ጋር (1 ክፍል አመድ ከ 5 ክፍል ዘር ጋር) በመቀላቀል ይጠቀሙ።
በማከማቻ ጊዜ ኦክስጅንን በመከልከል ተባዮቹን ለማጥፋት አየር የማያስገቡ ኮንቴይነሮችን ወይም ባለብዙ ንብርብር ፕላስቲክ ከረጢቶችን ይጠቀሙ።
የደረቁ እና የተፈጩ የኒም ቅጠሎችን ወይም የዲሚፅ ዘሮችን በተፈጥሮ መከላከያነት ወደ ማከማቻው ይጨምሩ።
om: Ilbiisota ittisuuf, sanyii sana gubbaadhaa daakuu ibiddaa (ash) qulqulluu (harkee 1 daakuu, harkee 5 sanyii) wajjin walitti makuu.
Yeroo kuusaa qilleensa dhabsiisuun ilbiisota ajjeesuuf, qodaawwan yookiin korojoo qilleensa hin galchine fayyadamaa.
Baala 'Neem' gogeefi daakame yookiin sanyii 'Dimmits' (Melia azedarach) akka ittisa uumamaatti fayyadamaa.

en: Can I use cooking oil to protect small quantities of bean seeds from weevils?
How long can seeds stay viable when stored with wood ash?

Use the Cornell Method by dividing your paper into three sections: notes, cues, and a summary, to organize information as you listen.
Focus on key concepts and keywords rather than writing every word the teacher says; listen for phrases like 'the most important point is' which signal exam content.
Review and edit your notes within 24 hours of the class to move the information from your short-term memory to long-term memory.
am: መረጃዎችን በምታዳምጥበት ጊዜ በሥርዓት ለማደራጀት ደብተርህን በሦስት ክፍል (ማስታወሻ፣ ፍንጮች እና ማጠቃለያ) በመክፈል ማስታወሻ ያዝ።
መምህሩ የሚናገረውን እያንዳንዱን ቃል ከመጻፍ ይልቅ ዋና ዋና ሃሳቦችን እና ቃላትን ላይ ትኩረት አድርግ፤ በተለይ 'ዋናው ነጥብ' የሚሉትን ሀረጎች በትኩረት አዳምጥ።
የያዝከውን ማስታወሻ መረጃው ከአጭር ጊዜ ትውስታ ወደ ረጅም ጊዜ ትውስታ እንዲቀየር በ24 ሰዓት ውስጥ በድጋሚ ከልሰው።
om: Yeroo barumsa hordofnu ragaa sirnaan qabachuuf waraqaa keessan bakka sadiitti (yaadannoo, qabxiiwwan ijoo fi gabaabbina) qooduun fayyadamaa.
Jecha barsiisaan dubbatu hunda barreessuu dhiistanii qabxiiwwan ijoo irratti xiyyeeffadhaa; keessattuu 'qabxiin inni guddaan' jechoota jedhan irratti dammaqaa.
Yaadannoo keessan akka hin irraanfatneef sa'aatii 24 keessatti irra deebi'anii ilaaluun gara sammuu yeroo dheeraatti akka darbu godha.

en: What are the best abbreviations to use for faster note-taking?
How can I take effective notes during online or recorded lectures?
Should I use different colored pens to organize my notes?
Analyze your current daily routine and identify 'dead time'—like traveling on a bus—that can be used for light revision.
Prioritize difficult subjects like Mathematics or Physics during your most alert hours, usually early in the morning before other distractions start.
Include short 5-10 minute breaks every hour to keep your brain fresh and prevent burnout during long study sessions.
am: የዕለት ተዕለት እንቅስቃሴዎን ይገምግሙ እና እንደ አውቶብስ ጉዞ ያሉ ለቀላል ክለሳ ሊውሉ የሚችሉ ክፍት ሰዓቶችን ለይተው ያውቁ።
እንደ ሂሳብ ወይም ፊዚክስ ያሉ ከባድ ትምህርቶችን አእምሮዎ ንቁ በሚሆንበት ሰዓት (አብዛኛውን ጊዜ ማለዳ ላይ) ቅድሚያ ሰጥተው ያጥኑ።
አእምሮዎ እንዳይደክም እና ለረጅም ጊዜ እንዲያጠኑ በየሰዓቱ ከ5-10 ደቂቃ የሚቆይ አጭር የእረፍት ጊዜ በፕሮግራምዎ ውስጥ ያካትቱ።
om: Gochaalee keessan guyyaa guyyaa xiinxaluun yeroo akkanumaan badu, fakkeenyaaf yeroo bashii (bus) eegdan, irra deebii salphaaf fayyadamaa.
Barnoota jajjaboo kan akka herregaa fi fiiziksii yeroo sammuun keessan dammaqaa ta'etti, keessattuu ganama barii duratti karoorsaa.
Sammuun keessan akka hin nuffineef sa'aatii tokko tokko keessatti boqonnaa daqiiqaa 5-10 ta'u sagantaa keessan keessatti dabalaa.

en: How many subjects should I study in a single day?
Is it better to study late at night or early in the morning?
How do I adjust my timetable during exam weeks?
Use acronyms to remember lists; for example, use the name of a person where each letter starts a word you need to memorize.
Apply the 'Method of Loci' by visualizing placing facts you need to remember in different rooms of your house as you walk through it in your mind.
Create rhymes or short songs about historical dates or scientific formulas, as the brain remembers rhythm and melody more easily than dry facts.
am: ዝርዝር ነገሮችን ለማስታወስ የእያንዳንዱን ቃል የመጀመሪያ ፊደላት በመውሰድ አጠር ያሉ ቃላትን ወይም ስሞችን ፍጠሩ።
የማስታወስ ዘዴዎችን ለመጠቀም የምታውቁትን ቤት በዓይነ ህሊናችሁ በመሳል እያንዳንዱ ክፍል ውስጥ ለማስታወስ የፈለጋችሁትን መረጃ በማስቀመጥ ተለማመዱ።
የታሪክ ቀናትን ወይም ሳይንሳዊ ቀመሮችን በዜማ ወይም በግጥም መልክ አዘጋጁ፤ አእምሮ ከደረቅ መረጃ ይልቅ ዜማን በቀላሉ ያስታውሳል።
om: Tarreeffama qabxiiwwan adda addaa yaadachuuf, qubee jalqabaa irratti hundaa'uun jecha gabaabaa uumaa fayyadamaa.
Bakka beekamaa tokko sammuutti fakkii kaasuun, qabxii yaadachuu barbaaddan sana kutaa mana keessanii garaagaraa keessa kaa'uun sammuutti qabadhaa.
Seenaa yookiin foormulaawwan saayinsii bifa weedduutiin yookiin walalootti jijjiiruun qo'adhaa; sammuun waan bifa sirbaatiin jiru salphaatti yaadadha.

en: Can you give an example of a mnemonic for the colors of the rainbow?
How can I use mnemonics for learning a new language?
Are mnemonics effective for long-term memory or just short-term exams?
Practice with past national exam papers from the last 5 years to familiarize yourself with the question formats and time constraints.
Join or form a study group with classmates to discuss difficult topics; explaining a concept to others is the best way to master it yourself.
Focus on the official student textbooks and curriculum guides, as national exams in Ethiopia are strictly based on these materials.
am: ከጥያቄዎቹ አቀራረብ እና ከሰዓት አጠቃቀም ጋር ለመላመድ ያለፉትን 5 ዓመታት ብሔራዊ የፈተና ጥያቄዎችን በመስራት ልምምድ ያድርጉ።
ከባድ ትምህርቶችን ለመወያየት ከጓደኞችዎ ጋር የጥናት ቡድን ይፍጠሩ፤ አንድን ሃሳብ ለሌላ ሰው ማስረዳት እራስዎ በደንብ እንዲረዱት ይረዳዎታል።
የኢትዮጵያ ብሔራዊ ፈተናዎች የሚወጡት ከነዚሁ መጽሐፍት ስለሆነ በትምህርት ሚኒስቴር በተዘጋጁ የመማሪያ መጽሐፍት ላይ ትኩረት አድርገው ያጥኑ።
om: Haala gaaffilee fi yeroo itti fayyadamaa beekuuf, gaaffilee biyyaalessaa waggoota 5n darban irratti shaakala gahaa godhaa.
Qabxiiwwan jajjaboo irratti hiriyoota keessanii wajjin mari'achuuf garee qo'annaa uumaa; waan qo'attan nama biraatti himuun ofiifis akka sirriitti galtu isin gargaara.
Qorumsi biyyaalessaa Itoophiyaa kitaaba barnootaa irratti waan hundaa'uuf, kitaabota barnootaa mootummaan qophaa'an irratti xiyyeeffadhaa.

en: What are the best strategies for answering multiple-choice questions?
How can I manage exam anxiety the night before the national exam?
Where can I find answer keys for past Grade 12 national exams?
During deep sleep, the brain processes and consolidates the information you learned during the day, turning it into long-term memories.
Lack of sleep impairs your ability to focus and solve complex problems, making your study sessions less effective.
Aim for 7-9 hours of consistent sleep each night; 'all-nighters' before exams often lead to poorer performance due to mental fatigue.
am: በጥልቅ እንቅልፍ ወቅት አእምሮ በቀን ውስጥ የተማርካቸውን መረጃዎች በማቀናጀት ወደ ረጅም ጊዜ ትውስታነት ይቀይራቸዋል።
የእንቅልፍ እጥረት በትምህርት ላይ ትኩረት የማድረግ እና አስቸጋሪ ጥያቄዎችን የመፍታት ችሎታህን ስለሚቀንስ የጥናት ጊዜህን ውጤታማ እንዳይሆን ያደርገዋል።
በየቀኑ ለ 7-9 ሰአታት ተኝተህ እረፍት አድርግ፤ ከፈተና በፊት ሌሊቱን ሙሉ አለመተኛት ለአእምሮ ድካም ስለሚዳርግ ለውጤት መቀነስ ምክንያት ይሆናል።
om: Yeroo hirribaa sammuun waan guyyaa qo'attan sirnaan gurmeessee gara yaadannoo yeroo dheeraatti jijjiira.
Hirribni gahaan dhabamuun dandeettii sammuun qabxiiwwan jajjaboo furuuf qabu ni hir'isa; kunis qo'annaan keessan bu'aa akka hin fenne godha.
Halkanitti sa'aatii 7-9 rafuun sammuun keessan akka boqotu godhaa; utuu hin rafin bulanii qorumsa seenuun dadhabbii sammuu waan fiduuf qabxii ni hir'isa.

en: How can I improve my sleep quality during high-stress exam periods?
Does taking a short afternoon nap help with afternoon studying?
What are the negative effects of caffeine on student learning?
The sun heats water in Ethiopia's lakes and rivers, causing it to turn into invisible gas called water vapor through evaporation.
As vapor rises into the cooler air above the Ethiopian highlands, it cools down and turns back into tiny water droplets, forming clouds (condensation).
When cloud droplets get too heavy, they fall back to the earth as rain, providing the essential water needed for the Kiremt planting season.
am: ፀሐይ በኢትዮጵያ ሐይቆች እና ወንዞች ውስጥ ያለውን ውሃ በማሞቅ በትነት አማካኝነት ወደማይታይ የውሃ ትነት ይለውጠዋል።
ትነቱ ወደ ኢትዮጵያ ደጋማ ቦታዎች ሲወጣ እና ቀዝቃዛ አየር ሲያገኝ ወደ ትናንሽ የውሃ ጠብታዎች በመለወጥ ደመናን ይፈጥራል (ስብስብ)።
የደመና ጠብታዎች በጣም በሚከብዱበት ጊዜ እንደ ዝናብ ወደ ምድር በመውረድ ለክረምት የእርሻ ወቅት አስፈላጊውን ውሃ ይሰጣሉ።
om: Adduun bishaan haroowwan fi laggeen Itoophiyaa keessa jiru ho'isuun gara gaasii ijaan hin mul'anneetti (hurka) jijjiira.
Hurki sun gara qilleensa qabbanaawaa tulluuwwan Itoophiyaa gubbaatti yeroo ol ba'u, deebi'ee gara dhangala'aatti jijjiiramuun duumessa uuma.
Yeroo duumessi sun baay'ee ulfaatu, bifa roobaatiin gara lafaatti deebi'uun waqtii gannaa qonnaaf barbaachisu nuuf kenna.

en: Why does it rain more in the Ethiopian highlands than in the lowlands?
What happens to rainwater after it soaks into the ground?
How do trees help in the water cycle process?
Roots anchor the plant in the soil and absorb water and minerals needed for the plant to grow healthy in the field.
The stem acts like a straw, carrying water from the roots to the leaves and supporting the plant to reach for sunlight.
Leaves are the 'food factories' where the plant uses sunlight to make energy, while flowers produce seeds to grow new plants.
am: ስሮች ተክሉን ከአፈር ጋር አጥብቀው ከመያዛቸውም በላይ ተክሉ በእርሻ ውስጥ ጤናማ ሆኖ እንዲያድግ የሚያስፈልገውን ውሃ እና ማዕድናት ይስባሉ።
ግንዱ እንደ ቧንቧ በመሆን ውሃን ከስር ወደ ቅጠሎች ያደርሳል እንዲሁም ተክሉ የፀሐይ ብርሃን እንዲያገኝ ደግፎ ያቆመዋል።
ቅጠሎች ተክሉ የፀሐይ ብርሃንን በመጠቀም ምግብ የሚያዘጋጅባቸው ቦታዎች ሲሆኑ አበቦች ደግሞ አዳዲስ ተክሎችን የሚያፈሩ ዘሮችን ያመነጫሉ።
om: Hundeen biqilaa lafa keessatti jabeessuun bishaan fi soorata biyyee keessaa biqilaan akka guddatuuf xuuxa.
Jirmi akka ujummootti tajaajila; bishaan hundee irraa gara baalaatti geessuun biqiltuun sun ifa aduu akka argatu ol-kaasee qaba.
Baalli bakka sooranni biqilaa itti qophaa'u yoo ta'u, daraaraan immoo sanyii biqilaa haaraa maddisiisu oomisha.

en: Why do some Ethiopian plants like Enset have very large leaves?
Can a plant survive if its roots are damaged?
How do bees help flowers produce seeds?
Trees act as the 'lungs of the earth' by taking in carbon dioxide, which is harmful in large amounts, and releasing fresh oxygen for us to breathe.
Through photosynthesis, trees use sunlight and air to grow, which helps to cool the environment and reduce the effects of climate change in Ethiopia.
Planting trees, like in the Green Legacy initiative, helps trap dust and pollutants, making the air cleaner and healthier for local communities.
am: ዛፎች ካርቦን ዳይኦክሳይድን በመውሰድ እና እኛ የምንተነፍሰውን ንጹህ ኦክስጅን በመልቀቅ እንደ 'የምድር ሳንባ' ያገለግላሉ።
ዛፎች በፎቶሲንተሲስ አማካኝነት የፀሐይ ብርሃንን እና አየርን በመጠቀም ያድጋሉ፤ ይህም አካባቢን ለማቀዝቀዝ እና በኢትዮጵያ ያለውን የአየር ንብረት ለውጥ ተፅእኖ ለመቀነስ ይረዳል።
እንደ አረንጓዴ አሻራ መርሃ ግብር ዛፎችን መትከል አቧራን እና ብክለትን ለመቀነስ ይረዳል፤ ይህም አየሩ ለአካባቢው ማህበረሰብ ንጹህ እና ጤናማ እንዲሆን ያደርጋል።
om: Mukeen kaarboon-daay-oksaayidii xuuxuun oksiijiinii qulqulluu nuuf kennu; kunis akka 'somba lafaa' tajaajilu jechuudha.
Footoosintizisii fayyadamuun mukeen ifa aduun guddachaa naannoo qabbaneessu; kunis jijjiirama qilleensaa Itoophiyaa keessatti mul'atu hir'isa.
Ashaaraa Magariisaa irratti hirmaachuun mukeen dhaabuun dhukkee fi xurii qilleensa keessaa qulqulleessuun fayyaa hawaasaa eega.

en: How many trees does an average person need to produce enough oxygen for a day?
What are the best types of indigenous trees to plant in Ethiopia for air quality?
Do trees release oxygen at night as well?
Solids, like a stone or a piece of wood, have a fixed shape and their particles are packed very tightly together.
Liquids, like milk or water from the Nile, flow and take the shape of the container they are poured into.
Gases, like the air around us or steam from a boiling kettle, don't have a fixed shape and spread out to fill any available space.
am: እንደ ድንጋይ ወይም እንጨት ያሉ ጠጣር ነገሮች ወጥ የሆነ ቅርጽ አላቸው እንዲሁም በውስጣቸው ያሉ ጥቃቅን ነገሮች በጣም ተቀራርበው የተያያዙ ናቸው።
እንደ ወተት ወይም የአባይ ውሃ ያሉ ፈሳሾች ይፈሳሉ እንዲሁም በተቀዱበት እቃ ልክ ቅርጻቸውን ይለውጣሉ።
እንደ አየር ወይም ከሚፈላ ሻይ የሚወጣ ትነት ያሉ ጋዞች ወጥ የሆነ ቅርጽ የላቸውም፤ በማንኛውም ክፍት ቦታ ላይ ይሰራጫሉ።
om: Jabaatoon (Solids), kan akka dhagaa yookiin mukaa, bifa dhaabbataa qabu; wantoonni keessa isaa jiranis walitti dhihaatanii jiru.
Dhangala'oon (Liquids), kan akka aannanii yookiin bishaan laga Abbaay, ni yaa'u; bifa meeshaa itti naqamaniis ni fudhatu.
Gaasoliin (Gases), kan akka qilleensa naannoo keenyaa, bifa dhaabbataa hin qaban; bakka argatan hunda keessa ni babal'atu.

en: Can a substance change from a solid to a liquid and then to a gas?
Why is it harder to compress a solid than a gas?
Is fire a solid, liquid, or gas?
The heart is a strong muscle that acts like a water pump, constantly pushing blood through your entire body.
It sends blood rich in oxygen to your brain and muscles to give you energy to work on the farm or study.
Your heart beats faster when you run or work hard because your body needs more oxygen-rich blood to keep going.
am: ልብ እንደ ውሃ ፓምፕ በመሆን ደምን በሰውነታችን ውስጥ በቋሚነት የሚገፋ ጠንካራ ጡንቻ ነው።
በእርሻ ላይ ለመስራት ወይም ለማጥናት የሚያስፈልገውን ጉልበት ለመስጠት ኦክስጅን የበለፀገ ደምን ወደ አእምሮዎ እና ጡንቻዎ ይልካል።
ሰውነትዎ ስራውን ለመቀጠል ተጨማሪ ኦክስጅን ስላለበት በሚሮጡበት ወይም ጠንክረው በሚሰሩበት ጊዜ ልብዎ በፍጥነት ይመታል።
om: Onneen maashaa jabaa akka paampii bishaaniitti tajaajiluun dhiiga gara guutummaa qaama keenyaatti raabsa.
Sammuu fi maashaaleen keenya humna qonna irratti hojjachuuf yookiin qo'annaaf barbaachisu akka argataniif dhiiga oksiijiinii qabu erga.
Yeroo fiigdan yookiin hojii jabaa hojjattan, qaamni keessan oksiijiinii baay'ee waan barbaaduuf onneen keessan ariitiin dhahata.

en: How can I keep my heart healthy through diet and exercise in Ethiopia?
What is the average resting heart rate for a healthy adult?
How does blood return to the heart after traveling to the feet?
Use 'Skip Counting' to learn tables; for example, to learn the 5s, practice counting 5, 10, 15, 20 like you are counting money.
Relate multiplication to repeated addition; 3 x 4 is just 4 + 4 + 4, which makes the concept easier to visualize.
Learn the easy tables first (2s, 5s, and 10s) to build confidence before moving to harder ones like 7s or 8s.
am: የማባዣ ሰንጠረዦችን ለመማር 'ዘልሎ መቁጠርን' ይጠቀሙ፤ ለምሳሌ የ 5 ቁጥርን ለማጥናት ልክ ብር እንደሚቆጥሩት 5፣ 10፣ 15፣ 20 እያሉ ይለማመዱ።
ማባዛትን ደጋግሞ ከመደመር ጋር ያዛምዱት፤ ለምሳሌ 3 x 4 ማለት 4 + 4 + 4 ማለት መሆኑን መረዳት ሃሳቡን ለማስታወስ ቀላል ያደርገዋል።
ወደ ከባዶቹ (እንደ 7 ወይም 8) ከመሄድዎ በፊት በራስ መተማመን እንዲኖርዎት መጀመሪያ ቀላል የሆኑትን (የ 2፣ የ 5 እና የ 10 ሰንጠረዦችን) ይማሩ።
om: Gabatee herregaa baay'isuu barachuuf 'tarkaanfachiisanii lakkaa'uu' fayyadamaa; fakkeenyaaf gabatee 5 barachuuf, akkuma qarshii lakkooftanitti 5, 10, 15, 20 jechuun shaakalaa.
Baay'isuu fi walitti ida'uu wal-kabsisaa; 3 x 4 jechuun 4 + 4 + 4 akka ta'e beekuun yaadachuuf isin gargaara.
Utuu gara warra jajjaboo (7 yookiin 8) hin deemin dura, warra salphaa (2, 5, fi 10) barachuun ofitti amanamummaa keessan dabaladhaa.

en: What is the 9-times table finger trick?
How can I help my child practice math at home without a textbook?
Are there songs or rhymes used in Ethiopian schools to learn multiplication?
Think of one whole 'Injera' as the total; if you cut it into two equal pieces, each piece is a 'Half' (1/2).
If you cut that Injera into four equal pieces, each piece is a 'Quarter' (1/4), which is also called 'Rub' in Amharic.
Fractions are simply parts of a whole; two quarters (1/4 + 1/4) added together always make one half (1/2).
am: አንድ ሙሉ እንጀራ እንደ አንድ ሙሉ ቁጥር ይቁጠሩት፤ በሁለት እኩል ቦታ ከከፈሉት እያንዳንዱ ክፍል 'ግማሽ' (1/2) ይባላል።
ያንኑ እንጀራ በአራት እኩል ቦታ ከከፈሉት እያንዳንዱ ክፍል 'ሩብ' (1/4) ይባላል።
ክፍልፋዮች የአንድ ሙሉ ነገር ቁርጥራጮች ናቸው፤ ሁለት ሩቦችን (1/4 + 1/4) አንድ ላይ ሲደምሩ ሁልጊዜ አንድ ግማሽ (1/2) ይሰጣሉ።
om: Buddeena tokko akka guutuu tokkootti yaadaa; yoo bakka lamatti wal-qixxee hirattan tokkoon tokkoo isaa 'walakkaa' (1/2) jedhama.
Buddeena sana yoo bakka afuritti wal-qixxee hirattan, tokkoon tokkoo isaa 'kuri' yookiin 'rubii' (1/4) jedhama.
Firaakshiniin (fractions) qaama guutuu tokkooti; kuriin lama (1/4 + 1/4) walitti yoo ida'aman yeroo hunda walakkaa (1/2) ta'u.

en: How do I explain the difference between a third and a quarter to a child?
How can I use measuring cups to teach fractions while cooking?
What happens if I have four quarters of an Injera?
To find the area of a rectangular farm plot, measure the length and the width in meters and multiply them (Length x Width).
If your plot is 50 meters long and 20 meters wide, the area is 1,000 square meters (50 x 20 = 1,000).
In Ethiopia, 10,000 square meters make 1 hectare; knowing your area helps you calculate exactly how much seed or fertilizer you need.
am: አራት ማዕዘን ቅርጽ ያለው የእርሻ መሬት ስፋትን ለማግኘት ርዝመቱን እና ወርዱን በሜትር ለክተው ያባዙ (ርዝመት x ወርድ)።
እርሻዎ 50 ሜትር ርዝመት እና 20 ሜትር ወርድ ቢኖረው ስፋቱ 1,000 ካሬ ሜትር (50 x 20 = 1,000) ይሆናል።
በኢትዮጵያ 10,000 ካሬ ሜትር አንድ ሄክታር ይባላል፤ የእርሻዎን ስፋት ማወቅዎ ምን ያህል ዘር ወይም ማዳበሪያ እንደሚያስፈልግዎ በትክክል ለማወቅ ይረዳዎታል።
om: Bal'ina lafa qonnaa roga-afur qabuu beekuuf, dheerinaa fi bal'ina isaa meetiraan madaaltanii waliin baay'isaa (Dheerina x Bal'ina).
Laffi keessan dheerina meetira 50 fi bal'ina meetira 20 yoo qabaate, bal'inni isaa 'square meter' 1,000 (50 x 20 = 1,000) ta'a.
Itoophiyaa keessatti 'square meter' 10,000 hektaara tokko; bal'ina lafa keessanii beekuun sanyii fi xaa'oo hangam akka barbaaddan adda baasuuf isin gargaara.

en: How do I calculate the area of a field that is shaped like a triangle?
What is the difference between a 'Gasha' and a Hectare?
How many square meters are in a 'Timad' of land?
Use addition to find the total cost of multiple items; for example, 150 Birr for grain plus 50 Birr for transport equals 200 Birr total.
Use subtraction to calculate your profit by taking the selling price and subtracting all the costs you spent to produce and bring it to market.
Always double-check your 'change' during a transaction by subtracting the item price from the total money you gave to the merchant.
am: የብዙ ነገሮችን ጠቅላላ ዋጋ ለማግኘት መደመርን ይጠቀሙ፤ ለምሳሌ 150 ብር ለእህል ሲደመር 50 ብር ለትራንስፖርት በአጠቃላይ 200 ብር ይሆናል።
ትርፍዎን ለማወቅ እህሉን ከሸጡበት ዋጋ ላይ እሱን ለማምረት እና ገበያ ለማቅረብ ያወጡትን ወጪ በሙሉ በመቀነስ ያሰሉ።
በንግድ ወቅት የሚመለስልዎትን መልስ ለማረጋገጥ ከሰጡት ጠቅላላ ገንዘብ ላይ የእቃውን ዋጋ በመቀነስ ሁልጊዜ ደግመው ይፈትሹ።
om: Gatii meeshaalee adda addaa walitti beekuuf ida'uu fayyadamaa; fakkeenyaaf 150 Birrii midhaaniif ida'uu 50 Birrii geejjibaaf walitti 200 Birrii ta'a.
Bu'aa keessan beekuuf, gatii midhaan ittiin gurgurtan irraa baasii oomishaaf baastan hunda hir'isaa.
Yeroo gabaa irratti qarshii isiniif deebi'u (santima) mirkaneeffachuuf, qarshii keessan irraa gatii meeshaa sanaa hir'isaa ilaalaa.

en: How do I calculate profit margin as a percentage?
What is the easiest way to do mental math for large numbers in the market?
How can I keep a simple paper record of my daily market sales?
A percentage means 'out of 100'; for example, 10% interest means you pay 10 Birr for every 100 Birr you borrowed.
When taking a loan from a microfinance institution, ask if the interest is 'flat rate' or 'reducing balance' to understand how much you will truly pay back.
In an 'Equb', if you pay 500 Birr and there is a 2% service fee, you calculate it as 500 x 0.02, which equals 10 Birr.
am: ፐርሰንት (%) ማለት 'ከመቶ' ማለት ነው፤ ለምሳሌ 10% ወለድ ማለት ለተበደሩት እያንዳንዱ 100 ብር 10 ብር ይከፍላሉ ማለት ነው።
ከአነስተኛ ብድር እና ቁጠባ ተቋም ብድር ሲወስዱ፣ በትክክል የሚከፍሉትን መጠን ለመረዳት ወለዱ እንዴት እንደሚታሰብ (flat rate ወይም reducing balance) ይጠይቁ።
በዕቁብ ውስጥ 500 ብር ከፍለው የ 2% አገልግሎት ክፍያ ቢኖርባችሁ፣ 500 x 0.02 በማድረግ 10 ብር መሆኑን ማወቅ ትችላላችሁ።
om: Parsantii (%) jechuun 'dhibba keessaa' jechuudha; fakkeenyaaf dhalli %10 jechuun Birrii 100 liqqeeffattan irratti Birrii 10 kaffaltu jechuudha.
Dhaabbata liqii fi qusannaa irraa yeroo liqii fudhattan, dhalli isaa akkamitti akka lakkaa'amu gaafachuun qarshii hammamii akka deebistan adda baafadhaa.
Iquubii keessatti Birrii 500 kaffaltanii kaffaltiin tajaajilaa %2 yoo ta'e, 500 x 0.02 jechuun Birrii 10 akka ta'e herregama.

en: What is the difference between simple interest and compound interest?
How can I calculate a 15% discount on fertilizer prices?
Why do banks in Ethiopia pay interest on savings accounts?
Avoid 'subvocalizing' or reading every word aloud in your head, as this limits your speed to how fast you can talk rather than how fast you can think.
Use your finger or a pen as a pacer to guide your eyes along the line; this prevents your eyes from skipping back and keeps you focused on moving forward.
Practice 'chunking' by grouping 3-4 words together in a single glance instead of focusing on each individual letter or word.
am: በልብዎ ውስጥ እያንዳንዱን ቃል ጮክ ብሎ ማንበብን (subvocalizing) ያስወግዱ፤ ይህ የማንበብ ፍጥነትዎን ከአስተሳሰብዎ ፍጥነት ይልቅ ከንግግርዎ ፍጥነት ጋር እንዲገደብ ያደርገዋል።
አይንዎ በመስመሩ ላይ እንዲከተል ጣትዎን ወይም እስክሪብቶዎን እንደ መመሪያ ይጠቀሙ፤ ይህ አይንዎ ወደ ኋላ እንዳይመለስ እና ወደ ፊት እንዲያነቡ ይረዳል።
ቃላትን አንድ በአንድ ከማንበብ ይልቅ 3-4 ቃላትን በአንድ እይታ በአንድ ላይ በጥቅል ለማንበብ ይለማመዱ።
om: Sagalee malee sammuu keessatti jechoota hunda dubbisuu (subvocalizing) dhiisaa; kun ariitii dubbisuu keessanii dandeettii dubbachuu keessan qofaatti daangessa.
Iji keessan akka duubatti hin deebineef, quba keessan yookiin qalamuun sarara sana hordofaa; kun xiyyeeffannaa keessan jabeessa.
Jecha tokko tokkoon dubbisuu dhiistanii, jechoota 3-4 walitti makuun (chunking) si'a tokkotti dubbachuuf shaakalaa.

en: Does reading faster reduce my ability to understand the content?
What are the best books to practice speed reading in Ethiopia?
How can I test my current reading speed in words per minute?
Include your full address and the recipient's office address at the top, often including the Kebele or Woreda in an Ethiopian context.
Start with a formal salutation such as 'Dear Sir/Madam' or 'To the Respected Manager' and state the purpose of your letter in the first paragraph.
Keep the body clear and concise, and conclude with a formal closing like 'Sincerely' or 'With Respect,' followed by your signature and date.
am: በኢትዮጵያ ነባራዊ ሁኔታ አድራሻዎን እና ደብዳቤው የሚላክለትን የመስሪያ ቤት አድራሻ (ቀበሌ ወይም ወረዳን ጨምሮ) ከላይ በግልጽ ያስፍሩ።
ደብዳቤውን 'ለተከበሩ ስራ አስኪያጅ' ወይም 'ክቡር/ክብርት' በሚል ይጀምሩ እና በመጀመሪያው አንቀጽ ላይ የደብዳቤውን አላማ ይግለጹ።
የመልእክቱን ፍሬ ነገር ግልጽ እና አጭር ያድርጉት፤ በመጨረሻም 'ከአክብሮት ጋር' በሚል ሰላምታ ደምድመው ፊርማዎን እና ቀኑን ያስፍሩ።
om: Teessoo keessanii fi teessoo biiroo xalayaan itti barreeffamu (Qabalee fi Woreda dabalatee) gubbaa irratti barreessaa.
Jalqaba irratti 'Gara Kabajamoo Hooggannaa' jechuun nagaa erga gaafattanii booda, keeyyata jalqabaa irratti kaayyoo xalayaa keessanii ibsaa.
Ergaa keessan gabaabaa fi ifa godhaa; dhuma irratti 'Kabajaa Wajjin' jechuun mallattoo fi guyyaa barreessuun goolabaa.

en: What is the correct way to address a letter to a government official in Ethiopia?
Should I attach supporting documents like an ID or educational certificates?
Can I use an email for formal communication in Ethiopian businesses?
Nouns are 'naming words' for people, places, or things (e.g., Farmer, Gondar, Teff, or Tractor).
Verbs are 'action words' that describe what someone or something is doing (e.g., Plow, Eat, Grow, or Study).
In a sentence, the noun (subject) usually performs the action described by the verb to tell a complete story.
am: ስሞች (Nouns) የሰዎች፣ የቦታዎች ወይም የነገሮች መጠሪያ ቃላት ናቸው (ለምሳሌ፦ ገበሬ፣ ጎንደር፣ ጤፍ ወይም ትራክተር)።
ግሶች (Verbs) ድርጊትን ወይም ስራን ገላጭ ቃላት ናቸው (ለምሳሌ፦ ማረስ፣ መብላት፣ ማደግ ወይም ማጥናት)።
በአንድ አረፍተ ነገር ውስጥ ስሙ ድርጊቱን ፈጻሚ ሲሆን ግሱ ደግሞ የተከናወነውን ድርጊት ይገልጻል።
om: Maqaan (Nouns) jechoota maqaa namootaa, bakkaa yookiin meeshaalee ittiin waamnuudha (fkn. Qonnaan bulaa, Gondar, Xaafee yookiin Tiraaktara).
Gochimni (Verbs) jechoota gocha tokko agarsiisaniidha (fkn. Qotuun, Nyaachuun, Guddachuun yookiin Qo'achuun).
Hima tokko keessatti, maqaan gocha gochimaan ibsamu sana raawwata.

en: What is the difference between a proper noun and a common noun?
How do verbs change their form based on time (past, present, future)?
Can you give examples of verbs used specifically in Ethiopian farming?
Daily writing helps organize your thoughts and improves your ability to express complex ideas clearly in both personal and professional life.
It strengthens your literacy skills, such as spelling and grammar, which are essential for school exams and job applications.
Keep a daily farm or school journal to record observations; this creates a valuable record of your progress and challenges over time.
am: የዕለት ተዕለት ጽሕፈት ሃሳብን ለማደራጀት እና አስቸጋሪ ሃሳቦችን በግልም ሆነ በስራ ህይወት ውስጥ በግልጽ ለመግለጽ ይረዳል።
ለፈተና እና ለስራ ማመልከቻ አስፈላጊ የሆኑትን እንደ የፊደላት አጻጻፍ እና ሰዋስው ያሉ የቋንቋ ክህሎቶችን ያጠናክራል።
እድገትዎን እና ያጋጠሙዎትን ፈተናዎች ለመመዝገብ በየቀኑ የእርሻ ወይም የትምህርት ማስታወሻ ደብተር ይያዙ።
om: Guyyaa guyyaatti barreessuun yaada keessan qindeessuufi dandeettii yaada dhuunfaa fi hojii keessanii ibsachuu ni fooyyessa.
Dandeettii qubeessuu fi herrega keessanii jabeessa; kunis qorumsa barnootaa fi hojii barbaaddachuuf baay'ee barbaachisaadha.
Guyyaa guyyaatti yaada keessan galmeessuun milkaa'ina fi rakkoo isin mudate yeroo dheeraaf akka yaadattan isin gargaara.

en: How long should I practice writing every day to see progress?
What are some interesting topics I can start writing about in my journal?
Is it better to write by hand in a notebook or on a phone/computer?
Use the alphabetical order and 'guide words' at the top of the page to locate a word quickly without reading every entry.
Check all the multiple definitions listed, as words often have different meanings depending on whether they are used in agriculture, science, or daily talk.
Pay attention to the 'part of speech' (noun, verb, or adjective) and example sentences to understand how to use the new word correctly in a sentence.
am: እያንዳንዱን ቃል ከማንበብ ይልቅ ቃላትን በፍጥነት ለማግኘት የአልፋቤት ቅደም ተከተልን እና በገጹ አናት ላይ ያሉትን መመሪያ ቃላት ይጠቀሙ።
ቃላት በግብርና፣ በሳይንስ ወይም በዕለት ተዕለት ንግግር ውስጥ የተለያየ ትርጉም ሊኖራቸው ስለሚችል ሁሉንም የተዘረዘሩ ትርጉሞች ይመልከቱ።
ቃሉን በትክክል ለመጠቀም የቃሉን አይነት (ስም፣ ግስ ወይም ቅጽል) እና የተሰጡ ምሳሌዎችን በትኩረት ይመልከቱ።
om: Jechoota hatattamaan argachuuf tartiiba qubeetiin fayyadamaa; kunis yeroo keessan qusata.
Jechi tokko hiika adda addaa qabaachuu danda'a; qonna keessatti, saayinsii keessatti fi haasaa guyyaa guyyaa keessatti hiika isaa adda baafadhaa.
Jechicha sirriitti fayyadamuuf inni maqaa, gochima yookiin ibsa maqaa ta'uu isaa fi fakkeenya kenname hordofaa.

en: What are the best English-Amharic-Oromo dictionaries available online?
How can I use a dictionary to improve my pronunciation?
What is the difference between a physical dictionary and a dictionary app?
Download educational apps like Khan Academy or language learning tools to study various subjects at your own pace.
Use YouTube to find practical video tutorials on topics ranging from modern farming techniques to complex school subjects like physics.
Download PDF versions of your school textbooks so you can read and study them offline without needing an active internet connection.
am: ስማርትፎንዎን ለትምህርት ለመጠቀም እንደ Khan Academy ያሉ ትምህርታዊ መተግበሪያዎችን በማውረድ የተለያዩ ትምህርቶችን በቤትዎ ይማሩ።
ከዘመናዊ የእርሻ ዘዴዎች እስከ ከባድ የትምህርት አይነቶች ድረስ ያሉ ተግባራዊ ስልጠናዎችን ለማግኘት ዩቲዩብን (YouTube) ይጠቀሙ።
የመማሪያ መጽሐፍትን በፒዲኤፍ (PDF) ፎርማት በማውረድ የኢንተርኔት ግንኙነት በሌለበት ጊዜም ጭምር ያንብቡ እና ያጥኑ።
om: Ismaartifoonii keessan barumsaaf fayyadamuuf appiiwwan akka Khan Academy buufachuun barnoota garaagaraa galma keessanitti baradhaa.
Mala qonnaa ammayyaa irraa kaasee hanga barnoota jajjaboo akka fiiziksiitti viidiyoowwan barumsaa Yuutuubii (YouTube) irratti hordofaa.
Kitaabota barnootaa bifa PDF tiin buufachuun yeroo interneetiin hin jirretti bilbiluma keessan irratti dubbisaa.

en: Which educational apps are free and work well in Ethiopia?
How can I save battery life on my smartphone while studying for long hours?
Are there any Ethiopian websites that provide free local curriculum textbooks in PDF?
Never share your bank account PIN, passwords, or personal identity numbers with anyone on Telegram, Facebook, or through text messages.
Before sharing a news story, verify it by checking official government websites or trusted news organizations to avoid spreading misinformation.
Be cautious of links or messages claiming you have won a prize, lottery, or job offer that requires you to pay money upfront.
am: የባንክ ሂሳብ ቁጥርዎን፣ የሚስጥር ቁጥርዎን (PIN) ወይም የግል መለያዎን በቴሌግራም፣ በፌስቡክ ወይም በቴክስት መልዕክት ለማንም አያጋሩ።
ማንኛውንም መረጃ ከማጋራትዎ በፊት የሐሰት ወሬ እንዳይሆን ትክክለኛነቱን ከመንግስት ድረ-ገጾች ወይም ከታመኑ የዜና አውታሮች ጋር በማመሳከር ያረጋግጡ።
ሎተሪ ደርሶዎታል ወይም ስጦታ አሸንፈዋል የሚሉ እና ቅድሚያ ክፍያ የሚጠይቁ አጠራጣሪ ሊንኮችን ወይም መልዕክቶችን በፍጹም አይክፈቱ።
om: Lakkoofsa baankii, koodii icciitii (PIN) yookiin odeeffannoo dhuunfaa keessan Telegram, Facebook yookiin ergaa gabaabaan eenyuufiyyuu hin erginaa.
Odeeffannoo sobaa akka hin rabsineef, odeeffannoo tokko utuu hin hiriniin dura madda amanamoo fi weebsaayitoota mootummaa irra jiraachuu isaa mirkaneeffadhaa.
Liinkiiwwan yookiin ergaawwan 'badhaasa mooteera' jedhanii fi kaffaltii dursaa gaafatan irraa of eeggadhaa.

en: How can I report a scam account on Facebook or Telegram?
What are the signs of a fake news website?
How do I create a strong password that is hard to hack?
Visit Gmail or Outlook and click 'Create Account' to set up a free digital identity using your real name.
Choose a strong password containing letters, numbers, and symbols to protect your account from unauthorized access.
Use your email to apply for jobs, register for national exams, and receive official information from agricultural and educational services.
am: በጂሜይል (Gmail) ወይም በኦውትሉክ (Outlook) ገጽ ላይ 'Create Account' የሚለውን በመጫን በራስዎ ስም ነፃ የኢሜይል አድራሻ ይክፈቱ።
አካውንትዎ እንዳይጠለፍ ፊደላትን፣ ቁጥሮችን እና ምልክቶችን የያዘ ጠንካራ የሚስጥር ቁጥር (Password) ይጠቀሙ።
ኢሜይልዎን ለስራ ማመልከቻ፣ ለሀገር አቀፍ ፈተናዎች ምዝገባ እና ከግብርና አገልግሎቶች መረጃዎችን ለመቀበል ይጠቀሙበት።
om: Gmail yookiin Outlook irratti 'Create Account' kan jedhu cuqaasuun maqaa keessaniin i-meelii (email) bilisaa banadhaa.
Herregni keessan akka hin hatamneef jecha icciitii (password) qubeewwan, lakkoofsotaa fi mallattoolee qabu fayyadamaa.
I-meelii keessan hojii barbaaddachuuf, qorumsa biyyaalessaaf galmaa'uu fi odeeffannoo qonnaa argachuuf fayyadamaa.

en: What should I do if I forget my email password?
How do I send an attachment (like a photo or document) via email?
Is it better to use Gmail or Outlook in Ethiopia?
The CPU (Central Processing Unit) is the 'brain' of the computer that processes all instructions and runs your software.
RAM (Random Access Memory) is temporary storage that helps the computer run multiple applications smoothly at the same time.
The screen or monitor displays the visual information, allowing you to see and interact with the programs and documents you are using.
am: ሲፒዩ (CPU) የኮምፒውተሩ 'አእምሮ' ሲሆን ሁሉንም መመሪያዎች የሚያቀነባብር እና ፕሮግራሞች እንዲሰሩ የሚያደርግ ክፍል ነው።
ራም (RAM) ኮምፒውተሩ ብዙ ስራዎችን በአንድ ጊዜ እና በፍጥነት እንዲሰራ የሚረዳው ጊዜያዊ የመረጃ ማከማቻ ነው።
ስክሪኑ (Screen) ምስላዊ መረጃዎችን የሚያሳይ ሲሆን የምንጠቀምባቸውን ፕሮግራሞች እና ፋይሎች እንድንመለከት ይረዳናል።
om: CPU'n 'sammuu' kompiitaraa yoo ta'u ajajoota hunda qindeessuun softiweerii akka hojjatu godha.
RAM'n kuusaa yeroo gabaabaa yoo ta'u, kompiitariin hojiiwwan hedduu si'a tokkotti saffisaan akka raawwatu gargaara.
Iskiriiniin (Screen) odeeffannoo fakkii fi barreeffamaa nuuf agarsiisuun hojii keenya akka hordofnu nu gargaara.

en: What is the difference between RAM and a Hard Drive?
How can I protect my computer screen from damage?
Why is the CPU called the brain of the computer?
Use search engines like Google by typing specific keywords related to your project to find articles, images, and data.
Visit reliable websites like Wikipedia or educational blogs to gather facts, but always verify the info with a second source.
Organize the information you find and cite your sources to avoid plagiarism and ensure your school project is high quality.
am: ስለ ፕሮጀክትዎ መረጃዎችን፣ ምስሎችን እና ዳታዎችን ለማግኘት እንደ ጎግል (Google) ባሉ መፈለጊያ ገጾች ላይ ቁልፍ ቃላትን ተጠቅመው ይፈልጉ።

om: Piroojektii keessaniif odeeffannoo argachuuf, Google irratti jechoota furtuu fayyadamuun barreeffamoota fi fakkiiwwan barbaadaa.
Dhugaawwan qabatamaa argachuuf Wiikippiidiyaa (Wikipedia) fayyadamaa; garuu odeeffannoon sun sirrii ta'uu madda biraan mirkaneeffadhaa.
Odeeffannoo argattan sirnaan qindeessuun madda isaa caqasaa; kunis qulqullina hojii keessanii dabala.

en: What are the best search engines for academic research?

Rights in Ethiopia include the right to education, freedom of expression, and equal protection under the law as guaranteed by the Constitution.

Active participation in the community, such as voting in elections and participating in local Kebele meetings, is essential for a healthy democracy.
am: በኢትዮጵያ ውስጥ ያሉት መብቶች በሕገ-መንግሥቱ የተረጋገጡትን የትምህርት ማግኘት፣ ሃሳብን በነጻነት የመግለጽ እና በሕግ ፊት እኩል የመታየት መብቶችን ያካትታሉ።
ዜጎች የአገሪቱን ሕጎች የማክበር፣ የመንግሥት አገልግሎቶችን ለመደገፍ ግብርን በታማኝነት የመክፈል እና የሕዝብ ንብረትን የመጠበቅ ግዴታ አለባቸው።

om: Itoophiyaa keessatti mirgoonni heera mootummaan mirkanaa'an mirga barumsaa, yaada ofii bilisaan ibsachuu fi seera duratti wal-qixa ilaalamuu kan dabalatuudha.
Lammiileen seera biyyaa kabajuu, tajaajila uummataa deeggaruuf gibira sirnaan kaffaluu fi qabeenya uummataa eeguu dirqama qabu.
Hirmaannaan hawaasummaa kan akka filannoo irratti sagalee kennuu fi walgahiiwwan gandaa irratti hirmaachuun dimookiraasii cimaaf baay'ee barbaachisaadha.

Manage stress by talking to trusted family members or friends; sharing your worries is a traditional and effective way to find support in Ethiopia.
Stay positive by focusing on things you can control and practicing gratitude for your daily successes on the farm or in school.
Engage in regular physical activities like walking or working in the garden, and ensure you take short breaks to rest your mind during busy seasons.
am: የሚያስጨንቁዎትን ነገሮች ለታመኑ የቤተሰብ አባላት ወይም ጓደኞች በማካፈል ውጥረትን ይቀንሱ፤ ይህ በኢትዮጵያ ባህል ውስጥ ትልቅ ድጋፍ የሚያስገኝ ዘዴ ነው።
በእርሻ ስራዎ ወይም በትምህርትዎ ውስጥ በሚያገኟቸው ጥቃቅን ስኬቶች ላይ ትኩረት በማድረግ እና አመስጋኝ በመሆን አዎንታዊ አስተሳሰብን ያሳድጉ።
እንደ በእግር መጓዝ ወይም የአትክልት ስራ ባሉ እንቅስቃሴዎች ላይ ይሳተፉ፤ እንዲሁም ስራ በሚበዛባቸው ወቅቶች አእምሮዎ እንዲያርፍ አጫጭር እረፍቶችን ይውሰዱ።
om: Waan isin dhiphisu miseensota maatii yookiin hiriyoota amantanitti himachuun dhiphuu keessan hir'isaa; kun aadaa keenya keessatti mala gaariidha.
Waan to'achuu dandeessan irratti xiyyeeffachuufi milkaa'ina qonnaa yookiin barnoota keessanitti guyyaa guyyaatti gammaduun ilaalcha gaarii akka qabaattan isin gargaara.
Sochii qaamaa kan akka lafoo deemuun yookiin hojii qonnaa irratti hirmaachuun, akkasumas yeroo hojiin baay'atutti sammuu keessaniif boqonnaa gabaabaa kennuun fayyaa keessaniif gaariidha.

en: What are the signs that stress is affecting my physical health?

In farming, use traditional labor-sharing practices like 'Debo' or 'Wobera' to complete heavy tasks like plowing or harvesting more quickly and efficiently.
At school, form study groups to help each other understand difficult subjects; explaining a topic to a classmate strengthens the knowledge of both students.
Teamwork builds strong community bonds and allows for the sharing of expensive tools or resources that one individual might not afford alone.
am: በእርሻ ስራ እንደ 'ደቦ' ወይም 'ወበራ' ያሉ ባህላዊ የጋራ ስራዎችን በመጠቀም እንደ ማረስ ወይም መከር መሰብሰብ ያሉ ከባድ ስራዎችን በፍጥነት እና በብቃት ያከናውኑ።
በትምህርት ቤት ከባድ ትምህርቶችን በጋራ ለመረዳት የጥናት ቡድኖችን ይፍጠሩ፤ ለአንድ ጓደኛዎ ትምህርቱን ማስረዳት የእርስዎን እውቀት ይበልጥ ያጠናክረዋል።
የቡድን ስራ ጠንካራ ማህበራዊ ትስስርን ከመፍጠሩም በላይ አንድ ሰው ብቻውን ሊገዛቸው የማይችላቸውን ውድ የእርሻ መሳሪያዎችን በጋራ ለመጠቀም ያስችላል።
om: Hojii qonnaa keessatti hojiiwwan jajjaboo akka qotuufi sassaabbii callaa hatattamaan xumuruuf aadaa 'Deboo' yookiin 'Woberaa' fayyadamaa.
Mana barumsaatti barnoota jajjaboo waliin barachuuf garee qo'annaa uumaa; hiriyaa keessaniif ibsuun isiniifis hubannaa dabalataa kenna.
Hojiin garee walitti dhufeenya hawaasummaa jabeessuufi meeshaalee qonnaa dhuunfaan bituun nama rakkisu waliin fayyadamuuf isin gargaara.

en: How do I handle a team member who is not doing their fair share of work?

Focus on the problem rather than attacking the person, and look for a 'win-win' solution where both parties feel their needs have been addressed.
am: አለመግባባቶች ሲፈጠሩ በጥሞና ማዳመጥን ይለማመዱ፤ የሌላውን ሰው ሃሳብ መረዳት ትንሽ ጭቅጭቅ ወደ ትልቅ ግጭት እንዳያመራ ይከላከላል።
በመሬት ወይም በሃብት ክፍፍል ላይ ለሚነሱ አለመግባባቶች ባህላዊ የሰላም ግንባታ ሂደቶችን በመከተል የተከበሩ ሽማግሌዎችን በመሃል ያስገቡ።

om: Yeroo walitti bu'iinsi uumamu qoma bal'inaan wal-dhaggeeffachuu shaakalaa; yaada nama biraa hubachuun falmiin xiqqoon akka hin babal'anne ittisa.
Wal-dhabbii lafaa yookiin qabeenyaa irratti uumamu hiikuuf jaarsolii biyyaa yookiin 'Jaarsummaa' fayyadamuun nagaa buusaa.
Nama sana irratti utuu hin taane rakkoo uumame irratti xiyyeeffadhaa; furmaata gama lameenuu gammachiisu dursa kennaa.

en: What should I do if the other person refuses to participate in a dialogue?

Write down your goals to make them feel real; for example, 'I want to build a modern house in 5 years' or 'I want to graduate university.'
Use the SMART method: make your goals Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, and Time-bound to ensure they are realistic.
Break large goals into small, monthly steps; if your goal is to buy a tractor, start by saving a specific amount of money from every harvest.
am: ግብዎ እውን እንዲሆን በወረቀት ላይ ያስፍሩት፤ ለምሳሌ 'በ5 ዓመት ውስጥ ዘመናዊ ቤት መገንባት እፈልጋለሁ' ወይም 'ዩኒቨርሲቲ መመረቅ እፈልጋለሁ' የሚሉትን ይጥቀሱ።
ግብዎ ተጨባጭ እንዲሆን SMART የተባለውን ዘዴ ይጠቀሙ፡ ግብዎ የተወሰነ፣ የሚለካ፣ የሚደረስበት፣ ተዛማጅነት ያለው እና የጊዜ ገደብ ያለው መሆን አለበት።
ትልልቅ ግቦችን ወደ ትናንሽ ወርሃዊ ተግባራት ይከፋፍሏቸው፤ ለምሳሌ ትራክተር ለመግዛት ካሰቡ ከእያንዳንዱ ምርት የተወሰነ ገንዘብ መቆጠብ ይጀምሩ።
om: Galmi keessan akka milkaa'uuf barreessanii ka'achuu: fakkeenyaaf 'waggaa 5 keessatti mana ammayyaa ijaaruun barbaada' yookiin 'yuunivarsiitii xumuruun barbaada'.
Galmi keessan dhugoomuuf mala SMART fayyadamaa: galmichi ifa, kan madaalamu, kan danda'amuufi yeroo kan qabu ta'uu qaba.
Galma gurguddaa gara tarkaanfiiwwan xixinnootti qoodaa; fakkeenyaaf tiraaktara bituuf yoo karoorfattan oomisha hunda irratti qarshii muraasa qusachuu jalqabaa.

en: How often should I review and update my long-term goals?

Increased temperatures often lead to the spread of pests and diseases into highland areas where they previously didn't exist, requiring closer crop monitoring.
Adopt climate-smart practices like planting drought-resistant crop varieties and using soil conservation techniques to keep moisture in the ground during dry spells.
am: ተደጋጋሚ ድርቅ እና የማይገመት የዝናብ ሁኔታ (ለምሳሌ የክረምት ወይም የበልግ ዝናብ መዘግየት) ሊያጋጥም ስለሚችል፣ የመዝራት ጊዜን ካላስተካከሉ ለምርት ውድመት ሊዳርግ ይችላል።
የሙቀት መጨመር ቀደም ሲል ባልነበሩባቸው የደጋማ አካባቢዎች ጭምር ተባዮች እና በሽታዎች እንዲስፋፉ ስለሚያደርግ የሰብል ክትትልን ማጠናከር ያስፈልጋል።
ድርቅን የሚቋቋሙ የሰብል ዝርያዎችን በመዝራት እና በአፈር ውስጥ እርጥበትን የሚጠብቁ የአፈር ጥበቃ ዘዴዎችን በመጠቀም ከአየር ንብረት ለውጥ ጋር የሚስማሙ አሰራሮችን ይተግብሩ።
om: Yeroo baay'ee hongee fi rooba hin herregamne (kan akka bishaan gannaa yookiin belgii turu) waan mul'atuuf, yeroo facaasaa yoo hin sirreessine callaan baduu danda'a.
提Ho'i qaama qilleensaa dabaluun ilbiisotaa fi dhibeewwan kanaan dura tulluuwwan irratti hin jirre akka babal'atan waan godhuuf hordoffii midhaanii jabeessuu barbaachisa.
Sanyiiwwan midhaanii hongee danda'anii fi malawwan biyyee keessatti jiidha tursiisan fayyadamuun jijjiirama qilleensaa wajjin wal-simatanii hojjachuun murteessaadha.
