Place the pot inside a smaller box or heat-resistant plastic bag to trap the heat, and cover the top with a clear glass or plastic sheet to create a greenhouse effect.
Use the solar cooker during the hottest part of the day (10 AM to 4 PM) for slow-cooking stews or grains, reducing the need for expensive charcoal or fuelwood.
am: የፀሐይ ብርሃንን ወደ ማብሰያው ድስት እንዲያንጸባርቅ ለማድረግ በትልቅ ካርቶን ውስጥ የአሉሚኒየም ፎይል ይለጥፉ።
ድስቱን ሙቀት እንዲይዝ በትንሽ ሳጥን ውስጥ ወይም ሙቀት በሚቋቋም ፕላስቲክ ውስጥ ያስቀምጡት፤ ከዚያም ሙቀቱ እንዳይወጣ ከላይ በመስታወት ወይም ግልጽ ፕላስቲክ ይሸፍኑት።
ውድ የሆነውን ከሰል ወይም እንጨት ለመቆጠብ የፀሐይ ማብሰያውን ከፍተኛ ፀሐይ ባለበት ሰዓት (ከጠዋቱ 4 ሰዓት እስከ ቀኑ 10 ሰዓት) ለጥራጥሬዎች ወይም ለወጥ ማብሰያነት ይጠቀሙ።
om: Kaartoonaa guddaa keessa isaa foyilii (aluminum foil) uffisuun ifa aduu gara distii nyaataa giddutti akka calaqqisu godhaa.
Disticha saanduqa xiqqaa keessa kaa'uun ho'a akka qabatuuf gubbaa isaa fulaa (glass) yookiin pilaastika qulqulluun haguugaa.
Kasaaraa cilee fi babbakuu hir'isuuf, sa'aatii aduun jabaatutti (ganama 4 hanga waaree booda 10) itti fayyadamuun nyaata bilcheessuu dandeessu.

en: Can a solar cooker work on cloudy days in Ethiopia?
What is the best type of pot to use for faster solar cooking?
How much money can I save per month by using solar energy for cooking?
Forests act as a barrier against soil erosion; their roots hold the soil together, preventing fertile land from being washed away during heavy rains.
Protecting endemic species like the Walia Ibex or the Ethiopian Wolf maintains the natural balance of the environment and supports income through eco-tourism.
Avoid cutting down indigenous trees for charcoal; instead, plant fast-growing woodlots for fuel and protect natural forests to ensure a steady supply of clean water and fresh air.
am: ደኖች የአፈር መሸርሸርን ለመከላከል ይረዳሉ፤ የዛፎች ስር አፈርን አጥብቆ በመያዝ ለም አፈር በዝናብ ተጠራርጎ እንዳይሄድ ያደርጋል።
እንደ ዋልያ ወይም የኢትዮጵያ ቀበሮ ያሉ ብርቅዬ እንስሳትን መጠበቅ የተፈጥሮን ሚዛን ከመጠበቁም በላይ በቱሪዝም አማካኝነት ገቢ ለማግኘት ይረዳል።
ለከሰል ተብሎ የሃገር በቀል ዛፎችን ከመቁረጥ ይቆጠቡ፤ በምትኩ ለነዳጅ የሚሆኑ በፍጥነት የሚያድጉ ዛፎችን ይትከሉ እና ንጹህ ውሃና አየር ለማግኘት ተፈጥሯዊ ደኖችን ይጠብቁ።
om: Bosonni dhiqannaa biyyee ittisa; hundeen mukeenii biyyee jabeessee qabuun callaan maasii irraa lolaan akka hin dhangalaane godha.
Bineensota Itoophiyaa qofa keessatti argaman akka Waaliyaa fi Qubbee eeguun madaallii uumamaa eeguufi galii tuuriizimii argachuuf gargaara.
Cileef jedhanii mukeen uumamaa muruu dhiisuun, bakka isaa mukeen ariitiin guddatan dhaabbachuu fi qilleensa qulqulluu argachuuf bosona eeguu qabna.

en: What are the most endangered wildlife species in my region?
How do I start a community-led forest protection group?
Can I get financial incentives for planting and maintaining indigenous trees?
Renewable energy from the sun and wind never runs out and does not produce smoke or pollution, making it healthier for your family and the planet.
Solar panels can provide clean lighting and power for mobile phones in rural areas not connected to the main electricity grid.
Ethiopia has vast potential for wind energy, with major wind farms in places like Ashegoda and Adama providing clean power to help grow the national economy.
am: ከፀሐይ እና ከንፋስ የሚገኝ ታዳሽ ኃይል በፍጹም አያልቅም፤ እንዲሁም ጭስ ወይም ብክለት ስለማያመጣ ለቤተሰብዎ ጤና እና ለዓለማችን ተመራጭ ነው።
የፀሐይ ኃይል (ሶላር) በዋናው የኤሌክትሪክ መስመር ላልተገናኙ የገጠር አካባቢዎች ንጹህ ብርሃን ለመስጠት እና ሞባይል ስልኮችን ለመሙላት ይረዳል።
ኢትዮጵያ ለንፋስ ኃይል ትልቅ አቅም ያላት ሲሆን፣ እንደ አሸጎዳ እና አዳማ ያሉ የንፋስ ኃይል ማመንጫዎች ለሀገር ኢኮኖሚ እድገት ንጹህ ኃይል ያቀርባሉ።
om: Anniisaan aduu fi qilleensa irraa argamu matumaa hin dhumu; akkasumas aaraa fi xurii waan hin uumneef fayyaa maatii fi addunyaaf gaariidha.
Inni aduu (solar) baadiyyaa ibsaa mootummaa hin qabneef ibsaa qulqulluu fi bilbila jidduu-galeessatti harkisuuf gargaara.
Itoophiyaan humna qilleensaa guddaa qabdi; iddoowwan akka Asheegoodaa fi Adaamaatti anniisaan qilleensaa dinagdee biyyaatiif humna guddaa kenna.

en: Where can I buy affordable and reliable solar lamps in rural Ethiopia?
How do I maintain a solar battery to make it last longer?
Are there government subsidies for small-scale solar irrigation pumps?
Separate organic waste like food scraps and coffee grounds to make compost, which is an excellent natural fertilizer for your garden.
Reuse plastic bottles and containers for planting seedlings or storing non-food items instead of throwing them into rivers or fields.
Never burn plastic or rubber waste near your home, as the smoke releases toxic chemicals that are harmful to your lungs and the environment.
am: ለምግብነት የማይውሉ ተረፈ-ምርቶችን እና የቡና አተላን በመለየት ኮምፖስት ያዘጋጁ፤ ይህም ለአትክልት ቦታዎ ምርጥ ተፈጥሯዊ ማዳበሪያ ነው።
የፕላስቲክ ጠርሙሶችን እና እቃዎችን ወደ ወንዝ ወይም ማሳ ላይ ከመጣል ይልቅ ችግኞችን ለመትከል ወይም ሌሎች ቁሳቁሶችን ለማስቀመጥ መልሰው ይጠቀሙባቸው።
ፕላስቲኮችን ወይም ጎማዎችን በቤትዎ አቅራቢያ አያቃጥሉ፤ የሚወጣው ጭስ ለሳንባ እና ለአካባቢ ጎጂ የሆኑ መርዛማ ኬሚካሎችን ይለቀቃል።
om: Hambaa nyaataa fi atala bunaa addaan baasuun xaa'oo uumamaa (compost) qopheessaa; kun kudraalee maasii keessaniif xaa'oo gaariidha.
Pilaastikoota laga keessatti gatuu dhiistanii, deebistanii sanyii biqiltuu irratti dhaabuuf yookiin meeshaa biraa keessa kaa'uuf fayyadamaa.
Pilaastika yookiin gommaa mana biratti hin gubinaa; aariin isaa summii qaba waan ta'eef sombaa fi naannoo ni miidha.

en: How long does it take for food waste to turn into usable compost?
What items cannot be composted in a backyard pit?
Are there local businesses in Ethiopia that buy recycled plastic or metal?
Gravity is the invisible force that pulls all objects toward the center of the Earth, which is why everything you drop falls down.
The Earth has a lot of mass, and this mass creates a strong gravitational pull that keeps our feet on the ground and the atmosphere in place.
Gravity is what causes ripe coffee berries or mangoes to fall from the tree to the ground instead of floating away into the sky.
am: ስበት (Gravity) ሁሉንም ነገሮች ወደ መሬት መሃል የሚስብ የማይታይ ኃይል ነው፤ ማንኛውም ነገር ሲለቀቅ ወደ ታች የሚወድቀው በዚህ ምክንያት ነው።
መሬት ከፍተኛ ክብደት ስላላት ይህ ክብደት እግራችን መሬት ላይ እንዲቆም እና አየር በቦታው እንዲኖር የሚያደርግ ጠንካራ የመሳብ ኃይል ይፈጥራል።
የበሰሉ የቡና ፍሬዎች ወይም ማንጎዎች ወደ ሰማይ ከመብረር ይልቅ ከዛፍ ላይ ተነቅለው ወደ መሬት እንዲወድቁ የሚያደርገው ይኸው የስበት ኃይል ነው።
om: Inni 'Gravity' jedhamu humna ijaan hin mul'anne kan wantoota hunda gara gidduu lafaatti harkisudha; wanti hundi yeroo gadi lakkifamu gara lafaatti kan kufuuf kanaafi.
Laffi ulfaatina guddaa waan qabduuf, kun immoo humna harkisaa jabaa miilli keenya lafa irra akka dhaabbatu godhu uuma.
Iji bunaa yookiin maangoo bilchaate gara samiitti utuu hin taane gara lafaatti akka harca'u kan godhu humna harkisa lafaati.

en: Does the moon have gravity like the Earth?
Why do heavier objects not fall faster than lighter ones in a vacuum?
How did Isaac Newton discover the law of universal gravitation?
Electricity flows in a continuous loop called a circuit; if the loop is broken (like turning off a switch), the electricity stops moving.
A simple circuit requires a power source like a battery, a path made of conductive wire, and a device like a light bulb to use the energy.
Materials that allow electricity to flow easily, like copper or water, are called conductors, while materials that block it, like rubber, are called insulators.
am: ኤሌክትሪክ 'ወረዳ' (circuit) በሚባል ተከታታይ መንገድ ውስጥ ይፈሳል፤ መንገዱ ከተቋረጠ (ለምሳሌ ማብሪያና ማጥፊያውን ሲያጠፉት) ኤሌክትሪኩ መንቀሳቀስ ያቆማል።
አንድ ቀላል የኤሌክትሪክ ወረዳ እንዲሰራ የኃይል ምንጭ (እንደ ባትሪ)፣ የኤሌክትሪክ ሽቦ እና ኃይሉን የሚጠቀም መሳሪያ (እንደ ባልብ) ያስፈልገዋል።
እንደ መዳብ ወይም ውሃ ያሉ ኤሌክትሪክን በቀላሉ የሚያስተላልፉ ነገሮች አስተላላፊዎች (conductors) ሲባሉ፣ እንደ ጎማ ያሉ ኤሌክትሪክን የሚከለክሉ ደግሞ ኢንሱሌተሮች ይባላሉ።
om: Elektirikiin karaa 'circuit' jedhamu keessa naanna'ee deema; yoo karaan sun cite (fakkeenyaaf yoo 'switch' dhaabsan) elektirikiin sun ni dhaabbata.
Sarkiitiin (circuit) salphaan madda humnaa (baatiri), karaa dhangala'aa (shiboo) fi meeshaa humna sana fayyadamu (baalbii) barbaada.
Wantoonni akka sibiilaa fi bishaan elektirikiin akka keessa darbu heyyaman 'conductors' jedhamu; kanneen akka gommaa dhorkan immoo 'insulators' jedhamu.

en: What is the difference between a series and a parallel circuit?
Why is it dangerous to touch electrical wires with wet hands?
What does a fuse do in an electrical circuit?
A physical change only changes the appearance or state, like melting ice into water; the substance remains the same and can often be reversed.
A chemical change creates a completely new substance through a reaction, like burning wood into ash or fermenting injera dough.
Rusting of iron tools or the souring of milk are examples of chemical changes because you cannot easily turn them back into their original state.
am: አካላዊ ለውጥ (Physical change) የነገሩን መልክ ወይም ሁኔታ ብቻ ይለውጣል፤ ለምሳሌ በረዶ ወደ ውሃ መቅለጥ፤ ነገሩ ግን ያው ነው ወደ ቀድሞ ሁኔታው መመለስ ይችላል።
ኬሚካላዊ ለውጥ (Chemical change) አዲስ ነገርን ይፈጥራል፤ ለምሳሌ እንጨት ወደ አመድነት ሲቃጠል ወይም የእንጀራ ሊጥ ሲቦካ (ሲበላላ)።
የብረት መሳሪያዎች መዝገት ወይም የወተት መምጠጥ ኬሚካላዊ ለውጦች ናቸው፤ ምክንያቱም በቀላሉ ወደ ቀድሞ ሁኔታቸው መመለስ አይችሉም።
om: Jijjiiramni 'Physical' jedhamu bifa qofa jijjiira, fakkeenyaaf cabbiin baquu; wantichi sanyiidhuma sana waan ta'eef deebisuun ni danda'ama.
Jijjiiramni 'Chemical' garuu waan haaraa uuma, fakkeenyaaf mukki gubatee ibiddatti jijjiiramuu yookiin bukoon bukaa'uun (fermentation).
Sibiilli rimeenyuun yookiin aannani itituun fakkeenya jijjiirama keemikaalaati; sababni isaas gara duraatti deebisuun hin danda'amu.

en: Is boiling water a physical or a chemical change?
Why is digestion considered a chemical change?
How can we identify if a chemical reaction has taken place?
Friction is the force that resists motion when two surfaces rub against each other, such as your shoes against a rocky path.
Rough surfaces create more friction and better grip, while smooth or wet surfaces (like mud) have low friction and make it easier to slip.
Friction also creates heat; this is why rubbing your hands together on a cold morning in the Ethiopian highlands makes them feel warm.
am: ሰበቃ (Friction) ሁለት ነገሮች እርስ በርስ ሲፋተጉ እንቅስቃሴን የሚቃወም ኃይል ነው፤ ለምሳሌ ጫማዎ ከኮረኮንች መንገድ ጋር ሲጋጭ።
ሻካራ ቦታዎች ከፍተኛ ሰበቃ እና የተሻለ መያዝ (grip) ሲኖራቸው፣ ለስላሳ ወይም እርጥብ ቦታዎች (እንደ ጭቃ) ዝቅተኛ ሰበቃ ስላላቸው ለመንሸራተት ቅርብ ናቸው።
ሰበቃ ሙቀትንም ይፈጥራል፤ በደጋማ የኢትዮጵያ አካባቢዎች ማለዳ ላይ እጅዎን እርስ በእርስ ሲያሹ ሙቀት የሚሰማዎት በዚህ ምክንያት ነው።
om: Sibaqaan (Friction) humna yeroo wantoonni lama wal-tuqan sochiitti gufuu ta'udha; fakkeenyaaf faana kophee keessanii fi daandii dhagaa.
Laffi haphataa ta'e sibaqaa guddaa qaba; laffi lallaafaan yookiin jiidhaan (loqee) immoo sibaqaa xiqqaa waan qabaniif nama mucucessu.
Sibaqaan ho'a uuma; kanaafuu ganama qabbanaawaa tulluuwwan Itoophiyaa irratti harkaa walitti harcaasuun ho'a isiniif kenna.

en: How does oil or grease reduce friction in farm machinery?
Why do car tires have patterns (treads) on them?
Is friction useful or harmful in everyday life?
Simple machines make work easier by changing the direction of a force or increasing the amount of force applied to an object.
A lever, like a crowbar used to lift a heavy stone, uses a pivot point called a fulcrum to multiply your strength.
A pulley uses a wheel and a rope to help lift heavy loads, like pulling a bucket of water up from a deep well in a village.
am: ቀላል ማሽኖች የኃይልን አቅጣጫ በመቀየር ወይም የሚተገበረውን ኃይል በመጨመር ስራን በቀላሉ ለመስራት ይረዳሉ።
እንደ ድንጋይ ለማንሳት እንደምንጠቀምበት መቆፈሪያ (Lever) ያሉ ማሽኖች ድጋፍ (fulcrum) በመጠቀም የሰውን ጉልበት ያባዛሉ።
መዘውር (Pulley) መንኮራኩር እና ገመድን በመጠቀም ከባድ ነገሮችን ለማንሳት ይረዳል፤ ለምሳሌ ከጥልቅ ጉድጓድ ውሃ በባልዲ ለመሳብ።
ቀላል ማሽኖች የኃይልን አቅጣጫ በመቀየር ወይም የሚተገበረውን ኃይል በመጨመር ስራን በቀላሉ ለመስራት ይረዳሉ።
om: Maashinoonni salphaan qajeelcha humnaa jijjiiruun yookiin humna guddan hojii akka nuuf salphatu godhu.
Sibiilli dhagaa ittiin buqqisnu (Lever), qabxii jabaa (fulcrum) fayyadamuun humna namaa dabala.
Mooraan (Pulley) geengoo fi funyoon gargaaramuun wantoota ulfaatoo akka ol-kaafnu nu gargaara; fakkeenyaaf boolla bishaanirraa bishaan harkisuuf.

en: Can you name the six types of simple machines?
How does a ramp (inclined plane) make it easier to load grain onto a truck?
What is mechanical advantage in simple machines?
Prices usually drop during the main harvest (Meher) because supply is high, so consider storing your grain to sell when the market supply decreases.
Demand for livestock and specific crops like onions often increases before major Ethiopian holidays, leading to higher prices for sellers.
If a crop like teff is scarce due to poor rain, the demand remains high but supply is low, which causes the market price to rise significantly.
am: በዋናው የመከር ወቅት (መህር) አቅርቦት ስለሚጨምር ዋጋ የመቀነስ ዝንባሌ አለው፤ ስለዚህ አቅርቦቱ በሚቀንስበት ወቅት ለመሸጥ እህልዎን ቢያከማቹ ይመረጣል።
ከዋና ዋና የኢትዮጵያ በዓላት በፊት ለከብቶች እና እንደ ቀይ ሽንኩርት ላሉ ሰብሎች ያለው ፍላጎት ስለሚጨምር ሻጮች የተሻለ ዋጋ ያገኛሉ።
በዝናብ እጥረት ምክንያት እንደ ጤፍ ያሉ ሰብሎች ሲጠፉ፣ ፍላጎቱ ከፍተኛ ሆኖ አቅርቦቱ ስለሚቀንስ የገበያ ዋጋው በከፍተኛ ሁኔታ እንዲጨምር ያደርጋል።
om: Waqtii sassaabbii callaa (Meher) dhiyeessiin waan baay'atuuf gatiin ni hir'ata; kanaafuu yeroo dhiyeessiin gabaa hir'atu gurguruuf callaa keessan kuusaa.
Ayyaanota gurguddoo Itoophiyaa dura fedhiin loonii fi kudraalee akka shunkurtii waan dabaluuf, gatii gaariitti gurgurachuun ni danda'ama.
Yoo roobni hir'atee xaafeen dhabame, fedhiin guddaa ta'ee dhiyeessiin waan hir'atuuf gatiin gabaa baay'ee ol-ka'a.

en: How can I track market prices without traveling to the city?
What are the risks of storing grain for too long while waiting for prices to rise?
How does transportation cost affect the supply of goods in rural markets?
Join a local Saving and Credit Cooperative (SACCO) to pool your savings with others, which allows you to access loans with lower interest rates than private moneylenders.
Commit to saving a fixed amount every month; consistent savings build your creditworthiness, making it easier to borrow for farm inputs like fertilizer.
Participate in the management of your SACCO to ensure transparency and to help decide how the collective funds are invested in the community.
am: ቁጠባዎን ከሌሎች ጋር ለማሰባሰብ በአከባቢዎ በሚገኝ አነስተኛ ብድር እና ቁጠባ ተቋም (SACCO) ውስጥ ይሳተፉ፤ ይህም ከግል አበዳሪዎች ያነሰ ወለድ ያለው ብድር ለማግኘት ይረዳዎታል።
በየወሩ የተወሰነ መጠን ያለው ገንዘብ ለመቆጠብ ይወስኑ፤ ቋሚ ቁጠባ የብድር እምነትዎን ስለሚገነባ እንደ ማዳበሪያ ያሉ የእርሻ ግብዓቶችን ለመግዛት ብድር ማግኘት ቀላል ይሆንልዎታል።
የተሰበሰበው ገንዘብ በምን ላይ መዋል እንዳለበት ለመወሰን እና ግልጽነት እንዲኖር በአከባቢዎ የብድር እና ቁጠባ ተቋም አመራር ውስጥ ይሳተፉ።
om: Waldaa Liqii fi Qusannaa (SACCO) naannoo keessan jiru miseensa ta'uun qusannaa keessan walitti qabaa; kun dhala xiqqaan liqii argachuuf isin gargaara.
Ji'a ji'aan qarshii murtaa'e qusachuuf murteessaa; kun amanamummaa liqii keessan dabaluun xaa'oo bitachuuf liqii akka argattan isin gargaara.
Maallaqni walitti qabame akkamitti akka hojirra oolu murteessuufi iftoomni akka jiraatuuf hirmaannaa waldaa keessanii jabeessaa.

en: What is the difference between a SACCO and a traditional 'Equb'?
What documents are required to open an account in an Ethiopian SACCO?
How safe is my money in a government-registered cooperative?
A 'Need' is something essential for survival and productivity, such as food, clean water, shelter, and seeds for the next planting season.
A 'Want' is something that is nice to have but not necessary, such as expensive clothes, entertainment, or a newer mobile phone when yours still works.
Prioritize spending on 'Needs' first, especially during the lean season, to ensure your family remains healthy and your farm stays productive.
am: አስፈላጊነት (Need) ለህልውና እና ለምርታማነት ወሳኝ የሆኑ እንደ ምግብ፣ ንጹህ ውሃ፣ መጠለያ እና ለሚቀጥለው የእርሻ ወቅት የሚሆኑ ዘሮችን ያካትታል።
ፍላጎት (Want) ቢኖሩ ጥሩ የሆኑ ነገር ግን የግድ አስፈላጊ ያልሆኑ እንደ ውድ ልብሶች፣ መዝናኛዎች ወይም እየሰራ ያለ ስልክ እያለ ሌላ አዲስ ስልክ መግዛትን ያካትታል።
ቤተሰብዎ ጤናማ እንዲሆን እና እርሻዎ ምርታማ እንዲሆን በተለይ ምርት በሌለባቸው ወራት ቅድሚያ ለሚያስፈልጉ (Needs) ነገሮች ወጪ ያድርጉ።
om: Barbaachisummaan (Need) waan jireenyaa fi oomishtummaaf murteessaa ta'aniidha; fakkeenyaaf nyaata, bishaan qulqulluu fi sanyii qonnaa.
Fedhiin (Want) waan qabaachuun gaarii ta'ee garuu jireenyaaf murteessaa hin taaneedha; fakkeenyaaf uffata gatii jabaa yookiin bilbila haaraa.
Maatiin keessan fayyaa akka ta'uu fi qonni keessan akka guddatuuf, dursanii waan baay'ee barbaachisoo ta'an (Needs) irratti qarshii baasaa.

en: How can I teach my children the difference between needs and wants?
How do I create a monthly budget for my household?
Is education considered a need or a want in financial planning?
Calculate your Total Revenue by adding up all the money you received from selling your products or services.
Calculate your Total Expenses by adding up all costs, including seeds, fertilizer, labor, transport, and taxes.
Subtract your Total Expenses from your Total Revenue; a positive number means you made a Profit, while a negative number means you have a Loss.
am: ምርትዎን ወይም አገልግሎትዎን በመሸጥ ያገኙትን ገንዘብ በሙሉ በመደመር ጠቅላላ ገቢዎን (Total Revenue) ያሰሉ።
እንደ ዘር፣ ማዳበሪያ፣ የጉልበት ዋጋ፣ ትራንስፖርት እና ግብር ያሉ ወጪዎችን በሙሉ በመደመር ጠቅላላ ወጪዎን (Total Expenses) ያሰሉ።
ከጠቅላላ ገቢዎ ላይ ጠቅላላ ወጪዎን ይቀንሱ፤ ውጤቱ ከዜሮ በላይ ከሆነ ትርፍ አግኝተዋል፣ ከዜሮ በታች ከሆነ ደግሞ ኪሳራ ገጥሞዎታል።
om: Gurgurtaa oomisha keessanii irraa maallaqa argattan hunda walitti ida'uun galii waliigalaa (Total Revenue) herregaa.
Baasii sanyii, xaa'oo, humna namaa, geejjibaa fi gibiraa walitti ida'uun baasii waliigalaa (Total Expenses) herregaa.
Galii waliigalaa irraa baasii waliigalaa hir'isaa; yoo bu'aan isaa 'positive' ta'e bu'aa argattan, yoo 'negative' ta'e immoo kasaartaniittu.

en: Why is it important to count my own labor as an expense?
What should I do if my farm business is consistently showing a loss?
How can I reduce my expenses without lowering the quality of my crop?
Planting different crops ensures that if one crop fails due to pests or bad weather, you still have others to harvest and sell for income.
Diversification allows you to have multiple income streams throughout the year rather than waiting for a single harvest season.
Including livestock alongside crop production provides a 'safety net' as animals can be sold for cash during emergencies or periods of crop failure.
am: የተለያዩ ሰብሎችን መዝራት አንዱ ሰብል በተባይ ወይም በአየር ንብረት ምክንያት ቢበላሽ፣ ሌሎች የሚሰበሰቡ እና የሚሸጡ ሰብሎች እንዲኖሩዎት በማድረግ ገቢዎን ይጠብቃል።
ዘርፈ-ብዙ ስራዎችን መስራት ከአንድ የመከር ወቅት ብቻ ከመጠበቅ ይልቅ ዓመቱን ሙሉ የተለያየ የገቢ ምንጭ እንዲኖርዎት ይረዳል።
ከሰብል ምርት ጎን ለጎን ከብቶችን ማርባት በድንገተኛ አደጋ ወይም በምርት ውድመት ወቅት እንስሳቱን በመሸጥ እንደ ዋስትና ያገለግላል።
om: Sanyii midhaanii adda addaa dhaabuun, yoo tokko sababa ilbiisaa yookiin qilleensaan bade, kan biraa irraa galii akka argattan isin gargaara.
Oomisha adda addaa hojjachuun waqtii sassaabbii tokko qofa eeguu dhiisanii waggaa guutuu madda galii garaagaraa akka qabaattan godha.
Midhaan cinaatti loon horsiisuun yeroo rakkotti yookiin yeroo callaan badu loon gurguranii maallaqa argachuuf akka wabbiitti tajaajila.

en: Which crops are the best to plant together (intercropping) in my region?
How many different types of crops are ideal for a small-scale farm?
Does raising chickens count as farm diversification?
When you breathe in, air travels through your nose and down into your lungs, where oxygen is absorbed into your blood to power your body.
In the high-altitude regions of Ethiopia, the air has less oxygen, so your lungs and heart work harder to ensure your muscles get enough energy.
Your lungs also remove waste by breathing out carbon dioxide, which plants then use to grow and produce fresh oxygen for us.
am: ወደ ውስጥ ሲተነፍሱ አየር በአፍንጫዎ በኩል ወደ ሳንባዎ ይገባል፤ እዚያም ኦክስጅን ወደ ደምዎ ውስጥ በመግባት ለሰውነትዎ ጉልበት ይሰጣል።
በኢትዮጵያ ደጋማ አካባቢዎች በአየር ውስጥ ያለው ኦክስጅን አነስተኛ በመሆኑ፣ ጡንቻዎችዎ በቂ ጉልበት እንዲያገኙ ሳንባዎ እና ልብዎ ጠንክረው ይሰራሉ።
ሳንባዎ ካርቦን ዳይኦክሳይድን ወደ ውጭ በማስወጣት ቆሻሻን ያስወግዳል፤ ይህም ጋዝ ተክሎች እንዲያድጉ እና ለእኛ ንጹህ ኦክስጅን እንዲሰጡን ይጠቅማቸዋል።
om: Yeroo argansiiftan qilleensi funyaan keessaniin gara sombaatti galla; achitti oksiijiiniin gara dhiigaatti makamuun qaama keessaniif humna kenna.
Naannoolee badda Itoophiyaatti oksiijiiniin qilleensa keessa jiru xiqqaa waan ta'eef, sombiifi onneen keessan maashaaleen humna gahaa akka argataniif jabaatanii hojjatu.
Sombi keessan kaarboon-daay-oksaayidii gara alaatti baasuun xurii qulqulleessa; gaasiin kun immoo biqiltoonni guddatanii oksiijiinii nuuf kennuuf isaan gargaara.

en: How does indoor smoke from cooking fires affect lung health in rural Ethiopia?
Why is it harder to breathe when you travel from the lowlands to the mountains?
What are the best exercises to strengthen the respiratory system?
White blood cells are like the 'soldiers' of your body; they constantly patrol your blood to find and destroy harmful bacteria and viruses.
When you get a cut or an illness, these cells multiply quickly to attack the infection and help your body heal faster.
Eating a balanced diet with local fruits and vegetables helps your body produce strong white blood cells to protect you against diseases like malaria or flu.
am: ነጭ የደም ሴሎች እንደ ሰውነትዎ 'ወታደሮች' ናቸው፤ ጎጂ ባክቴሪያዎችን እና ቫይረሶችን ለማግኘት እና ለማጥፋት ሁልጊዜ በደምዎ ውስጥ ይዘዋወራሉ።
ቁስል ወይም ህመም ሲያጋጥምዎት እነዚህ ሴሎች ኢንፌክሽኑን ለመከላከል እና ሰውነትዎ በፍጥነት እንዲያገግም ለመርዳት በፍጥነት ይራባሉ።
የአከባቢ ፍራፍሬዎችን እና አትክልቶችን ያካተተ የተመጣጠነ ምግብ መመገብ ሰውነትዎ እንደ ወባ ወይም ጉንፋን ካሉ በሽታዎች የሚከላከሉ ጠንካራ ነጭ የደም ሴሎችን እንዲያመርት ይረዳል።
om: Seeliiwwan dhiiga adii akka 'loltuu' qaama keessaniiti; baakteriyaa fi vaayiraasota miidhaa geessisan barbaaduun dhabamsiisuuf dhiiga keessa naanna'u.
Yeroo madooftan yookiin dhukkubsattan, seeliiwwan kun hatattamaan baay'achuun dhibee sana loluun qaamni keessan akka dafee fayyu gargaaru.
Kudraalee fi muduraalee naannoo soorachuun qaamni keessan seelii dhiiga adii jabaa akka oomishuufi dhibee akka weerraraa (malaria) irraa akka isin eegu gargaara.

en: What happens to white blood cells when a person has a very high fever?
Which Ethiopian traditional foods are best for boosting the immune system?
Can a blood test tell if my white blood cell count is low?
Genetics is the study of how traits like height, eye color, and hair type are passed from parents to children through information called genes.
Each child receives half of their genetic information from their mother and half from their father, creating a unique mix that explains family resemblances.
In farming, this same principle is used in cross-breeding to select the best traits from local Ethiopian livestock and combine them with high-yielding varieties.
am: ጂነቲክስ እንደ ቁመት፣ የአይን ቀለም እና የፀጉር አይነት ያሉ ባህሪያት 'ጂን' በሚባል መረጃ አማካኝነት ከወላጆች ወደ ልጆች እንዴት እንደሚተላለፉ የሚያጠና የትምህርት ዘርፍ ነው።
እያንዳንዱ ልጅ ግማሹን የዘር መረጃ ከእናቱ ግማሹን ደግሞ ከአባቱ ስለሚቀበል፣ በቤተሰብ አባላት መካከል ያለውን መመሳሰል የሚፈጥር ልዩ ውህደት ይፈጠራል።
በእርሻ ስራ ውስጥ ይህ መርህ ከሀገር በቀል የእንስሳት ዝርያዎች ምርጥ ባህሪያትን መርጦ ከፍተኛ ምርት ከሚሰጡ ዝርያዎች ጋር ለማዳቀል ጥቅም ላይ ይውላል።
om: Jeneetiksiin (genetics) amalli akka dheerinaa, bifa ijaa fi bifa rifeensaa 'genes' fayyadamanii akkamitti akka warrarraa gara ijoolleetti darbu qo'ata.
Mucaan tokko walakkaa ragaa jeneetikii haadha isaa irraa, walakkaa immoo abbaa isaa irraa waan fudhatuuf, wal-fakkaattii maatii uuma.
Hojii qonnaa keessattis, sanyiin beeyladaa Itoophiyaa amala gaarii qaban sanyii callaa gaarii kennan wajjin wal-makuun (cross-breeding) kan hojjetamu hunda'uma kanaan.

en: Can a child have a trait that neither parent shows, like a different eye color?
Why are twins sometimes identical and sometimes different?
How is genetic knowledge used to develop drought-resistant crops?
A vaccine introduces a tiny, harmless part of a germ into your body to 'train' your immune system to recognize and fight that specific disease in the future.
Once vaccinated, your body creates 'antibodies' that act like a memory, so if the real germ enters your body later, your immune system kills it before you get sick.
Vaccines have helped eliminate dangerous diseases like smallpox and are essential for protecting children in Ethiopia against polio, measles, and tetanus.
am: ክትባት አንድን ጎጂ ተህዋሲያን በትንሽ እና ጉዳት በማያደርስ መልኩ ወደ ሰውነትዎ በማስተዋወቅ፣ ወደፊት ያ በሽታ ሲመጣ በሽታ የመከላከል ስርዓትዎ ለይቶ እንዲዋጋ 'ያሰለጥነዋል።'
ከተከተቡ በኋላ ሰውነትዎ እንደ ማስታወሻ የሚያገለግሉ 'አንቲቦዲዎችን' ይፈጥራል፤ ስለዚህ ትክክለኛው በሽታ በኋላ ላይ ወደ ሰውነትዎ ቢገባ ሳይታመሙ ያጠፋዋል።
ክትባቶች እንደ ፈንጣጣ ያሉ አደገኛ በሽታዎችን ለማጥፋት የረዱ ሲሆን፣ በኢትዮጵያ ውስጥ ህጻናትን እንደ ፖሊዮ፣ ኩፍኝ እና መንጋጋ ቆልፍ ካሉ በሽታዎች ለመጠበቅ ወሳኝ ናቸው።
om: Talaalliin qaama ijaan hin mul'anne ka'umsa dhibee ta'e bifa miidhaa hin geessisneen qaama keessatti madaqsuun, gara fuulduraatti dhibee sana akka loluuf 'leellisa'.
Erga talaalamtanii booda, qaamni keessan 'antibodies' kan akka yaadannootti tajaajilu uuma; yoo dhibeen sun dhufe, utuu isin hin dhukkubsin ajjeesa.
Talaalliin dhibeewwan akka 'smallpox' dhabamsiisuuf gargaareera; Itoophiyaa keessattis ijoollee 'polio', 'measles' fi 'tetanus' irraa eeguuf murteessaadha.

en: Why do some vaccines require multiple doses or 'booster' shots?
Are there any common side effects after a child receives a vaccine?
Where can I find the official vaccination schedule for children in Ethiopia?
Most bacteria are beneficial; in the soil, they break down dead plants into nutrients that crops like maize and wheat need to grow healthy.
In the human stomach, 'good bacteria' help digest food and produce essential vitamins, keeping your gut healthy and strengthening your overall immunity.
Bacteria also drive the fermentation of 'Injera' dough, creating the unique sour taste and making the nutrients easier for the body to absorb.
am: አብዛኛዎቹ ባክቴሪያዎች ጠቃሚ ናቸው፤ በአፈር ውስጥ የደረቁ ተክሎችን በመሰባበር እንደ በቆሎ እና ስንዴ ያሉ ሰብሎች እንዲያድጉ የሚያስፈልጋቸውን ንጥረ ነገር ያዘጋጃሉ።
በሰው ልጅ ሆድ ውስጥ ያሉ 'ጥሩ ባክቴሪያዎች' ምግብ እንዲፈጭ እና አስፈላጊ ቪታሚኖች እንዲመረቱ ይረዳሉ፤ ይህም የሆድ ጤንነትን እና አጠቃላይ በሽታ የመከላከል አቅምን ያጠናክራል።
ባክቴሪያዎች የእንጀራ ሊጥ እንዲበላላ (fermentation) በማድረግ ልዩ የሆነውን ኮምጣጣ ጣዕም እንዲኖረው እና ንጥረ ነገሮች በሰውነት በቀላሉ እንዲመጠጡ ያደርጋሉ።
om: Baakteriyaan baay'een faayidaa qabu; biyyee keessatti baala gogaa gara soorataatti jijjiiruun akka boqqoolloo fi qamadiin guddatan godhu.
Garaa namaa keessatti 'baakteriyaan gaariin' nyaata bullessuu fi vitaaminii maddisiisuun dandeettii dhibee ittisuu qaamaa jabeessu.
Baakteriyaan bukoon bukaa'ee (fermentation) buddeenni mi'aa isaa akka koflooftu godhu; kunis soorata qaaman fudhatamuuf akka salphatu godha.

en: How can antibiotics affect the 'good bacteria' in the human digestive system?
What are the best ways to improve beneficial bacteria in farm soil?
Why is eating traditionally fermented foods like 'Ergo' (yogurt) good for health?
The Blue Nile (Abbay) starts in Ethiopia's Lake Tana and is a major tributary of the Nile, the longest river in Africa.
Ras Dashen is the highest peak in Ethiopia at 4,550 meters, while Mount Kilimanjaro in Tanzania is the highest in all of Africa.
The Great Rift Valley is a major geographical feature that divides Ethiopia and stretches across much of East Africa.
am: ጥቁር አባይ የሚጀምረው ከኢትዮጵያው ጣና ሐይቅ ሲሆን በአፍሪካ ረጅሙ ወንዝ ለሆነው ለዓባይ ወንዝ ዋና ገባር ነው።
ራስ ዳሸን 4,550 ሜትር ከፍታ ያለው የኢትዮጵያ ከፍተኛው ተራራ ሲሆን በታንዛኒያ የሚገኘው ኪሊማንጃሮ ደግሞ የአፍሪካ ከፍተኛው ተራራ ነው።
ታላቁ የምስራቅ አፍሪካ ስምጥ ሸለቆ ኢትዮጵያን ለሁለት የሚከፍል እና በብዙ የምስራቅ አፍሪካ አገሮች ውስጥ የሚዘልቅ ትልቅ መልክዓ ምድራዊ ገጽታ ነው።
om: Abbaay kan jalqabu haroo Xaanaa Itoophiyaa keessaa yoo ta'u, laga Naayil isa dheeraa Afrikaaf madda guddaadha.
Raas Daashen tulluu Itoophiyaa keessaa isa ol-ka'aa (meetira 4,550) yoo ta'u, Tulluun Kilimanjaro (Tanzaaniyaa) ammoo Afrikaa keessaa isa tokkoffaadha.
Sululli Shallaqqii Guddan Itoophiyaa bakka lamatti qooduun hanga Afrikaa Bahaa hedduutti diriira.

en: Which other major rivers flow out of Ethiopia into neighboring countries?
What are the benefits of the Rift Valley lakes for Ethiopia's economy?
How many countries does the Nile river pass through before reaching the sea?
The Earth rotates on its axis every 24 hours; as different parts of the planet face the sun, they experience day at different times.
Ethiopia is in the East Africa Time zone (GMT+3), meaning the sun rises earlier here than in West African countries like Nigeria.
In Ethiopia, local time is often counted from sunrise (6 AM is 12:00 in local counting), which aligns with the daily solar cycle.
am: መሬት በየ24 ሰዓቱ በራሷ ዛቢያ ላይ ትዞራለች፤ የተለያዩ የፕላኔቷ ክፍሎች ወደ ፀሐይ ሲዞሩ በተለያየ ሰዓት ቀን ይሆናል።
ኢትዮጵያ በምስራቅ አፍሪካ የሰዓት ቀጠና (GMT+3) ውስጥ ትገኛለች፤ ይህም ማለት ፀሐይ ከምዕራብ አፍሪካ አገሮች (እንደ ናይጄሪያ) ቀድማ እዚህ ትወጣለች ማለት ነው።
በኢትዮጵያ የአካባቢ ሰዓት አቆጣጠር ከፀሐይ መውጫ ጀምሮ ይቆጠራል (ለምሳሌ የጠዋቱ 12 ሰዓት በአገር ውስጥ አቆጣጠር 6 ሰዓት ይባላል)።
om: Laffi sa'aatii 24 keessatti si'a tokko ofirra naannofti; kun immoo kutaaleen addunyaa adda addaa yeroo garaagaraatti aduu akka argatan godha.
Itoophiyaan sa'aatii Afrikaa Bahaa (GMT+3) hordofti; kanaanis biyyoota Afrikaa Lixaa (akka Naayijeeriyaa) dura aduun nuuf baati.
Itoophiyaa keessatti lakkoofsi sa'aatii yeroo baay'ee barii (ganama sa'aatii 12:00) irraa jalqaba; kunis madaallii aduu wajjin deema.

en: Why does Ethiopia use a 12-hour clock system that starts at dawn?
How many time zones are there in total across the entire world?
Does the length of the day change significantly in Ethiopia throughout the year?
A map scale shows the relationship between a distance on the map and the actual distance on the ground (e.g., 1cm on map = 1km in reality).
Symbols are small pictures used to represent real features like rivers (blue lines), mountains (brown triangles), or towns (black dots).
The map legend or 'Key' explains what each symbol and color means, while the compass rose shows directions like North and South.
am: የካርታ ልኬት (Scale) በካርታው ላይ ባለው ርቀት እና በመሬት ላይ ባለው ትክክለኛ ርቀት መካከል ያለውን ዝምድና ያሳያል (ለምሳሌ 1ሳ.ሜ በካርታ = 1ኪ.ሜ በመሬት)።
ምልክቶች እንደ ወንዞች (ሰማያዊ መስመሮች)፣ ተራሮች (ቡናማ ሶስት ማዕዘን) ወይም ከተሞች (ጥቁር ነጥቦች) ያሉ ትክክለኛ ነገሮችን ለመወከል የሚያገለግሉ ምስሎች ናቸው።
የካርታው መፍቻ (Key) የእያንዳንዱ ምልክት እና ቀለም ምንነት ሲያብራራ፣ ኮምፓስ ደግሞ እንደ ሰሜን እና ደቡብ ያሉ አቅጣጫዎችን ያሳያል።
om: Iskeelii (Scale) kaartaa fageenya kaartaa irratti mul'atuu fi fageenya lafa irra jiru wal-bira qabee agarsiisa (fkn. 1cm kaartaa irratti = 1km lafa irratti).
Mallattooleen fakkiiwwan xixinnoo laga (sarara cuquliisa), tulluu (koflee bunaa) yookiin magaalaa (tuqaa gurraacha) bakka bu'aniidha.
Hiikni mallattoolee (Legend) tokkoon tokkoo bifaafi fakkii ni ibsa; 'Compass' immoo kallattii akka Kaabaa fi Kibbaa nuuf agarsiisa.

en: What is the difference between a large-scale map and a small-scale map?
How can I use a map to calculate the travel time between two Ethiopian cities?
Why is North always at the top of most modern maps?
Weather describes short-term changes in the air, such as whether it is raining or sunny in Addis Ababa today.
Climate is the average pattern of weather in a specific place over a long period (usually 30 years or more).
For example, Ethiopia's climate is generally tropical monsoon, characterized by a long rainy season (Kiremt) and a dry season (Bega).
am: የአየር ሁኔታ (Weather) በአጭር ጊዜ ውስጥ በአየር ላይ የሚከሰቱ ለውጦችን ይገልጻል፤ ለምሳሌ ዛሬ አዲስ አበባ ውስጥ ዝናብ ይሁን ወይም ፀሐይ።
የአየር ንብረት (Climate) በአንድ የተወሰነ ቦታ ላይ ለረጅም ጊዜ (ብዙውን ጊዜ ለ30 ዓመታት ወይም ከዚያ በላይ) የሚታይ የአየር ሁኔታ ስብስብ ነው።
ለምሳሌ የኢትዮጵያ የአየር ንብረት በአጠቃላይ ሞቃታማ ሲሆን ረጅም የዝናብ ወቅት (ክረምት) እና ደረቅ ወቅት (በጋ) አለው።
om: Haalli qilleensaa (Weather) jijjiirama yeroo gabaabaa ibsa; fakkeenyaaf Finfinnee keessa har'a bishaan roobaa jira moo aduudha kan jedhuudha.
Kilayimeetiin (Climate) ammoo giddu-galeessa haala qilleensaa yeroo dheeraa (waggaa 30 ol) bakka tokkoo ibsa.
Fakkeenyaaf, kilayimeetiin Itoophiyaa waqtii roobaa dheeraa (Ganna) fi waqtii gogaa (Bega) kan qabuudha.

en: How does global warming affect the climate of Ethiopia?
What tools do meteorologists use to measure daily weather?
Which regions of Ethiopia have the most extreme climate differences?
There are seven continents on Earth: Africa, Asia, Europe, North America, South America, Antarctica, and Australia.
There are five major oceans: the Pacific, Atlantic, Indian, Southern, and Arctic Oceans.
Ethiopia is located on the continent of Africa, in the northeastern region known as the Horn of Africa, close to the Indian Ocean.
am: በመሬት ላይ ሰባት አህጉራት አሉ፡ አፍሪካ፣ እስያ፣ አውሮፓ፣ ሰሜን አሜሪካ፣ ደቡብ አሜሪካ፣ አንታርክቲካ እና አውስትራሊያ።
አምስት ዋና ዋና ውቅያኖሶች አሉ፡ ፓሲፊክ፣ አትላንቲክ፣ ህንድ፣ ደቡባዊ እና አርክቲክ ውቅያኖሶች።
ኢትዮጵያ በአፍሪካ አህጉር ውስጥ፣ በአፍሪካ ቀንድ ተብሎ በሚታወቀው ሰሜን ምስራቅ አካባቢ ለህንድ ውቅያኖስ ቅርብ ሆና ትገኛለች።
om: Addunyaa irratti ardiiwwan torba jiru: Afrikaa, Eeshiyaa, Awurooppaa, Ameerikaa Kaabaa, Ameerikaa Kibbaa, Antaarkitikaa fi Awustiraaliyaa.
Garba gurguddoo shantu jira: Paasifiik, Atilaantiik, Indiyaan, Kibbaa fi Arkitiik.
Itoophiyaan ardii Afrikaa keessatti, naannoo gaanfa Afrikaa jedhamutti Garba Indiyaatti dhihaattee argamti.

en: Which is the largest continent by land area and population?
Why is Antarctica the only continent without a permanent human population?
How do the oceans affect the weather patterns in East Africa?
Soap molecules have a 'water-loving' head and a 'water-fearing' tail; the tails attach to oil and dirt while the heads stay in the water.
When you scrub, the soap molecules surround the dirt to form tiny spheres called micelles, trapping the grime in the center.
When you rinse with water, the heads of the micelles are pulled away, carrying the trapped dirt and oil down the drain.
am: የሳሙና ሞለኪውሎች ውሃን የሚወድ 'ራስ' እና ውሃን የሚጠላ 'ጭራ' አላቸው፤ ጭራዎቹ ከዘይት እና ከቆሻሻ ጋር ሲጣበቁ ራሶቹ ደግሞ በውሃው ውስጥ ይቆያሉ።
እጅዎን ወይም ልብስዎን በሚያሹበት ጊዜ የሳሙና ሞለኪውሎች ቆሻሻውን በመክበብ 'ማይሴልስ' የሚባሉ ጥቃቅን ክብ ቅርጾችን በመፍጠር ቆሻሻውን መሃል ላይ ያስራሉ።
በውሃ ሲለቁት የሳሙናው ራሶች በውሃው ይሳባሉ፤ በዚህም የታሰረውን ቆሻሻ እና ዘይት አብረው ጠርገው ያስወግዳሉ።
om: Molekiulonni saamunaa mataa bishaan jaallatuufi eegee bishaan jibbatu qabu; eegeen sun zayitaafi xurii wajjin wal-qabata, mataan isaa immoo bishaan keessa tura.
Yeroo dhiptan, molekiulonni saamunaa xurii sana naanneffachuun koflee xixinnoo 'micelles' jedhamu uumuun xurii sana gidduutti kiyyeessu.
Yeroo bishaanitti naqan, mataan molekiuloota sanaa bishaanitti harkifamuun xurii kiyyeeffame sana dhiquun gatu.

en: Why is warm water more effective than cold water when using soap?
Can soap kill bacteria or does it only wash them away?
What is the difference between natural soap and chemical detergents?
Rusting, or oxidation, occurs when iron metal reacts with oxygen and water (moisture) in the air, creating a weak reddish-brown layer.
In humid areas of Ethiopia, farm tools like sickles and plows rust quickly if left outside, making them blunt and fragile over time.
Prevent rust by keeping tools dry, painting them to block air, or applying a thin layer of oil or grease to create a waterproof barrier.
am: መዝገት የሚከሰተው ብረት በአየር ውስጥ ካለው ኦክስጅን እና ውሃ (እርጥበት) ጋር ኬሚካላዊ ምላሽ ሲሰጥ ነው፤ ይህም ደካማ ቡናማ ሽፋን ይፈጥራል።
በኢትዮጵያ እርጥበታማ አካባቢዎች እንደ ማጭድ እና ሞፈር ያሉ የእርሻ መሳሪያዎች ውጭ ከቀሩ በፍጥነት ይዝጋሉ፤ ይህም በጊዜ ሂደት እንዲደነዝዙ እና እንዲሰባበሩ ያደርጋቸዋል።
መሳሪያዎችን በደረቅ ቦታ በማስቀመጥ፣ አየር እንዳያገኟቸው በመቀባት ወይም ውሃን የሚከላከል ዘይት/ቅባት በመቀባት መዝገትን መከላከል ይቻላል።
om: Rimeenyuun kan uumamu yeroo sibiilli oksiijiinii fi bishaan (jiidha) qilleensa keessa jiruun wal-argudha; kunis dibata bunaa laafaa uuma.
Naannoolee jiidha qabanitti meeshaaleen qonnaa akka haamtuu fi gindii yoo alatti dhiifaman dafanii rimeayu; kunis akka hin qaramannee fi akka caccaban godha.
Meeshaalee gogsanii kaa'uun, dibuun yookiin zayita lallaafaa itti dibuun qilleensaa fi bishaan irraa eeguun rimeenyuu ittisuun ni danda'ama.

en: Does salt water make iron rust faster than fresh water?
How can I remove rust from an old farm tool safely?
What is galvanization and how does it protect metal?
Acids are substances that taste sour and can be found in lemons or vinegar; they have a low pH value (below 7).
Bases are substances that taste bitter and feel slippery, like soap or baking soda; they have a high pH value (above 7).
In Ethiopia, 'Lime' (Nora) is often added to acidic soils to raise the pH level, a process called neutralization, making the soil better for crops.
am: አሲዶች ኮምጣጣ ጣዕም ያላቸው ነገሮች ሲሆኑ እንደ ሎሚ ወይም ሆምጣጤ ባሉ ነገሮች ውስጥ ይገኛሉ፤ የፒኤች (pH) መጠናቸውም ከ7 በታች ነው።
ቤዞች ደግሞ የሚመሩ እና የሚንሸራትቱ ሲሆኑ እንደ ሳሙና ወይም ቢካርቦናት (Baking soda) ያሉ ናቸው፤ የፒኤች መጠናቸውም ከ7 በላይ ነው።
በኢትዮጵያ አሲዳማ አፈሮችን ለማከም 'ኖራ' ይጨመራል፤ ይህም አፈሩ ለሰብል ተስማሚ እንዲሆን አሲዱን የማመጣጠን (Neutralization) ስራ ይሰራል።
om: Asiidonni waan dhangaggaa'an kan akka loomii fi vinnigaarii keessatti argamaniidha; sadarkaan pH isaanii 7 gadi.
Beezonni immoo waan hadhaa'anii fi mucucessoo dha, akka saamunaa yookiin beeking soodaa; sadarkaan pH isaanii 7 ol.
Itoophiyaa keessatti, biyyee asiidii qabu sirreessuuf 'nuuraa' itti dabalu; kunis biyyichi callaa gaarii akka kennuuf gargaara.

en: What happens when you mix an acid and a base together?
How can I test the pH of my farm soil at home?
Why are some fertilizers more acidic than others?
Fermentation is a process where tiny microorganisms like yeast and bacteria eat the sugars in dough and turn them into alcohol and carbon dioxide gas.
In Injera making, the carbon dioxide gas creates bubbles that rise to the surface, forming the famous 'eyes' (ayen) when the batter is cooked.
This process also creates beneficial acids that give Injera its sour taste and help preserve the food from going bad too quickly.
am: መቦካት (Fermentation) ማለት እርሾ ውስጥ ያሉ ጥቃቅን ተህዋሲያን በሊጡ ውስጥ ያለውን ስኳር በመመገብ ወደ አልኮል እና ካርቦን ዳይኦክሳይድ ጋዝ የሚቀይሩበት ሂደት ነው።
እንጀራ በሚዘጋጅበት ጊዜ የሚፈጠረው ካርቦን ዳይኦክሳይድ ወደ ላይ በመውጣት እንጀራው በሚጋገርበት ጊዜ የታወቁትን 'አይኖች' ይፈጥራል።
ይህ ሂደት እንጀራው የራሱ የሆነ ኮምጣጣ ጣዕም እንዲኖረው የሚያደርጉ አሲዶችን ከመፍጠሩም በላይ ምግቡ በፍጥነት እንዳይበላሽ ይረዳል።
om: Bukaayuun (Fermentation) adeemsa baakteriyaaleen xixinnoon sukkaara bukoo keessa jiru soorachuun gara 'alcohol' fi 'carbon dioxide' tti jijjiiraniidha.
Yeroo buddeenii, gaasiin carbon dioxide sun gara gubbaatti ol-ba'uun 'ija' buddeenaa beekamaa sana uuma.
Adeemsi kun asiidii buddeenaaf mi'aa dhangaggaa'aa kennu uumuun, nyaatichi dafee akka hin banne gargaara.

en: How does temperature affect the speed of Injera fermentation?
What is the difference between wild yeast and commercial bread yeast?
Why is teff better for fermentation than other grains like maize?
Nitrogen (N) is essential for green leaf growth; without enough nitrogen, plants like maize will turn yellow and stay small.
Phosphorus (P) is vital for strong root development and flower/fruit production, helping the plant establish itself early in the season.
Potassium (K) improves overall plant health, helps fight diseases, and ensures the quality and size of the harvested seeds or tubers.
am: ናይትሮጅን (N) ለአረንጓዴ ቅጠል እድገት ወሳኝ ነው፤ በቂ ናይትሮጅን ከሌለ እንደ በቆሎ ያሉ ተክሎች ቅጠላቸው ይቢጫናል፣ እድገታቸውም ይገታል።
ፎስፈረስ (P) ለጠንካራ ስር እድገት እና ለአበባ/ፍሬ ምርት በጣም አስፈላጊ ነው፤ ይህም ተክሉ በወቅቱ መጀመሪያ ላይ ራሱን እንዲያደራጅ ይረዳዋል።
ፖታሺየም (K) የተክሉን አጠቃላይ ጤና ያሻሽላል፣ በሽታን ለመከላከል ይረዳል፣ እንዲሁም የሚሰበሰበው ምርት መጠን እና ጥራት የተጠበቀ እንዲሆን ያደርጋል።
om: Naayitiroojiiniin (N) guddina baalaatiif murteessaadha; yoo kun hir'ate boqqoolloon keelloofne guddisaa dhaba.
Fosfarasii (P) hundee jabaa fi daraaraa yookiin ija gaariif baay'ee barbaachisaadha; kunis biqiltuun sun jalqaba irratti akka jabaatu gargaara.
Pootaasiyamiin (K) fayyaa guutuu biqiltuu eeguun dhibee ittisa; akkasumas callaan sassaabamu hangaa fi qulqullina gaarii akka qabaatu godha.

en: What are the signs of phosphorus deficiency in young crops?
How do I read the numbers on a fertilizer bag (e.g., 20-10-10)?
Can I use natural compost to get all three NPK nutrients?
Think of an equation as a balanced scale; whatever operation you perform on one side, you must do the exact same to the other to keep it balanced.
To find X, use inverse operations: if a number is added to X, subtract it from both sides; if it is multiplied, divide both sides.
Always double-check your answer by replacing X in the original equation with the number you found to see if both sides remain equal.
am: እኩልዮሽን እንደ ሚዛን ያስቡት፤ በአንዱ በኩል ያደረጉትን ማንኛውንም ስሌት እኩልነቱን ለመጠበቅ በሌላኛው በኩልም ማድረግ አለብዎት።
ኤክስን (X) ለማግኘት የተቃራኒ ስሌቶችን ይጠቀሙ፤ ቁጥሩ በኤክስ ላይ ተደምሮ ከሆነ ይቀንሱት፣ ተባዝቶ ከሆነ ደግሞ ያካፍሉት።
ያገኙትን ውጤት በትክክለኛው እኩልዮሽ ውስጥ በኤክስ (X) ቦታ በመተካት ሁለቱም ወገኖች እኩል መሆናቸውን በማረጋገጥ መልስዎን ያረጋግጡ።
om: Ikwizshinii (Equation) akka madaallii wal-qixxeetti yaadaa; gama tokkoon waan gootan wal-qixxummaa eeguuf gama biraatiinis raawwachuu qabdu.
X barbaaduuf, 'inverse operations' fayyadamaa: yoo lakkoofsi itti ida'ameera ta'e hir'isaa, yoo baay'ateera ta'e immoo hir'isaa.
Lakkoofsa argattan bakka X buusuun gama lameenuu wal-qixxee ta'uu isaanii mirkaneeffachuun deebii keessan deebisaa ilaalaa.

en: How do I solve equations where X is on both sides of the equals sign?
What is a real-life example of using algebra in an Ethiopian market?
How do I handle negative numbers when solving for X?
A right angle is exactly 90 degrees, forming a perfect 'L' shape like the corner of a standard Ethiopian window frame.
An acute angle is 'sharp' and smaller than 90 degrees, while an obtuse angle is 'wide' and larger than 90 but less than 180 degrees.
Angles are measured in degrees using a tool called a protractor, which is essential for accurate carpentry and construction work.
am: ቀኝ ማዕዘን (Right angle) ልክ 90 ዲግሪ ነው፤ ይህም እንደ መስኮት ማዕዘን ፍጹም የ 'L' ቅርጽ ይፈጥራል።
አጣዳፊ ማዕዘን (Acute angle) ከ 90 ዲግሪ ያነሰ ሲሆን፣ ዝርጥጥ ማዕዘን (Obtuse angle) ደግሞ ከ 90 ዲግሪ የሚበልጥ ግን ከ 180 ዲግሪ የሚያንስ ነው።
ማዕዘኖች 'ፕሮትራክተር' በሚባል መለኪያ በዲግሪ ይለካሉ፤ ይህም ለትክክለኛ አናጺነት እና ለግንባታ ስራዎች በጣም አስፈላጊ ነው።
om: Kofleen sirriin (Right angle) digrii 90 dha; kunis akka golee foddaa manaa bifa 'L' sirrii uuma.
Kofleen qaraa (Acute angle) digrii 90 gadi, kofleen bal'aan (Obtuse angle) immoo digrii 90 ol garuu 180 gadi dha.
Koflewwan digriidhaan meeshaa 'protractor' jedhamuun madaalamu; kunis hojii anaaxummaa fi ijaarsaatiif baay'ee murteessaadha.

en: What is the sum of all angles inside a triangle?
How can I find a 90-degree angle without a protractor using the 3-4-5 rule?
What do we call an angle that is exactly 180 degrees?
To find the volume of a circular tank, use the formula: Pi (3.14) x radius squared x height.
Calculate the radius by measuring the distance from the center of the tank to the edge; remember that radius is half of the diameter.
Convert the result to liters to know how much water you have: 1 cubic meter of volume equals exactly 1,000 liters of water.
am: ክብ ቅርጽ ያለው የውሃ ታንከር ስፋትን (Volume) ለማግኘት የሚከተለውን ቀመር ይጠቀሙ፡ ፒ (3.14) x የራዲየስ ስኩዌር x ቁመት።
ራዲየሱን ለማግኘት ከታንከሩ መሃል እስከ ዳር ያለውን ርቀት ይለኩ፤ ራዲየስ የዲያሜትር ግማሽ መሆኑን ያስታውሱ።
ያለዎትን የውሃ መጠን ለማወቅ ውጤቱን ወደ ሊትር ይቀይሩ፡ 1 ኩቢክ ሜትር ስፋት በትክክል ከ 1,000 ሊትር ውሃ ጋር እኩል ነው።
om: Bifa geengoo taankii bishaania herreguuf, fomulaa: Pi (3.14) x 'radius squared' x dheerina (height) fayyadamaa.
Raadiyaasii beekuuf gidduu taankii irraa hanga fiixee isaa madaalaa; raadiyaasiin walakkaa diyamitiraa ta'uu hin dagatinaa.
Bishaan hammam akka qabdan beekuuf gara liitiriitti jijjiiraa: '1 cubic meter' liitira bishaania 1,000 wajjin wal-qixxaata.

en: How do I calculate the volume of a rectangular water reservoir?

The theorem states that in a right-angled triangle, the square of the longest side (hypotenuse) equals the sum of the squares of the other two sides (a² + b² = c²).
Use this theorem in construction to ensure corners are perfectly square (90 degrees) by checking the lengths of the sides.
This formula only works for 'right triangles'—triangles that have one corner shaped like the letter 'L'.
am: ይህ ቀመር በአንድ ቀኝ ማዕዘን ሶስት ማዕዘን ውስጥ፣ የረጅሙ ጎን ስኩዌር ከሌሎቹ ሁለት ጎኖች ስኩዌር ድምር ጋር እኩል መሆኑን ይገልጻል (a² + b² = c²)።
በግንባታ ስራ ወቅት የማዕዘኖቹን ርዝመት በመለካት ማዕዘኑ በትክክል 90 ዲግሪ መሆኑን ለማረጋገጥ ይህንን ቀመር ይጠቀሙ።
ይህ ቀመር የሚሰራው 'ቀኝ ማዕዘን' ላላቸው ሶስት ማዕዘኖች ብቻ ነው፤ ይህም ማለት አንዱ ማዕዘን የ 'L' ቅርጽ ላላቸው ብቻ።
om: Tiyooramiin kun koflee sirrii keessatti, kofleen inni dheeraan iskuweerii isaa ida'ama iskuweerii koflewwan lamaanii wajjin wal-qixxaata (a² + b² = c²).
Ijaarsa keessatti goleen mana keessanii digrii 90 ta'uu isaa mirkaneeffachuuf fageenya koflewwan madaaluun fayyadamaa.
Fomulaan kun 'right triangles' yookiin kofleewwan bifa 'L' qaban qofaaf hojjata.

en: Can I use the Pythagorean theorem to find the length of a ladder needed for a wall?

Probability is a branch of math that measures how likely an event is to happen, expressed as a number between 0 (impossible) and 1 (certain).
Calculate simple probability by dividing the number of ways an event can happen by the total number of possible outcomes.
Farmers use probability to estimate the chance of rain based on past years, helping them decide the best week to start planting.
am: ፕሮባቢሊቲ (Probability) አንድ ነገር የመከሰት እድሉ ምን ያህል እንደሆነ የሚለካ የሂሳብ ዘርፍ ሲሆን፣ ከ 0 (ሊሆን የማይችል) እስከ 1 (በእርግጠኝነት የሚሆን) ይገለጻል።
ቀላል ፕሮባቢሊቲን ለማስላት የሚፈልጉት ነገር ሊከሰት የሚችልባቸውን መንገዶች ለጠቅላላ አማራጮች በማካፈል ማግኘት ይቻላል።
ገበሬዎች ባለፉት ዓመታት ያለውን ሁኔታ በማየት ዝናብ የመዝነብ እድሉን ለመገመት እና መቼ መዝራት እንዳለባቸው ለመወሰን ፕሮባቢሊቲን ይጠቀማሉ።
om: Piroobaabiliitiin (Probability) carraan waan tokkoo raawwatamuu hangam akka ta'e herrega madaaluudha; lakkoofsa 0 (hin ta'u) hanga 1 (dhugaa) gidduutti ibsama.
Carraa salphaa herreguuf, karaa waanti sun itti ta'uu danda'u carraawwan waliigalaaf hiruun herregama.
Qonnaan bultoonni waggoota darban madaaluun carraa roobni roobuu herreguun, torban facaasaaf gaarii ta'e murteessuuf fayyadamu.

en: What is the probability of flipping a coin and getting 'Tails'?

am: መጋዙ እንዳይዘል አውራ ጣትዎን እንደ መመሪያ በመጠቀም፣ መጋዙን ጥቂት ጊዜ ወደ ኋላ በመሳብ ምልክት በማውጣት መቁረጥ ይጀምሩ።
እንጨት በሚቆርጡበት ጊዜ መጋዙን በ45 ዲግሪ ዘንበል አድርገው ይያዙ፤ እንዲሁም ቀጥ ያለ እና ለስላሳ ጠርዝ እንዲኖረው ረጅም እና የተረጋጋ የእጅ እንቅስቃሴን ይጠቀሙ።
አንድ ነገር ትክክል መሆኑን ለማረጋገጥ ሚዛኑን (level) በላዩ ላይ ያስቀምጡ፤ በውስጡ ያለው አየር በሁለቱ መስመሮች መካከል በትክክል እስኪቀመጥ ድረስ ያስተካክሉ::
om: Muraa jalqabuuf, masiiniin akka hin utaalneef quba abba-hudduu keessanitti gargaaramuun si'a muraasa gara duubatti hirkisaa uumaa.
Muka muruuf masiinii koflee digrii 45n qabadhaa; qajeelloo akka muruuf harka keessan fageessanii deebisaa sochoosaa.
Laffi sun wal-qixxee ta'uu mirkaneeffachuun, 'level' irra kaa'uun hamma qilleensi sun gidduu sararoota lamaanii jiru tursiisutti sirreessaa.

For a strong wall-building mortar, use a ratio of 1 part cement to 3 parts clean sand, ensuring the sand is free from clay or organic matter.
Always mix the cement and sand thoroughly while they are dry until the color is uniform before adding water to prevent weak spots.
Add water gradually to the center of the pile; the mixture should be thick like paste and stick to the shovel without flowing like water.
am: ለጠንካራ ግንብ ግንባታ 1 እጅ ሲሚንቶ ከ 3 እጅ ንጹህ አሸዋ ጋር ይቀላቅሉ፤ አሸዋው ከሸክላ አፈር ወይም ከቆሻሻ የጸዳ መሆኑን ያረጋግጡ።
ውሃ ከመጨመርዎ በፊት ሲሚንቶውን እና አሸዋውን ቀለሙ ወጥ እስኪሆን ድረስ በደረቁ በሚገባ ይቀላቅሏቸው።
ውሃውን በትንሽ በትንሹ መሃል ላይ ይጨምሩ፤ ድብልቁ እንደ ሊጥ ወፍራም መሆን አለበት እንጂ እንደ ውሃ መፍሰስ የለበትም።
om: Gilaala jabaa ijaaruuf, simentoo harka 1 fi ashawaa qulqulluu harka 3 makuun fayyadamaa; ashawaan suphee irraa qulqulluu ta'uu mirkaneeffadhaa.
Utuu bishaan hin naqin dura, hamma bifti isaa wal-fakkaatutti simentoo fi ashawaa gogaatti sirriitti walitti makuu qabdu.
Bishaan suuta gidduutti naqaa; makoon sun akka bukoo furdachuu qaba malee akka bishaanitti yaa'uu hin qabu.

am: የመለኪያ ሪባኑን ከሰውነት ጋር አጣብቀው ይያዙት ነገር ግን በጣም አያጥብቁት፤ አንድ ጣት በሪባኑ ስር እንዲያልፍ በቂ ቦታ ይተው።
ለሱሪ ወይም ለቀሚስ ትክክለኛውን መጠን ለማግኘት ወገብን በሚለኩበት ጊዜ፣ ሰውየው በተፈጥሮአዊ ሁኔታ መቆሙን እና ትንፋሹን አለመያዙን ያረጋግጡ።
ለሀበሻ ቀሚስ ትክክለኛውን ርዝመት ለማግኘት ከትከሻ አጥንት ጀምሮ እስከ ቁርጭምጭሚት ድረስ ያለውን ርቀት ይለኩ።
om: Meesha madaallii (tape) qaama irratti diriirsaa qabaa, garuu garmalee hin hirkisinaa; quba tokkoof bakka duubatti dhiisaa.
Mudhii madaaluuf, namni sun bifa uumamaatiin dhaabbachuu isaa fi hargansuu isaa akka hin qabanne gochuun madaallii sirrii argadhaa.
Uffata aadaa (Habesha Kemis) dheerina isaa beekuuf, lafee gateettii irraa hanga koronyootti madaalaa.

am: አይንዎ በወልድ ብርሃን እንዳይጎዳ እና የአይን እይታዎን እንዳያጡ ሁልጊዜ ጥቁር መነጽር ያለው የወልዲንግ ጭምብል (helmet) ይጠቀሙ።
የስራ ቦታዎ ደረቅ መሆኑን እና መከላከያ ጓንት ማድረጋችሁን ያረጋግጡ፤ እርጥብ እጅ ወይም ወለል ለከፍተኛ የኤሌክትሪክ አደጋ ሊያጋልጥ ይችላል።
መቁረጫ (Grinder) በሚጠቀሙበት ጊዜ የሚፈነጥቀው ብልጭታ ከሰውነትዎ እና በቀላሉ ከሚቀጣጠሉ ነገሮች (እንደ ነዳጅ ወይም ደረቅ ሣር) የራቀ መሆኑን ያረጋግጡ።
om: Iji keessan ibiddan akka hin miidhamneef, yeroo hunda koofiyyaa 'welding' kan fuula haguugu fayyadamaa.
Bakki hojii keessanii gogaa ta'uu fi 'gloves' harkatti uffachuu keessan mirkaneeffadhaa; bishaan naannoo jiru balaa elektirikiif nama saaxila.
Masiinii sibiila muruun (grinder) yeroo hojjattan, kofli ibiddaa sun qaama keessan irraa fi waan bishaan qabu irraa fagaachuu isaa to'adhaa.

Before applying the patch, use sandpaper to roughen the area around the hole so the glue creates a strong, permanent bond.

am: በጎማው ውስጥ ያለውን ቀዳዳ ለማግኘት፣ አየር ይሙሉበት እና በውሃ ውስጥ ይክተቱት፤ አየር የሚወጣበት (የሚተነፍስበት) ቦታ ላይ አረፋ ይወጣል።
ከመለጠፍዎ በፊት፣ ሙጫው በሚገባ እንዲይዝ በቀዳዳው ዙሪያ ያለውን ቦታ በአሸዋ ወረቀት (ሳንድፔፐር) በመፋቅ እንዲሻክር ያድርጉት።
የቢስክሌት ሰንሰለት ቢበጠስ፣ የተጎዳውን ክፍል ለማስወገድ እና እንደገና ለማገናኘት የሰንሰለት መፍቻ መሳሪያን (chain tool) ይጠቀሙ።
om: Gommaa keessaa (tube) uuraa qabaachuu isaa beekuuf, qilleensa itti guutuun bishaan keessa lallaafatti cuuphaa; bakka uuraa qabutti 'bubbles' ni uuma.
Utuu hin suphin dura, bakka uuraa qabu sana ashaboodhaan (sandpaper) hoxxisaa; kunis qorichi sun jabeessee akka qabu gargaara.
Sinsilaan bisikleetaa yoo cite, meeshaa sinsilaa hiikuun (chain tool) madaa sana baasuun deebisanii walitti hidhuu.

The Axumite Empire was one of the four great powers of the ancient world, ruling from the Ethiopian highlands and controlling major trade routes along the Red Sea.
Under King Ezana in the 4th century, Axum became one of the first empires in the world to adopt Christianity and mint its own gold, silver, and bronze coins.
The empire is famous for its massive monolithic stelae (obelisks) and the ancient port of Adulis, which served as a gateway for global commerce with India and Rome.
am: የአክሱም ስርወ-መንግስት በጥንታዊው ዓለም ከአራቱ ታላላቅ ኃይሎች አንዱ የነበረ ሲሆን ከኢትዮጵያ ደጋማ ቦታዎች ተነስተው የቀይ ባህር የንግድ መስመሮችን ይቆጣጠር ነበር።
በ4ኛው መቶ ክፍለ ዘመን በንጉሥ ኢዛና የግዛት ዘመን አክሱም ክርስትናን ከተቀበሉ እና የራሳቸውን የወርቅ፣ የብር እና የነሐስ ሳንቲሞች ካተሙ የዓለም መንግስታት ቀዳሚ ነበር።
ኢምፓየሩ በግዙፍ የአንድ ድንጋይ ሐውልቶች (obelisks) እና ከህንድ እና ከሮም ጋር ለሚደረገው ዓለም አቀፍ ንግድ መግቢያ በነበረው በአዱሊስ ወደብ ይታወቃል።
om: Mootummaan Aksuum durii humnoota gurguddoo addunyaa afuran keessaa tokko yoo ta'u, lafa tulluuwwan Itoophiyaa irraa ka'uun daandii daldalaa Garba Diimaa to'achaa ture.
Kutaa jaarraa 4ffaa keessa Mootii Eezaanaa jalatti, Aksuum addunyaa irratti mootummoota amantii Kiristaanaa fudhatanii fi qarshii ofii hojjatan keessaa isaan jalqabaa turan.
Mootummaan kun siidaawwan dhaabbataa gurguddoo (obelisks) fi buufata doonii Aduliis kan daldala Hindii fi Roomaa wajjiniif balbala ta'uun beekama.

en: How did the Axumite Empire decline and what led to its downfall?
Where can I visit the ruins of the Axumite civilization today in Ethiopia?
What was the significance of the Ge'ez script developed during the Axumite era?
Alexander Graham Bell was a Scottish-born inventor who successfully patented the first practical telephone in 1876, revolutionizing how humans communicate.
The first words ever spoken over the telephone were 'Mr. Watson, come here—I want to see you,' sent by Bell to his assistant in another room.
Bell's interest in sound was inspired by his work with the deaf, leading him to discover that sound could be converted into electrical signals and sent through wires.
am: አሌክሳንደር ግራሃም ቤል በ1876 የመጀመሪያውን ተግባራዊ ስልክ የፈጠረ እና የባለቤትነት መብት (patent) ያገኘ የፈጠራ ሰው ሲሆን የሰው ልጅ የመገናኛ ዘዴን ቀይሯል።
በስልክ ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ የተነገሩት ቃላት 'ሚስተር ዋትሰን፣ ወደዚህ ና—ላገኝህ እፈልጋለሁ' የሚሉ ነበሩ፤ ይህም ቤል በሌላ ክፍል ውስጥ ለነበረው ረዳቱ የላከው መልዕክት ነበር።
ቤል ድምፅን ወደ ኤሌክትሪክ ምልክት በመቀየር በሽቦ መላክ እንደሚቻል የደረሰበት መስማት ለተሳናቸው ሰዎች ከሚያደርገው ምርምር በመነሳት ነበር።
om: Aliksaander Giraaham Beel namoota kalaqaan beekaman keessaa tokko yoo ta'u, bara 1876tti bilbila jalqabaa hojjechuun qunnamtii namaa jijjiireera.
Jechi jalqabaa bilbiilaan dubbatame 'Obbo Waatsan, koottu—si arguun barbaada' kan jedhu yoo ta'u, kunis Beel gargaaraa isaa kutaa biraa jiruun dubbachuudha.

Beel dhageettii sagalee irratti kan xiyyeeffate namoota gurri isaanii hin dhageenye gargaaruu irraa yoo ta'u, kunis sagalee gara elektirikiitti jijjiiruun shiboodhaan erguu danda'uun akka kalaqu isa gargaare.

en: How has the telephone changed society and business since its invention?
Who else was working on the invention of the telephone at the same time as Bell?
When did the first telephone services reach Ethiopia?
Orville and Wilbur Wright were two brothers who built and flew the first successful motor-powered airplane on December 17, 1903, in Kitty Hawk, North Carolina.
Their first flight lasted only 12 seconds and covered 120 feet, but it proved that humans could achieve controlled, sustained flight in a heavier-than-air machine.
Before building airplanes, the brothers were bicycle mechanics, and they used their mechanical skills to solve the complex problems of balancing and steering a plane.
am: ኦርቪል እና ዊልበር ራይት በታህሳስ 17 ቀን 1903 በኪቲ ሃውክ ሰሜን ካሮላይና የመጀመሪያውን ስኬታማ በሞተር የሚንቀሳቀስ አውሮፕላን የሰሩ እና የበረሩ ወንድማማቾች ናቸው።
የመጀመሪያው በረራ የቆየው ለ12 ሰከንድ ብቻ ሲሆን 120 ጫማ ርቀት ሸፍኗል፤ ነገር ግን የሰው ልጅ አየር ላይ በሚንቀሳቀስ ማሽን መብረር እንደሚችል አረጋግጧል።
አውሮፕላን ከመሥራታቸው በፊት ወንድማማቾቹ የቢስክሌት መካኒኮች ነበሩ፤ ያገኙትንም ሜካኒካል እውቀት አውሮፕላንን የመቆጣጠር እና ሚዛን የመጠበቅ ችግሮችን ለመፍታት ተጠቅመውበታል።
om: Orviil fi Wiilbar Raayit obbolaa lameen Muddee 17, 1903tti qophee (airplane) jalqabaa mookaraa qabuun balali'an ijaaruun seenaa hojjatan.
Balaliin isaanii inni jalqabaa seekondii 12 qofa kan tureefi fageenya meetira 37 kan uffise yoo ta'u, kunis namni qilleensa irra balali'uu danda'u mirkaneesse.
Utuu qophee hin hojjetin dura obbolaan kun mikaanika bisikleetaa turan; dandeettii mikaanikaa qabanis balali'aa sana akkamitti akka to'atan furuuf itti fayyadaman.

en: How long did it take for aviation to reach Ethiopia after the Wright Brothers' flight?
What are the major components of an airplane that allow it to lift off the ground?
Who was the first pilot to fly solo across the Atlantic Ocean?
The Pyramids of Giza in Egypt were built over 4,500 years ago as grand tombs for the Pharaohs, who were the kings of ancient Egypt.
The Great Pyramid of Khufu, the largest of them all, was built using about 2.3 million massive stone blocks, each weighing an average of 2.5 tons.
Ancient Egyptians used advanced engineering, ramps, and the seasonal flooding of the Nile River to transport heavy limestone blocks from distant quarries.
am: በግብፅ የሚገኙት የጊዛ ፒራሚዶች ከ4,500 ዓመታት በፊት የተገነቡት የጥንቷ ግብፅ ነገሥታት ለነበሩት ፈርኦኖች ታላላቅ መቃብሮች እንዲሆኑ ተብሎ ነበር።
ከሁሉም ትልቁ የሆነው የኩፉ ፒራሚድ የተገነባው እያንዳንዳቸው በአማካይ 2.5 ቶን የሚመዝኑ 2.3 ሚሊዮን ግዙፍ የድንጋይ ንጣፎችን በመጠቀም ነው።
ጥንታዊ ግብፃውያን ግዙፍ የኖራ ድንጋዮችን ከሩቅ ቦታዎች ለማጓጓዝ የላቀ ምህንድስናን፣ ቁልቁለቶችን እና የአባይ ወንዝ ወቅታዊ የጎርፍ መሙላትን ይጠቀሙ ነበር።
om: Piraamidonni Giizaa (Egypt) waggoota 4,500 dura kan ijaaraman yoo ta'u, awwaalcha guddaa mootota Gibxii duriitiif tajaajilaa turan.
Piraamiidiin 'Khufu' isa hunda caalaa guddaa ta'e dhagaa gurguddoo miliyoona 2.3 irraa ijaarame; tokkoon tokkoo dhagaa sanaa 'ton' 2.5 ulfaatu.
Namoonni Gibxii durii dhagaa gurguddoo fageenya irraa fe'uuf dandeettii injinariingii, ujummoo bishaanii fi lolaa laga Naayil fayyadamaa turan.

en: Are there any pyramids in other parts of Africa besides Egypt?
What was the significance of the mummification process used by ancient Egyptians?
How do modern scientists believe the pyramids were aligned so accurately with the stars?
Emperor Menelik II and Empress Taytu Betul are celebrated for leading Ethiopia to victory at the Battle of Adwa in 1896, preserving the nation's independence.
Belay Zeleke was a famous patriot who led a resistance movement against the Italian occupation in the 1930s, becoming a symbol of Ethiopian courage.
Abebe Bikila became a global hero as the first sub-Saharan African to win an Olympic gold medal, running the 1960 Rome marathon barefoot.
am: ዳግማዊ አፄ ምኒልክ እና እቴጌ ጣይቱ ብጡል በ1888 የዓድዋ ጦርነት ላይ ኢትዮጵያን ለድል በመምራት እና የሀገሪቱን ነፃነት በማስከበራቸው ይከበራሉ።
በላይ ዘለቀ በ1930ዎቹ ጣሊያን ኢትዮጵያን በወረረችበት ወቅት የጥቃቱን የመከላከል እንቅስቃሴ በመምራት የታወቀ የአርበኝነት ተምሳሌት ነው።
አበበ ቢቂላ በ1960 የሮም ማራቶንን በባዶ እግሩ በመሮጥ የመጀመሪያው ከሰሃራ በታች ያለ አፍሪካዊ የኦሎምፒክ የወርቅ ሜዳሊያ አሸናፊ እና የዓለም ጀግና ሆኗል።
om: Atsee Miniliik II fi Imprees Xaayituu Bitul bara 1896 waraana Adwaa irratti Itoophiyaa dursuun bilisummaa biyyaa kabachiisaniiru.
Belay Zeleke goota beekamaa bara 1930moota keessa weerara Xaaliyaanii loluun Itoophiyaaf dhiiga isaa dhangalaasee mallattoo gootummaa ta'eera.
Abebe Biqilaa maratoonii Room bara 1960 miilla duwwaa fiiguun warra Afrikaa keessaa medaliyaa warqee Oolimpikiin jalqabaa mo'achuun goota addunyaa ta'e.

en: Who are some female Ethiopian heroes besides Empress Taytu?
What are the major historical sites in Ethiopia dedicated to these heroes?
How do schools in Ethiopia commemorate the victory of Adwa every year?
The skeleton acts as the framework of the body, giving it shape and allowing you to stand upright while working on the farm.
It protects vital organs: the skull shields the brain, and the ribcage protects the heart and lungs from injury during physical labor.
Bones are living tissue that store essential minerals like calcium and produce blood cells in the marrow to keep you healthy.
am: አፅም የሰውነት ቅርጽ በመስጠት እና በእርሻ ስራ ወቅት ቀጥ ብለው እንዲቆሙ በማድረግ እንደ የሰውነት ማገር ያገለግላል።
ጠቃሚ የሰውነት ክፍሎችን ይጠብቃል፡ የራስ ቅል አእምሮን ይሸፍናል፣ የደረት አጥንት ደግሞ በከባድ ስራ ወቅት ልብንና ሳንባን ከአደጋ ይከላከላል።
አጥንቶች እንደ ካልሲየም ያሉ አስፈላጊ ማዕድናትን የሚያከማቹ እና ጤናማ እንዲሆኑ በውስጣቸው የደም ሴሎችን የሚያመርቱ ህይወት ያላቸው ቲሹዎች ናቸው።
om: Lafeen qaamaa akka utubaa qaamaatti tajaajila; bifa qaamaa kennuun hojii qonnaa irratti akka qajeeltanii dhaabbattan isin gargaara.
Qaama keessoo barbaachisoo ta'an eega: lafeen mataa sammuu haguuga, lafeen qomaa immoo yeroo hojii jabaa onnee fi somba miidhaa irraa eega.
Lafeen tishuu jiraataa ma'idana akka kaalsiyamii kuusuufi dhiiga maddisiisuun fayyaa keessan eeguudha.

en: How can I keep my bones strong as I get older?
What local Ethiopian foods are highest in calcium for bone health?
What happens to the skeleton if a person has a vitamin D deficiency?
The brain is the command center of the body, processing information from your senses and controlling every move you make.
Nerves act like electrical wires, sending rapid signals between the brain and your muscles so you can react quickly to danger.
The nervous system allows you to learn new farming skills and remember important information about weather patterns and crop cycles.
am: አእምሮ የሰውነት የቁጥጥር ማዕከል ሲሆን፣ ከስሜት ህዋሳት የሚመጡ መረጃዎችን በማቀነባበር እያንዳንዱን እንቅስቃሴዎን ይቆጣጠራል።
ነርቮች እንደ ኤሌክትሪክ ሽቦዎች በመሆን በአእምሮ እና በጡንቻዎችዎ መካከል ፈጣን መልዕክቶችን ያስተላልፋሉ፤ ይህም ለአደጋ በፍጥነት ምላሽ እንዲሰጡ ይረዳዎታል።
የነርቭ ሥርዓቱ አዳዲስ የእርሻ ክህሎቶችን እንዲማሩ እና ስለ አየር ሁኔታ እና ሰብል ወቅቶች ጠቃሚ መረጃዎችን እንዲያስታውሱ ያስችልዎታል።
om: Sammuun giddu-galeessa ajaja qaamaati; odeeffannoo miira irraa dhufu qindeessuun sochii keessan hunda to'ata.
Yanni (nerves) akka shiboo elektirikiitti tajaajilu; sammuu fi maashaa gidduutti ergaa ariitii dabarsuun balaa irraa akka of eegdan isin gargaaru.
Sirni narvii ogummaa qonnaa haaraa barachuu fi waa'ee qilleensaa fi waqtii facaasaa yaadachuuf isin gargaara.

en: How does lack of sleep affect the brain's ability to focus?
What are the signs of nerve damage in the hands or feet?
How can I protect my head from injury during construction work?
If a bone is suspected to be broken, do not try to straighten it; keep the injured limb as still as possible to prevent further damage.
Apply a splint using stiff materials like straight wood, bamboo, or thick cardboard, and tie it gently but firmly above and below the break.
Seek medical help at the nearest health center immediately after stabilizing the limb to ensure proper alignment and healing.
am: አጥንት የተሰበረ ከመሰለዎት ለማቃናት አይሞክሩ፤ ተጨማሪ ጉዳት እንዳይደርስ የተጎዳውን ክፍል በተቻለ መጠን እንዳይንቀሳቀስ ያድርጉ።
እንደ እንጨት፣ ቀርከሃ ወይም ወፍራም ካርቶን ያሉ ጠንካራ ቁሳቁሶችን በመጠቀም ስብራቱን ደግፉ (splint)፤ ከዚያም ከስብራቱ በላይ እና በታች በጥንቃቄ እሰሩት።
አጥንቱ በትክክል እንዲያገግም የተጎዳውን ክፍል ካረጋጉ በኋላ በአፋጣኝ በአቅራቢያዎ ወደሚገኝ ጤና ጣቢያ ይሂዱ።
om: Lafeen cabuu isaa yoo kalfattan, qajeelchuuf hin yaalinaa; miidhaa dabalataa ittisuuf bakka miidhame sana akka hin sochoone godhaa.
Muka qajeelaa, sanbaqo yookiin kaartoonaa jabaatti fayyadamanii hidhuun (splint) akka hin sochoone godhaa; caba sanaa olii fi gadiitti jabeessanii hidhaa.
Eega tasabbeessitanii booda, lafichi sirriitti walitti akka deebi'uuf hatattamaan buufata fayyaa geessaa.

en: How can I tell the difference between a sprain and a broken bone?
What should I do if a broken bone is sticking out through the skin?
Can I use a traditional cloth (Gabi) to make a temporary sling for a broken arm?
Identify heatstroke by signs such as high body temperature (above 40°C), confusion, rapid pulse, and red, dry skin while working in the hot sun.
Move the person to a shaded, cool area immediately and remove extra clothing to help their body temperature drop.
Cool the person by applying cool water to their skin, fanning them, or placing wet cloths on their neck and armpits, and seek emergency help.
am: በሞቃት ፀሐይ ውስጥ በሚሰሩበት ጊዜ ከፍተኛ የሰውነት ሙቀት (ከ40 ዲግሪ በላይ)፣ ግራ መጋባት፣ ፈጣን የልብ ምት እና ደረቅ ቆዳ ካዩ የፀሐይ ምት (heatstroke) መሆኑን ይረዱ።
ግለሰቡን ወዲያውኑ ጥላ ወዳለበት ቀዝቃዛ ቦታ ይውሰዱት እና የሰውነት ሙቀቱ እንዲቀንስ ተጨማሪ ልብሶችን ያስወግዱ።
በቆዳው ላይ ቀዝቃዛ ውሃ በመርጨት፣ በንፋስ በማቀዝቀዝ ወይም እርጥብ ጨርቅ በአንገቱ እና በብብቱ ስር በማድረግ ያቀዝቅዙት፤ ከዚያም የህክምና እርዳታ ይፈልጉ።
om: Aduu jabaa keessatti yoo ho'i qaamaa (digrii 40 ol), burjaaja'uu, onneen ariitiin dhahachuu fi gogaan diimachuu mul'ate 'heatstroke' dha.
Hatattamaan namicha gara gaaddidduu fi qabbanaatti geessuun uffata dabalataa irraa baasuun ho'a hir'isaa.
Bishaan qabbanaawaa qaama irratti facaasuu, qilleensa itti hifuu yookiin huccuu jiidhaa mormaa fi jala harkaa kaa'uun qabbaneessaa, achiin booda gara buufata fayyaa geessaa.

en: How much water should I drink daily when working in the lowlands of Ethiopia?
Why is heatstroke more dangerous for elderly people and young children?
What are the best types of clothing to wear to prevent overheating in the sun?
Clean your teeth at least twice a day using a toothbrush or a traditional 'Mefaka' to remove food particles and prevent plaque buildup.
Limit the intake of sugary foods and drinks, as sugar reacts with bacteria in the mouth to create acids that eat away at tooth enamel.
Prevent tooth decay by rinsing your mouth with clean water after meals and using toothpaste that contains fluoride if available.
am: የምግብ ፍርፋሪዎችን ለማስወገድ እና የአፍ ጤንነትን ለመጠበቅ በቀን ቢያንስ ሁለት ጊዜ በጥርስ ብሩሽ ወይም በባህላዊ 'መፋቂያ' ጥርስዎን ያጽዱ።
ጣፋጭ ምግቦችን እና መጠጦችን ይቀንሱ፤ ምክንያቱም ስኳር በአፍ ውስጥ ካሉ ባክቴሪያዎች ጋር በመገናኘት ጥርስን የሚበላ አሲድ ስለሚፈጥር።
ከምግብ በኋላ አፍዎን በንጹህ ውሃ በመታጠብ እና ከተቻለ ፍሎራይድ ያለው የጥርስ ሳሙና በመጠቀም የጥርስ መበስበስን ይከላከሉ።
om: Guyyaatti yoo xiqqaate si'a lama rigaa (mefaka) yookiin burtuunaan ilkaan keessan qulqulleessuun hambaa nyaataa fi kukkubiirraa eeggadhaa.
Nyaata sukkaara baay'ee qaban hir'isaa; sukkaarri baakteriyaa afaan keessa jiruun wal-ga'uun asiidii ilkaan nyaatu uuma.
Nyaata booda bishaan qulqulluun afaan lallaafatti dhiqachuu fi saamunaa ilkaanii (toothpaste) fayyadamuun ilkaan rimeenyuu irraa eegaa.

en: Which local Ethiopian trees provide the best branches for traditional mefaka?
How can I tell if a small child has a cavity starting to form?
Does chewing 'Khat' affect long-term dental and gum health?
Support girls to attend school consistently by ensuring they have the necessary supplies and time at home for studying.
Education for girls reduces poverty for the entire family, as educated women often invest their income back into their children's health and schooling.
When both genders are educated equally, the community benefits from diverse ideas and more effective problem-solving in agriculture and business.
am: ሴት ልጆች በትምህርታቸው ላይ እንዲያተኩሩ አስፈላጊውን ቁሳቁስ በማቅረብ እና በቤት ውስጥ የጥናት ጊዜ እንዲኖራቸው በማድረግ ይደግፉ።
የሴቶች ትምህርት የቤተሰብን ድህነት ይቀንሳል፤ ምክንያቱም የተማሩ ሴቶች ገቢያቸውን ለልጆቻቸው ጤና እና ትምህርት ላይ የማዋል ዝንባሌ አላቸው።
ወንዶችም ሆኑ ሴቶች እኩል ሲማሩ ማህበረሰቡ ከተለያዩ ሃሳቦች እና ውጤታማ የችግር አፈታት ዘዴዎች ተጠቃሚ ይሆናል።
om: Dubara gara mana barumsaa akka deeman meeshaalee barumsaa fi yeroo qo'annaa gahaa manatti kennuufiin deeggaraa.
Barumsi dubartootaa hiyyummaa maatii hunda ni hir'isa; dubartoonni baratan galii isaanii fayyaa fi barumsa ijoollee isaaniif oolchu.
Dhiirri fi dubarri wal-qixa yoo baratan, hawaasni yaada garaagaraa fi mala furaa rakkoo qonnaa fi daldalaa argata.

en: What are the most common barriers to girls' education in rural Ethiopia?
How can local leaders encourage parents to keep their daughters in school?
Are there government scholarships available for female students from farming families?
Set a clear date and gathering point, then spread the word through Kebele announcements and local religious institutions.
Involve local leaders and youth groups to lead the effort, ensuring that everyone brings tools like shovels, rakes, and sacks.
Identify specific disposal sites or pits where trash can be safely buried or burned away from water sources and residential houses.
am: ግልጽ የሆነ ቀን እና የመሰብሰቢያ ቦታ በመወሰን በቀበሌ ማስታወቂያዎች እና በአከባቢው የሃይማኖት ተቋማት በኩል መረጃውን ያሰራጩ።
የአከባቢ አመራሮችን እና የወጣት ቡድኖችን በማሳተፍ ሁሉም ሰው እንደ አካፋ፣ ሬክ እና ማዳበሪያ ያሉ መሳሪያዎችን ይዞ እንዲመጣ ያድርጉ።
ቆሻሻው ከውሃ ምንጮች እና ከመኖሪያ ቤቶች ርቆ በደህና የሚቀበርበት ወይም የሚቃጠልበት የተለየ ቦታ አስቀድመው ይለዩ።
om: Guyyaa fi bakka walitti qabaa ifa ta'e murteessuun labsii gandaa fi manneen amantaa naannootiin uummata beeksisaa.
Hooggantoota gandaa fi dargaggoota hirmaachisuun namni hundi meeshaalee akka shofolaa, harkee fi keeshaa akka qabatu godhaa.
Bakka kosiin itti gatamu, kan maddeen bishaanii fi manneen jireenyaa irraa fagaate adda baasaa.

en: What items should we prioritize collecting during a village clean-up?
How can we prevent trash from building up again after the clean-up day?
Can we turn organic waste collected into compost for the community garden?
Elders act as the 'Shimagile' or mediators who settle disputes over land, marriage, and resources using traditional wisdom and fairness.
Consult elders for advice on traditional farming cycles and indigenous knowledge that has been passed down through generations.
Respecting elders ensures social stability and keeps historical knowledge alive within the community, guiding the younger generation's values.
am: ሽማግሌዎች ባህላዊ ጥበብን እና ፍትሃዊነትን በመጠቀም በመሬት፣ በትዳር እና በሀብት ላይ የሚነሱ አለመግባባቶችን በመፍታት እንደ አስታራቂ ያገለግላሉ።
ከብዙ ትውልድ የተላለፉ ባህላዊ የእርሻ ወቅቶችን እና የአገር በቀል እውቀቶችን በተመለከተ ሽማግሌዎችን ምክር ይጠይቁ።
ሽማግሌዎችን ማክበር ማህበራዊ መረጋጋትን ያረጋግጣል፤ እንዲሁም ታሪካዊ እውቀቶች በማህበረሰቡ ውስጥ ጸንተው እንዲቆዩ ያደርጋል።
om: Jaarsoliin 'Jaarsummaa' fayyadamuun wal-dhabbii lafaa, gaa'elaa fi qabeenyaa irratti uumamu ogummaa aadaatiin hiiku.
Waqtii qonnaa fi beekumsa uumamaa dhalootaa dhalootatti darbe irratti jaarsolii gorsa gaafadhaa.
Jaarsolii kabajuun tasgabbii hawaasaa eeguu fi seenaan naannoo akka hin irraanfatamne godha.

en: How can youth learn traditional mediation skills from their elders?
What are some specific cultural ceremonies where elders play a lead role?
How is the role of elders changing with the introduction of modern legal systems?
Establish clear rules for when members can withdraw money for emergencies, such as unexpected illness, funerals, or crop failure.
Keep transparent written records of every contribution and withdrawal to maintain trust among all members of the group.
Select a committee of trusted local individuals to oversee the funds and ensure that the group meets regularly to discuss its progress.
am: አባላት እንደ ድንገተኛ ህመም፣ ለቀብር ወይም ለምርት ውድመት ያሉ ችግሮች ሲያጋጥሟቸው መቼ ገንዘብ ማውጣት እንደሚችሉ ግልጽ ህጎችን ያውጡ።
በሁሉም አባላት መካከል እምነት እንዲኖር ለእያንዳንዱ መዋጮ እና ወጪ ግልጽ የሆነ የጽሁፍ ሰነድ ይያዙ።
ገንዘቡን እንዲከታተሉ ታማኝ የሆኑ የአከባቢ ሰዎችን ይምረጡ እና ስለ ቡድኑ እድገት ለመወያየት በየጊዜው መገናኘትዎን ያረጋግጡ።
om: Yeroo rakkon akka dhukkubaa, du'aa yookiin oomishni baduun uumamu miseensonni akkamitti qarshii baasuu akka danda'an seera ifa ta'e baasaa.
Amanamummaa miseensota gidduutti uumuuf galmee kaffaltii fi baasii hunda sirriitti qabadhaa.
Namoota amanamoo qarshii sana to'atan filadhaa; akkasumas guddina garee keessanii irratti yeroo yeroon mari'adhaa.

en: What is the ideal number of members for a stable village savings group?
How do we handle a member who is unable to make their monthly contribution?
Can a savings group eventually grow into a formal credit union or SACCO?
Prepare your three main points in advance to ensure your message is clear and easy for the community to understand.
Stand tall and speak with a calm, clear voice, making eye contact with the audience to show confidence and respect.
Listen respectfully to other people's views before responding, as this builds trust and makes them more likely to support your ideas.
am: መልእክትዎ ግልጽ እና ለማህበረሰቡ በቀላሉ የሚረዳ እንዲሆን ዋና ዋና ነጥቦችዎን አስቀድመው ያዘጋጁ።
በራስ መተማመንን እና አክብሮትን ለማሳየት ቀጥ ብለው ይቁሙ እና በተረጋጋና ግልጽ ድምጽ አድማጮችን እያዩ ይናገሩ።
ምላሽ ከመስጠትዎ በፊት የሌሎችን ሃሳብ በአክብሮት ያዳምጡ፤ ይህ እምነትን ስለሚገነባ ሃሳብዎን እንዲደግፉ ይረዳቸዋል።
om: Ergaan keessan ifaa fi salphaatti kan galu akka ta'uuf, qabxiiwwan sadii ijoo ta'an dursee qopheessaa.
Ofitti amanamummaan dhaabbachuun sagalee ifa ta'een dubbadhaa; akkasumas kabajaan namoota ilaalaa haasa'aa.
Yaada keessan akka deeggaraniif, deebii kennuun dura yaada namoota biraa obsaan dhaggeeffadhaa.

en: How can I overcome nervousness before speaking in front of a large crowd?
What should I do if someone in the meeting strongly disagrees with my idea?
How can I use local proverbs or stories to make my speech more engaging?
Atoms are the tiny building blocks of everything; understanding them helps farmers recognize how minerals like Nitrogen and Phosphorus interact in the soil.
The Periodic Table organizes elements based on their properties, showing why elements like Oxygen and Carbon are essential for crop growth.
Molecules are formed when two or more atoms bond together, such as Hydrogen and Oxygen forming water (H2O), which is vital for Ethiopian agriculture.
Protons and electrons determine an element's identity and how it reacts with others, which is the basis for how chemical fertilizers work.
Studying the periodic table helps in identifying micro-nutrients like Zinc and Iron that are often deficient in certain Ethiopian soil types.
am: አቶሞች የሁሉም ነገሮች ትናንሽ መገንቢያዎች ናቸው፤ እነሱን መረዳት ገበሬዎች እንደ ናይትሮጅን እና ፎስፈረስ ያሉ ማዕድናት በአፈር ውስጥ እንዴት እንደሚገናኙ ለማወቅ ይረዳቸዋል።
የፔርዮዲክ ቴብል ንጥረ ነገሮችን በባህሪያቸው መሰረት ያደራጃል፤ ይህም እንደ ኦክስጅን እና ካርቦን ያሉ ንጥረ ነገሮች ለሰብል እድገት ለምን አስፈላጊ እንደሆኑ ያሳያል።
ሞለኪውሎች የሚፈጠሩት ሁለት ወይም ከዚያ በላይ አቶሞች ሲተሳሰሩ ነው፤ ለምሳሌ ሃይድሮጅን እና ኦክስጅን ውሃን (H2O) ይፈጥራሉ፤ ይህም ለኢትዮጵያ ግብርና ወሳኝ ነው።
ፕሮቶኖች እና ኤሌክትሮኖች የአንድን ንጥረ ነገር ማንነት እና ከሌሎች ጋር እንዴት እንደሚገናኝ ይወስናሉ፤ ይህም የኬሚካል ማዳበሪያዎች እንዴት እንደሚሰሩ መሰረት ነው።
የፔርዮዲክ ቴብልን ማጥናት በአንዳንድ የኢትዮጵያ የአፈር አይነቶች ውስጥ የሚጎድሉትን እንደ ዚንክ እና ብረት ያሉ ጥቃቅን ንጥረ ነገሮችን ለመለየት ይረዳል።
om: Atomonni bu'uura ijaarsa waan hundumaati; waa'ee isaanii beekuun qonnaan bultoonni akka naayitiroojiiniifi fosfarasii biyyee keessatti akkamitti akka wal-argan hubachuuf isaan gargaara.
Gabateen peeryoodikii (Periodic Table) amala isaanii irratti hundaa'uun elementoota qindeessa; kunis maaliif akka oksiijiinii fi kaarbooniin guddina midhaaniitiif barbaachisaa ta'an agarsiisa.
Molekiulonni kan uumaman yeroo atomonni lamaa fi isaa ol walitti hidhaman; fakkeenyaaf haayidiroojiiniifi oksiijiiniin bishaan (H2O) uumu, kunis qonna Itoophiyaatiif murteessaadha.
Pirootoonni fi elektiroononni eenyummaa elementii tokkoo fi akkamitti elementii biraa wajjin akka wal-argan murteessu; kunis bu'uura xaa'oon keemikaalaa itti hojjetuudha.
Gabatee peeryoodikii qo'achuun elementoota xixinnoo akka ziinkiifi sibiilaa kan biyyee Itoophiyaa muraasa keessatti hir'atan adda baasuuf gargaara.

en: Which elements in the periodic table are most important for organic farming?
How can I use a periodic table to understand soil acidity?
What is the difference between a pure element and a chemical compound?
Combustion is a chemical reaction that requires three components: fuel (like wood or charcoal), oxygen from the air, and heat to start the reaction.
In Ethiopia, controlled combustion is used to clear land, but it must be done carefully to prevent wildfires and soil nutrient loss.
Fire releases energy in the form of light and heat while producing carbon dioxide and water vapor as the fuel is broken down.
The ash left after wood combustion contains minerals like potassium, which can be used as a traditional fertilizer in Ethiopian home gardens.
Incomplete combustion happens when there is not enough oxygen, creating dangerous carbon monoxide gas and thick black smoke.
am: ቃጠሎ (Combustion) ሶስት ነገሮችን የሚፈልግ ኬሚካላዊ ምላሽ ነው፡ ነዳጅ (እንደ እንጨት ወይም ከሰል)፣ ከአየር የሚገኝ ኦክስጅን እና ምላሹን ለመጀመር ሙቀት።
በኢትዮጵያ ቁጥጥር የሚደረግበት ቃጠሎ መሬትን ለማፅዳት ይጠቅማል፤ ነገር ግን ሰደድ እሳትን እና የአፈር ንጥረ ነገር መጥፋትን ለመከላከል በጥንቃቄ መደረግ አለበት።
እሳት ነዳጁ በሚቃጠልበት ጊዜ ካርቦን ዳይኦክሳይድ እና የውሃ ትነት እያመነጨ ኃይልን በብርሃን እና በሙቀት መልክ ይለቃል።
ከእንጨት ቃጠሎ በኋላ የሚቀረው አመድ እንደ ፖታሺየም ያሉ ማዕድናትን የያዘ ሲሆን በኢትዮጵያ የጓሮ አትክልቶች ውስጥ እንደ ባህላዊ ማዳበሪያ ሊያገለግል ይችላል።
ያልተሟላ ቃጠሎ የሚከሰተው በቂ ኦክስጅን በማይኖርበት ጊዜ ሲሆን ይህም አደገኛ የካርቦን ሞኖክሳይድ ጋዝ እና ጥቁር ጭስ ይፈጥራል።
om: Gubannaan (Combustion) riyaakshinii keemikaalaa waan sadii barbaaduudha: babbakuu (akka mukaa yookiin cilee), oksiijiinii qilleensa keessaa fi ho'a riyaakshinii sana jalqabsiisu.
Itoophiyaa keessatti, gubannaan to'atame lafa qulqulleessuuf ni tajaajila; garuu balaa ibiddaa fi hir'ina soorata biyyee ittisuuf of-eeggannoon hojjetamuu qaba.
Ibiddi ifaa fi ho'a maddisiisa; yeroo babbakuun sun gubatu kaarboon-daay-oksaayidii fi hurka bishaania uuma.
Harkeen ibidda mukaa booda hafu ma'idana akka pootaasiyamii qaba; kunis qonnaa gandaa Itoophiyaa keessatti akka xaa'oo aadaatti tajaajila.
Gubannaan guutuu hin taane yeroo oksiijiiniin gahaa hin jirre uumama; kunis gaasii kaarboon-moonooksaayidii harmful ta'ee fi aara gurraacha furduu uuma.

en: How can I safely extinguish a grease fire in the kitchen?
Why does fire need oxygen to keep burning?
What are the environmental impacts of burning crop residues in the field?
Sound is created by vibrations that travel through a medium like air, water, or solid objects as invisible waves.
In rural areas, farmers use loud sounds like drums or metal clanging to scare away birds and wild animals from their ripening crops.
Sound travels faster through solid objects and water than through the air, which is why you can hear distant footsteps by placing your ear to the ground.
An echo occurs when sound waves hit a hard surface like a cliff in the Ethiopian highlands and bounce back to your ears.
Understanding sound frequency is important for animal health; some pests can be repelled by high-frequency sounds that humans cannot hear.
am: ድምፅ የሚፈጠረው እንደ አየር፣ ውሃ ወይም ጠጣር ነገሮች ባሉ ነገሮች ውስጥ በማይታዩ ሞገዶች በሚጓዙ ንዝረቶች አማካኝነት ነው።
በገጠር አካባቢዎች ገበሬዎች እንደ ከበሮ ወይም ብረት ያሉ ከፍተኛ ድምፆችን በመጠቀም አእዋፍን እና የዱር እንስሳትን ከሰብላቸው ያስፈራራሉ።
ድምፅ ከአየር ይልቅ በጠጣር ነገሮች እና በውሃ ውስጥ በፍጥነት ይጓዛል፤ ለዚህም ነው ጆሮዎን መሬት ላይ በማስቀመጥ የሩቅ ፈርጥ ድምፅ መስማት የሚችሉት።
አስተጋባ (Echo) የሚከሰተው የድምፅ ሞገዶች እንደ ኢትዮጵያ ደጋማ ቦታዎች ያሉ ጠንካራ ገጽታዎችን ሲመቱ እና ወደ ጆሮዎ ሲመለሱ ነው።
የድምፅ ድግግሞሽን (frequency) መረዳት ለእንስሳት ጤና አስፈላጊ ነው፤ አንዳንድ ተባዮች ሰዎች በማይሰሙት ከፍተኛ ድግግሞሽ ድምፅ ሊባረሩ ይችላሉ።
om: Sagaleen sosocho'iinsa (vibrations) karaa qilleensaa, bishaania yookiin jabaataa dambalii ijaan hin mul'anneen deemuun uumama.
Naannoo baadiyyaatti, qonnaan bultoonni sagalee jabaa akka dibbee yookiin sibiila walitti rurukkutuun simbirrootaa fi bineensota callaa irraa ari'u.
Sagaleen qilleensa caalaa bishaan fi jabaataa keessa saffisaan deema; kanaafuu gurra lafa kaa'uun faana miillaa fageenya irra jiru dhaga'uun ni danda'ama.
Ikoon (echo) kan uumamu yeroo dambaliin sagalee tulluuwwan Itoophiyaa jabaa rurukkutee gara gurra keessaniitti deebi'uudha.
Sadarkaa sagalee (frequency) beekuun fayyaa beeyladaatiif murteessaadha; ilbiisota tokko tokko sagalee ol-aanaa namni hin dhageenyeen ari'uun ni danda'ama.

en: Why does sound travel farther at night in quiet rural villages?
How do our ears convert sound waves into signals for the brain?
What materials are best for blocking loud noise in a house?
Magnetism is a force that can attract or repel certain metals like iron, which is the same principle used in many modern Ethiopian machines.
Every magnet has a North and South pole; opposite poles attract each other, while similar poles push each other away (repulsion).
A compass uses a small magnetic needle that aligns with the Earth's magnetic poles to help travelers find their direction in remote forests.
Magnets are used in dairy farming to catch pieces of metal swallowed by cows (cow magnets), preventing internal injuries and 'hardware disease'.
Electromagnets are created using electricity and are essential for the functioning of water pumps and generators used on small farms.
am: መግነጢሳዊነት እንደ ብረት ያሉ አንዳንድ ብረቶችን ሊስብ ወይም ሊገፋ የሚችል ኃይል ነው፤ ይህም በብዙ ዘመናዊ የኢትዮጵያ ማሽኖች ውስጥ ጥቅም ላይ ይውላል።
እያንዳንዱ መግነጢስ የሰሜን እና የደቡብ ፖል አለው፤ ተቃራኒ ፖሎች እርስ በርስ ይሳባሉ፣ ተመሳሳይ ፖሎች ደግሞ እርስ በርስ ይገፋፋሉ።
ኮምፓስ ከመሬት መግነጢሳዊ ፖሎች ጋር የሚሰለፍ ትንሽ መግነጢሳዊ መርፌን በመጠቀም መንገደኞች በሩቅ ደኖች ውስጥ አቅጣጫቸውን እንዲያገኙ ይረዳል።
መግነጢሶች በላሞች ሆድ ውስጥ የሚገኙ የብረት ቁርጥራጮችን ለመሳብ (cow magnets) ያገለግላሉ፤ ይህም የውስጥ አካል ጉዳትን ይከላከላል።
ኤሌክትሮማግኔቶች የሚፈጠሩት ኤሌክትሪክን በመጠቀም ሲሆን በአነስተኛ እርሻዎች ላይ ለሚጠቀሙት የውሃ ፓምፖች እና ጄነሬተሮች ስራ ወሳኝ ናቸው።
om: Maagneetiizimiin humna sibiilota akka ayiranii harkisu yookiin dhiibuudha; kunis maashinoota Itoophiyaa ammayyaa hedduu keessatti hojiirra oola.
Maagneetiin hundi fiixee Kaabaa fi Kibbaa qaba; fiixeen faallaa wal-harkisu, fiixeen wal-fakkaataan immoo wal-dhiibu.
Kampaasiin lilmoo maagneetii xiqqaatti fayyadamuun kallattii Kaabaa fi Kibbaa lafaa hordofee namoonni karaa akka hin dhabne gargaara.
Maagneetiin loon keessatti sibiila isaan liqimsan harkisuuf ni tajaajila; kunis miidhaa garaa keessaa (hardware disease) ittisa.
Ilektiroomaagneetiin elektirikiin uumama; kunis paampii bishaania fi jeneraatara qonnaa xixinnoo irratti tajaajilaniif baay'ee murteessaadha.

en: How can I make a temporary magnet using a piece of iron and a battery?
Why do magnets not attract materials like wood or plastic?
What are the uses of magnetism in modern medical equipment like MRI?
Reflection happens when light bounces off a smooth surface like a mirror or still water, allowing us to see images of objects.
Refraction is the bending of light as it passes from one medium (like air) to another (like water), making objects look broken or shifted.
In Ethiopia, understanding light is vital for solar energy; solar panels capture light particles to create clean electricity for rural homes.
White sunlight is actually made of a spectrum of colors (a rainbow) that can be separated by raindrops acting like tiny prisms.
Lenses in eyeglasses use refraction to bend light correctly so that people with poor vision can see their farm work more clearly.
am: ነጸብራቅ (Reflection) የሚከሰተው ብርሃን እንደ መስታወት ወይም ረግረጋማ ውሃ ካሉ ለስላሳ ገጽታዎች ላይ ሲመለስ ነው፤ ይህም የነገሮችን ምስል እንድናይ ያስችለናል።
ሪፍራክሽን (Refraction) ብርሃን ከአንድ ነገር (እንደ አየር) ወደ ሌላ (እንደ ውሃ) ሲያልፍ የሚፈጠር የብርሃን መታጠፍ ነው፤ ይህም ነገሮች የተሰበሩ ወይም የተፈናቀሉ እንዲመስሉ ያደርጋል።
በኢትዮጵያ ብርሃንን መረዳት ለሶላር ኃይል ወሳኝ ነው፤ የሶላር ፓነሎች ለገጠር ቤቶች ንጹህ ኤሌክትሪክ ለመፍጠር የብርሃን ቅንጣቶችን ይሰበስባሉ።
ነጭ የፀሐይ ብርሃን በትክክል የቀለማት ስብስብ (ቀስተ ደመና) ሲሆን እንደ ትንሽ ፕሪዝም በሚያገለግሉ የዝናብ ጠብታዎች ሊለያዩ ይችላሉ።
በመነጽር ውስጥ ያሉ ሌንሶች ደካማ እይታ ያላቸው ሰዎች የእርሻ ስራቸውን በግልጽ እንዲያዩ ብርሃንን በትክክል ለማጠፍ ሪፍራክሽንን ይጠቀማሉ።
om: Reflekshiniin (Reflection) kan uumamu yeroo ifni fuula lallaafaa akka fulaa yookiin bishaan ciisu irraa deebbi'uudha; kunis fakkii waan tokkoo akka arginu godha.
Refiraakshiniin (Refraction) immoo dabama ifaa yeroo ifni qilleensa keessaa gara bishaanitti darbu uumamuudha; kunis waanti bishaan keessa jiru akka kaccabetti mul'isa.
Itoophiyaa keessatti ifa aduu hubachuun anniisaa 'solar' tiif murteessaadha; paannaliin soolaarii ifa gara elektirikiitti jijjiiruun ibsaa nuuf kenna.
Ifni aduu adii ta'e dambalii bifa garaagaraa (rainbow) irraa uumame; kunis yeroo roobaa bifa torba qabaatee mul'ata.
Leensiin manayyuu (eyeglasses) ifa dabsanii mul'isuun namoonni iji isaanii dadhabaa ta'e hojii qonnaa isaanii sirriitti akka hojjetan gargaara.

en: Why does a straw look broken when you put it in a glass of water?
How do plants use specific colors of light to grow during photosynthesis?
What is the difference between transparent, translucent, and opaque materials?
Trickster characters, such as the Hare or the Spider (Anansi), are common and use wit to outsmart stronger opponents, teaching survival skills.
Folktales often explain the origins of natural phenomena or animal traits, connecting the physical world with spiritual beliefs.
The use of proverbs and metaphors within stories serves to instill community values and ethical behavior in the younger generation.
am: እንደ ጥንቸል ወይም ሸረሪት ያሉ ብልጥ ገጸ-ባህሪያት በብልሃት ከአካላዊ ጥንካሬ ይልቅ አሸናፊ መሆን እንደሚቻል እና የመተርረፍ ጥበብን ያስተምራሉ።
የአፍሪካ ተረቶች ብዙ ጊዜ የተፈጥሮ ክስተቶች ወይም የእንስሳት ባህሪያት እንዴት እንደተገኙ በማብራራት ቁሳዊውን ዓለም ከመንፈሳዊ እምነቶች ጋር ያገናኛሉ።
በታሪኮች ውስጥ ምሳሌያዊ አነጋገሮችን መጠቀም በማህበረሰቡ ውስጥ ያሉ እሴቶችን እና ስነ-ምግባራዊ ባህሪያትን ለቀጣዩ ትውልድ ለማስተላለፍ ይረዳል።
om: Namni bifa bineensaa akka hantuutaa yookiin illeettii qabu haala qaroominaan diina isaa injifatu, akkaataa jireenyaa keessatti dandeettii of-eeggannoo barsiisa.
Sheekkoon yeroo baay'ee uumama uumamaa fi amala bineensotaa ibsuun, addunyaa ijaan mul'atu amantii haፉuraa wajjin wal-qabsiisa.
Makkonni fi mamsaan oduu durii keessatti tajaajilan, dhaloota haaraatiif duudhaa hawaasummaa fi amala gaarii barsiisuuf gargaaru.

en: What is the significance of the Tortoise in West African folklore?
How do oral traditions differ from written literature in preserving history?
Can you name a famous Ethiopian folk hero?
Identify the 'speaker' or persona of the poem to understand the perspective and emotional tone being conveyed.
Look for sensory imagery—vivid descriptions of sights, sounds, or smells—that the poet uses to create a mental picture for the reader.
Analyze metaphors and similes to find deeper symbolic meanings that go beyond the literal definitions of the words.
am: የግጥሙን ስሜት እና የሚተላለፈውን መልዕክት ለመረዳት የግጥሙን ተራኪ ወይም 'ባለቤት' መለየት ያስፈልጋል።
ገጣሚው ለአንባቢው በህሊናው ስዕል እንዲስል የተጠቀመባቸውን የስሜት ህዋሳትን የሚነኩ ዝርዝር መግለጫዎችን (ምስል-ከሳች ቃላትን) ፈልጉ።
ከቃላቱ ቀጥተኛ ትርጉም በስተጀርባ ያሉ ጥልቅ እና ምሳሌያዊ ትርጉሞችን ለማግኘት ምሳሌያዊ ንግግሮችን እና ዘይቤዎችን ይመርምሩ።
om: Miira walalichaa fi ergaa darbu hubachuuf, 'dubbataa' yookiin eenyummaa walaloo sanaa adda baasaa.
Ibsawwan fakkii sammuu keessatti uuman (imagery)—kan akka fakkii, sagalee yookiin foolii—barreessaan akka nuti sammuun ijaarruuf fayyadame hordofaa.
Hiika dubbiin alaa jiru hubachuun, mamsaa fi makkonnii walalicha keessatti tajaajilan xiinxalaa.

en: What is the difference between a metaphor and a simile?
