How does the rhythm of a poem affect its overall mood?
What is a sonnet and how is its structure analyzed?
Johannes Gutenberg invented the movable-type printing press around 1440, which allowed books to be mass-produced for the first time.
Before the press, books were handwritten manuscripts, usually created by monks, making them rare and affordable only to the wealthy.
The spread of printed books led to a massive increase in literacy rates and the rapid exchange of scientific and religious ideas across the world.
am: ዮሃንስ ጉተንበርግ በ1440 ገደማ ተንቀሳቃሽ የህትመት መኪናን የፈጠረ ሲሆን ይህም መጽሐፍት ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ በብዛት እንዲታተሙ አስችሏል።
የህትመት መኪና ከመፈጠሩ በፊት መጽሐፍት በእጅ የሚጻፉ (manuscripts) ነበሩ፤ ይህም መጽሐፍትን ውድ እና ለሀብታሞች ብቻ ተደራሽ ያደርጋቸው ነበር።
የታተሙ መጽሐፍት መስፋፋት የንባብ እና የጽሕፈት ክህሎት እንዲጨምር እና የሳይንሳዊ እና ሃይማኖታዊ ሃሳቦች በዓለም ዙሪያ በፍጥነት እንዲሰራጩ አድርጓል።
om: Yohaannis Guutanberg bara 1440 keessa maashinii maxxansaa jalqabaa kalaqe; kunis kitaabonni baay'inaan akka oomishaman godhe.
Maashiniin maxxansaa utuu hin dhufin dura, kitaabonni harkaan barreeffamu turan; kunis kitaaba gatii jabaa fi qabeeyyiidhaaf qofa akka ta'u godhee ture.
Maxxansi kitaabotaa babal'achuun dandeettii dubbisuu fi barreessaa guddisuun, yaadonni saayinsii fi amantii addunyaa irratti akka tamsa'an godhe.

en: When was the first printing press introduced to Ethiopia?
How did the printing press influence the Protestant Reformation?
What is the oldest known printed book in the world?
Storytelling is a vital tool for passing down cultural values, history, and life lessons from one generation to the next.
It fosters a sense of shared identity and belonging within a community, helping individuals understand their heritage.
Through stories, people develop empathy by experiencing the world and challenges through the eyes of different characters.
am: ታሪክን መተረክ የባህል እሴቶችን፣ ታሪክን እና የህይወት ትምህርቶችን ከአንድ ትውልድ ወደ ሌላው ለማስተላለፍ ወሳኝ መሳሪያ ነው።
በማህበረሰቡ ውስጥ የጋራ ማንነት እና የባለቤትነት ስሜት እንዲዳብር በማድረግ ግለሰቦች ቅርሶቻቸውን እንዲረዱ ይረዳል።
በታሪኮች አማካኝነት ሰዎች የዓለምን ፈተናዎች በተለያዩ ገጸ-ባህሪያት እይታ በማየት ሌሎችን የመረዳት (empathy) ችሎታቸውን ያሳድጋሉ።
om: Oduu durii fi seenessuun duudhaalee aadaa, seenaa fi barumsa jireenyaa dhalootaa dhalootatti dabarsuuf meeshaa murteessaadha.
Hawaasa keessatti eenyummaa waloo fi miira tokkummaa uuma; namoonni dhaloota isaanii akka beekan gargaara.
Seenaa keessaan namoonni miira namoota biraa hubachuu (empathy) baratu; haala kanaan addunyaa ija nama biraatiin argu.

en: How does digital storytelling differ from traditional oral storytelling?
Why are origin stories important in many African cultures?
Can storytelling be used as a form of social activism?
Give your character a clear motivation or desire; a character who wants something intensely drives the plot forward.
Use the 'show, don't tell' technique by describing actions and sensory details instead of just stating emotions.
Create an internal or external conflict that forces the character to make difficult choices and grow throughout the story.
am: ለገጸ-ባህሪዎ ግልጽ የሆነ ፍላጎት ወይም ግብ ይስጡት፤ አንድን ነገር አጥብቆ የሚፈልግ ገጸ-ባህሪ የታሪኩን ሂደት ወደ ፊት ይገፋዋል።
ስሜትን በቀጥታ ከመናገር ይልቅ ድርጊቶችን እና ስሜትን የሚነኩ ዝርዝሮችን በመግለጽ 'አሳይ እንጂ አትንገር' የሚለውን ዘዴ ይጠቀሙ።
ገጸ-ባህሪው አስቸጋሪ ምርጫዎችን እንዲያደርግ እና በታሪኩ ሂደት ውስጥ እንዲለወጥ የሚያስገድድ ውስጣዊ ወይም ውጫዊ ግጭት ይፍጠሩ።
om: Qaama seenessaa (character) keessaniif kaayyoo ifa ta'e kennaa; namni waan tokko hawwu seenaa sana gara duratti sochoosa.
Miira qaama sanaa himuu dhiistanii, gochaa fi fakkiiwwan ijaan mul'ataniin (show, don't tell) agarsiisaa.
Wal-itti bu'iinsa (conflict) keessoo yookiin alaa uumaa; kunis namichi filannoo jabaa akka godhuufi seenaa keessatti akka jijjiiramu godha.

en: How do I develop a realistic 'voice' for my main character?
What is the importance of a character's backstory in creative writing?
How can I use the setting of a story to reflect the character's mood?
Digestion begins in the mouth where saliva starts breaking down carbohydrates into simpler sugars.
The small intestine is the most critical part where nutrients like glucose are absorbed into the bloodstream through tiny finger-like structures called villi.
Once in the blood, glucose is carried to cells where it is combined with oxygen to create the energy you need for farming and daily activities.
am: የምግብ መፈጨት የሚጀምረው በአፍ ውስጥ ሲሆን ምራቅ ካርቦሃይድሬትን ወደ ቀላል ስኳርነት መለወጥ ይጀምራል።
ትንሹ አንጀት ግሉኮስን የመሰሉ ንጥረ ነገሮች ቪሊ (villi) በሚባሉ ጥቃቅን መዋቅሮች አማካኝነት ወደ ደም ውስጥ የሚገቡበት ዋናው ቦታ ነው።
ግሉኮስ ደም ውስጥ ከገባ በኋላ ወደ ሴሎች ይወሰዳል፤ እዚያም ለዕለታዊ ስራዎች እና ለእርሻ የሚሆን ጉልበት ለመስጠት ከኦክስጅን ጋር ይዋሃዳል።
om: Bullaa'insi nyaataa afaan keessatti jalqaba; hancuufni immoo kaarboohaayidireetii gara sukkaaraatti jijjiiruu eegala.
Marimaan xiqqaan bakka murteessaa sooratni akka glukoosii kutaalee 'villi' jedhamanun gara dhiigaatti itti xuuxamaniidha.
Glukoosiin erga dhiiga seenee booda gara seelotaatti geeffama; achittis oksiijiinii wajjin wal-makuun humna hojii qonnaaf barbaachisu uuma.

en: Why is chewing food thoroughly important for better energy absorption?
What happens to fiber since it cannot be turned into energy?
How do stomach acids help in the breakdown of proteins?
Each kidney contains millions of tiny filters called nephrons that separate waste products and excess water from your blood.
Filtered waste products, including urea and salts, are turned into urine and sent to the bladder for storage before being removed from the body.
Kidneys also help balance the amount of salt and minerals in your body, which is vital for keeping your blood pressure stable while working in the sun.
am: እያንዳንዱ ኩላሊት ቆሻሻን እና ትርፍ ውሃን ከደም ውስጥ የሚለዩ ኔፍሮን (nephrons) የሚባሉ በሚሊዮን የሚቆጠሩ ጥቃቅን ማጣሪያዎችን ይዟል።
እንደ ዩሪያ እና ጨው ያሉ የተጣሩ ቆሻሻዎች ወደ ሽንት ይቀየራሉ፤ ከዚያም ከሰውነት ከመውጣታቸው በፊት በማጠራቀሚያው ፊኛ ውስጥ ይቆያሉ።
ኩላሊቶች በሰውነትዎ ውስጥ ያለውን የጨው እና የማዕድን መጠን እንዲመጣጠን ይረዳሉ፤ ይህም በፀሐይ ውስጥ በሚሰሩበት ጊዜ የደም ግፊትዎ እንዳይዛባ ያደርጋል።
om: Kaleen tokkoon tokkoon isaa 'nephrons' kan jedhaman kiliyoonaan kan lakkaawwaman xurii fi bishaan dabalataa dhiiga keessaa calalan qaba.
Xuriiwwan calalaman kan akka 'urea' fi soogiddaa gara fincaanitti jijjiiramuun, utuu qaama keessaa hin ba'in dura kuusaa fincaanii (bladder) keessa turu.
Kaleen soogiddaa fi ma'idana qaama keessaa madaaluun, yeroo aduu keessa hojjattan dhiibbaan dhiigaa akka hin jijjiiramne gargaaru.

en: How much water should I drink daily to support healthy kidney function?
What are the early signs that the kidneys are not filtering blood correctly?
Why does urine become darker when we are dehydrated?
Hormones are chemical messengers created by glands like the thyroid and pancreas that travel through the blood to tell your organs what to do.
The hormone insulin controls how your body uses sugar for energy; if it doesn't work correctly, sugar stays in the blood, leading to diabetes.
Hormones also regulate your growth, your sleep patterns, and your body’s reaction to stress or danger through the 'fight or flight' response.
am: ሆርሞኖች እንደ ታይሮይድ እና ጣፊያ ባሉ እጢዎች የሚመረቱ ኬሚካላዊ መልእክተኞች ሲሆኑ፣ በደም ውስጥ በመዘዋወር የአካል ክፍሎች ምን ማድረግ እንዳለባቸው ይነግሯቸዋል።
ኢንሱሊን የተባለው ሆርሞን ሰውነትዎ ስኳርን ለጉልበት እንዴት እንደሚጠቀም ይቆጣጠራል፤ በትክክል ካልሰራ ስኳር በደም ውስጥ ስለሚቆይ ለስኳር በሽታ ይዳርጋል።
ሆርሞኖች እድገትዎን፣ የእንቅልፍ ሁኔታዎን እና ሰውነትዎ ለጭንቀት ወይም ለአደጋ የሚሰጠውን ፈጣን ምላሽ ይቆጣጠራሉ።
om: Hoormoononni ergaa keemikaalaa xannachoota akka 'thyroid' fi 'pancreas' tiin oomishamaniidha; isaanis dhiiga keessa deemuun qaamni maal hojjachuu akka qabu ajaju.
Hoormooniin 'insulin' jedhamu qaamni keessan sukkaara akkamitti akka fayyadamu to'ata; yoo inni hin hojjenne dhukkuba sukkaaraaf nama saaxila.
Hoormoononni guddina qaamaa, sirna hirribaa fi akkamitti qaamni dhiphuu yookiin balaa akka lolu (fight or flight) to'atu.

en: How does the 'Adrenaline' hormone help us during physical emergencies?
Which foods help balance hormones naturally in the body?
What gland is responsible for controlling the speed of our metabolism?
Light enters the eye through the pupil, while the iris (the colored part) controls how much light gets in depending on the brightness.
The lens behind the pupil focuses the light onto the retina at the back of the eye, creating an upside-down image of what you are looking at.
The optic nerve then carries this image as electrical signals to the brain, which flips the image so you see the world correctly.
am: ብርሃን በአይን ብሌን (pupil) በኩል ወደ አይን ይገባል፤ አይሪስ (ባለቀለሙ ክፍል) ደግሞ እንደ ብርሃኑ መጠን ምን ያህል ብርሃን መግባት እንዳለበት ይቆጣጠራል።
ከአይን ብሌን ጀርባ ያለው ሌንስ ብርሃኑን በአይን ጀርባ ባለው ሬቲና (retina) ላይ እንዲያርፍ ያደርጋል፤ ይህም የምታዩትን ነገር ምስል ይፈጥራል።
የአይን ነርቭ (optic nerve) ይህንን ምስል በኤሌክትሪክ ምልክት ወደ አእምሮ ይወስዳል፤ አእምሮም ምስሉን በማስተካከል ዓለምን በትክክል እንድናይ ያደርገናል።
om: Ifni ija keessa kan seenu 'pupil' tiini; 'iris' (qaama bifa qabu) immoo akka ifa aduutti hammam ifni akka seenu to'ata.
Leensiin 'pupil' duuba jiru ifa sana 'retina' (duuba ijaa) irratti ffocus godha; kunis fakkii waan isin ilaaltanii uuma.
Narviin ijaa (optic nerve) fakkii sana gara sammuutti erga; sammuun immoo fakkii sana gara sirriitti jijjiiruun akka arginu godha.

en: Why do we need two eyes instead of just one for depth perception?
How does Vitamin A deficiency lead to 'night blindness' in children?
What is the function of tears beyond just emotional crying?
When your body fights a germ for the first time, it creates special 'Memory Cells' that store information about that specific germ's structure.
If the same germ enters your body again, these memory cells recognize it instantly and produce antibodies to kill it before you feel sick.
This 'immune memory' is the basis for vaccines, which teach your body to recognize dangerous germs without you having to get the actual disease first.
am: ሰውነትዎ ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ ከአንድ ተህዋሲያን ጋር ሲዋጋ፣ ስለዚያ ተህዋሲያን መዋቅር መረጃ የሚያከማቹ ልዩ 'የማስታወሻ ሴሎችን' (Memory Cells) ይፈጥራል።
ያ ሰውነትዎ የሚያውቀው ተህዋሲያን እንደገና ወደ ሰውነትዎ ከገባ፣ እነዚህ የማስታወሻ ሴሎች ወዲያውኑ ለይተውት በሽታው ሳይሰማዎት ያጠፉታል።
ይህ 'የመከላከል ትውስታ' ለክትባት መሰረት ነው፤ ክትባቶች በሽታው ሳይይዝዎ ሰውነትዎ አደገኛ ተህዋሲያንን ለይቶ እንዲያውቅ ያስተምራሉ።
om: Yeroo qaamni keessan jalqabaaf jarmii lolu, seelota yaadannoo (Memory Cells) kan waa'ee jarmii sanaa kuusan uuma.
Yoo jarmiin sun deebi'ee qaama keessan seene, seelonni yaadannoo sun hatattamaan isa beekuun utuu isin hin dhukkubsin ajjeesu.
Yaadannoon ittisa qaamaa kun bu'uura talaalliiti; talaalliin utuu dhukkubichi isin hin qabin qaamni keessan akka jarmii sana beeku godha.

en: Why can we get the common cold many times if our immune system has memory?
How long do memory cells usually stay in the human body?
What role do white blood cells play during the first exposure to a new virus?
Select a site with firm, rocky ground on both banks to ensure the bridge foundations do not sink or shift during the rainy season.
Deepen the foundations below the riverbed level to prevent water from washing away the soil around the base (scouring).
Distribute the 'dead load' (weight of the bridge) and 'live load' (vehicles/people) evenly using trusses or arches to prevent structural failure.
Use reinforced concrete or treated timber to resist high humidity and prevent rot or rust in Ethiopia's diverse climates.
Inspect the bridge annually for cracks or shifting, especially after heavy flooding, to ensure the supports remain stable.
am: በክረምት ወቅት የድልድዩ መሰረት እንዳይሰምጥ ወይም እንዳይናጋ በሁለቱም ወገን ጠንካራ እና ድንጋያማ መሬት ያለበትን ቦታ ይምረጡ።
ውሃ በመሰረቱ ዙሪያ ያለውን አፈር እንዳያጥበው የድልድዩን መሰረት ከወንዙ ወለል በታች ጠልቆ እንዲገባ አድርገው ይገንቡ።
የድልድዩን የራሱን ክብደት እና በላዩ ላይ የሚያልፉትን ተሽከርካሪዎች/ሰዎች ክብደት በወጥ ሁኔታ ለማከፋፈል 'ትረስ' ወይም 'አርች' የተባሉ የድጋፍ ዘዴዎችን ይጠቀሙ።
በኢትዮጵያ የተለያዩ የአየር ንብረቶች ውስጥ ዝገትን እና መበስበስን ለመከላከል ጠንካራ ኮንክሪት ወይም የታከመ እንጨት ይጠቀሙ።
ድጋፎቹ የተረጋጉ መሆናቸውን ለማረጋገጥ ድልድዩን በየአመቱ በተለይም ከከባድ ጎርፍ በኋላ ለጥንቃቄ ይመርምሩ።
om: Waqtii gannaa bu'uurri riqichaa akka hin sifeenyef yookiin hin sochooneef gama lameenunuu lafa jabaa fi dhagaa qabu filadhaa.
Lolaan bishaania biyyee hundee riqichaa jala jiru akka hin harcaafneef, hundee isaa gad-fageenyaan bishaan jala gadi fageessanii ijaaruu.
Ulfaatina riqichaa fi kan konkolaataa/namaa bifa wal-qixa ta'een raabsuuf akkaataa ijaarsa 'arch' yookiin 'truss' fayyadamaa.
Jijjiirama qilleensa Itoophiyaa dandamatanii akka hin rimeenyef yookiin hin madaofneef 'concrete' jabaa yookiin muka wal-'aanu' fayyadamaa.
Riqicha sana waggaa waggaatti, keessattuu lolaa booda dhangala'aa fi babbaqaun jiraachuu isaa yeroo hunda hordofaa.

en: What is the difference between a beam bridge and a suspension bridge?
How can we use local stones to build small footbridges in rural villages?
What are the safety signs of a bridge that is about to collapse?
Shut off the main water valve first to stop the flow before attempting any repairs on individual pipes or faucets.
Drain the remaining water from the system by opening the lowest tap in the house or yard to prevent messy spills while working.
Wrap Teflon tape clockwise around the pipe threads 3-5 times to create a watertight seal before screwing the joints back together.
Check for worn-out rubber gaskets or washers inside leaking valves; replacing these small parts often stops the leak without needing a new valve.
Tighten the joints firmly with a wrench, but avoid over-tightening as this can crack plastic PVC pipes or strip metal threads.
am: በቧንቧዎች ወይም በቧንቧ ራሶች ላይ ማንኛውንም ጥገና ከማድረግዎ በፊት መጀመሪያ ዋናውን የውሃ መዝጊያ ቫልቭ ይዝጉ።
በሚሰሩበት ጊዜ ውሃ እንዳይፈስ በአከባቢው ያለውን ዝቅተኛውን የውሃ ቧንቧ በመክፈት በቧንቧው ውስጥ የቀረውን ውሃ ያፍስሱ።
ቧንቧዎቹን መልሰው ከመገጠምዎ በፊት ውሃ እንዳያሳልፉ የቴፍሎን ቴፕ በቧንቧው ክር ላይ በሰዓት አቅጣጫ ከ3-5 ጊዜ ይጠቅልሉበት።
በቫልቮች ውስጥ ያረጁ የጎማ መገጠሚያዎች (gaskets) መኖራቸውን ያረጋግጡ፤ እነዚህን ትናንሽ ክፍሎች መቀየር ብዙ ጊዜ አዲስ ቫልቭ ሳይገዙ ፍሳሹን ያቆማል።
የቧንቧ መገጣጠሚያዎችን በመፍቻ (wrench) አጥብቀው ይያዙ፤ ነገር ግን የፕላስቲክ ቧንቧዎችን እንዳይሰነጥቅ በጣም አያጥብቁት።
om: Ujummoo bishaania suphuun dura, jalqaba vaalvii bishaania isa guddaa cufuun bishaan akka dhaabbatu godhaa.
Yeroo hojjattan bishaan akka isin hin dhangalaaneef, bishaan ujummoo keessa hafe ujummoo gad-aanaa banuun dhangalaasaa.
Ujummoo deebisanii walitti hidhuun dura, akka bishaan hin lallaafneef 'Teflon tape' morma ujummoo irratti si'a 3-5 maraa.
Vaalvii bishaan lallaafu keessa gommaa (gasket) moofaan jiraachuu isaa to'adhaa; yeroo baay'ee gommaa jijjiiruun gahaadha.
Meeshaa 'wrench' jedhamuun jabeessanii hidhaa, garuu ujummoo pilaastikaa akka hin babbaqsineef garmalee hin jabeessinaa.

en: How do I fix a burst PVC pipe caused by high water pressure?
What are the best tools for a basic home plumbing kit?
How can I prevent water pipes from clogging with sediment or dirt?
Clean dust and bird droppings off the panels every 1-2 weeks using a soft cloth and clean water to maintain maximum electricity production.
Perform cleaning in the early morning or late evening when the panels are cool to avoid cracking the glass due to sudden temperature changes.
Check all wiring connections for signs of damage from rodents or weathering, and ensure all plugs are tight and dry.
Keep the area around the panels clear of growing trees or bushes; even a small shadow can significantly reduce the power output of the whole system.
Inspect the battery terminals for white corrosion; clean them with a mixture of baking soda and water, then apply a little petroleum jelly.
am: ከፍተኛ የኤሌክትሪክ ምርት ለማግኘት በየ1-2 ሳምንቱ ለስላሳ ጨርቅ እና ንጹህ ውሃ በመጠቀም አቧራውን እና የወፍ ኩበትን ከፓነሉ ላይ ያፅዱ።
በከፍተኛ ሙቀት ምክንያት መስታወቱ እንዳይሰነጠቅ ፓነሎቹ ቀዝቃዛ በሚሆኑበት በማለዳ ወይም ምሽት ላይ ጽዳቱን ያከናውኑ።
በአይጦች ወይም በአየር ሁኔታ ምክንያት የሚመጡ የሽቦ ብልሽቶችን ያረጋግጡ፤ እንዲሁም ሁሉም ፕለጎች የጠነከሩ እና ደረቅ መሆናቸውን ያረጋግጡ።
በፓነሎቹ ዙሪያ ያሉ ዛፎችን ወይም ቁጥቋጦዎችን ይቁረጡ፤ ትንሽ ጥላ እንኳን የጠቅላላውን ሲስተም የኃይል ምርት በእጅጉ ሊቀንስ ይችላል።
የባትሪ መገናኛዎችን (terminals) ከዝገት ያፅዱ፤ በቢካርቦናት እና በውሃ ድብልቅ ካጸዱ በኋላ ትንሽ ቫዝሊን ይቀቡት።
om: Anniisaa guutuu argachuuf, torban tokko yookiin lamaan al tokko huccuu lallaafaa fi bishaan qulqulluun dhukkee paanalii irraa qulqulleessaa.
Fulaan (glass) paanalii ho'aan akka hin babbaqsineef, ganama barii yookiin galgala yeroo paanaliin qabbanaawutti qulqulleessaa.
Shiboowwan hantuunni akka hin nyannee fi jabaatanii hidhamuu isaanii yeroo yeroon to'adhaa.
Gaaddidduun xiqqoon oomisha anniisaa waan hir'isuuf, naannoo paanaliitti mukeen akka hin guddinne muree qulqulleessaa.
Bakka baatiriin wal-qabatu (terminals) xurii irraa qulqulleessuun vaaziliinii muraasa itti dibaa; kunis akka hin madaofne godha.

en: How do I know if my solar battery is no longer holding a charge?
What should I do if the inverter shows a red error light?
Can I use soap to clean my solar panels?
An algorithm is a step-by-step set of instructions to complete a task, much like a recipe for making 'Doro Wot'.
Start by clearly defining the end goal; you cannot write an effective algorithm if you do not know exactly what problem you are solving.
Break the process down into the smallest possible individual steps so that even a machine can follow them without making a mistake.
Ensure the steps follow a logical sequence where each action leads naturally to the next one (e.g., wash the pot, then add water, then heat).
Test your algorithm by following it yourself; if you find a mistake (a 'bug'), go back and fix that specific step in the sequence.
am: አልጎሪዝም (Algorithm) ማለት አንድን ተግባር ለማከናወን በቅደም ተከተል የተቀመጡ መመሪያዎች ስብስብ ነው፤ ልክ የዶሮ ወጥ አሰራር ቅደም ተከተል ማለት ነው።
መጀመሪያ የመጨረሻ ግብዎን በግልጽ ይግለጹ፤ ምን ዓይነት ችግር እየፈቱ እንደሆነ በትክክል ካላወቁ ውጤታማ መመሪያ ማውጣት አይችሉም።
ማሽንም ቢሆን ሳይሳሳት እንዲከተለው ሂደቱን ወደ ትናንሽ እና ነጠላ ደረጃዎች ይከፋፍሉት።
እያንዳንዱ ተግባር ወደ ሚቀጥለው ደረጃ እንዲያመራ መመሪያዎቹ ምክንያታዊ ቅደም ተከተል መከተላቸውን ያረጋግጡ።
መመሪያውን (Algorithm) እራስዎ በመከተል ይሞክሩት፤ ስህተት (bug) ካገኙ ወደ ኋላ ተመልሰው ያንን የተለየ ደረጃ ያስተካክሉ።
om: Algooriizimiin (Algorithm) qajeelfama hojii tokko raawwachuuf tartiibaan dhiyaatuudha; fakkeenyaaf akkaataa qophee koflee nyaataa.
Jalqaba irratti galma keessan adda baasaa; rakkoo furuun barbaaddan yoo hin beekne qajeelfama sirrii baasuu hin dandeessan.
Maashiniin illee akka hin dogoggorreetti, adeemsa sana gara tarkaanfiiwwan xixinnootti qoodaa.
Tarkaanfiiwwan sun wal-hordofuu isaanii mirkaneeffadhaa (fkn. qodaa dhiquu, bishaan naquu, achiin ho'isuu).
Qajeelfama sana ofuma keessaniin hordofaa madaalaa; yoo dogoggorri (bug) jiraate tarkaanfii sana sirreessaa.

en: What is the difference between an algorithm and a computer program?
How can I practice thinking like a coder in my everyday life?
Why is the 'order' of steps so important in an algorithm?
Sand the wooden surface thoroughly with sandpaper to remove bumps and old paint, creating a smooth area for the new layer to stick to.
Clean all dust and grease from the wood after sanding using a dry brush or cloth, as dirt will cause the paint to peel later.
Apply a coat of primer or a termite-resistant chemical (anti-termite) first to protect the wood from insects and indoor moisture.
Paint with long, even strokes following the direction of the wood grain to achieve a professional and beautiful finish.
Apply a final layer of clear varnish or sealant to create a waterproof barrier that protects the wood from sunlight and heavy use.
am: አዲሱ ቀለም በሚገባ እንዲይዝ የአሸዋ ወረቀት (sandpaper) በመጠቀም የእንጨቱን ገጽታ በማለስለስ የቆዩ ቀለሞችን እና ወጣ ገባዎችን ያስወግዱ።
ከፈገፈጉ በኋላ አቧራዎችን እና ቅባቶችን በደረቅ ጨርቅ ያፅዱ፤ ምክንያቱም ቆሻሻ ካለ ቀለሙ በኋላ ላይ ሊላጥ ይችላል።
እንጨቱን ከተባይ እና ከእርጥበት ለመጠበቅ መጀመሪያ የፕራይመር (primer) ወይም ምስጥ የሚከላከል ኬሚካል (anti-termite) ይቀቡት።
ውብ እና ወጥ የሆነ ውጤት ለማግኘት ቀለሙን የእንጨቱን መስመሮች ተከትለው በረጅም እና በእኩል የእጅ እንቅስቃሴ ይቀቡት።
እንጨቱን ከፀሐይ ብርሃን እና ከውሃ ለመጠበቅ በመጨረሻ የሚያብለጨልጭ ቫርኒሽ ወይም መከላከያ (sealant) ይቀቡት።
om: Qalamni haaraan akka sirriitti qabatuuf, ashaboo (sandpaper) fayyadamuun qola muka sanaa lallaffisaa.
Eega ashaboon hoxxisanii booda, dhukkee fi zayita huccuu gogaan qulqulleessaa; xuriin qalumni akka qunca'u godha.
Muka sana ilbiisota (mixii) fi jiidha irraa eeguuf, jalqaba qoricha mixii ittisu yookiin 'primer' dibaa.
Bifa miidhagaa akka qabaatuuf, kallattii sarara muka sanaa hordofuun qalama dibaa.
Bishaan fi aduu irraa eeguuf, dhumarratti 'varnish' yookiin 'sealant' bishaan ittisuun irra dibaa.

en: What is the difference between oil-based and water-based paints for wood?
How many coats of paint are needed for outdoor wooden fences?
How can I tell if wood has been treated for termites before I buy it?
The Sun is the center of our solar system, a massive star whose gravity keeps all eight planets in their specific orbits.
The four inner planets (Mercury, Venus, Earth, and Mars) are rocky and small, while the four outer planets (Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune) are gas giants or ice giants.
Jupiter is the largest planet in our solar system, so big that all the other planets could fit inside it twice over.
Earth is the only planet known to support life, located at just the right distance from the Sun to have liquid water and a breathable atmosphere.
The further a planet is from the Sun, the longer it takes to complete one orbit; for example, Neptune takes about 165 Earth years to go around the Sun once.
am: ፀሐይ የፀሐይ ስርዓታችን እምብርት ስትሆን፣ ግዙፍ ስበትዋ ስምንቱንም ፕላኔቶች በራሳቸው ምህዋር ውስጥ እንዲቆዩ ያደርጋቸዋል።
አራቱ የውስጥ ፕላኔቶች (ሜርኩሪ፣ ቬነስ፣ መሬት እና ማርስ) ድንጋያማ እና ትናንሽ ሲሆኑ፣ አራቱ የውጭ ፕላኔቶች (ጁፒተር፣ ሳተርን፣ ዩራነስ እና ኔፕቱን) ግን ግዙፍ ጋዝ ወይም በረዶ ናቸው።
ጁፒተር በፀሐይ ስርዓታችን ውስጥ ትልቁ ፕላኔት ነው፤ በጣም ግዙፍ ከመሆኑ የተነሳ ሌሎች ፕላኔቶች በሙሉ በእሱ ውስጥ ሁለት ጊዜ ሊገቡ ይችላሉ።
መሬት ፈሳሽ ውሃ እና ለመተንፈስ የሚረዳ አየር እንዲኖራት ከፀሐይ ተገቢው ርቀት ላይ በመገኘቷ ህይወት የሚኖርባት ብቸኛ የታወቀች ፕላኔት ናት።
አንድ ፕላኔት ከፀሐይ በራቀ ቁጥር አንድ ዙር ለመጨረስ ረጅም ጊዜ ይፈጅበታል፤ ለምሳሌ ኔፕቱን ፀሐይን አንድ ጊዜ ለመዞር 165 የመሬት ዓመታትን ይፈጃል።
om: Aduun giddu-galeessa sirna aduu keenyaa ti; humna harkisaa isheetiin pilaaneetota sadeen madda isaanii keessa akka turan gooti.
Pilaaneetonni keessoo arfan (Meerkurii, Venas, Lafa, fi Maars) jabaataa fi xixinnoo dha; pilaaneetonni alaa arfan (Juuppitar, Saatiirn, Uuraanus, fi Neeptuun) ammoo gaasii fi cabbii gurguddoo dha.
Juuppitar pilaaneetota sirna aduu keenya keessa jiran hunda caalaa guddaa dha; bal'inni isaa pilaaneetota biroo hunda si'a lama of keessatti qabachuu danda'a.
Laffi bishaan dhangala'aa fi qilleensa hargansuu waan qabduuf, pilaaneetota jireenya namaa deeggaran keessaa ishee tokkoffaa dha.
Pilaaneetiin tokko aduu irraa yoo fagaate, naannoo aduu tokko naanna'uuf yeroo dheeraa itti fudhata; fakkeenyaaf Neeptuun aduu naanna'uuf waggaa 165 itti fudhata.

en: Why is Pluto no longer considered one of the main planets?
What lies in the asteroid belt between Mars and Jupiter?
How hot is the surface of Venus compared to Mercury?
Stars are giant, glowing balls of hot gas, mostly hydrogen and helium, held together by their own intense gravity.
They produce energy through a process called nuclear fusion, where hydrogen atoms smash together to form helium, releasing massive amounts of light and heat.
Our Sun is a medium-sized star; it looks so much bigger and brighter than others only because it is much closer to Earth.
The color of a star indicates its temperature: blue stars are the hottest, while red stars are relatively cooler.
Stars are born in giant clouds of dust and gas called nebulae and can live for billions of years before running out of fuel.
am: ከዋክብት በራሳቸው ስበት የተያዙ በዋናነት ሃይድሮጅን እና ሄሊየም ጋዞችን የያዙ ግዙፍ እና የሚንቀለቀሉ ሞቃታማ የጋዝ ኳሶች ናቸው።
ከዋክብት የሃይድሮጅን አቶሞች ተጋጭተው ሄሊየምን በሚፈጥሩበት 'ኒውክሌር ፊውዥን' በተባለ ሂደት ከፍተኛ ብርሃን እና ሙቀት ያመነጫሉ።
ፀሐያችን መካከለኛ መጠን ያላት ኮከብ ናት፤ ከሌሎች ከዋክብት ይልቅ ትልቅ እና ብሩህ ሆና የምትታየው ለመሬት በጣም ቅርብ ስለሆነች ብቻ ነው።
የኮከብ ቀለም ሙቀቱን ያመለክታል፡ ሰማያዊ ከዋክብት በጣም ሞቃታማ ሲሆኑ ቀይ ከዋክብት ደግሞ በአንጻራዊ ሁኔታ ቀዝቃዛ ናቸው።
ከዋክብት 'ነቡላ' በሚባሉ ግዙፍ የአቧራ እና የጋዝ ደመናዎች ውስጥ የሚፈጠሩ ሲሆን ነዳጃቸው እስኪያልቅ ድረስ ለቢሊዮኖች ዓመታት ሊቆዩ ይችላሉ።
om: Urjiileen gaasii ho'aa gurguddoo bifa kubbaatiin jiran yoo ta'an, baay'inaan haayidiroojiinii fi hee liyamii of keessaa qabu.
Urjiileen anniisaa kan maddisiisan adeemsa 'nuclear fusion' jedhamuun, yeroo atomoonni haayidiroojiinii walitti dhufanii hee liyamii uuman, ifaa fi ho'a guddaa baasu.
Aduun keenya urjii guddina giddu-galeessaa qabdu dha; urjiilee biroo caalaa guddaa fi ifaa kan mul'attu lafaatti dhihoo waan taateef qofa.
Bifa urjii irraa ho'a ishee beekuun ni danda'ama: urjiin cuquliisni baay'ee ho'aa dha, urjiin diimaan ammoo xiqqaate ho'a.
Urjiileen duumessa dhukkee fi gaasii 'nebulae' jedhamu keessatti uumamu; babbakuun isaanii hamma dhumutti waggaa biliyoonaan lakkaa'amuuf turuu danda'u.

en: What happens to a star when it runs out of hydrogen fuel?
How many stars are there in our Milky Way galaxy?
What is a supernova and how does it affect the space around it?
The Moon does not produce its own light; it shines because it reflects sunlight back toward Earth.
As the Moon orbits Earth every 29.5 days, we see different amounts of its sunlit side from our perspective on the ground.
In a 'New Moon' phase, the Moon is between the Earth and the Sun, so the side facing us is completely dark.
In a 'Full Moon' phase, the Earth is between the Moon and the Sun, allowing us to see the entire illuminated half.
The 'Crescent' and 'Gibbous' phases occur as the Moon moves through its orbit, showing us partial slices of the sunlit portion.
am: ጨረቃ የራሷን ብርሃን አታመነጭም፤ የምታበራው የፀሐይን ብርሃን ወደ መሬት መልሳ ስለምታንጸባርቅ ነው።
ጨረቃ በየ 29.5 ቀናት መሬትን ስትዞር፣ እኛ ከመሬት ሆነን የምናያት በፀሐይ የበራው የጨረቃ ክፍል መጠን ይለያያል።
በ 'አዲስ ጨረቃ' (New Moon) ወቅት ጨረቃ በመሬት እና በፀሐይ መካከል ትሆናለች፤ ስለዚህ ወደ እኛ የዞረው ክፍል ሙሉ በሙሉ ጨለማ ይሆናል።
በ 'ሙሉ ጨረቃ' (Full Moon) ወቅት መሬት በጨረቃ እና በፀሐይ መካከል ትሆናለች፤ ይህም ሙሉውን የበራውን ግማሽ ክፍል እንድናይ ያስችለናል።
ጨረቃ በምህዋሯ ውስጥ ስትንቀሳቀስ 'ጨረቃ ቅርጽ' (Crescent) እና ሌሎች ቅርጾችን የምናየው በፀሐይ የበራው ክፍል በከፊል ሲታየን ነው።
om: Ji'i ifa ofii ishee hin maddisiistu; ifni ishee ifa aduu gara lafaatti calaqqisiisuu irraa kan dhufe dha.
Ji'i guyyoota 29.5 keessatti lafa naanna'aa, nuyi bakka lafa irra jiru irraa gama aduun ife garaa garaa argina.
Waqtii 'Ji'a Haaraa' (New Moon) keessa, ji'i lafaa fi aduu gidduu jirti; kanaanis gamni gara keenya jiru dukkana ta'a.
Waqtii 'Ji'a Guutuu' (Full Moon) keessa, laffi ji'aa fi aduu gidduu jirti; kunis gama ife guutummaatti akka arginu nu taasisa.
Bifti ji'aa kan adda addaa (Crescent) kan mul'atu yeroo ji'i madda ishee keessa deemaa ifa aduu gara keenyatti mul'iftu dha.

en: What is a lunar eclipse and how often does it happen?
Does the Moon rotate on its axis as it orbits Earth?
How does the Moon's gravity affect the tides in Earth's oceans?
The space age began in 1957 when the Soviet Union launched Sputnik 1, the first artificial satellite to orbit the Earth.
In 1969, the Apollo 11 mission successfully landed the first humans, Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin, on the Moon.
Ethiopia entered the space age in 2019 by launching its first satellite, ETRSS-1, to monitor environmental and agricultural changes.
Satellites are essential for modern life, providing data for weather forecasting, GPS navigation, and international telecommunications.
The International Space Station (ISS) is a large laboratory orbiting Earth where astronauts from different countries live and conduct scientific research.
am: የጠፈር ዘመን የጀመረው በ1957 ሶቪየት ህብረት የመጀመሪያዋን ሰው ሰራሽ ሳተላይት 'ስፑትኒክ 1' ወደ ምህዋር ስታመጥቅ ነበር።
በ1969 የአፖሎ 11 ተልዕኮ ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ የሰው ልጆችን (ኒል አርምስትሮንግ እና ባዝ ኦልድሪን) ጨረቃ ላይ ማሳረፍ ቻለ።
ኢትዮጵያ በ2019 የመጀመሪያዋን ሳተላይት 'ETRSS-1' የአካባቢ እና የግብርና ለውጦችን ለመከታተል ወደ ጠፈር በማምጠቅ የጠፈር ዘመኑን ተቀላቅላለች።
ሳተላይቶች ለዘመናዊ ህይወት ወሳኝ ናቸው፤ ለአየር ሁኔታ ትንበያ፣ ለጂፒኤስ (GPS) አቅጣጫ ጠቋሚ እና ለዓለም አቀፍ ተግባቦት መረጃ ይሰጣሉ።
ዓለም አቀፍ የጠፈር ጣቢያ (ISS) ከተለያዩ ሀገራት የመጡ ጠፈርተኞች የሚኖሩበት እና ሳይንሳዊ ምርምር የሚያካሂዱበት መሬትን የሚዞር ግዙፍ ላቦራቶሪ ነው።
om: Bara 1957tti sooviyeet yuuniyeen saatalaayitii nam-tolchee jalqabaa 'Sputnik 1' jedhamtu gara madda lafaatti erguun bara hawaasummaa eegalame.
Bara 1969tti misiyooniin 'Apollo 11' namoota jalqabaa (Neil Armstrong fi Buzz Aldrin) ji'a irra qubsiisuu danda'eera.
Itoophiyaan bara 2019tti saatalaayitii ishee jalqabaa 'ETRSS-1' jedhamtu jijjiirama naannoo fi qonnaa hordofuuf erguun bara hawaasaa seente.
Saatalaayitoonni jireenya ammayaatiif baay'ee barbaachisoo dha; raajii qilleensaa, 'GPS' fi qunnamtiif ragaa nuuf kennu.
Buufanni Hawaasaa Idil-addunyaa (ISS) laaboratoorii guddaa lafa naanna'u yoo ta'u, astiroonootonni biyya adda addaa keessatti qorannoo saayinsii gaggeessu.

en: How do rockets overcome Earth's gravity to reach space?
What kind of crops can astronauts grow in space stations?
Why are private companies like SpaceX becoming important in space travel?
Seasons are caused by Earth's axis being tilted at an angle of 23.5 degrees as it orbits the Sun.
When a hemisphere is tilted toward the Sun, it experiences summer with more direct sunlight and longer days.
When a hemisphere is tilted away from the Sun, it experiences winter with less direct sunlight and shorter days.
Because Ethiopia is near the Equator, the length of day and night stays fairly equal, and seasons are defined more by rainfall (Kiremt and Bega) than temperature.
The equinox occurs twice a year when the Sun is directly above the Equator, making day and night exactly equal in length everywhere on Earth.
am: ወቅቶች የሚከሰቱት መሬት ፀሐይን ስትዞር ዘንግዋ በ23.5 ዲግሪ ዘንበል ብሎ በመገኘቱ ነው።
አንድ የጎላር ክፍል (hemisphere) ወደ ፀሐይ ሲያዘነብል፣ ቀጥተኛ የፀሐይ ብርሃን እና ረጅም ቀናት ያሉት የበጋ ወቅት ይሆናል።
አንድ የጎላር ክፍል ከፀሐይ ራቅ ብሎ ሲያዘነብል፣ አነስተኛ የፀሐይ ብርሃን እና አጭር ቀናት ያሉት የክረምት ወቅት ይሆናል።
ኢትዮጵያ ለኢኳተር ቅርብ በመሆኗ የቀንና የሌሊት ርዝመት ብዙም አይለያይም፤ ወቅቶችም ከሙቀት ይልቅ በዝናብ (ክረምት እና በጋ) ይታወቃሉ።
ኢኩኖክስ (Equinox) በዓመት ሁለት ጊዜ ፀሐይ በትክክል ከኢኳተር በላይ ስትሆን ይከሰታል፤ ይህም በመላው ዓለም የቀንና የሌሊት ርዝመት እኩል እንዲሆን ያደርጋል።
om: Waqtiwwan kan uumaman laffi koflee digrii 23.5n dabdee aduu waan naanna'uufi.
Yeroo gami lafaa tokko gara aduutti gaggabu, aduu kallattiin argata; kunis waqtii ho'aa (summer) guyyaa dheeraa qabu uuma.
Yeroo gami lafaa tokko aduu irraa garagalutti, aduu kallattiin hin argatu; kunis waqtii qabbanaa (winter) guyyaa gabaabaa qabu uuma.
Itoophiyaan sarara 'Equator' tti dhihoo waan taateef, dheerinni guyyaa fi halkanii wal-qixa; waqtiwwanis ho'aan utuu hin taane bishaan roobaan (Ganna fi Bona) beekamu.
Waqtiin 'Equinox' waggaatti si'a lama uumama; yeroo aduun sarara 'Equator' gubbaa jirtu guyyaa fi halkanni addunyaa irratti wal-qixa ta'u.

en: Why are seasons opposite in the Northern and Southern Hemispheres?
How does the Earth's orbit shape affect the intensity of seasons?
What is the significance of the June solstice in Ethiopian agriculture?
Monitor crop health daily before acting; this 'scouting' ensures you only spend money and labor when pest numbers reach a damaging threshold.
Prioritize cultural controls like crop rotation and intercropping; this breaks the life cycle of pests that specialize in a single crop type.
Encourage natural predators like ladybugs or spiders in your field; these 'beneficials' provide free labor by consuming harmful aphids and larvae.
Use mechanical methods such as hand-picking or pheromone traps; these target specific pests without killing the helpful insects in your ecosystem.
Maintain clean field borders and remove weed hosts; many pests survive the off-season on nearby weeds before jumping to your new crops.
Apply chemical pesticides only as a final resort; this prevents pests from developing resistance and protects the long-term health of your soil and bees.
am: እርምጃ ከመውሰድዎ በፊት በየቀኑ የሰብሉን ጤንነት ይከታተሉ፤ ይህ ተባዮች ጉዳት ወደሚያደርሱበት ደረጃ ሲደርሱ ብቻ ወጪ እና ጉልበት እንዲያወጡ ይረዳዎታል።
እንደ ሰብል ፈራቃ እና ሰብልን ደባልቆ መዝራት ያሉ ባህላዊ መቆጣጠሪያዎችን ቅድሚያ ይስጡ፤ ይህም በአንድ የሰብል አይነት ላይ ብቻ የሚኖሩ ተባዮችን የእድገት ዑደት ይሰብራል።
በእርሻዎ ውስጥ እንደ በረሮ በል ወይም ሸረሪት ያሉ ተፈጥሯዊ ተባይ በል እንስሳትን ያበረታቱ፤ እነዚህ ጠቃሚ ነፍሳት ጎጂ ተባዮችን በመመገብ ነፃ እርዳታ ይሰጣሉ።
እንደ በእጅ መልቀም ወይም በጭቃ ማጥመጃ ያሉ ሜካኒካዊ ዘዴዎችን ይጠቀሙ፤ እነዚህ ጠቃሚ ነፍሳትን ሳይገድሉ የተወሰኑ ተባዮችን ብቻ ይለያሉ።
የእርሻ ድንበሮችን በንጽህና ይያዙ እና ተባይ የሚያርፍባቸውን አረሞች ያስወግዱ፤ ብዙ ተባዮች ወደ ሰብልዎ ከመሸጋገራቸው በፊት በአቅራቢያ ባሉ አረሞች ላይ ይቆያሉ።
የኬሚካል ፀረ-ተባዮችን እንደ የመጨረሻ አማራጭ ብቻ ይጠቀሙ፤ ይህም ተባዮች መድሃኒት የመላመድ አቅማቸውን እንዲቀንሱ እና የአፈርዎንና የንቦችን ጤንነት ለመጠበቅ ይረዳል።
om: Tarkaanfii fudhachuun dura guyyaa guyyaatti fayyaa midhaanii hordofaa; kunis baasii fi humna keessan yeroo ilbiisni miidhaa geessisu qofatti akka baastan isin gargaara.
Mala aadaa kan akka midhaan wal-jijjiiruufi walitti makuu dursa kennaa; kunis ilbiisota gosa midhaan tokko qofa irratti hunda'an ittisa.
Bineensota uumamaa ilbiisa nyaatan kan akka xadhannoo yookiin sariitii maasii keessatti jajjabeessaa; isaan kun ilbiisota miidhaa geessisan nyaachuun tajaajila bilisaa kennu.
Mala mekanikaalaa kan akka harkaan guuruu yookiin kiyyootti fayyadamaa; kun ilbiisota hojii gaarii hojjatan utuu hin ajjeesin warra miidhaa geessisan qofa balleessa.
Maasii keessan qulqulleessaa fi harama ilbiisni itti dhokatu balleessaa; ilbiisota hedduun harama naannoo jiru irratti turanii gara midhaan keessaniitti darbu.
Qoricha keemikaalaa akka filannoo dhumaatti qofa fayyadamaa; kun ilbiisni qoricha akka hin baranneefi fayyaa biyyee fi kaniisaa eeguuf gargaara.

en: How do I distinguish between beneficial insects and harmful pests?
What are the economic thresholds for common Ethiopian pests like Fall Armyworm?
Can organic sprays like neem oil be part of an IPM strategy?
Select a high-quality 'scion' from a productive tree and join it to a hardy 'rootstock'; this combines superior fruit quality with strong soil disease resistance.
Ensure the 'cambium' layers of both parts touch perfectly; this is the tissue where the tree's vascular system connects, allowing nutrients to flow between them.
Grafting allows for a faster harvest because the scion is already mature; it skips the long 'juvenile' phase that trees grown from seeds must endure.
Use local varieties as rootstocks for mango and citrus; they are already adapted to Ethiopia's soil conditions and can withstand local droughts better.
Wrap the graft union tightly with plastic tape; this prevents the cut from drying out and protects the wound from infection until the two pieces fuse.
Grafting ensures true-to-type fruit production; unlike seeds which create genetic variations, a graft is a clone that guarantees the same taste and size as the mother tree.
am: ምርታማ ከሆነ ዛፍ ላይ ጥሩ ቀንበጥ (scion) በመውሰድ ጠንካራ ከሆነው ስር (rootstock) ጋር ያገናኙ፤ ይህም ጥራት ያለው ፍሬን እና የበሽታ መቋቋም አቅምን በአንድ ላይ ይሰጣል።
የሁለቱም ክፍሎች 'ካምቢየም' (cambium) በሚገባ መነካካታቸውን ያረጋግጡ፤ ይህ ቲሹ የዛፉ የደም ዝውውር የሚገናኝበት ሲሆን ንጥረ ነገሮች እንዲዘዋወሩ ያስችላል።
የተቀጠለ ዛፍ በፍጥነት ምርት ይሰጣል፤ ምክንያቱም ቀንበጡ ቀድሞውኑ የበሰለ ስለሆነ ከዘር የሚበቅሉ ዛፎች የሚያልፉትን ረጅም የእድገት ጊዜ ያሳጥራል።
ለማንጎ እና ለሎሚ/ብርቱካን የሀገር በቀል ዝርያዎችን እንደ ስር (rootstock) ይጠቀሙ፤ ምክንያቱም ከኢትዮጵያ አፈር ጋር የተላመዱ እና ድርቅን የሚቋቋሙ ናቸው።
የተቀጠለበትን ቦታ በላስቲክ አጥብቀው ይጠቅልሉት፤ ይህ ቁስሉ እንዳይደርቅ እና ሁለቱ ክፍሎች እስኪቀላቀሉ ድረስ ከኢንፌክሽን ይጠብቀዋል።
መቀጠል ወጥ የሆነ የፍሬ አይነት እንዲኖር ያደርጋል፤ ከዘር እንደሚበቅሉ እና ባህሪያቸው እንደሚቀያየሩ ዛፎች ሳይሆን፣ የተቀጠለው ዛፍ እንደ እናቱ ዛፍ ተመሳሳይ ጣዕም እና መጠን ያለው ፍሬ ይሰጣል።
om: Muka callaa gaarii kennu irraa 'scion' fudhuun 'rootstock' jabaa wajjin walitti qabsiisaa; kunis qulqullina ijaa fi dandeettii dhibee dandamachuu walitti fida.
Kutaan 'cambium' lamaanuu walitti akka bu'u mirkaneeffadhaa; kun bakka sooranni mukeen gidduutti itti dhangala'uudha.
Muka walitti qabsiisame (grafting) callaa hatattamaan kenna; sababni isaas kutaaleen sun bilchaatoo waan ta'aniif yeroo dheeraa guddinaa ni hir'isa.
Maangoo fi liimoniif sanyii biyya keessaa akka 'rootstock' tti fayyadamaa; isaan biyyee Itoophiyaa beeku, hongees ni danda'u.
Bakka walitti qabsiiftan sanatti pilaastika maraa; kunis akka hin gogneefi hamma walitti makamanitti dhibee irraa eega.
Malli kun gosa ijaa wal-fakkaataa akka argattan godha; sanyii facaafamu irraa adda ta'ee, malli kun mi'aa fi guddinni isaa akka muka haadhaa ta'uu isaa mirkaneessa.

en: What is the best month in Ethiopia for grafting mango trees?
How do I care for a newly grafted tree during the first three months?
What are the signs of a failed graft union?
Grow plants in nutrient-rich water solutions instead of soil; this allows the roots to absorb minerals directly, leading to 30-50% faster growth rates.
Recirculate the water in a closed system; this method uses up to 90% less water than traditional farming, making it ideal for drought-prone areas in Ethiopia.
Eliminate soil-borne diseases and pests; because there is no dirt, you don't need to deal with common soil fungi or root-eating grubs.
Utilize vertical space by stacking growing trays; this 'vertical farming' produces massive yields in small urban areas or backyard plots.
Monitor the pH levels of your water daily; maintaining the correct acidity ensures the plant can actually take up the nutrients you provide.
Ensure the roots have access to oxygen through air pumps or bubbling; without air, roots in water will suffocate and develop root rot.
am: ተክሎችን ከአፈር ይልቅ ንጥረ ነገር ባለው ውሃ ውስጥ ያሳድጉ፤ ይህ ስሮች ማዕድናትን በቀጥታ እንዲወስዱ ስለሚያደርግ እድገታቸው ከ30-50% ይጨምራል።
ውሃውን መልሰው በሚያሽከረክር (closed system) ዘዴ ይጠቀሙ፤ ይህ ዘዴ ከባህላዊ እርሻ በ 90% ያነሰ ውሃ ስለሚጠቀም ለኢትዮጵያ ድርቅ ለሚበዛባቸው አካባቢዎች ተመራጭ ነው።
በአፈር አማካኝነት የሚመጡ በሽታዎችን እና ተባዮችን ያስወግዳል፤ አፈር ስለሌለ የአፈር ፈንገሶችን ወይም ስር የሚበሉ ተባዮችን መቋቋም አያስፈልግዎትም።
የማሳደጊያ ገበታዎችን (trays) በመደርደር ቀጥ ያለ ቦታን ይጠቀሙ፤ ይህ 'ቀጥ ያለ እርሻ' በከተማ ወይም በጓሮ አነስተኛ ቦታዎች ላይ ከፍተኛ ምርት ይሰጣል።
የውሃውን የፒኤች (pH) መጠን በየቀኑ ይከታተሉ፤ ትክክለኛውን የአሲድነት መጠን መጠበቅ ተክሉ የሰጡትን ንጥረ ነገር በሚገባ እንዲመገብ ያደርገዋል።
በአየር ፓምፖች አማካኝነት ስሮች ኦክስጅን ማግኘታቸውን ያረጋግጡ፤ ያለ አየር ውሃ ውስጥ ያሉ ስሮች መተንፈስ ስለማይችሉ ይበሰብሳሉ።
om: Biqiltuu biyyee malee bishaan soorata qabu keessatti guddisaa; kunis hundeen kallattiin soorata akka xuuxu gochuun guddina isaa %30-50 dabala.
Bishaan sana naanna'ee akka hojjetu (closed system) godhaa; malli kun bishaan %90 qusata, kunis naannoolee hongee Itoophiyaatiif gaariidha.
Dhibeewwan biyyee keessaa dhufan dhabamsiisa; biyyen waan hin jirreef, fangasii hundee nyaatu yookiin ilbiisota biyyee keessaa hin sodaattan.
Bakka dhiphaa keessatti oomisha guddaa argachuuf ol-kaasanii wal-irra ijaaruun (vertical farming) fayyadamaa.
Sadarkaa pH bishaanichaa guyyaa guyyaatti to'adhaa; hamma asiidii madaalawaa eeguun biqiltuun soorata keennitan akka xuuxu gargaara.
Paampii qilleensaan hundeen oksiijiinii akka argatu godhaa; bishaan keessatti qilleensa yoo dhaban hundeen biqiltuu ni rimaaya.

en: What are the best low-cost materials for a homemade hydroponic setup?
Can I grow crops like potatoes or carrots in a hydroponic system?
How do I prepare a balanced nutrient solution using locally available materials?
Nitrogen is the main engine of plant growth, responsible for leaf development and the deep green color needed for photosynthesis.
Legumes like beans and lentils host 'Rhizobium' bacteria in their roots; these bacteria pull nitrogen from the air and fix it into the soil for free.
Microorganisms break down organic matter into ammonia and nitrates; these are the only forms of nitrogen that plant roots can actually absorb.
Avoid over-watering after applying urea fertilizer; this prevents 'leaching,' where nitrogen is washed deep into the ground beyond the reach of roots.
Maintain high soil organic matter through composting; this acts as a reservoir, releasing nitrogen slowly over the whole growing season.
เข้าใจ denitrification (Nitrogen loss to the air); when soil is waterlogged for too long, bacteria convert soil nitrogen into gas, and it disappears into the sky.
am: ናይትሮጅን ለተክሎች እድገት ዋና ሞተር ነው፤ ለቅጠል እድገት እና ለምግብ ዝግጅት (photosynthesis) የሚያስፈልገውን ጥቁር አረንጓዴ ቀለም ይሰጣል።
እንደ ቦሎቄ እና ምስር ያሉ ጥራጥሬዎች በሥሮቻቸው ውስጥ 'ራይዞቢየም' የተባሉ ባክቴሪያዎችን ያስተናግዳሉ፤ እነዚህ ባክቴሪያዎች ናይትሮጅንን ከአየር ላይ በመሳብ ወደ አፈር ውስጥ በነፃ ያስገባሉ።
ጥቃቅን ተህዋሲያን ኦርጋኒክ ቁሶችን ወደ አሞኒያ እና ናይትሬት ይሰብራሉ፤ እነዚህ ተክሎች ሊመገቡ የሚችሏቸው ብቸኛ የናይትሮጅን አይነቶች ናቸው።
ዩሪያ ማዳበሪያ ከተጠቀሙ በኋላ ከመጠን በላይ ውሃ አያጠጡ፤ ይህ ናይትሮጅኑ ታጥቦ ስሮች ወደማይደርሱበት ጥልቀት እንዳይወርድ (leaching) ይከላከላል።
በኮምፖስት አማካኝነት የአፈርን ለምነት ይጠብቁ፤ ይህ እንደ ማጠራቀሚያ በመሆን ናይትሮጅንን በጠቅላላው የምርት ዘመን በዝግታ እንዲለቀቅ ያደርጋል።
ናይትሮጅን ወደ አየር መጥፋቱን (denitrification) ይረዱ፤ አፈር ውስጥ ውሃ ለረጅም ጊዜ ከቆመ ባክቴሪያዎች ናይትሮጅኑን ወደ ጋዝ በመቀየር ወደ አየር እንዲበን ያደርጉታል።
om: Naayitiroojiiniin guddina biqiltuutiif madda humnaati; guddina baalaafi bifa magariisa footoosintizisiif barbaachisu kenna.
Midhaan akka daangulee (baaqelaa, misira) hundee isaanii keessatti baakteriyaa 'Rhizobium' qabu; isaan kun qilleensa keessaa naayitiroojiinii xuuxanii biyyee gabbisu.
Jarmiin xixinnoon wantoota dhumatan gara 'ammonia' fi 'nitrate' tti jijjiiru; biqiltuun naayitiroojiinii bifa kanaan qofa fudhachuu danda'a.
Xaa'oo urea erga fayyadamanii booda bishaan baay'isanii hin obaasin; kunis naayitiroojiiniin dhiqamee hundee gadi akka hin dhumne ittisa.
Kompoostiin gabbina biyyee eegaa; kunis naayitiroojiiniin suuta jedhee yeroo dheeraaf akka biqiltuuf darbu godha.
Naayitiroojiiniin qilleensatti baduu isaa (denitrification) hubadhaa; yoo bishaan maasii keessatti yeroo dheeraaf ciise, naayitiroojiiniin gara gaasiitti jijjiiramee bada.

en: How can I tell if my maize is suffering from nitrogen deficiency?
What is the best way to manage crop residues to keep nitrogen in the soil?
How long does it take for legume-fixed nitrogen to benefit the next crop?
Use drip irrigation for high precision; it delivers water directly to the base of the plant, reducing water waste by up to 50% compared to other methods.
Minimize evaporation by using drip lines under mulch; because the water is underground or shielded, it doesn't disappear into the hot Ethiopian air.
Control weeds by using drip; because you only water the area near the crop, the paths between rows stay dry and weed seeds cannot germinate.
Choose sprinklers for large-scale cereal crops like wheat; they cover vast areas quickly, though they lose more water to wind and evaporation.
Prevent leaf diseases with drip irrigation; keeping the foliage dry reduces the chance of fungal growth that occurs when sprinklers soak the whole plant.
Maintain system pressure regularly; modern irrigation relies on even pressure to ensure the plant at the end of the field gets as much water as the first one.
am: ከፍተኛ ጥንቃቄ ለሚፈልጉ ተክሎች የጠብታ መስኖን (drip) ይጠቀሙ፤ ውሃን በቀጥታ ከተክሉ ስር ስለሚያደርስ ከሌሎች ዘዴዎች ጋር ሲነፃፀር እስከ 50% ውሃ ይቆጥባል።
የጠብታ መስኖን ከአፈር ሽፋን (mulch) በታች በመጠቀም ትነትን ይቀንሱ፤ ውሃው ተሸፍኖ ስለሚቀመጥ በሞቃት አየር ምክንያት አይንምም።
የጠብታ መስኖን በመጠቀም አረምን ይቆጣጠሩ፤ ውሃ የሚሰጠው ለተክሉ አቅራቢያ ብቻ ስለሆነ በመስመሮች መካከል ያለው ቦታ ደረቅ ሆኖ ይቀራል፣ አረምም አይበቅልም።
እንደ ስንዴ ላሉ ሰፊ ቦታ ለሚሸፍኑ ሰብሎች ርጭት መስኖን (sprinkler) ይምረጡ፤ ምንም እንኳን በንፋስ እና በትነት ውሃ ቢባክንም ሰፊ ቦታን በፍጥነት ያጠጣል።
የጠብታ መስኖን በመጠቀም የቅጠል በሽታዎችን ይከላከሉ፤ ቅጠሉ ደረቅ ሆኖ መቆየቱ ርጭት መስኖ ሙሉ ተክሉን ሲያርስ የሚፈጠረውን የፈንገስ እድገት ይቀንሳል።
የመስኖ ሲስተም ግፊትን (pressure) ሁልጊዜ ያረጋግጡ፤ ዘመናዊ መስኖ በመስኩ መጨረሻ ያለው ተክል እንደ መጀመሪያው እኩል ውሃ እንዲያገኝ በወጥ ግፊት ላይ የተመሰረተ ነው።
om: Mala jallisiitiif 'drip' fayyadamaa; bishaan kallattiin hundee biqiltuutti waan kennuuf bishaan %50 qusata.
Bishaan hurkaan akka hin dhumneef haguuggaa (mulch) jalaan 'drip' fayyadamaa; kanaan bishaan ho'a qilleensaa Itoophiyaan hin badu.
Aramaa to'achuuf 'drip' fayyadamaa; bakka midhaan jiru qofa waan obaasuuf gidduun sararaa gogaa tura, haramni hin biqilu.
Midhaan bal'ina qaban kan akka qamadiitiif 'sprinkler' filadhaa; yeroo gabaabaatti lafa bal'aa obaasu, garuu bubbee fi ho'aan bishaan ni bada.
Dhibee baalaa ittisuuf 'drip' fayyadamaa; baalli biqiltuu gogaa yoo ta'e fangasiin itti hin baay'atu.
Dhiibbaa bishaania (pressure) yeroo hunda to'adhaa; jallisii ammayyaa keessatti biqiltuun dhuma maasii jiru akka isa jalqabaatti bishaan gahaa akka argatuuf dhiibbaan wal-qixa ta'uu qaba.

en: Which irrigation method is more cost-effective for a 1-hectare vegetable farm?
How do I clean clogged drip emitters caused by hard water or sediment?
What is the best time of day to run a sprinkler system to minimize water loss?
Antibiotic resistance occurs when bacteria evolve to survive the drugs designed to kill them; this happens through natural selection where resistant strains multiply while weaker ones die.
Misuse of antibiotics, such as taking them for viral infections like the common cold or stopping a prescribed course early, accelerates the development of resistant bacteria.
When you stop treatment too soon, the strongest bacteria that survived the initial doses continue to grow and can share their resistant DNA with other bacteria nearby.
am: የአንቲባዮቲክ መቋቋም የሚከሰተው ባክቴሪያዎች እነሱን ለመግደል የተሰሩ መድሃኒቶችን ተላምደው እንዲተርፉ ሲለወጡ ነው፤ ደካማዎቹ ሲሞቱ ጠንካራዎቹ በመራባት ይህንን ባህሪ ያስፋፋሉ።
እንደ ጉንፋን ላሉ በቫይረስ ለሚመጡ በሽታዎች አንቲባዮቲክ መውሰድ ወይም የታዘዘልዎትን የመድሃኒት ቆይታ ሳይጨርሱ ማቆም ባክቴሪያዎች መድሃኒት የመላመድ አቅማቸውን እንዲያሳድጉ ያደርጋል።
የመድሃኒት ህክምናን በጣም ቀድመው ሲያቆሙ፣ ከመጀመሪያዎቹ መጠኖች የተረፉት ጠንካራ ባክቴሪያዎች ማደጋቸውን ይቀጥላሉ እንዲሁም የመቋቋም ችሎታቸውን ለሌሎች ባክቴሪያዎች ያስተላልፋሉ።
om: Inni qoricha madaaluu dhabuu (resistance) kan uumamu baakteriyaaleen qoricha isaan ajjeesuuf qophaa'e dandamatanii yeroo guddataniidha; kunis warri dadhaboon du'anii warri jajjaboon yoo baay'ataniidha.
Qoricha akka madaalummaatti (antibiotics) dhibee vaayiraasiin dhufuuf (akka qufaatti) fudhachuu yookiin qoricha ajajame utuu hin fixin dhaabuun baakteriyaan akka qoricha baratu godha.
Yoo yaala qorichaa hatattamaan dhaabdan, baakteriyaaleen jajjaboo qoricha jalqabaa irraa hafan guddachuu itti fufu; dandeettii dhibee dandamachuus baakteriyaa biraatti dabarsu.

en: Why are doctors worried about 'Superbugs' in modern hospitals?
Can I get sick from resistant bacteria if I have never used antibiotics myself?
How do researchers develop new types of antibiotics to fight resistance?
Tuberculosis is caused by a slow-growing bacterium called Mycobacterium tuberculosis that primarily attacks the lungs but can affect any part of the body.
The disease is spread through the air when an infected person coughs or sneezes; in its 'latent' form, the bacteria hide in the body without making the person sick or contagious.
Treatment requires a strict 6-to-9-month course of specialized antibiotics to ensure all dormant bacteria are killed, preventing the disease from returning in a resistant form.
am: ቲቢ (Tuberculosis) የሚከሰተው ማይኮባክቴሪያም ቲዩበርክሎሲስ በተባለ በዝግታ በሚያድግ ባክቴሪያ ሲሆን በብዛት ሳንባን ያጠቃል፤ ነገር ግን ማንኛውንም የሰውነት ክፍል ሊነካ ይችላል።
በሽታው የተያዘ ሰው ሲያስል ወይም ሲያስነጥስ በአየር ይተላለፋል፤ በ 'ድብቅ' (latent) ደረጃ ላይ ባክቴሪያው ሰውየውን ሳይታመም ወይም ለሌሎች ሳይተላለፍ በሰውነት ውስጥ ተደብቆ ይቆያል።
ሁሉንም ባክቴሪያዎች ለመግደል እና በሽታው ተላምዶ እንዳይመለስ ለ 6 እስከ 9 ወራት የሚቆይ ጥብቅ የህክምና ክትትል እና ልዩ አንቲባዮቲኮችን መውሰድ ያስፈልጋል።
om: Dhukkubni TB baakteriyaa suuta guddatu 'Mycobacterium tuberculosis' jedhamuun dhufa; baay'ee somba kan miidhu yoo ta'u qaama biraas ni miidha.
Dhukkubni kun yeroo namni dhukkubicha qabu qufa'u yookiin hatsifatu qilleensa keessaan darba; bifa 'latent' tiin baakteriyaan sun utuu nama hin dhukkubsin qaama keessa dhokata.
Baakteriyaa hunda balleessuufi akka inni hin deebineef, yaala qorichaa ji'a 6 hanga 9 tursiisu sirnaan hordofuun dirqama.

en: What is the difference between a dry cough and a TB cough?
How is the DOTS program helping TB patients in Ethiopia?
Can someone with latent TB spread the disease to their family?
Hypertension is a chronic condition where the force of the blood against your artery walls is too high, leading to heart disease or stroke over time.
A diet high in sodium (salt) causes the body to retain water, increasing the volume of blood and thus putting extra pressure on the blood vessels.
Eating foods rich in potassium, such as bananas and leafy greens, helps balance sodium levels and relaxes the blood vessel walls to lower pressure.
am: ደም ግፊት ማለት ደም በደም ቅዳ ቧንቧዎች ግድግዳ ላይ የሚያሳድረው ግፊት በጣም ከፍተኛ የሚሆንበት ሁኔታ ሲሆን በጊዜ ሂደት ለልብ ህመም ወይም ለስትሮክ ይዳርጋል።
ከመጠን በላይ ጨው (ሶዲየም) መመገብ ሰውነት ውሃ እንዲይዝ ያደርጋል፤ ይህም የደም መጠንን በመጨመር በደም ቧንቧዎች ላይ ተጨማሪ ግፊት ይፈጥራል።
እንደ ሙዝ እና አረንጓዴ ቅጠላቅጠል ያሉ በፖታሺየም የበለፀጉ ምግቦችን መመገብ የሶዲየምን መጠን ለማመጣጠን እና የደም ቧንቧዎችን በማዝናናት ግፊትን ለመቀነስ ይረዳል።
om: Dhiibbaan dhiigaa dhangala'aan dhiigaa ujummoo dhiigaa irratti dhiibbaa cimaa yeroo uumudha; kunis yeroo dheeraa booda onnee fi sammuu miidha.
Nyaata soogidda (sodium) baay'ee qabu soorachuun qaamni bishaan akka kuusu godha; kunis dhiibbaa ujummoo dhiigaa irratti uumamu dabala.
Nyaata 'potassium' qaban kan akka muuzii fi raafuu soorachuun dhiibbaa kana hir'isuufi ujummoon dhiigaa akka boqotu gargaara.

en: What is considered a 'normal' blood pressure reading for an adult?
Does high blood pressure always show symptoms or is it a 'silent killer'?
How does physical activity help in managing hypertension?
Glucose is the primary sugar the body uses for energy, but it requires the hormone insulin to enter the cells from the bloodstream.
In diabetes, the pancreas either fails to produce enough insulin or the body's cells become resistant to it, causing glucose to build up to dangerous levels in the blood.
Consistently high blood sugar acts like a slow poison, damaging small blood vessels in the eyes, kidneys, and nerves over many years.
am: ግሉኮስ ሰውነታችን ለጉልበት የሚጠቀምበት ዋናው ስኳር ነው፤ ነገር ግን ከደም ውስጥ ወደ ሴሎች ለመግባት ኢንሱሊን የተባለ ሆርሞን ያስፈልገዋል።
በስኳር ህመም ጊዜ ጣፊያ በቂ ኢንሱሊን ማምረት ያቅተዋል ወይም የሰውነት ሴሎች ኢንሱሊንን መቋቋም ይጀምራሉ፤ ይህም ግሉኮስ በደም ውስጥ በአደገኛ ሁኔታ እንዲከማች ያደርጋል።
በደም ውስጥ ያለው የስኳር መጠን ሁልጊዜ ከፍተኛ መሆን እንደ ዝግተኛ መርዝ ይቆጠራል፤ ይህም ለብዙ ዓመታት የአይንን፣ የኩላሊትን እና የነርቭ ደም ቧንቧዎችን ይጎዳል።
om: Glukoosiin sukkaara humnaaf tajaajiluudha; garuu dhiiga keessaa gara seeliitti akka seenuuf hoormooniin 'insulin' barbaachisaadha.
Dhukkuba sukkaaraa keessatti, 'pancreas' inni jedhamu inshuliinii gahaa hin oomishu yookiin seeliin qaamaa inshuliinii fudhachuu dida; kunis dhiiga keessatti sukkaara baay'isa.
Dhiiga keessatti sukkaarri yeroo dheeraaf baay'achuun akka summiitti tajaajila; kunis ija, kalee fi narvii miidha.

en: What is the difference between Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes?
Can a healthy diet and weight loss reverse Type 2 diabetes?
Why is foot care so important for people living with diabetes?
The lymphatic system is a network of tissues and organs that help rid the body of toxins and waste while moving immune cells through the body.
Lymph nodes act as 'security checkpoints' where white blood cells attack and destroy bacteria and viruses filtered from the lymphatic fluid.
This system maintains fluid balance in the body by collecting excess fluid from tissues and returning it to the bloodstream after purification.
am: ሊምፋቲክ ሲስተም (Lymphatic system) መርዛማ ነገሮችን እና ቆሻሻዎችን ከሰውነት ለማስወገድ የሚረዳ ሲሆን የመከላከያ ሴሎችን በሰውነት ውስጥ የሚያዘዋውር የቲሹዎች ስብስብ ነው።
ሊምፍ ኖዶች (Lymph nodes) እንደ 'የፍተሻ ጣቢያዎች' የሚያገለግሉ ሲሆን፣ ነጭ የደም ሴሎች ከፈሳሹ ውስጥ የተጣሩ ባክቴሪያዎችን እና ቫይረሶችን የሚያጠፉባቸው ቦታዎች ናቸው።
ይህ ሲስተም ከቲሹዎች ውስጥ ትርፍ ፈሳሾችን በመሰብሰብ እና ካጠራ በኋላ ወደ ደም ውስጥ በመመለስ በሰውነት ውስጥ ያለውን የፈሳሽ ሚዛን ይጠብቃል።
om: Sirni limfaatiikii (lymphatic system) xurii fi summii qaama keessaa baasuufi seelota ittisaa qaama keessa naanneessuuf gargaara.
Iggi limfii (lymph nodes) akka buufata to'annootti tajaajilu; bakka kanatti seeliin dhiiga adii jarmii dhiiga keessaa calalame ajjeesa.
Sirni kun dhangala'aa qaama keessa jiru wal-madaalchisa; dhangala'aa tishuu keessaa walitti qabuun erga qulqulleesse booda gara dhiigaatti deebisa.

en: Why do lymph nodes in the neck swell when we have a sore throat?
What is the role of the spleen in the lymphatic system?
How does physical exercise help the lymphatic fluid move through the body?
Deductive reasoning starts with a general rule or law and leads to a specific, certain conclusion; for example, if all legumes fix nitrogen and beans are legumes, then beans certainly fix nitrogen.

Inductive reasoning looks at specific observations to reach a broad generalization; for instance, if you see three healthy crops after using compost, you induce that compost likely improves all crops.
The key difference is certainty: deductive reasoning provides a guaranteed conclusion if the premises are true, while inductive reasoning provides a probable conclusion based on patterns.
am: ዲዳክቲቭ (Deductive) ምክንያታዊነት ከአጠቃላይ እውነት ተነስቶ ወደ ተወሰነ ድምዳሜ ያደርሳል፤ ለምሳሌ ሁሉም ጥራጥሬዎች ናይትሮጅን የሚሰጡ ከሆነ እና ቦሎቄ ጥራጥሬ ከሆነ፣ ቦሎቄ በእርግጠኝነት ናይትሮጅን ይሰጣል።
ኢንዳክቲቭ (Inductive) ምክንያታዊነት የተወሰኑ ምልከታዎችን በማየት ወደ አጠቃላይ መደምደሚያ ይደርሳል፤ ለምሳሌ ኮምፖስት የተጠቀሙባቸው ሶስት እርሻዎች ጥሩ ምርት ከሰጡ፣ ኮምፖስት ለሁሉም እርሻዎች ጥሩ ሊሆን ይችላል የሚል መደምደሚያ ላይ መድረስ።
ዋናው ልዩነቱ እርግጠኝነት ነው፤ ዲዳክቲቭ መነሻ ሃሳቦቹ እውነት ከሆኑ የተረጋገጠ ውጤት ይሰጣል፤ ኢንዳክቲቭ ደግሞ በልምድ ላይ ተመስርቶ ሊሆን የሚችል ውጤትን ያሳያል።
om: Yaadni sababaa 'Deductive' jedhamu seera waliigalaa irraa ka'uun gara xumura murtaa'aa tokኮtti nama geessa; fakkeenyaaf, midhaan daangulee hundi 'nitrogen' kan kennan yoo ta'e, baaqelaan ammoo daangulee dha, kanaaf baaqelaan 'nitrogen' ni kenna.

Yaadni sababaa 'Inductive' jedhamu ammoo gocha murtaa'aa ilaaluun gara yaada waliigalaatti nama geessa; fakkeenyaaf, maasii sadii xaa'oo uumamaatiin oomisha gaarii yoo kennan, xaa'oon uumamaa maasii hundaaf gaariidha jedhanii yaaduudha.
Garaagarummaan isaanii inni guddaan mirkaneeffannaadha: yaadni 'deductive' xumura dhugaa ta'e kenna, 'inductive' ammoo xumura ta'uu danda'u qofa agarsiisa.

en: Can a deductive argument be logical even if the starting premise is false?
How do scientists use inductive reasoning to form new hypotheses?
Why is inductive reasoning more common in everyday agricultural decision-making?
The scientific method is a systematic way of learning that begins with an observation about the world, such as noticing that one part of a field grows faster than another.
After observing, you form a hypothesis, which is an educated guess or a testable explanation for what you saw, like 'this area grows faster because it receives more sunlight.'
The most critical step is the experiment; you must test your hypothesis under controlled conditions and collect data before reaching a final, objective conclusion.
am: ሳይንሳዊ ዘዴ በስርዓት የመማር መንገድ ሲሆን የሚጀምረው ስለ ዓለም ምልከታ በማድረግ ነው፤ ለምሳሌ የአንድ እርሻ ክፍል ከሌላው በበለጠ ለምን እንደሚበቅል ማስተባል።
ከታዘቡ በኋላ መላምት ይፈጥራሉ፤ ይህም ላዩት ነገር ሊሆን የሚችል ማብራሪያ ነው፤ ለምሳሌ 'ይህ ቦታ በፍጥነት የሚያድገው ብዙ የፀሐይ ብርሃን ስላለው ነው' ብሎ መገመት።
በጣም ወሳኙ እርምጃ ሙከራ ነው፤ ወደ መጨረሻው ድምዳሜ ከመድረስዎ በፊት መላምትዎን በትክክለኛ ሁኔታ መፈተሽ እና መረጃዎችን መሰብሰብ አለብዎት።
om: Malli saayinsii adeemsa sirnaan barachuuti; kunis waa'ee addunyaa hubachuu yookiin 'observation' irraa jalqaba; fakkeenyaaf, maasii tokko keessatti kutaaleen tokko tokko maaliif dafanii biqilu jedhanii ilaaluudha.

Erga hubattanii booda 'hypothesis' yookiin yaada-rimee qopheessitu; kunis waan argitaniif ibsa yaalamee mirkanaa'u danda'u, fakkeenyaaf 'bakki kun ifa aduu baay'ee waan argatuuf dafee biqila' jedhanii yaaduudha.
Tarkaanfiin inni guddaan yaaliidha (experiment); yaada keessan qabatamaan yaaltanii ragaa walitti qabuun xumura irra gahuu qabdu.

en: Why must a scientific experiment be repeatable by other people?
What is the difference between a scientific theory and a law?
How can a farmer use the scientific method to test a new type of fertilizer?
Ethics involves making choices that benefit the collective good; in Ethiopia, this includes respecting communal resources like shared grazing lands and water sources.
Environmental responsibility means practicing agriculture in a way that preserves the soil and water for future generations, rather than seeking only immediate profit.
Integrity in the community means being honest in trade and labor-sharing (Debo), ensuring that your actions do not harm your neighbor's livelihood or the local ecosystem.
am: ስነ-ምግባር ለጋራ ጥቅም የሚሆኑ ምርጫዎችን ማድረግን ያካትታል፤ በኢትዮጵያ ይህ እንደ ጋራ የግጦሽ መሬቶች እና የውሃ ምንጮችን ማክበርን ይጨምራል።
ለአካባቢ ጥበቃ ተስማሚ መሆን ማለት ለዛሬ ትርፍ ብቻ ሳይሆን ለወደፊት ትውልድ እንዲተርፍ አፈርን እና ውሃን በሚጠብቅ መልኩ እርሻን ማከናወን ማለት ነው።
በማህበረሰቡ ውስጥ ታማኝነት ማለት በንግድ እና በጋራ ስራ (ደቦ) ወቅት ቅን መሆን ነው፤ ይህም የእርስዎ ተግባር የጎረቤትዎን ኑሮ ወይም አካባቢውን እንደማይጎዳ ማረጋገጥ ነው።
om: Naamusni filannoo faayidaa waliigalaaf tajaajilu gochuudha; Itoophiyaa keessatti kun qabeenya waloo kan akka lafa dheedumsaa fi maddeen bishaania kabajuu dabalata.
Itti-gaafatamummaan naannoo jechuun, bu'aa yeroo gabaabaa qofa utuu hin taane oomisha qonnaa biyyee fi bishaan dhaloota dhufuuf eeguu danda'u gaggeessuudha.
Hawaasa keessatti amanamummaan daldalaa fi hojii waloo (Deboo) keessatti dhugaa dubbachuudha; kunis gochi keessan jireenya ollaa keessanii fi naannoo akka hin miidhe mirkaneessuudha.

en: How does the concept of 'Medemer' relate to community responsibility?
Why is it unethical to use pesticides near a shared river source?
What is our ethical duty toward indigenous seeds and traditional knowledge?
Begin by skimming the text to identify the main thesis or central argument, usually found in the introduction and the conclusion paragraphs.
Note the topic sentence of each paragraph; these sentences typically contain the primary claim, while the rest of the paragraph provides supporting evidence.
Rewrite the gathered points in your own words (paraphrasing) to ensure you understand the material, keeping the summary brief and focused only on the most essential information.
am: ጽሑፉን በፍጥነት በማንበብ (skimming) ዋናውን መልእክት ወይም ጭብጥ ይለዩ፤ ይህ አብዛኛውን ጊዜ በመግቢያው እና በመደምደሚያው አንቀጾች ውስጥ ይገኛል።
የእያንዳንዱን አንቀጽ መሪ ዓረፍተ ነገር ልብ ይበሉ፤ እነዚህ ዓረፍተ ነገሮች ብዙውን ጊዜ ዋናውን ሃሳብ ይይዛሉ፣ ቀሪው አንቀጽ ደግሞ ዝርዝር ማስረጃዎችን ይሰጣል።
ትምህርቱን በሚገባ መረዳትዎን ለማረጋገጥ ያገኙትን ነጥቦች በራስዎ ቃላት እንደገና ይጻፉ፤ ማጠቃለያው አጭር እና በጣም አስፈላጊ በሆኑ መረጃዎች ላይ ብቻ ያተኮረ እንዲሆን ያድርጉ።
om: Jalqaba irratti barreeffamicha ariitiin dubbisuun (skimming) yaada isaa isa ijoo adda baasaa; kunis yeroo baay'ee seensaa fi xumura irratti argama.
Himoota jalqabaa tokkoon tokkoo keeyyataa hubadhaa; himoonni kun yaada ijoo keeyyatichaa of keessaa qabu, kutaaleen biroo immoo ragaa dabalataa kennu.
Qabxiiwwan walitti qabdan sana akka hubattan mirkaneessuuf jecha keessaniin deebisaa barreessaa; gabaabbinaan qabxiiwwan baay'ee barbaachisoo ta'an irratti qofa xiyyeeffadhaa.

en: What is the difference between a summary and an abstract?
How can I avoid changing the author's original meaning when summarizing?
Why is summarizing a useful skill for researchers and students?
A primary source is an original, first-hand account of an event, such as an interview with an elder who lived through a drought or a diary entry from that time.
A secondary source interprets or analyzes primary sources; examples include school textbooks, history books, or newspaper articles written after an event.
Good research uses both: primary sources provide direct evidence and raw data, while secondary sources provide context and different perspectives on that data.
am: ቀዳሚ ምንጭ (Primary source) የአንድ ክስተት የመጀመሪያ ምስክርነት ነው፤ ለምሳሌ ድርቅን ካሳለፈ አረጋዊ ጋር የተደረገ ቃለ-ምልልስ ወይም በዚያን ጊዜ የተጻፈ የግል ማስታወሻ።
ሁለተኛ ደረጃ ምንጭ (Secondary source) ቀዳሚ ምንጮችን የሚተነትን ወይም የሚመረምር ነው፤ ለምሳሌ የመማሪያ መጽሐፍት፣ የታሪክ መጽሐፍት ወይም ከክስተቱ በኋላ የተጻፉ የጋዜጣ ጽሑፎች።
ጥሩ ምርምር ሁለቱንም ይጠቀማል፡ ቀዳሚ ምንጮች ቀጥተኛ ማስረጃዎችን ሲሰጡ፣ ሁለተኛ ደረጃ ምንጮች ደግሞ ስለ መረጃው ሰፋ ያለ ትንታኔ እና እይታ ይሰጣሉ።
om: Maddi jalqabaa (Primary source) ragaa kallattiin yeroo sana qophaa'eedha; fakkeenyaaf jaarsa yeroo hongee sana ture wajjin af-gaaffii gochuu yookiin yaadannoo yeroo sana barreeffameedha.
Maddi lammataa (Secondary source) madda jalqabaa irratti hunda'uun xiinxala kan kennuudha; fakkeenyaaf kitaabota barnootaa, kitaabota seenaa yookiin barruulee waa'ee gocha sanaa booda barreeffaman.
Qorannoon gaariin lameenuu fayyadama: maddi jalqabaa ragaa qabatamaa kenna, maddi lammataa immoo yaada bal'aa fi ibsa dabalataa kenna.

en: Is a photograph of a historical event a primary or secondary source?
How do I cite an interview with a local farmer in an academic paper?
Why must researchers be careful about bias in secondary sources?
Conduction is the transfer of heat through direct contact, such as a metal ladle getting hot while sitting in a boiling pot of 'Wot'.
Convection occurs in liquids and gases where warm air rises and cool air sinks, which is why the air near the ceiling of a kitchen is warmer than near the floor.
Radiation is heat transfer through waves without direct contact, like the warmth you feel from the sun on a clear day in the Ethiopian highlands.
am: ኮንዳክሽን (Conduction) ሙቀት በቀጥታ ንክኪ የሚተላለፍበት መንገድ ነው፤ ለምሳሌ የሚፈላ ወጥ ውስጥ የተቀመጠ ብረት ጭልፋ በሙቀቱ ምክንያት ሲጋል።
ኮንቬክሽን (Convection) በፈሳሽ እና በጋዝ ውስጥ ሙቀት የሚተላለፍበት መንገድ ሲሆን ሞቃት አየር ወደ ላይ ሲወጣ ቀዝቃዛ አየር ደግሞ ወደ ታች ይወርዳል።
ሬዲዮሽን (Radiation) ሙቀት ያለ ንክኪ በሞገድ የሚተላለፍበት መንገድ ነው፤ ለምሳሌ በደጋማው የኢትዮጵያ ክፍል በጠራራ ፀሐይ የሚሰማን ሙቀት።
om: Koondaakshiniin (Conduction) ho'a karaa wal-tuqa kallattiitiin darbudha; fakkeenyaaf mooka sibiilaa ittoo bilchaataa jiru keessa yoo turu ho'uun isaa kanaaf ragaadha.
Konveekshiniin (Convection) dhangala'oo fi gaasii keessatti ho'i yeroo qilleensi ho'aan ol-ba'uufi qilleensi qabbanaa'aan gadi bu'u kan uumamudha.
Raadiyeeshiniin (Radiation) ho'a karaa dambaliitiin wal-tuqa malee darbudha; fakkeenyaaf tulluuwwan Itoophiyaa irratti ho'a aduu ijaan mul'attu irraa nutti dhaga'amuudha.

en: Why is wood a better handle for a cooking pot than metal?
How do clay houses (Chika) help in regulating temperature through insulation?
What is the difference between thermal conductors and insulators?
Potential energy is stored energy based on an object's position, like water held behind a large dam like the GERD before it is released.
Kinetic energy is the energy of motion; when the water is released from the dam and flows down, its potential energy converts into kinetic energy.
A heavy stone sitting at the top of a hill has high potential energy, but as it rolls down, it gains kinetic energy while losing potential energy.
am: ተከማችቶ ያለ ኃይል (Potential energy) አንድ ነገር ባለበት ቦታ ምክንያት ያለው ኃይል ነው፤ ለምሳሌ እንደ ታላቁ የኢትዮጵያ ሕዳሴ ግድብ በግድብ የታቆረ ውሃ።
የእንቅስቃሴ ኃይል (Kinetic energy) አንድ ነገር ሲንቀሳቀስ የሚኖረው ኃይል ነው፤ ግድብ ውስጥ ያለው ውሃ ተለቆ ወደ ታች ሲፈስ ወደ እንቅስቃሴ ኃይል ይለወጣል።
አንድ ትልቅ ድንጋይ በተራራ ጫፍ ላይ ሲቀመጥ ከፍተኛ ተከማችቶ ያለ ኃይል አለው፤ ነገር ግን ተንከባሎ ወደ ታች ሲወርድ ያ ኃይል ወደ እንቅስቃሴ ኃይል ይለወጣል።
om: Anniisaa kuufamaa (Potential energy) anniisaa bakka waanti tokko jiru irratti hundaa'uun kuufameedha; fakkeenyaaf bishaan hidha guddicha (GERD) duubatti kuufame.
Anniisaa socho'aa (Kinetic energy) anniisaa waanti socho'u qabudha; yeroo bishaan hidha sana keessaa gadi lakkifamu anniisaa socho'aatti jijjiirama.
Dhagaan guddaan fiixee tulluu irra jiru anniisaa kuufamaa guddaa qaba; garuu yeroo gadi garagalamu anniisaa socho'aatti jijjiiramaa deema.

en: How does a bow and arrow demonstrate both types of energy?
Can an object have both kinetic and potential energy at the same time?
How is potential energy calculated in terms of height and mass?
Lift is the upward force created by airflow over the wings, allowing airplanes from Ethiopian Airlines to rise and stay in the air.
Thrust is the forward force produced by engines that pushes the plane forward, while Drag is the air resistance that tries to slow it down.
Weight is the downward force of gravity acting on the plane; for flight to occur, Lift must be greater than Weight, and Thrust must overcome Drag.
am: ሊፍት (Lift) በአውሮፕላን ክንፎች ላይ በሚያልፍ አየር የሚፈጠር ወደ ላይ የሚገፋ ኃይል ነው፤ ይህም አውሮፕላኖች ወደ ጠፈር እንዲወጡ እና አየር ላይ እንዲቆዩ ያስችላቸዋል።
ትረስት (Thrust) አውሮፕላኑን ወደ ፊት የሚገፋው የሞተር ኃይል ሲሆን ድራግ (Drag) ደግሞ አውሮፕላኑን ወደ ኋላ የሚጎትተው የአየር መቋቋም ነው።
ክብደት (Weight) መሬት አውሮፕላኑን ወደ ታች የምትስብበት የስበት ኃይል ነው፤ አውሮፕላን ለመብረር ሊፍት ከክብደት መብለጥ አለበት።
om: Liiftiin (Lift) humna qilleensa koochoo irra deemuun uumamu yoo ta'u, kunis xiyyaarri akka ol-ka'uu fi qilleensa irra turu gargaara.
Thirastiin (Thrust) humna mookaraan maddisiisuun xiyyara gara fuulduraatti dhiibudha; 'Drag' immoo humna qilleensa duubatti hirkisudha.
Ulfaatinni (Weight) humna harkisa lafaa xiyyara gadi harkisudha; xiyyaarri balali'uuf Liiftiin ulfaatina caaluu qaba.

en: How do pilots control the plane's direction using flaps?
Why is air pressure lower on top of a wing than beneath it?
What is Bernoulli's principle in the context of aviation?
A generator works on the principle of electromagnetic induction, where moving a wire through a magnetic field creates an electric current.
In a power plant, spinning turbines move large magnets inside coils of copper wire, forcing electrons to flow and create electricity.
Mechanical motion (from wind, falling water, or an engine) is the input that drives the internal parts to produce electrical power.
am: ጄነሬተር በኤሌክትሮማግኔቲክ ኢንዳክሽን መርህ ላይ ይሰራል፤ ይህም ማለት ሽቦን በመግነጢሳዊ መስክ ውስጥ በማንቀሳቀስ የኤሌክትሪክ ፍሰት ይፈጠራል።
በኃይል ማመንጫ ውስጥ የሚሽከረከሩ ተርባይኖች በመዳብ ሽቦዎች ውስጥ ያሉ ትላልቅ መግነጢሶችን በማንቀሳቀስ ኤሌክትሮኖች እንዲፈሱ እና ኤሌክትሪክ እንዲፈጠር ያደርጋሉ።
ከንፋስ፣ ከሚፈስ ውሃ ወይም ከሞተር የሚገኝ ሜካኒካዊ እንቅስቃሴ የኤሌክትሪክ ኃይል ለማምረት እንደ ግብዓት የሚያገለግል እንቅስቃሴ ነው።
om: Jeneeratarri mala 'electromagnetic induction' jedhamuun hojjata; kunis shiboo maagneetii keessatti sochoosuun dhangala'aa elektirikaa uuma.
Buufata annisaa keessatti, mookarri naanna'u maagneetii shiboo keessatti sochoosuun elektiroononni akka yaa'an godha; kunis elektirika uuma.
Sochiin mekaanikaalaa (bubbee, bishaan yookiin mookara irraa dhufu) humni ittiin annisaa elektirikaa maddisiisudha.

en: What is the difference between AC and DC current?
How does a transformer change the voltage of electricity?
Can a motor be used as a generator if spun manually?
Renewable energy comes from natural sources that replenish themselves, such as sunlight (solar), wind, and falling water (hydro).
Non-renewable energy, like oil, coal, and natural gas, takes millions of years to form and cannot be replaced once they are used up.
Using renewable energy in Ethiopia reduces pollution and ensures a long-term, sustainable power supply for future generations.
am: ታዳሽ ኃይል (Renewable energy) ራሳቸውን ከሚተኩ ተፈጥሯዊ ምንጮች የሚገኝ ነው፤ ለምሳሌ እንደ የፀሐይ ብርሃን፣ ንፋስ እና የሚፈስ ውሃ።
ታዳሽ ያልሆነ ኃይል (Non-renewable energy) እንደ ዘይት፣ የድንጋይ ከሰል እና የተፈጥሮ ጋዝ ያሉ ሲሆኑ አንዴ ጥቅም ላይ ከዋሉ በኋላ ሊተኩ አይችሉም።
በኢትዮጵያ ውስጥ ታዳሽ ኃይልን መጠቀም የአየር ብክለትን ይቀንሳል እንዲሁም ለወደፊት ትውልድ አስተማማኝ የኃይል አቅርቦትን ያረጋግጣል።
om: Annisaan deebi'ee oomishamu (Renewable) madda uumamaa of-haaromsan kan akka ifa aduu, bubbee fi bishaan yaa'aa irraa argama.
Annisaan deebi'ee hin oomishamne (Non-renewable) kan akka boba'aa fi cilee yoo ta'an, erga dhumatanii booda deebisanii argachuun hin danda'amu.
Itoophiyaa keessatti annisaa deebi'ee oomishamu fayyadamuun xurii hir'isa, dhaloota dhufuufis madda annisaa amansiisaa uuma.

en: Why is charcoal considered a semi-renewable resource if managed correctly?
What are the environmental impacts of burning fossil fuels?
How can Ethiopia maximize its wind energy potential?
International trade is the exchange of goods and services between countries; Exports are goods sold to other countries, while Imports are goods bought from abroad.
Ethiopia's major exports include coffee, oilseeds, and cut flowers, which earn the country essential foreign currency (Forex) to buy needed goods.
Imports for Ethiopia often include processed fuel, machinery, and medicines, which are necessary for industrial growth and public health.
The Balance of Trade is the difference between the value of a country's exports and its imports; a 'trade deficit' occurs when a country imports more than it exports.
am: ዓለም አቀፍ ንግድ ማለት በአገሮች መካከል የሚደረግ የሸቀጦች እና አገልግሎቶች ልውውጥ ነው፤ ኤክስፖርት ወደ ውጭ አገር የሚሸጡ ሲሆኑ፣ ኢምፖርት ደግሞ ከውጭ የሚገቡ ናቸው።
የኢትዮጵያ ዋና ዋና የኤክስፖርት ምርቶች ቡና፣ የቅባት እህሎች እና አበባ ሲሆኑ፣ እነዚህም አገሪቱ አስፈላጊ የሆኑ ቁሳቁሶችን ለመግዛት የሚያስፈልጋትን የውጭ ምንዛሬ እንድታገኝ ይረዳሉ።
ኢትዮጵያ ከውጭ የምታስገባቸው (ኢምፖርት) ምርቶች በብዛት ነዳጅ፣ ማሽነሪዎች እና መድኃኒቶች ናቸው፤ እነዚህም ለኢንዱስትሪ እድገት እና ለሕዝብ ጤና አስፈላጊ ናቸው።
የንግድ ሚዛን ማለት በአንድ ሀገር ኤክስፖርት እና ኢምፖርት ዋጋ መካከል ያለው ልዩነት ነው፤ አንዲት ሀገር ከምትልከው በላይ ከውጭ ካስገባች 'የንግድ ጉድለት' ይፈጠራል።
om: Daldalli idil-addunyaa biyyoota gidduutti wal-jijjiirraa meeshaalee fi tajaajilaati; Al-erguun (Exports) meeshaa biyya alaatti gurguramu yoo ta'u, Al-galchuun (Imports) immoo meeshaa biyya alaaraa bitamuudha.
Oomishaan Itoophiyaan baay'inaan alatti ergitu buna, mimmittii fi daraaraa yoo ta'an, kunis biyyattiin meeshaalee barbaachisoo bitachuuf sharafa alaa akka argattu gargaaru.
Itoophiyaan baay'inaan boba'aa, maashinariifi qoricha alaa galchiti; kunis guddina induustriifi fayyaa uummataatiif baay'ee barbaachisoodha.
Madaallii daldalaa jechuun garaagarummaa gatii meeshaa alatti ergamuufi alaa galu gidduu jiruudha; yoo biyyi tokko waan ergitu caalaa galchite 'hir'ina daldalaa' uumama.

en: How do changes in the global price of coffee affect Ethiopia's economy?
What is the role of the African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA)?
Why do governments sometimes put tariffs or taxes on imported goods?
Inflation is the general increase in the prices of goods and services over time, which reduces the 'purchasing power' of money.
When inflation is high, the same amount of Ethiopian Birr buys fewer goods (like Teff or oil) than it did in previous years.
Common causes of inflation include high demand for goods, increased production costs (like high fuel prices), or an increase in the total money supply in the economy.
Moderate inflation is often a sign of a growing economy, but rapid inflation can make it difficult for families to afford basic daily needs.
am: የዋጋ ንረት (ኢንፍሌሽን) ማለት በጊዜ ሂደት የሸቀጦች እና የአገልግሎቶች ዋጋ መጨመር ሲሆን፣ ይህም የገንዘብን የመግዛት አቅም ይቀንሳል።
የዋጋ ንረት ከፍተኛ በሚሆንበት ጊዜ፣ ተመሳሳይ የብር መጠን ካለፉት ዓመታት ያነሰ እቃዎችን (እንደ ጤፍ ወይም ዘይት) ለመግዛት ብቻ ይበቃል።
ለዋጋ ንረት መንስኤ ከሆኑት መካከል የሸቀጦች ፍላጎት መጨመር፣ የምርት ወጪዎች ማደግ (ለምሳሌ የነዳጅ ዋጋ) ወይም በኢኮኖሚው ውስጥ ያለው የገንዘብ ስርጭት መጨመር ይገኙበታል።
መጠነኛ የዋጋ ንረት ብዙውን ጊዜ የኢኮኖሚ እድገት ምልክት ነው፤ ነገር ግን ፈጣን የዋጋ ንረት ቤተሰቦች መሰረታዊ ፍላጎቶቻቸውን ለማሟላት እንዲቸገሩ ያደርጋል።
om: Infireeshinii jechuun yeroo keessa gatiin meeshaalee fi tajaajilaa dabaluudha; kunis humna bittaa maallaqaa hir'isa.
Yeroo infireeshiniin jabaatu, qarshiin Itoophiyaa (Birriin) hamma waggoota duraa caalaa meeshaa xiqqaatti (akka xaafee yookiin zayitaa) bituu danda'a.
Sababni infireeshinii fedhiin meeshaa dabaluu, baasiin oomishaa (akka gatii boba'aa) ol-ka'uu yookiin maallaqni gabaa keessa jiru baay'achuudha.
Infireeshiniin giddu-galeessaa guddina dinagdee agarsiisa; garuu infireeshiniin ariitii ta'e maatiin waan barbaachisoo bitachuuf akka rakkatan godha.

en: How can individuals protect their savings from losing value due to inflation?
What is the Consumer Price Index (CPI) and how is it measured in Ethiopia?
How does inflation affect people who receive a fixed monthly salary?
The Central Bank (in Ethiopia, the National Bank of Ethiopia) is responsible for managing the country's money supply and ensuring financial stability.
One of its main roles is to control inflation by adjusting interest rates and regulating how much money is circulating in the economy.
The Central Bank manages the country's foreign exchange reserves, which are used to pay for imports and settle international debts.
It also acts as the 'lender of last resort' to commercial banks, ensuring the banking system does not collapse during financial crises.
am: ማዕከላዊ ባንክ (በኢትዮጵያ የኢትዮጵያ ብሔራዊ ባንክ) የአገሪቱን የገንዘብ አቅርቦት የማስተዳደር እና የፋይናንስ መረጋጋትን የማረጋገጥ ኃላፊነት አለበት።
ዋናው ተግባሩ የወለድ ምጣኔን በማስተካከል እና በኢኮኖሚው ውስጥ የሚዘዋወረውን የገንዘብ መጠን በመቆጣጠር የዋጋ ንረትን መከላከል ነው።
ብሔራዊ ባንክ የአገሪቱን የውጭ ምንዛሬ ክምችት ያስተዳድራል፤ ይህም ለኢምፖርት ክፍያ እና ለዓለም አቀፍ ዕዳዎች ክፍያ ይውላል።
እንዲሁም ለንግድ ባንኮች እንደ 'የመጨረሻ አበዳሪ' ሆኖ ያገለግላል፤ ይህም በፋይናንስ ቀውስ ወቅት የባንክ ሥርዓቱ እንዳይፈርስ ይከላከላል።
om: Baankii Giddu-galeessaa (Itoophiyaatti Baankii Biyyaalessaa Itoophiyaa) hamma maallaqa biyya keessa jiru to'achuu fi tasgabbii faayinaansii mirkaneessuuf itti-gaafatamummaa qaba.
Hojii isaa keessaa inni guddaan dhala baankii sirreessuufi hamma maallaqa gabaa keessa jiru to'achuun infireeshinii hir'isuudha.
Baankii Biyyaalessaa kuusaa sharafa alaa biyyaa ni bulcha; kunis meeshaa alaa bituufi liqii idil-addunyaa kaffaluuf gargaara.
Baankoota daldalaatiif akka 'liqeessaa dhumaa' tajaajila; kunis yeroo rakkoo faayinaansii sirni baankii akka hin jigine godha.

en: How does the National Bank of Ethiopia influence the value of the Birr?
Why is the independence of a Central Bank important for an economy?
What happens when a Central Bank prints too much money?
The United Nations (UN) is an international organization founded in 1945 to promote peace, security, and cooperation among all nations.
The General Assembly is the main branch where all 193 member countries, including Ethiopia, have a vote on global issues.
The Security Council is responsible for maintaining international peace; it can authorize peacekeeping missions or sanctions against countries.
Addis Ababa is a major UN hub, hosting the Economic Commission for Africa (ECA) and coordinating regional development and humanitarian efforts.
am: የተባበሩት መንግስታት ድርጅት (ተመድ) በ1945 የተመሰረተ ዓለም አቀፍ ድርጅት ሲሆን ዓላማውም በሁሉም አገሮች መካከል ሰላምን፣ ደህንነትን እና ትብብርን ማስፈን ነው።
ጠቅላላ ጉባኤው ኢትዮጵያን ጨምሮ ሁሉም 193 አባል አገራት በዓለም አቀፍ ጉዳዮች ላይ ድምጽ የሚሰጡበት ዋናው የድርጅቱ ክፍል ነው።
የጸጥታው ምክር ቤት ዓለም አቀፍ ሰላምን የመጠበቅ ኃላፊነት አለበት፤ የሰላም አስከባሪ ተልዕኮዎችን ወይም ማዕቀቦችን የመጣል ስልጣን አለው።
አዲስ አበባ የተባበሩት መንግስታት ድርጅት ዋና ማዕከል ናት፤ የአፍሪካ ኢኮኖሚክ ኮሚሽንን (ECA) በማስተናገድ ቀጣናዊ ልማትን እና ሰብአዊ እርዳታን ያስተባብራል።
om: Dhaabbanni Mootummoota Gamtoomanii (UN) bara 1945tti nageenya, tasgabbii fi wal-ta'iinsa biyyoota gidduu jiru guddisuuf hundaa'e.
Walga'iin Waliigalaa (General Assembly) bakka biyyoonni miseensa ta'an 193, Itoophiyaa dabalatee, dhimmoota addunyaa irratti sagalee itti kennaniidha.
Mana Marii Nageenyaa (Security Council) nageenya idil-addunyaa eeguuf itti-gaafatamummaa qaba; ergaa nageenya eegumsaa yookiin uggura biyyoota irratti murteessuu danda'a.
Finfinneen giddu-galeessa UN guddaadha; 'Economic Commission for Africa' (ECA) simachuun guddina raajichaa fi gargaarsa namoomaa qindeessiti.

en: What are the 17 Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) set by the UN?
What was Ethiopia's role as a founding member of the United Nations?
How does the World Health Organization (WHO) function under the UN?
Human Rights are basic freedoms and protections that belong to every person in the world from birth until death, regardless of race, gender, or religion.
The Universal Declaration of Human Rights (UDHR) is a key international document that lists 30 rights, including the right to life, liberty, and security.
Civil and political rights include the right to a fair trial, freedom of expression, and the right to participate in government through voting.
Economic and social rights include the right to work in safe conditions, the right to an adequate standard of living, and the right to education.
am: ሰብአዊ መብቶች ማለት ከልደት እስከ ሞት ድረስ በዓለም ላይ ያለ ማንኛውም ሰው ምንም ዓይነት የዘር፣ የጾታ ወይም የሃይማኖት ልዩነት ሳይደረግበት የሚገቡት መሰረታዊ ነፃነቶች ናቸው።
ዓለም አቀፉ የሰብአዊ መብቶች ድንጋጌ (UDHR) የህይወት፣ የነጻነት እና የደህንነት መብቶችን ጨምሮ 30 መብቶችን የያዘ ዋና ዓለም አቀፍ ሰነድ ነው።
ሲቪል እና ፖለቲካዊ መብቶች ፍትሃዊ የፍርድ ሂደት የማግኘት መብት፣ ሃሳብን በነጻነት የመግለጽ እና በምርጫ የመሳተፍ መብቶችን ያካትታሉ።
ኢኮኖሚያዊ እና ማህበራዊ መብቶች ደህንነቱ በተጠበቀ ሁኔታ የመስራት መብት፣ ተስማሚ የኑሮ ደረጃ የማግኘት መብት እና የትምህርት መብትን ያካትታሉ።
om: Mirgi namummaa mirgoota bu'uuraa namni hundi dhalootaa hanga du'aatti qabaachuu qabudha; kunis sanyii, saala yookiin amantiin addaan hin qoodamu.
Labsii Idil-addunyaa Mirga Namummaa (UDHR) mirgoota 30 kan akka mirga jireenyaa, bilisummaa fi nageenyaa of keessaa qaba.
Mirgoonni siivilii fi siyaasaa mirga murtii haqaa argachuu, yaada ofii bilisaan ibsachuu fi filannoo irratti hirmaachuu dabalatu.
Mirgoonni dinagdee fi hawaasummaa mirga haala gaariin hojjachuu, sadarkaa jireenyaa gahaa argachuu fi mirga barumsaa of keessaa qabu.

en: How are human rights protected under the Ethiopian Constitution?
What is the difference between 'Universal' and 'Inalienable' rights?
What role do organizations like the Red Cross play in protecting human rights?

Scientific Benefit: Minimum tillage prevents the breakdown of soil structure and protects beneficial microorganisms, while soil cover reduces evaporation and prevents erosion by blocking wind and heavy rain impact.
Step 1: Instead of traditional multiple plowing (Maresha), limit disturbance to only the planting hole or narrow furrow to keep the soil's natural layers intact.
Step 2: Leave at least 30% of previous crop residues (like maize stalks or wheat straw) on the field surface to act as a protective blanket that keeps the soil cool and moist.
am: ሳይንሳዊ ጥቅም፡ አነስተኛ ማረስ የአፈርን መዋቅር እንዳይፈርስ እና ጠቃሚ ጥቃቅን ተህዋሲያንን ይከላከላል፤ የአፈር ሽፋን ደግሞ ትነትን በመቀነስ እና የአፈር መሸርሸርን በመከላከል እርጥበትን ይጠብቃል።
ደረጃ 1፡ በባህላዊ መንገድ ደጋግሞ ከማረስ ይልቅ የአፈሩን የተፈጥሮ ንብርብሮች ለመጠበቅ ሲባል ለመዝሪያነት የሚሆን ጉድጓድ ወይም ጠባብ መስመር ላይ ብቻ በማረስ አፈሩ እንዳይናጋ ያድርጉ።
ደረጃ 2፡ አፈሩ ቀዝቃዛ እና እርጥብ እንዲሆን ቢያንስ 30% የሚሆነውን ያለፈው ወቅት የሰብል ተረፈ-ምርት (እንደ በቆሎ ግንድ ወይም የጭድ ቅሪት) በማሳው ላይ በትነው ይተዉት።
om: Faayidaa Saayinsii: Qonni xiqqaan (minimum tillage) caasaa biyyee eeguun jarmiilee gargaaran ittisa; haguuggiin biyyee immoo hurka hir'isuun dhiqannaa biyyee lolaa fi bubbeedhaan dhufu ittisa.
Tarkaanfii 1: Akka aadaatti yeroo baay'ee qotuun (Mareshaa) caasaa biyyee akka hin diigneef, bakka sanyii facaafamu qofa qotuun qonna keessan raawwadhaa.
Tarkaanfii 2: Biyyeen akka qabbanaa'uufi jiidha akka tursiisuuf, hambaa oomisha darbee (akka jirma boqqoolloo yookiin cidii) yoo xiqqaate %30 maasii irratti dhiisaa.

en: How do I control weeds effectively without traditional plowing?
Can I use conservation agriculture for all types of Ethiopian crops?
How many years does it take to see improved soil health through minimum tillage?

Scientific Benefit: Regenerative farming restores the natural nutrient cycle by using cover crops to fix nitrogen and bio-fertilizers to increase the population of microbes that make soil nutrients available to plants.
Step 1: Plant leguminous cover crops like vetch or clover during fallow periods; their roots work with bacteria to pull nitrogen from the air into the soil, acting as a green manure.
Step 2: Apply bio-fertilizers such as Rhizobium inoculants to legume seeds before planting or use compost tea to introduce healthy fungi and bacteria that improve nutrient uptake.
am: ሳይንሳዊ ጥቅም፡ መልሶ ማልማት እርሻ (Regenerative farming) ናይትሮጅንን ለመተካት የሽፋን ሰብሎችን እና የአፈር ንጥረ ነገሮችን ለተክሎች ዝግጁ የሚያደርጉ ተህዋሲያንን ለመጨመር ባዮ-ማዳበሪያዎችን በመጠቀም ተፈጥሯዊ የአፈር ለምነትን ያድሳል።
ደረጃ 1፡ መሬቱ በሚያርፍበት ወቅት እንደ ጓያ ወይም ክሎቨር ያሉ የሽፋን ሰብሎችን ይዝሩ፤ ሥሮቻቸው ከባክቴሪያ ጋር በመተባበር ናይትሮጅንን ከአየር ወደ አፈር በመሳብ እንደ ተፈጥሯዊ ማዳበሪያ ያገለግላሉ።
ደረጃ 2፡ እንደ ራይዞቢየም ያሉ ባዮ-ማዳበሪያዎችን ከመዝራትዎ በፊት ከዘሩ ጋር ይቀላቅሉ ወይም ጠቃሚ ፈንገሶችን እና ባክቴሪያዎችን ለመጨመር ኮምፖስት ቲ (compost tea) ይጠቀሙ።
om: Faayidaa Saayinsii: Qonni haaromsaa (Regenerative farming) midhaan haguuggaatti fayyadamuun naayitiroojiinii biyyee keessatti hidha; xaa'oon baayoloojiikaalaa immoo jarmiilee soorata biyyee biqiltuudhaaf mijjeessan baay'isa.
Tarkaanfii 1: Yeroo lafti boqotutti midhaan haguuggaa akka 'vetch' yookiin 'clover' dhaabaa; hundeen isaanii baakteriyaa wajjin ta'uun naayitiroojiinii qilleensa keessaa xuuxanii biyyee gabbisu.
Tarkaanfii 2: Utuu hin dhaabin dura sanyii irratti xaa'oo baayoloojiikaalaa (Rhizobium) naqaa yookiin kumpoostii bishaanitti makuun (compost tea) jarmiilee gargaaran biyyee keessatti dabalaa.

en: What are the best cover crops to use in the Ethiopian highlands?
Where can I buy Rhizobium bio-fertilizers in Ethiopia?
Can regenerative farming replace chemical fertilizers completely?
Scientific Benefit: Drought-tolerant varieties have deep roots or short growing cycles (early maturity) that allow them to produce grain before the soil moisture disappears during erratic rainfall.
Step 1 (Highlands): Select early-maturing varieties of barley or wheat (e.g., Kingbird) that can complete their life cycle quickly to escape the late-season moisture stress common in cooler regions.

Step 2 (Lowlands): Choose crops naturally adapted to heat like Sorghum (Melkam variety) or Pearl Millet; these plants close their leaf pores during dry spells to conserve water and survive high temperatures.
am: ሳይንሳዊ ጥቅም፡ ድርቅን የሚቋቋሙ ዝርያዎች ጥልቅ ሥር ወይም አጭር የእድገት ጊዜ አላቸው፤ ይህም ዝናብ በሚጠፋበት ወቅት የአፈር እርጥበት ሳይጨርስ ምርት እንዲሰጡ ያስችላቸዋል።
ደረጃ 1 (ደጋማ ቦታዎች)፡ በደጋማ አካባቢዎች የሚከሰተውን የእርጥበት እጥረት ለማምለጥ እንደ 'ኪንግበርድ' ያሉ አጭር ጊዜ ውስጥ የሚደርሱ የገብስ ወይም የስንዴ ዝርያዎችን ይምረጡ።
ደረጃ 2 (ቆላማ ቦታዎች)፡ ለሙቀት ተስማሚ የሆኑትን እንደ 'መልካም' የአኩሪ አተር ወይም የማሽላ ዝርያዎችን ይምረጡ፤ እነዚህ ተክሎች በድርቅ ወቅት ውሃን ለመቆጠብ የቅጠል ቀዳዳዎቻቸውን የመዝጋት ተፈጥሯዊ ባህሪ አላቸው።
ሳይንሳዊ ጥቅም፡ ድርቅን የሚቋቋሙ ዝርያዎች ጥልቅ ሥር ወይም አጭር የእድገት ጊዜ አላቸው፤ ይህም ዝናብ በሚጠፋበት ወቅት የአፈር እርጥበት ሳይጨርስ ምርት እንዲሰጡ ያስችላቸዋል።
om: Faayidaa Saayinsii: Sanyiin hongee danda'an hundee gadi fageenya qabu yookiin yeroo gabaabaatti kan bilchaatan waan ta'aniif, bishaan biyyee keessaa utuu hin dhumatin callaa kennu.
Tarkaanfii 1 (Badda): Garbuu yookiin qamadii (fkn. Kingbird) yeroo gabaabaatti gahan filadhaa; kunis dhabamuun bishaania dhuma waqtii irratti dhufu akka jalaa bahan gargaara.
Tarkaanfii 2 (Gammoojjii): Mishingaa (sanyii Melkam) yookiin 'Pearl Millet' ho'a danda'an filadhaa; biqiltoonni kun yeroo bishaan dhaban bishaan qusachuuf banama baala isaanii ni cufu.

en: Which Sorghum varieties are best for the Rift Valley region?
How do I know if a seed is certified for drought tolerance in Ethiopia?
Is it better to use local landraces or improved seeds for dry areas?

Scientific Benefit: Worms digest organic waste and turn it into 'castings' which are rich in concentrated nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium (NPK) and contain beneficial enzymes that stimulate plant growth.
Step 1: Build a shaded, ventilated bin and fill it with bedding material like shredded cardboard, dried grass, and a layer of cow manure to create a home for the worms.
Step 2: Add Red Wiggler worms and feed them kitchen scraps (fruit/veg peels) while keeping the bin moist but not soaked; in 2-4 months, harvest the dark, crumbly worm compost for your garden.
am: ሳይንሳዊ ጥቅም፡ ትላትሎች ኦርጋኒክ ቆሻሻዎችን በመመገብ ወደ 'ካስቲንግ' ይቀይሯቸዋል፤ ይህም በናይትሮጅን፣ ፎስፈረስ እና ፖታሺየም የበለፀገ ከመሆኑም በላይ የተክሎችን እድገት የሚያፋጥኑ ኢንዛይሞችን ይዟል።
ደረጃ 1፡ ጥላ ያለው እና አየር የሚገባው ጉድጓድ ወይም ሳጥን ያዘጋጁ፤ ከዚያም እንደ የተቀዳደደ ካርቶን፣ ደረቅ ሣር እና የላም ኩበት በመጨመር ለትላትሎቹ መኖሪያ ይፍጠሩ።
ደረጃ 2፡ ትላትሎችን ወደ ሳጥኑ ያስገቡ እና የምግብ ተረፈ-ምርቶችን (የአትክልት/ፍራፍሬ ልጣጭ) ይመግቧቸው፤ ቦታው እርጥብ እንዲሆን ያድርጉ፤ ከ2-4 ወራት በኋላ ጥቁር እና ለም የሆነውን ትላትል ኮምፖስት ለምርት ይጠቀሙ።
om: Faayidaa Saayinsii: Raammooni xurii uumamaa soorachuun gara 'castings' tti jijjiiru; kunis 'nitrogen', 'phosphorus' fi 'potassium' (NPK) baay'ee qaba, akkasumas guddina biqiltuu ariitii godha.
Tarkaanfii 1: Bakka gaaddidduu qabu qopheessuun kaartoonaa ciccite, marga gogaa fi dhoqqee loonii keessa naquun mana raammoof ta'u ijaaraa.
Tarkaanfii 2: Raammoolee (Red Wiggler) itti naquun hambaa kudraalee fi muduraa soorachisaa; bakka sana jiisanii tursiisuun ji'a 2-4 keessatti xaa'oo uumamaa qulqulluu argattu.

en: Where can I find Red Wiggler worms for composting in Ethiopia?
Can I feed spicy foods or meat to my composting worms?
