How do I separate the worms from the finished compost without hurting them?

Scientific Benefit: Integrating trees provides a 'microclimate' that shields crops from extreme heat, fixes nitrogen through specialized tree roots, and provides deep-soil nutrient cycling that shallow crops cannot reach.
Step 1: Choose multi-purpose trees like Sesbania or Leucaena for nitrogen fixation and animal fodder, or fruit trees like Avocado and Mango to diversify your family's income.
Step 2: Plant trees in rows or along field borders (hedgerows) with a spacing of 5-10 meters to prevent excessive shading while still providing windbreaks and soil stability.
am: ሳይንሳዊ ጥቅም፡ ዛፎችን ከእርሻ ጋር ማቀናጀት ሰብሎችን ከከፍተኛ ሙቀት የሚከላከል 'ጥቃቅን አየር ንብረት' (microclimate) ይፈጥራል፤ በሥሮቻቸው ናይትሮጅን ይተካሉ እንዲሁም ሰብሎች ሊደርሱበት የማይችሉትን ጥልቀት ያለው ንጥረ ነገር ወደ ላይ ያወጣሉ።
ደረጃ 1፡ ለናይትሮጅን እና ለእንስሳት መኖ የሚሆኑ እንደ 'ሰስባኒያ' ያሉ ዛፎችን፣ ወይም ለቤተሰብ ገቢ የሚሆኑ እንደ አቮካዶ እና ማንጎ ያሉ የፍራፍሬ ዛፎችን ይምረጡ።
ደረጃ 2፡ የፀሐይ ብርሃን እንዳይከለክሉ ዛፎቹን በየ 5-10 ሜትር ርቀት በመስመር ወይም በእርሻ ድንበሮች ላይ ይትከሉ፤ ይህም የንፋስ መከላከያ እንዲሆኑ እና አፈር እንዳይሸረሸር ይረዳል።
om: Faayidaa Saayinsii: Mukeen midhaan wajjin dhaabuun ho'a garmalee irraa midhaan eega; hundee isaaniitiin 'nitrogen' biyyee keessa kaa'u, soorata gadi fageenya jiru ammoo gara gubbaatti fidu.
Tarkaanfii 1: Mukeen faayidaa hedduu qaban kan akka 'Sesbania' soorata looniitiif, yookiin mukeen ija godhatan kan akka Avokaadoo fi Maangoo galii dabalataatiif filadhaa.
Tarkaanfii 2: Mukeen sararaan fageenya meetira 5-10tti dhaabaa; kunis gaaddidduun garmalee akka hin baay'anne gochuun bubbee ittisa, biyyee jabeessa.

en: How do I prune agroforestry trees to maximize crop sunlight?
Which fodder trees are best for increasing milk production in cows?
Can I plant Moringa trees directly in my maize field?
Select the correct wire gauge based on the system's amperage; using wires that are too thin causes resistance, leading to heat buildup and energy loss.
Always install a Charge Controller between the panels and the battery to prevent overcharging, which significantly shortens the lifespan of expensive deep-cycle batteries.
Connect the battery to the controller first before connecting the solar panels; this ensures the controller correctly identifies the system voltage (12V or 24V).
Use an Inverter to convert DC power from the batteries into AC power for standard household appliances, ensuring the inverter's wattage exceeds the total load.
Implement a proper grounding (earthing) system for the metal frames of the solar panels to protect against lightning strikes and electrical surges.
Maintain clean and tight battery terminals; loose connections create sparks and can lead to melting or fire in high-current solar setups.
am: ለሲስተሙ የኤሌክትሪክ ፍሰት (amperage) የሚመጥን የሽቦ ውፍረት ይምረጡ፤ በጣም ቀጭን ሽቦ መጠቀም ሙቀት እንዲፈጠር እና የኃይል ብክነት እንዲኖር ያደርጋል።
ውድ የሆኑ ባትሪዎች ከመጠን በላይ እንዳይሞሉ እና እድሜያቸው እንዳያጥር ሁልጊዜ በፓነሉ እና በባንትሪው መካከል የቻርጅ መቆጣጠሪያ (Charge Controller) ይግጠሙ።
የሶላር ፓነሎችን ከማገናኘትዎ በፊት መጀመሪያ ባትሪውን ከመቆጣጠሪያው (controller) ጋር ያገናኙ፤ ይህም መቆጣጠሪያው የሲስተሙን ቮልቴጅ (12V ወይም 24V) በትክክል እንዲለይ ይረዳዋል።
ከባትሪ የሚገኘውን የዲሲ (DC) ኃይል ለቤት ውስጥ ቁሳቁሶች ወደሚሆን ኤሲ (AC) ለመቀየር ኢንቨርተር ይጠቀሙ፤ የኢንቨርተሩ አቅም ከሚጠቀሙት የኤሌክትሪክ ፍጆታ መብለጥ አለበት።
ፓነሎችን ከመብረቅ እና ድንገተኛ የኃይል መጨመር ለመጠበቅ ለሶላር ፓነል የብረት ክፈፎች ትክክለኛ የመሬት ግንኙነት (earthing) ያድርጉ።
የባትሪ መገናኛዎችን በንጽህና እና በጥብቅ ይያዙ፤ የላላ ግንኙነት ብልጭታ ስለሚፈጥር ለቃጠሎ ወይም ለቀለጠ ሽቦ መንስኤ ሊሆን ይችላል።
om: Hamma elektirikaa sirna sanaatiif shiboo guddina sirrii qabu filadhaa; shiboon haphiin ho'a uumuun anniisaa balleessa.
Baatiriin akka hin miidhamneef, paanalii fi baatirii gidduutti yeroo hunda 'Charge Controller' galchaa; kunis umrii baatirii dheeressa.
Paanalii soolaarii utuu hin hidhin dura, jalqaba baatirii gara 'controller' tti hidhaa; kunis 'controller'-ni sun voolteejii sirrii (12V yookiin 24V) akka adda baasu gargaara.
Anniisaa DC baatirii irraa dhufu gara AC tti jijjiiruuf 'Inverter' fayyadamaa; humni 'inverter' sanaa meeshaalee itti fayyadamtan irra guddaa ta'uu qaba.
Balaa balaqqee fi humna elektirikaa garmalee irraa eeguuf, paanalii soolaariitiif sirna lafatti gadi lakkisuu (earthing) qopheessaa.
Bakka baatiriin wal-qabatu qulqulleessaa jabeessitanii hidhaa; hidhaan lallaafaan koflee ibiddaa uumuun balaa ibiddaaf nama saaxila.

en: How do I calculate the total daily watt-hour usage for my home?
What is the difference between PWM and MPPT charge controllers?
How should I store solar batteries during the rainy season when sunlight is limited?
Change the engine oil every 50-100 hours of operation; dirty oil contains metal fragments that act like sandpaper, wearing down the engine's internal parts.
Clean the air filter regularly, especially in dusty Ethiopian farm environments; a clogged filter chokes the engine and leads to high fuel consumption.
Inspect the spark plug for carbon buildup; a dirty plug prevents efficient combustion, making the engine difficult to start and prone to stalling.
Drain the fuel tank or add a stabilizer if the engine will be unused for over a month; old fuel turns into a sticky 'gum' that clogs the carburetor.
Check for loose bolts and vibrations in water pumps and mills; excessive vibration can crack the engine housing or damage the drive belts.
Always use the correct fuel-to-oil ratio if using a 2-stroke engine; failing to mix oil with fuel will cause the engine to overheat and seize permanently.
am: በየ 50-100 ሰዓታት የሞተር ዘይት ይቀይሩ፤ የቆሸሸ ዘይት የሞተሩን የውስጥ ክፍሎች የሚጎዱ የብረት ፍርፋሪዎችን ሊይዝ ይችላል።
በተለይ አቧራማ በሆኑ አካባቢዎች የአየር ማጣሪያውን (filter) በየጊዜው ያፅዱ፤ የቆሸሸ ማጣሪያ አየር ስለሚከለክል ሞተሩ ብዙ ነዳጅ እንዲበላ ያደርገዋል።
ስፓርክ ፕለግ (spark plug) ላይ የከሰል ክምችት እንዳለ ይፈትሹ፤ የቆሸሸ ፕለግ ሞተሩ በቀላሉ እንዳይነሳ እና ስራ እንዲያቆም ሊያደርግ ይችላል።
ሞተሩ ከአንድ ወር በላይ የማይሰራ ከሆነ ነዳጁን ያፍስሱ፤ የቆየ ነዳጅ ካርቡሬተሩን የሚደፍን ተለጣፊ ነገር ይፈጥራል።
በውሃ ፓምፖች እና ወፍጮዎች ላይ የላላ ቦልት እና ንዝረት መኖሩን ያረጋግጡ፤ ከፍተኛ ንዝረት የሞተሩን አካል ሊሰነጣጥቅ ወይም ቀበቶውን ሊያበላሽ ይችላል።
ባለ 2-ስትሮክ (2-stroke) ሞተር የሚጠቀሙ ከሆነ ሁልጊዜ ትክክለኛውን የነዳጅ እና የዘይት ድብልቅ ይጠቀሙ፤ ነዳጅን ከዘይት ጋር ካልቀላቀሉ ሞተሩ ሊቃጠል ይችላል።
om: Sa'aatii hojii 50-100 gidduutti zayita mookaraa jijjiiraa; zayita xuraawaan kutaalee mookaraa keessoo jiran hatattamaan hixiirsa.
Bakka dhukkeen jiruutti 'air filter' yeroo hunda qulqulleessaa; filtariin cufame mookara kuffisuun boba'aa baay'ee akka fixu godha.
Isppaarkiilaagii (spark plug) to'adhaa; xuriin isppaarkiilaagii irratti kuufame mookarri akka hatattamaan hin kaane godha.
Mookarri ji'a tokkoo ol yoo hin hojjenne boba'aa keessaa dhangalaasaa; boba'aan ture 'carburetor' cufa.
Paampii bishaania fi mookara keessatti 'bolt' lallaafaan jiraachuu isaa to'adhaa; sosocho'iinsi garmalee mookara babbaqsuu danda'a.
Mookara '2-stroke' fayyadamtan yoo ta'e, boba'aa fi zayita madaalawaa makuu hin dagatinaa; boba'aa qofa naquun mookara ni gubba.

en: Why is white smoke coming out of my water pump's exhaust?
How do I clean a clogged carburetor without taking the whole engine apart?
What are the signs that my grain mill's drive belt needs to be replaced?
Build a symmetrical house layout (square or rectangular) rather than complex shapes; symmetrical buildings distribute earthquake forces more evenly.
Ensure the foundation is tied together as a single unit using grade beams; this prevents different parts of the house from shifting at different rates during a tremor.
Use vertical and horizontal reinforcement (steel rebars) within hollow concrete blocks or brick walls to create a 'frame' that holds the masonry together.
Maintain a high-quality mortar mix (typically 1:3 ratio of cement to sand); weak mortar is the primary cause of wall collapse during seismic activities.
Install 'ring beams' at the top of all walls before the roof is added; these act like a belt, holding the walls together and preventing them from leaning outward.
Avoid building heavy, unreinforced masonry chimneys or balconies, as these are the first parts to break away and cause injury during an earthquake.
am: ከተወሳሰቡ ቅርጾች ይልቅ የተመጣጠነ (አራት ማዕዘን) የቤት ፕላን ይጠቀሙ፤ የተመጣጠኑ ቤቶች የመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ ኃይልን በእኩል ያከፋፍላሉ።
የመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ በሚኖርበት ጊዜ የተለያዩ የቤት ክፍሎች በተለያየ ፍጥነት እንዳይናጉ የመሠረት ምሰሶዎችን (grade beams) በመጠቀም መሠረቱን አንድ ላይ አያይዘው ይገንቡ።
ግድግዳዎቹን አንድ ላይ አጥብቆ የሚይዝ 'ክፈፍ' ለመፍጠር በኮንክሪት ብሎኮች ወይም በጡብ ግድግዳዎች ውስጥ ቀጥ ያሉ እና አግዳሚ የብረት ማጠናከሪያዎችን (rebar) ይጠቀሙ።
ጥራት ያለው የሲሚንቶ እና አሸዋ ድብልቅ (1፡3) ይጠቀሙ፤ ደካማ ድብልቅ በመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ ወቅት ለግድግዳ መፈራረስ ዋና መንስኤ ነው።
ጣራው ከመጫኑ በፊት በሁሉም ግድግዳዎች ላይ 'ሪንግ ቢም' (ring beam) ይስሩ፤ ይህ እንደ ቀበቶ በመሆን ግድግዳዎቹን አንድ ላይ ይይዛቸዋል።
የብረት ማጠናከሪያ የሌላቸው ከባድ በረንዳዎችን ወይም ጭስ መውጫዎችን ከመገንባት ይቆጠቡ፤ ምክንያቱም በመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ ወቅት መጀመሪያ ተለይተው የሚወድቁት እነሱ ናቸው።
om: Dizayinii mana keessanii bifa koflee-afur wal-qixxee qabuun ijaaraa; manni bifa kanaan ijaarame dhiibbaa kirkira lafaa wal-qixa raabsa.
Hundeen manaa cimsamee walitti hidhamuu qaba; kunis yeroo kirkira lafaa kutaaleen manaa adda addaan akka hin sochoone godha.
Keessoo 'block' yookiin birikiitti shiboo sibiilaa (rebar) galchuun cimsitanii ijaaraa; kunis gilaalli sun akka hin jigne wal-qabsiisee qaba.
Makuu simentoo fi ashawaa qulqulluu (1:3) fayyadamaa; makuun laafaan sababa jalqabaa gilaalli kirkiraan akka jiguufi.
Utuu baaxii hin uffisin dura, gubbaa gilaalaa irratti 'ring beam' ijaaraa; kunis akka sabbataatti gilaala hunda walitti hidhee qaba.
Barandaa yookiin gubbaa manaatti wantoota ulfaatoo shiboo sibiilaa hin qabne ijaaruu irraa of eeggadhaa; isaan kun kirkiraan dafanii kufu.

en: Which regions in Ethiopia are at the highest risk for earthquakes?
Can I make a traditional mud-and-straw house earthquake-resistant?
How deep should a foundation be for a single-story stone house?
Grounding (earthing) provides a safe path for excess electricity to travel into the ground, preventing the metal casing of appliances from becoming live and shocking you.
A circuit breaker is a safety switch that automatically 'trips' or cuts off power when it detects an overload or a short circuit, preventing electrical fires.
Never bypass a circuit breaker or replace a fuse with a piece of wire; this removes the safety protection and can lead to the entire building burning down.
Install a Ground Fault Circuit Interrupter (GFCI) in areas with water, like kitchens and bathrooms, to instantly cut power if a leak to the ground is detected.
Inspect electrical cords for exposed wires or cracked insulation; bare wires touching each other cause short circuits and dangerous sparks.
Always use a copper rod driven deep into moist soil for your earthing system to ensure the electrical resistance is low enough to work correctly.
am: የመሬት ግንኙነት (earthing) ትርፍ ኤሌክትሪክ ወደ መሬት የሚፈስበት ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ መንገድ ይሰጣል፤ ይህም የቁሳቁሶች የብረት አካል ኤሌክትሪክ እንዳያስተላልፍ እና እንዳይመታዎት ይከላከላል።
ሰርኪዩት ብሬከር (Circuit breaker) የኤሌክትሪክ መጨናነቅ ወይም አጭር መቆራረጥ ሲያጋጥም ኤሌክትሪክን በራሱ የሚያጠፋ የደህንነት ማብሪያና ማጥፊያ ነው፤ ይህም የእሳት አደጋን ይከላከላል።
ሰርኪዩት ብሬከርን በሽቦ አይተኩት፤ ይህ የደህንነት መከላከያውን ስለሚያስቀር ህንፃው በኤሌክትሪክ አደጋ እንዲቃጠል ሊያደርግ ይችላል።
እንደ ኩሽና እና መታጠቢያ ቤት ባሉ ውሃ በሚኖርባቸው ቦታዎች የኤሌክትሪክ ፍሳሽ ካለ ኤሌክትሪክን ወዲያውኑ የሚያጠፋ GFCI የተባለ መሳሪያ ይግጠሙ።
የኤሌክትሪክ ሽቦዎች መላጣቸውን ወይም መበላሸታቸውን ያረጋግጡ፤ የተላጡ ሽቦዎች እርስ በርስ ሲነካኩ ለአጭር ሰርኪዩት እና ለአደገኛ ብልጭታ መንስኤ ይሆናሉ።
የመሬት ግንኙነት (earthing) ሲስተሙ በትክክል እንዲሰራ ሁልጊዜ እርጥብ አፈር ውስጥ ጠልቆ የገባ የመዳብ ዘንግ (copper rod) ይጠቀሙ።
om: Iirfimgiin (Earthing) anniisaa elektirikaa dabalataa gara lafaatti gadi lakkisuun meeshaaleen sibiilaa akka nama hin rurukkunne ittisa.
Saarkit bireekariin (Circuit breaker) yeroo elektirikaan garmalee baay'atu yookiin 'short circuit' uumamu ofumaan of dhangalaasa; kunis balaa ibiddaa ittisa.
Saarkit bireekarii shiboodhaan hin jijjiirinaa; kun balaa ibiddaa guddaa mana irratti fiduu danda'a.
Bakka bishaan jiru akka mana fincaanii keessatti meeshaa 'GFCI' jedhamu galchaa; kunis yoo bishaan elektirikaan wal-qunname hatattamaan elektirika dhaabsa.
Shiboowwan elektirikaa qunca'uu isaanii to'adhaa; shiboon qunca'ee wal-tuqu balaa guddaa fida.
Iirfingiin keessan sirriitti akka hojjatuuf, sibiila koopparii (copper rod) lafa jiidha qabu keessa gadi fageessanii dhaabuun murteessaadha.

en: Why do my lights flicker when I turn on a heavy appliance like a water heater?
What is the standard color code for grounding wires in Ethiopia?
How do I test if my home's earthing system is still working correctly?
If a computer is slow, check the Task Manager to see which programs are using the most RAM or CPU; closing unnecessary background apps often improves speed.
Overheating is a common cause of sudden PC shutdowns; ensure the cooling fans are clean and the air vents are not blocked by dust.
For smartphones that won't turn on, try a 'hard reset' by holding the power and volume buttons; this often fixes software freezes without losing data.
If a battery drains quickly, check for 'vampire apps' that run in the background or lower the screen brightness and disable GPS/Bluetooth when not in use.
Avoid using non-original chargers for smartphones; cheap chargers provide unstable voltage that can permanently damage the phone's internal power IC.
For computers that fail to start (Blue Screen), try booting in 'Safe Mode' to uninstall recently added drivers or software that might be causing conflicts.
am: ኮምፒዩተሩ ከዘገየ የትኞቹ ፕሮግራሞች ብዙ ራም (RAM) ወይም ሲፒዩ (CPU) እየተጠቀሙ እንደሆነ በታስክ ማናጀር (Task Manager) ይፈትሹ፤ የማያስፈልጉ ፕሮግራሞችን መዝጋት ፍጥነቱን ይጨምራል።
ኮምፒዩተር ድንገት እንዲጠፋ ከሚያደርጉ ምክንያቶች አንዱ ሙቀት ነው፤ የኮምፒዩተሩ ደጋፊ (fan) ንፁህ መሆኑን እና አየር መውጫው በአቧራ አለመደፈኑን ያረጋግጡ።
ስልክዎ እምቢ ካለ ፓወር (power) እና የድምፅ መጨመሪያ ቁልፎችን በአንድ ላይ በመጫን 'Hard reset' ያድርጉ፤ ይህ ብዙ ጊዜ ዳታ ሳይጠፋ ችግሩን ይፈታል።
ባትሪው በፍጥነት የሚያልቅ ከሆነ በስተጀርባ የሚሰሩ አፕሊኬሽኖችን ይዝጉ ወይም የስክሪን ብርሃኑን ይቀንሱ እንዲሁም ጂፒኤስ (GPS) እና ብሉቱዝ በማይጠቀሙበት ጊዜ ያጥፉ።
ለስልክዎ ኦሪጅናል ያልሆኑ ቻርጀሮችን አይጠቀሙ፤ ርካሽ ቻርጀሮች ወጥ ያልሆነ ቮልቴጅ ስለሚሰጡ የስልኩን የውስጥ ክፍል ሊያበላሹ ይችላሉ።
ኮምፒዩተሩ ሰማያዊ ስክሪን ካሳየ በ 'Safe Mode' በመክፈት በቅርብ የተጫኑ እና ችግር የፈጠሩ ሶፍትዌሮችን በማጥፋት ያስተካክሉ።
om: Kompiitariin yoo suuta deeme, 'Task Manager' irratti appiiwwan RAM baay'ee fixan cufaa; kun saffisa isaa ni dabala.
Ho'i garmalee kompiitara ofumaan dhaabsa; 'fan' qulqulleessuu fi dhukkeen akka hin haguugne to'adhaa.
Bilbilli yoo banamuu dide, 'Power' fi 'Volume' walitti qabuun 'Hard reset' godhaa; kunis utuu ragaan hin badin softiweerii sirreessa.
Baatiriin yoo dafee dhume, appiiwwan duuba hojjatan cufaa, ifa iskiriinii hir'isaa, akkasumas GPS fi Bluetooth cufaa.
Bilbilaaf chaarjara orijinaala hin taane hin fayyadaminaa; chaarjarri gatii xiqqaa elektirika wal-fakkaataa hin qabneen bilbila ni balleessa.
Kompiitariin yoo iskiriinii cuquliisa (Blue Screen) agarsiise, 'Safe Mode' tiin banuun softiweerii dhihoo galchan balleessaa.

en: What is the difference between an SSD and an HDD in terms of speed and reliability?
How can I recover data from a damaged USB flash drive?
Why is my smartphone getting very hot while charging?
The FDRE Constitution (Article 41) grants every Ethiopian citizen the right to access education, which is essential for personal growth and national development.
The government is obligated to provide free primary education to ensure that every child, regardless of economic status, has the opportunity to learn.
Education must be accessible without discrimination based on gender, religion, or ethnic background, promoting a culture of equality and inclusion.
The state has the duty to eliminate illiteracy by expanding educational facilities and ensuring quality standards across all regions of Ethiopia.
Parents have the ethical responsibility to send their children to school, as education is the most effective tool for breaking the cycle of poverty.
Constitutional rights also protect the right to be taught in one's mother tongue in primary schools to ensure better comprehension and cultural preservation.
am: የኢፌዴሪ ሕገ-መንግሥት (አንቀጽ 41) ለማንኛውም ኢትዮጵያዊ ዜጋ ለግል ዕድገትና ለሀገር ልማት ወሳኝ የሆነውን ትምህርት የማግኘት መብት ይሰጣል።
መንግሥት እያንዳንዱ ሕፃን የኢኮኖሚ ሁኔታው ሳይገደበው የመማር ዕድል እንዲኖረው ነፃ የመጀመሪያ ደረጃ ትምህርት የመስጠት ግዴታ አለበት።
ትምህርት በጾታ፣ በሃይማኖት ወይም በብሔር ሳይለይ ለሁሉም በእኩልነት እና ያለ አድልዎ ተደራሽ መሆን አለበት።
መንግሥት የትምህርት ተቋማትን በማስፋፋት እና በሁሉም የኢትዮጵያ ክልሎች የጥራት ደረጃን በማረጋገጥ መሃይምነትን የማጥፋት ግዴታ አለበት።
ትምህርት ድህነትን ለማጥፋት ዋነኛው መሳሪያ በመሆኑ ወላጆች ልጆቻቸውን ወደ ትምህርት ቤት የመላክ የሞራል ግዴታ አለባቸው።
የሕገ-መንግሥታዊ መብቶች የተሻለ ግንዛቤ እንዲኖር እና ባህል እንዲጠበቅ ሲባል በመጀመሪያ ደረጃ ትምህርት ቤቶች በአፍ መፍቻ ቋንቋ የመማር መብትን ያከብራሉ።
om: Heerri mootummaa Itoophiyaa (Keeyyata 41) lammiin Itoophiyaa hundi mirga barumsaa guddina dhuunfaa fi biyyaatiif murteessaa ta'e akka argatu ni heyyama.
Mootummaan mucaan hundi, haalli dinagdee isaa utuu hin daangessin, akka baratuuf barumsa bu'uuraa bilisaan kennuuf dirqama qaba.
Barumsi saalaan, amantiin yookiin sanyiin utuu addaan hin qoodamin hundaaf wal-qixa dhaqqabamaa ta'uu qaba.
Mootummaan manneen barumsaa babal'isuu fi qulqullina isaa eeguun wallaalummaa dhabamsiisuuf itti-gaafatamummaa qaba.
Barumsi hiyyummaa balleessuuf meeshaa guddaa waan ta'eef, warri ijoollee isaanii gara mana barumsaa erguuf dirqama naamusaa qabu.
Heerri mootummaa hubannaa gaarii fi aadaa eeguuf jecha manneen barumsaa sadarkaa jalqabaatti afaan dhalootaan barachuuf mirga ni kenna.

en: What are the specific articles in the constitution regarding women's right to education?
How can a community request the opening of a new primary school in their Kebele?
What is the difference between private and public educational rights in Ethiopia?
Digital privacy means having control over your personal information and how it is collected and used by websites and apps.
Use strong, unique passwords for every account and enable two-factor authentication (2FA) to add an extra layer of security against hackers.
Be cautious about what you share on social media; information like your home address or bank details can be used by scammers for identity theft.
Understand 'Terms of Service' before clicking agree; many apps collect your location and contact list to sell to third-party advertisers.
Never click on suspicious links in text messages or emails (phishing), as these are often designed to steal your login credentials or install viruses.
Ethically, respect the privacy of others by not sharing their photos or personal messages without their explicit permission.
am: ዲጂታል ግላዊነት ማለት ስለ ግል መረጃዎ ቁጥጥር እንዲኖርዎት እና መረጃዎ በድረ-ገጾች እና አፕሊኬሽኖች እንዴት እንደሚሰበሰብ እና ጥቅም ላይ እንደሚውል ማወቅ ማለት ነው።
ለእያንዳንዱ አካውንት ጠንካራ የሚስጥር ቁጥር ይጠቀሙ እና ከጠላፊዎች (hackers) ተጨማሪ ጥበቃ ለማግኘት ባለ ሁለት ደረጃ ማረጋገጫን (2FA) ያብሩ።
በማህበራዊ ሚዲያ ላይ በሚያጋሯቸው ነገሮች ላይ ጥንቃቄ ያድርጉ፤ እንደ ቤት አድራሻ ወይም የባንክ ዝርዝሮች ያሉ መረጃዎች በአጭበርባሪዎች ጥቅም ላይ ሊውሉ ይችላሉ።
ማንኛውንም አፕሊኬሽን ከመጠቀምዎ በፊት መመሪያዎቹን ያንብቡ፤ ብዙ አፕሊኬሽኖች የእርስዎን ቦታ እና የስልክ ቁጥሮች ዝርዝር ለሌሎች ለማስተላለፍ ሊሰበስቡ ይችላሉ።
በቴክስት ወይም በኢሜይል የሚላኩ አጠራጣሪ ሊንኮችን በፍጹም አይክፈቱ፤ እነዚህ ብዙውን ጊዜ የእርስዎን የሚስጥር ቁጥር ለመስረቅ ወይም ቫይረስ ለመላክ የተሰሩ ናቸው።
የሌሎችን ሰዎች ፎቶ ወይም የግል መልእክት ያለፈቃዳቸው ባለማጋራት የሌሎችን ግላዊነት ማክበር የሞራል ግዴታ ነው።
om: Icciitii dijitaalaa jechuun odeeffannoo dhuunfaa keessan irratti to'annoo qabaachuu fi akkamitti weebsaayitootaan akka sassaabamu beekuudha.
Lakkoofsa icciitii (password) jabaa fayyadamaa; akkasumas hattoota irraa eeguuf mallattoo 'two-factor authentication' (2FA) banadhaa.
Miidiyaa hawaasaa irratti waan maxxansitan of-eeggannoon ilaalaa; teessoo manaa yookiin herrega baankii namoonni hamoon isin jalaa hatuuf itti fayyadamuu danda'u.
Appiiwwan hedduun bakka isin jirtanii fi lakkoofsa bilbilaa keessan beeksisoo birootti gurguruuf sassaabu; kanaaf seera isaanii dubbisaa.
Liinkiiwwan shakkisoo ergaa gabaabaan dhufan hin baninaa; isaan kun yeroo baay'ee icciitii keessan hatuuf yookiin vaayirasii erguuf qophaa'u.
Fakkii yookiin ergaa nama biraa utuu hayyama hin gaafatin maxxansuu dhiisuun naamusaa fi icciitii namaa kabajuudha.

en: How do I clear my digital footprint and cookies from a web browser?
What should I do if my Facebook account has been hacked?
Are there specific laws in Ethiopia regarding data protection and cybercrime?
To start a business legally, you must first decide on the business form (e.g., Sole Proprietorship, PLC, or Cooperative).
Obtain a Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN) from the Ministry of Revenues; this is a legal requirement for all businesses in Ethiopia.
Register your business name and apply for a commercial license at the local Woreda or City Trade Office to ensure you operate within the law.
For cooperatives, at least 10 members are usually required, and you must submit a signed 'By-law' outlining how the group will be governed.
Provide proof of business capital and a valid office or land address as part of the registration documentation requirements.
Operating legally protects you from heavy fines and allows you to access government loans, participate in tenders, and export goods.
am: የንግድ ስራን በህጋዊ መንገድ ለመጀመር መጀመሪያ የንግድ ስራውን አይነት መወሰን አለብዎት (ለምሳሌ የግል፣ የኃላፊነቱ የተወሰነ የግል ማህበር ወይም ህብረት ስራ ማህበር)።
ከገቢዎች ሚኒስቴር የታክስ ከፋይ መለያ ቁጥር (TIN) ያውጡ፤ ይህ በኢትዮጵያ ውስጥ ለሚገኙ ለሁሉም የንግድ ድርጅቶች ህጋዊ ግዴታ ነው።
ህጋዊ መሆንዎን ለማረጋገጥ የንግድ ስምዎን ያስመዝግቡ እና በአከባቢዎ ወረዳ ወይም የከተማ ንግድ ጽሕፈት ቤት የንግድ ፈቃድ ያውጡ።
ለህብረት ስራ ማህበራት ቢያንስ 10 አባላት የሚያስፈልጉ ሲሆን ማህበሩ እንዴት እንደሚመራ የሚገልጽ የተፈረመ 'መተዳደሪያ ደንብ' ማቅረብ አለብዎት።
እንደ ምዝገባ ሰነድ የምዝገባ መስፈርት አካል የንግድ መነሻ ካፒታል እና ህጋዊ የቢሮ ወይም የመሬት አድራሻ ማረጋገጫ ያቅርቡ።
በህጋዊ መንገድ መስራት ከፍተኛ ቅጣትን ከመከላከል ባለፈ የመንግስት ብድር ለማግኘት፣ በጨረታዎች ለመሳተፍ እና ምርቶችን ወደ ውጭ ለመላክ ያስችላል።
om: Daldala seeraan jalqabuuf, jalqaba gosa daldalaa (dhuunfaa, PLC yookiin waldaa hojii gamtaa) ta'uu isaa murteessuu qabdu.
Ministeera Galiiwwanii irraa lakkoofsa TIN fudhadhaa; kun Itoophiyaa keessatti daldala hundaaf dirqama seeraati.
Maqaa daldala keessanii galmeessisuun biiroo daldalaa aanaa yookiin magaalaa irraa heyyama daldalaa (license) baafadhaa.
Waldaalee hojii gamtaatiif miseensota yoo xiqqaate 10 barbaachisu; akkasumas seera ittiin bulmaata maallaqa sanaa mallatteessanii dhiyeessuu qabu.
Ragaalee galmeessisuuf kaappitaala daldalaa fi teessoo biiroo yookiin lafaa ragaa dhiyeessuu barbaachisa.
Seeraan hojjachuun adabbii jabaa irraa nama eega; akkasumas liqii mootummaa argachuufi caalbaasii irratti hirmaachuuf nama gargaara.

en: What is the cost of a commercial business license in Ethiopia?
How often do I need to renew my business license?
Can a small farmer register as a cooperative to access better market prices?
The Ethiopian Labor Proclamation (No. 1156/2019) ensures that workers are treated fairly and are protected from exploitation.
Workers are entitled to a fair wage as agreed in their contract, and the law limits the regular working week to 48 hours.
Employers have a legal duty to provide a safe working environment and necessary protective equipment to prevent accidents and health issues.
Employees have the right to join or form labor unions to collectively negotiate for better conditions and higher pay.
Forced labor and child labor are strictly prohibited under both national and international law to protect human dignity and childhood development.
Discrimination in hiring or wages based on gender, religion, or ethnicity is illegal; equal work deserves equal pay.
am: የኢትዮጵያ የሰራተኛ አዋጅ (ቁጥር 1156/2011) ሰራተኞች በፍትሃዊነት እንዲያዙ እና ከብዝበዛ እንዲጠበቁ ያረጋግጣል።
ሰራተኞች በውላቸው ላይ በተስማሙት መሰረት ፍትሃዊ ደመወዝ የማግኘት መብት አላቸው፤ ህጉም መደበኛ የስራ ሰዓት በሳምንት 48 ሰዓት እንዲሆን ይገድባል።
አሰሪዎች አደጋዎችን እና የጤና ችግሮችን ለመከላከል ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ የስራ አካባቢ እና አስፈላጊ የመከላከያ መሳሪያዎችን የማቅረብ ህጋዊ ግዴታ አለባቸው።
ሰራተኞች ለተሻለ ሁኔታ እና ደመወዝ በጋራ ለመደራደር በሰራተኛ ማህበራት የመደራጀት መብት አላቸው።
የሰውን ክብር እና የህፃናትን እድገት ለመጠበቅ ሲባል በግዳጅ ስራ ማሰራት እና የህፃናት ጉልበት ብዝበዛ በሀገር አቀፍም ሆነ በዓለም አቀፍ ህግ በጥብቅ የተከለከለ ነው።
በጾታ፣ በሃይማኖት ወይም በብሔር ምክንያት በቅጥር ወይም በደመወዝ ላይ አድልዎ ማድረግ ህገ-ወጥ ነው፤ እኩል ስራ እኩል ክፍያ ይገባዋል።
om: Labsii Hojjetaa fi Hojjechiisaa Itoophiyaa (Lak. 1156/2011) hojjetaan haala haqaan akka qabamuufi cunqursaa irraa akka eegamu godha.
Hojjetaan mindaa haqaa waliigaltee irratti ibsame argachuuf mirga qaba; seerri sa'aatii hojii torbanitti sa'aatii 48 qofa akka ta'u daangessa.
Hojjechiisoonni balaa irraa eeguuf bakka hojii mijataa fi meeshaalee of-eeggannoo dhiyeessuuf dirqama seeraa qabu.
Hojjettoonni mirga isaaniif mormuuf waldaa hojjattootaa hundeeffachuuf mirga qabu.
Namummaa kabajuufi guddina ijoolleetiif jecha, hojii humnaa fi ijoollee hojjechiisuun seeraan dhowwamaadha.
Saalaan yookiin amantiin addaan qooduun mindaa kennuun dhowwamaadha; hojii wal-qixaaf mindaa wal-qixaa kaffalamuun qaba.

en: How can a worker file a formal complaint if their labor rights are violated?
What are the rules regarding paid leave and maternity leave in Ethiopia?
Does the labor law apply to temporary or seasonal agricultural workers?
Environmental law provides a framework for protecting natural resources; in Ethiopia, the environment is seen as a collective heritage of all citizens.
Every citizen has the constitutional right to live in a clean and healthy environment, but also the duty to protect it from damage.
It is illegal to dump chemicals or waste into rivers and lakes, as this poisons water for humans, livestock, and downstream communities.
Protection of the soil from erosion through terracing and reforestation is not just a farm practice but a civic duty to prevent land degradation.
Industrial and construction projects are legally required to conduct an 'Environmental Impact Assessment' before they start to minimize damage.
Individuals and companies that cause environmental damage can be held legally liable and forced to pay for the restoration of the damaged area.
am: የአካባቢ ጥበቃ ህግ የተፈጥሮ ሀብትን ለመጠበቅ የሚያስችል መዋቅር ይሰጣል፤ በኢትዮጵያ አካባቢ የሁሉም ዜጎች የጋራ ቅርስ ተደርጎ ይታያል።
እያንዳንዱ ዜጋ በንፁህ እና ጤናማ አካባቢ የመኖር ህገ-መንግስታዊ መብት አለው፤ ነገር ግን አካባቢውን ከጉዳት የመጠበቅ ግዴታም አለበት።
ኬሚካሎችን ወይም ቆሻሻዎችን ወደ ወንዞች እና ሀይቆች መጣል ህገ-ወጥ ነው፤ ምክንያቱም ለሰዎች፣ ለእንስሳት እና ለታችኛው ተፋሰስ ማህበረሰቦች ውሃውን ይመርዛል።
በእርከን ስራ እና በደን ልማት አማካኝነት አፈርን ከመሸርሸር መጠበቅ የእርሻ ስራ ብቻ ሳይሆን የአፈር መሸርሸርን ለመከላከል የዜግነት ግዴታ ነው።
የኢንዱስትሪ እና የኮንስትራክሽን ፕሮጀክቶች ጉዳትን ለመቀነስ ስራ ከመጀመራቸው በፊት 'የአካባቢ ተፅእኖ ግምገማ' እንዲያካሂዱ በህግ ይጠየቃሉ።
በአካባቢ ላይ ጉዳት የሚያደርሱ ግለሰቦች እና ኩባንያዎች በህግ ተጠያቂ ሊሆኑ እና የተጎዳውን አካባቢ መልሶ ለማልማት እንዲከፍሉ ሊገደዱ ይችላሉ።
om: Seerri naannoo qabeenya uumamaa eeguuf gargaara; Itoophiyaa keessatti naannoon qabeenya waloo lammiilee hundaati.
Lammiin hundi naannoo qulqulluu keessa jiraachuuf mirga qaba; garuu naannoo sana miidhaa irraa eeguuf dirqama qaba.
Keemikaala yookiin xurii lagaa fi haroo keessatti gatuun seeraan dhowwamaadha; kun bishaan namaa fi loonii summeessa.
Biyyee dhiqannaa irraa eeguun hojii qonnaa qofa utuu hin taane dirqama lammummaati.
Warshaaleen hojii jalqabuun dura 'Environmental Impact Assessment' hojjachuuf dirqama seeraa qabu.
Namni yookiin dhaabbanni naannoo miidhe seeraan gaafatamaa ta'a; akkasumas naannoo sana deebisanii ijaaruuf kaffaltii kaffaluuf dirqamu.

en: How can I report a company that is polluting a local river?
What are the penalties for illegal deforestation in Ethiopia?
Are there incentives for farmers who adopt soil conservation practices?
DNA is shaped like a twisted ladder called a 'double helix,' which efficiently packs large amounts of genetic information into a tiny space.
The ladder's sides are made of sugar and phosphate, while the rungs consist of four nitrogen bases: Adenine, Thymine, Guanine, and Cytosine.
Base pairing is specific: Adenine always pairs with Thymine, and Guanine always pairs with Cytosine, ensuring accurate copying during cell division.
DNA acts as a biological library, containing the precise instructions needed to build and operate every protein in the human body.
A 'gene' is a specific segment of DNA that determines a particular trait, such as the color of a coffee berry or the height of a person.
During reproduction, DNA is passed from parents to offspring, which is why children inherit physical characteristics and even certain health traits.
am: ዲኤንኤ (DNA) 'ድርብ ሄሊክስ' የሚባል የተጠማዘዘ መሰላል ቅርጽ አለው፤ ይህም ከፍተኛ መጠን ያለው የዘር መረጃ በትንሽ ቦታ ውስጥ እንዲያዝ ያስችላል።
የመሰላሉ ጎኖች ከስኳር እና ፎስፌት የተሰሩ ሲሆኑ፣ እርከኖቹ ደግሞ አራት የናይትሮጅን መሰረቶች (A, T, G, C) ናቸው።
የመሰረቶቹ ጥምረት የተወሰነ ነው፡ አዴኒን ከታይሚን ጋር፣ እንዲሁም ጉዋኒን ከሳይቶሲን ጋር ሁልጊዜ ይጣመራሉ፤ ይህም መረጃው እንዳይሳሳት ያደርጋል።
ዲኤንኤ እንደ ባዮሎጂካል ቤተ-መጽሐፍት ያገለግላል፤ ይህም በሰውነታችን ውስጥ ያሉ ፕሮቲኖችን ለመገንባት የሚያስፈልጉ ትክክለኛ መመሪያዎችን ይዟል።
ጂን (Gene) ማለት አንድን የተወሰነ ባህሪ የሚወስን የዲኤንኤ ክፍል ነው፤ ለምሳሌ የቡና ፍሬ ቀለምን ወይም የሰውን ቁመት።
በመራባት ወቅት ዲኤንኤ ከወላጆች ወደ ልጆች ይተላለፋል፤ ለዚህም ነው ልጆች የአካል ገጽታን እና የጤና ሁኔታዎችን ከወላጆቻቸው የሚወርሱት።
om: DNA'n bifa 'double helix' jedhamuun kan ijaarame yoo ta'u, ragaa jeneetikii baay'ee bakka dhiphaa keessa kaa'uuf gargaara.
Moggaaan DNA sukkaaraa fi fosfeetii irraa yoo ijaaramu, gidduun isaa kutaalee naayitiroojiinii afur (A, T, G, C) irraa ijaarame.
Wal-fudhannaan kutaalee kanaa murtaa'aadha: 'Adenine' yeroo hunda 'Thymine' wajjin, 'Guanine' immoo 'Cytosine' wajjin wal-qabatu.
DNA'n akka kuusaa kitaaba baayoloojiikaalaatti tajaajila; kunis akkamitti pirootiniin qaama keenyaa akka ijaaramu ajaja kenna.
Jiiniin (Gene) kutaa DNA amala tokko murteessudha; fakkeenyaaf bifa ija bunaa yookiin dheerina namaa murteessa.
Yeroo wal-hormaataa, DNA'n warra irraa gara ijoolleetti darba; ijoolleen amala dhalootaa kan warra isaanii kan fakkatan kanaafi.

en: How does a mutation in the DNA sequence affect an organism?
What is the difference between DNA and RNA in a cell?
How can scientists use DNA to identify relationships between different plant species?
Carbon is the building block of life; the carbon cycle describes how it moves between the atmosphere, soil, plants, and animals.
During photosynthesis, plants take in carbon dioxide (CO2) from the air and use sunlight to turn it into sugar and oxygen.
Animals consume plants to get energy, and through cellular respiration, they release CO2 back into the atmosphere as a byproduct.
When plants and animals die, decomposers like bacteria break down their bodies, returning carbon to the soil to nourish new life.
Some carbon is stored deep underground for millions of years, turning into fossil fuels like coal and oil.
Human activities, such as burning forests and fossil fuels, release stored carbon too quickly, contributing to global climate change.
am: ካርቦን የሕይወት መሠረት ነው፤ የካርቦን ዑደት ደግሞ ካርቦን በአየር፣ በአፈር፣ በተክሎች እና በእንስሳት መካከል እንዴት እንደሚዘዋወር ይገልጻል።
በፎቶሲንተሲስ ወቅት ተክሎች ካርቦን ዳይኦክሳይድን (CO2) ከአየር ወስደው በፀሐይ ብርሃን አማካኝነት ወደ ስኳር እና ኦክስጅን ይለውጡታል።
እንስሳት ተክሎችን በመመገብ ጉልበት ያገኛሉ፤ ከዚያም በመተንፈስ ሂደት ካርቦን ዳይኦክሳይድን ወደ አየር መልሰው ይለቃሉ።
ተክሎች እና እንስሳት ሲሞቱ ባክቴሪያዎች አካላቸውን በመሰባበር ካርቦኑን ወደ አፈር በመመለስ ለአዳዲስ ተክሎች ምግብ እንዲሆን ያደርጋሉ።
አንዳንድ ካርቦን ለብዙ ሚሊዮን ዓመታት ከመሬት በታች በመከማቸት ወደ ድንጋይ ከሰል እና ነዳጅነት ይለወጣል።
እንደ ደን መጨፍጨፍ እና ነዳጅ ማቃጠል ያሉ የሰው ልጆች ተግባራት የተከማቸውን ካርቦን በፍጥነት ወደ አየር በመልቀቅ ለአየር ንብረት ለውጥ መንስኤ ይሆናሉ።
om: Kaarbooniin bu'uura jireenyaati; naanna'insa kaarboonii jechuun akkamitti kaarbooniin qilleensa, biyyee, biqiltuu fi beeylada gidduu deemuudha.
Adeemsa footoosintizisii keessatti, biqiltoonni kaarboon-daay-oksaayidii xuuxuun ifa aduutiin gara sukkaaraa fi oksiijiiniitti jijjiiru.
Beeyladoonni biqiltuu soorachuun humna argatu; yeroo hargansuu immoo kaarboon-daay-oksaayidii gara qilleensaatti deebisu.
Yeroo biqiltuun yookiin beeyladni du'an, baakteriyaaleen isaan rimeessuun kaarboonii sana gara biyyee deebisuun biqiltuu haaraaf soorata ta'a.
Kaarbooniin tokko tokko waggoota miliyoonaan lafa jala kuufamuun gara boba'aa uumamaatti (fossil fuels) jijjiirama.
Gochaaleen namaa, kan akka bosona gubuu fi boba'aa fayyadamuu, kaarboonii kuufame hatattamaan gara qilleensaatti gatuun jijjiirama qilleensaaf sababa ta'a.

en: How do oceans help in absorbing excess carbon from the atmosphere?
What is the role of volcanic eruptions in the carbon cycle?
How can planting more trees help balance the amount of carbon in the air?
Fermentation is an anaerobic process, meaning microorganisms break down sugars to produce energy without using oxygen.
Yeast, a type of fungus, consumes sugar to produce carbon dioxide and ethanol; the gas makes bread and injera rise by creating bubbles.
Lactic acid bacteria turn sugars into acid, which gives traditional foods like 'Ergo' and fermented sourdough their distinct sour taste.
In Ethiopia, 'Ersho' is a natural starter culture containing both wild yeast and bacteria that drive the multi-day fermentation of teff dough.
This process acts as a natural preservative because the resulting acidity prevents the growth of harmful, food-spoiling bacteria.
Fermented foods are often easier to digest and contain probiotics, which improve gut health and strengthen the human immune system.
am: መቦካት (Fermentation) ኦክስጅን በሌለበት ሁኔታ ጥቃቅን ተህዋሲያን ስኳርን በመሰባበር ኃይል የሚያመነጩበት ሂደት ነው።
እርሾ (Yeast) ስኳርን በመመገብ ካርቦን ዳይኦክሳይድ ያመነጫል፤ ይህ ጋዝ በሊጡ ውስጥ አረፋ በመፍጠር ዳቦ እና እንጀራ እንዲነፉ ያደርጋል።
ላክቲክ አሲድ ባክቴሪያዎች ስኳርን ወደ አሲድ ይለውጣሉ፤ ይህም እንደ እርጎ እና ለቦካ እንጀራ ልዩ የሆነውን ኮምጣጣ ጣዕም ይሰጣል።
በኢትዮጵያ 'እርሾ' ለጤፍ ሊጥ መቦካት የሚያገለግሉ የተፈጥሮ እርሾዎችን እና ባክቴሪያዎችን የያዘ የመነሻ ውህድ ነው።
ይህ ሂደት እንደ ተፈጥሮ መከላከያ ያገለግላል፤ የሚፈጠረው አሲድ ምግብ የሚያበላሹ ጎጂ ባክቴሪያዎች እንዳያድጉ ይከላከላል።
የቦኩ ምግቦች በቀላሉ ለመፈጨት የሚረዱ ከመሆኑም በላይ ለሆድ ጤንነት እና ለበሽታ መከላከል አቅም ጠቃሚ የሆኑ ተህዋሲያንን (probiotics) ይይዛሉ።
om: Bukaayuun (Fermentation) adeemsa oksiijiinii malee jarmiileen sukkaara diiguun humna itti maddisiisaniidha.
Iirshon (Yeast) sukkaara soorachuun kaarboon-daay-oksaayidii uuma; gaasiin kun immoo akka buddeennii fi daaboon ol-ka'u godha.
Baakteriyaan 'Lactic acid' sukkaara gara asiidiitti jijjiiru; kunis akka itittuun (Ergo) fi bukoon mi'aa dhangaggaa'aa qabaatan godha.
Itoophiyaa keessatti 'Ershon' madda iirshoo uumamaa fi baakteriyaa bukoon xaafee akka bukaayu godhuudha.
Adeemsi kun nyaanni akka hin banne ittisa; asiidiin uumamu baakteriyaa nyaata balleessan akka hin rimeenyne dhorka.
Nyaanni bukaaye garaa keessatti salphaatti bulla'a; akkasumas dandeettii dhibee ittisuu qaamaa jabeessa.

en: Why does teff require a longer fermentation time than other grains?
What is the difference between alcoholic and lactic acid fermentation?
Can fermentation improve the nutritional value of low-quality grains?
Bacteria are complex, single-celled living organisms that can survive on their own in soil, water, or the human body.
Viruses are much smaller and are not considered fully 'alive' because they require a living host cell to replicate and survive.
Antibiotics are only effective against bacterial infections; they work by attacking the cell walls or reproductive machinery of bacteria.
Viruses cannot be killed by antibiotics; viral infections like the flu or COVID-19 are managed through vaccines and antiviral medications.
While some bacteria cause diseases like TB, many are 'good bacteria' that live in our gut and help us digest food and stay healthy.
Vaccines train the immune system to recognize both specific viruses and bacteria, preventing severe illness before an infection starts.
am: ባክቴሪያዎች በአፈር፣ በውሃ ወይም በሰው አካል ውስጥ በራሳቸው ሊኖሩ የሚችሉ ውስብስብ ባለአንድ ሴል ህይወት ያላቸው ፍጥረታት ናቸው።
ቫይረሶች በጣም ጥቃቅን ናቸው፤ ለመራባት እና ለመኖር ህይወት ያለው የሰውነት ሴል ስለሚፈልጉ ሙሉ በሙሉ 'ህይወት አላቸው' አይባሉም።
አንቲባዮቲኮች የሚሰሩት በባክቴሪያ ለሚመጡ በሽታዎች ብቻ ነው፤ የባክቴሪያን የሴል ግድግዳ ወይም የመራቢያ አካል በማጥቃት ይገድሏቸዋል።
ቫይረሶች በአንቲባዮቲክ አይሞቱም፤ እንደ ጉንፋን ያሉ የቫይረስ በሽታዎች በክትባት እና በፀረ-ቫይረስ መድሃኒቶች ይታከማሉ።
ምንም እንኳን አንዳንድ ባክቴሪያዎች እንደ ቲቢ ያሉ በሽታዎችን ቢያመጡም፣ ብዙዎቹ ግን በሆዳችን ውስጥ የሚኖሩ እና ለምግብ መፈጨት የሚረዱ 'ጥሩ ባክቴሪያዎች' ናቸው።
ክትባቶች በሽታ የመከላከል ስርዓታችን ቫይረሶችን እና ባክቴሪያዎችን ለይቶ እንዲያውቅ በማሰልጠን በሽታው ሳይይዘን እንድንከላከል ይረዳሉ።
om: Baakteriyaaleen lubbu-qabeeyyii seel-tokkee yoo ta'an, biyyee, bishaan yookiin qaama namaa keessa jiraachuu danda'u.
Vaayiraasoliin baay'ee xixinnoo dha; ofumaan wal-horuu waan hin dandeenyeef seelii namaa irratti hirkatu.
Qorichi 'Antibiotics' jedhamu baakteriyaa qofa ajjeesa; kutaalee baakteriyaa miidhuun dhibee sana dhaabsa.
Vaayiraasiin 'Antibiotics' dhaan hin ajjeefamu; dhibeewwan akka qufaa vaayiraasiin dhufan talaallii fi qoricha vaayiraasiin to'atamu.
Baakteriyaan tokko tokko akka TB dhibee fidu; garuu hedduun isaanii garaa keenya keessa jiraatanii bullaa'insa nyaataa gargaaru.
Talaalliin qaama keenya akka vaayiraasii fi baakteriyaa adda baasee lolu barsiisa; kunis utuu hin dhukkubsatin dura ittisa.

en: Why is it dangerous to take antibiotics for a viral cold?
How do bacteria exchange DNA to develop resistance to drugs?
What are the main shapes of bacteria found in medical science?
The nervous system is the body's communication network, composed of the brain, spinal cord, and billions of specialized cells called neurons.
A neuron has three main parts: dendrites that receive signals, a cell body, and a long axon that sends signals away.
Signals travel along an axon as an electrical impulse called an 'action potential,' moving at speeds up to 100 meters per second.
When the signal reaches the end of an axon, it must cross a tiny gap called a synapse to reach the next neuron.
Because electricity cannot jump the gap, the neuron releases chemicals called neurotransmitters to carry the message across the synapse.
This rapid transmission allows you to react instantly, such as pulling your hand away from a hot stove before you even feel the pain.
am: የነርቭ ሥርዓት የሰውነታችን የመገናኛ መረብ ሲሆን ከአእምሮ፣ ከአከርካሪ አጥንት ነርቭ እና ቢሊዮን ከሚቆጠሩ 'ኒውሮን' ከሚባሉ ሴሎች የተገነባ ነው።
አንድ ኒውሮን ሶስት ዋና ክፍሎች አሉት፡ መረጃ የሚቀበሉ 'ዴንድራይትስ'፣ የሴል አካል እና መረጃን የሚያስተላልፍ ረጅም 'አክሰን'።
መልዕክቶች በአክሰን ውስጥ እንደ ኤሌክትሪክ ግፊት ይጓዛሉ፤ ይህም በሰከንድ እስከ 100 ሜትር በሚደርስ ፍጥነት ይንቀሳቀሳል።
መልዕክቱ የአክሰን መጨረሻ ላይ ሲደርስ፣ ወደ ሚቀጥለው ኒውሮን ለመሻገር 'ሲናፕስ' የሚባል ጥቃቅን ክፍተት ማለፍ አለበት።
ኤሌክትሪኩ ክፍተቱን መዝለል ስለማይችል፣ ኒውሮኑ 'ኒውሮትራንስሚተር' የተባሉ ኬሚካሎችን በመልቀቅ መልዕክቱን ያሻግራል።
ይህ ፈጣን ስርጭት ለአደጋዎች አፋጣኝ ምላሽ እንድንሰጥ ያስችለናል፤ ለምሳሌ ህመሙ ሳይሰማን እጃችንን ከሚፋጅ ነገር ላይ በፍጥነት እንድናነሳ።
om: Sirni narvii madda qunnamtii qaamaati; sammuu, mi'a dugdaa fi seelota biiliyoonaan lakkaawwaman 'neurons' irraa ijaarame.
Niyurooniin kutaalee sadii qaba: 'dendrites' ergaa fudhatan, qaama seelii fi 'axon' dheeraa ergaa dabarsu.
Ergaan 'axon' keessa akka elektirikaatti deema; kunis seekondii tokko keessatti meetira 100 fiiga.
Ergaan sun dhuma 'axon' yoo ga'u, niyuroonii itti aanu bira ga'uuf uuraa xiqqoo 'synapse' jedhamu ce'uu qaba.
Elektirikiin uuraa sana utaaluu waan hin dandeenyeef, niyurooniin sun keemikaala 'neurotransmitter' jedhamu gadi lakkisuun ergaa dabarsa.
Saffisni kun hatattamaan akka nuti tarkaanfii fudhannu godha; fakkeenyaaf utuu ho'i isin hin gubiniin dura harkaa keessan ibidda irraa fuutu.

en: How does the myelin sheath help in speeding up nerve signals?
What is the difference between the Central and Peripheral nervous systems?
How do drugs or toxins interfere with neurotransmitters in the synapse?
Transitioning from exporting raw green coffee beans to roasted and packaged products allows Ethiopia to capture a higher percentage of the final retail price.
Establishing traceability systems and geographical indications (like Sidama or Yirgacheffe) protects the brand and allows for premium pricing in the global market.
Investing in local oilseed crushing facilities reduces the export of raw sesame and provides high-quality edible oil for the domestic market, substituting expensive imports.
Value addition requires strict adherence to international quality standards (ISO) and sanitary/phyto-sanitary (SPS) regulations to minimize rejection rates at borders.
Aggregating smallholder production into cooperatives creates the volume needed to negotiate directly with international buyers, bypassing unnecessary middlemen.
Developing distinct branding for Ethiopian oilseeds highlights their unique organic properties, making them more competitive against mass-produced varieties.
am: ጥሬ የቡና ፍሬዎችን ወደ ውጭ ከመላክ ይልቅ ቆልቶና አሽጎ መላክ ኢትዮጵያ ከችርቻሮ ሽያጭ የምታገኘውን ድርሻ በእጅጉ ይጨምራል።
የመከታተያ ዘዴዎችን (traceability) እና የአካባቢ መለያዎችን (እንደ ሲዳማ ወይም ይርጋጨፌ) መጠቀም የቡናውን ዝና በመጠበቅ በዓለም ገበያ የተሻለ ዋጋ ለማግኘት ይረዳል።
የቅባት እህሎችን እዚሁ ሀገር ውስጥ የሚጭመቁ ፋብሪካዎች ላይ ኢንቨስት ማድረግ ሰሊጥን በጥሬው ከመላክ ይልቅ የምግብ ዘይት በማምረት ውድ የሆኑ የውጭ ምርቶችን ለመተካት ያስችላል።
ለእሴት ጭማሪ ምርቱ በድንበር ላይ ውድቅ እንዳይሆን ዓለም አቀፍ የጥራት ደረጃዎችን (ISO) እና የጤና ጥበቃ ደንቦችን (SPS) በጥብቅ መከተል ያስፈልጋል።
የአነስተኛ ገበሬዎችን ምርት በህብረት ስራ ማህበራት በኩል መሰብሰብ ከአላስፈላጊ ደላሎች በመራቅ ከዓለም አቀፍ ገዢዎች ጋር በቀጥታ ለመደራደር የሚያስችል አቅም ይፈጥራል።
ለኢትዮጵያ የቅባት እህሎች የተለየ ብራንድ ማዘጋጀት ተፈጥሯዊነታቸውን በማጉላት በዓለም ገበያ ካሉ ሌሎች ምርቶች ጋር ተወዳዳሪ እንዲሆኑ ያደርጋል።
om: Buna dheedhii alatti erguu irraa gara qolamee fi saamsametti jijjiiruun, Itoophiyaan gatii gurgurtaa dhumaa irraa bu'aa guddaa akka argattu godha.
Sirna hordoffii (traceability) fi mallattoo naannoo (akka Sidaamaa yookiin Yirgaaceffee) fayyadamuun buna keenyaaf gabaa addunyaa irratti gatii ol-aana argamsiisa.
Warshaalee zayitaa biyya keessatti ijaaruun, saliita dheedhii erguu dhiisanii zayita qulqulluu oomishuun meeshaa alaa bitamu bakka bu'uun ni danda'ama.
Gatii dabalataaf qulqullina sadarkaa addunyaa (ISO) fi seerota fayyaa (SPS) kabajuun callaan keenya akka hin deebineef baay'ee murteessaadha.
Oomisha qonnaan bultoota xixinnoo waldaan walitti qabuun, daldaltoota gidduu jiran dhiisanii kallattiin bitoota addunyaa wajjin mari'achuuf gargaara.
Sanyii mimmittii fi saliita Itoophiyaaf beekamtii (branding) kennuun, oomisha biyya biraa wajjin dorgommii keessatti jabaa akka ta'an godha.

en: How can small-scale farmers access financing for basic coffee processing machinery?
What are the most in-demand certifications for Ethiopian oilseeds in Europe?
How does the Ethiopian Commodity Exchange (ECX) facilitate value chain efficiency?
Microfinance Institutions (MFIs) provide credit to rural populations who lack traditional collateral (like land titles), enabling them to purchase essential farm inputs.
By promoting rural savings, MFIs mobilize local capital that can be reinvested into small community businesses, fostering local economic growth.
Credit for agricultural cycles is designed with flexible repayment schedules that align with harvest times, reducing the risk of debt traps for farmers.
MFIs play a crucial role in women's empowerment by providing loans for off-farm activities like poultry, beekeeping, or small-scale trading.
Financial inclusion through microfinance reduces the reliance on informal moneylenders who often charge exploitative and unsustainable interest rates.
Beyond credit, many MFIs offer financial literacy training, teaching farmers how to budget, save, and manage business risks effectively.
am: አነስተኛ የፋይናንስ ተቋማት (MFIs) መደበኛ መያዣ (እንደ መሬት ካርታ) ለሌላቸው የገጠር ነዋሪዎች ብድር በመስጠት የእርሻ ግብዓቶችን እንዲገዙ ይረዳሉ።
የገጠር ቁጠባን በማበረታታት፣ እነዚህ ተቋማት በአከባቢው አነስተኛ ንግዶች ላይ መልሶ ሊውል የሚችል ካፒታል እንዲሰበሰብ በማድረግ የአከባቢውን ኢኮኖሚ ያሳድጋሉ።
የእርሻ ብድሮች ከምርት መሰብሰቢያ ወቅት ጋር በተቀናጀ መልኩ የሚከፈሉ በመሆናቸው ገበሬዎች በዕዳ አዙሪት ውስጥ እንዳይገቡ ይከላከላል።
ተቋማቱ እንደ ዶሮ እርባታ፣ ንብ ማርባት ወይም አነስተኛ ንግድ ላሉ የእርሻ ስራ ላልሆኑ ተግባራት ብድር በመስጠት የሴቶችን አቅም በመገንባት ረገድ ትልቅ ሚና ይጫወታሉ።
በአነስተኛ የፋይናንስ ተቋማት አማካኝነት የፋይናንስ ተደራሽነትን ማሳደግ ከፍተኛ ወለድ ከሚጠይቁ ህገ-ወጥ አበዳሪዎች ጥገኝነትን ይቀንሳል።
ከብድር በተጨማሪ ብዙ ተቋማት ገበሬዎች በጀትን እንዴት እንደሚያዘጋጁ፣ እንደሚቆጥቡ እና የንግድ ስጋቶችን እንዴት እንደሚቆጣጠሩ የፋይናንስ ትምህርት ይሰጣሉ።
om: Dhaabbanni Faayinaansii Xixinnoon (MFI) namoota qabeenya qabsiisan hin qabneef liqii kennuun meeshaalee qonnaa akka bitatan gargaara.
Qusannaa baadiyyaa jajjabeessuun, kaappitaala naannoo sanaa walitti qabuun daldala xixinnoo naannoo keessatti akka babal'atu godhu.
Liqiin qonnaa yeroo oomishni sassaabamu akka kaffalamu waan taasifamuuf, qonnaan bultoonni liqiin akka hin hubeffamne eega.
MFIn dubartootaaf hojiiwwan akka lukkuu horsiisuu fi daldala xixinnoo irratti liqii kennuun dubartoota jireenyaan of danda'u akka ta'an godha.
Liqii sirnaawaa argachuun daldaltoota liqii humnaa olii (dhala guddaa) gaafatan irraa qonnaan bultoota baraara.
Liqii cinaatti, dhaabbanni kunniin akkamitti maallaqa qusachuu fi daldala bulchuun akka danda'amu leenjii hubannaa faayinaansii ni kennu.

en: What is the average interest rate for agricultural loans from Ethiopian MFIs?
How can a group of farmers form a SACCO to provide their own microfinance services?
Are there digital microfinance options available via mobile phones in Ethiopia?
The supply chain begins with the extraction of raw materials, such as cobalt from Congo or lithium, which are essential for smartphone batteries.
Specialized components like processors and camera sensors are manufactured in high-tech hubs like Taiwan or South Korea before being shipped for assembly.
Final assembly usually takes place in large manufacturing centers like China, where thousands of individual parts are integrated into a finished product.
Global logistics involve complex networks of air and sea freight to move products quickly across continents to distribution hubs in countries like Ethiopia.
Supply chains rely on 'Just-in-Time' inventory management, which reduces storage costs but makes the system vulnerable to delays caused by pandemics or conflicts.
Understanding the supply chain helps businesses identify where costs can be reduced and how to manage risks like parts shortages or shipping delays.
am: የአቅርቦት ሰንሰለቱ የሚጀምረው ለስማርትፎን ባትሪዎች አስፈላጊ የሆኑትን እንደ ኮባልት (ከኮንጎ) ወይም ሊቲየም ያሉ ጥሬ ማዕድናትን በማውጣት ነው።
እንደ ፕሮሰሰር እና የካሜራ ሴንሰሮች ያሉ ልዩ ክፍሎች ለገጠማ ከመላካቸው በፊት እንደ ታይዋን ወይም ደቡብ ኮሪያ ባሉ የቴክኖሎጂ ማዕከላት ይመረታሉ።
የመጨረሻው የመገጣጠም ስራ አብዛኛውን ጊዜ በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ክፍሎች ተቀናጅተው አንድ ምርት በሚወጣባቸው እንደ ቻይና ባሉ ትልልቅ የኢንዱስትሪ ማዕከላት ውስጥ ይከናወናል።
ዓለም አቀፍ ሎጂስቲክስ ምርቶችን በፍጥነት ወደ ተለያዩ አህጉራት እና እንደ ኢትዮጵያ ወዳሉ የክፍፍል ማዕከላት ለማጓጓዝ የአየር እና የባህር ትራንስፖርት መረቦችን ይጠቀማል።
የአቅርቦት ሰንሰለቶች የማከማቻ ወጪን የሚቀንስ 'Just-in-Time' የተባለ አሰራርን ይጠቀማሉ፤ ነገር ግን ይህ አሰራር በወረርሽኝ ወይም በግጭት ምክንያት ለሚፈጠር መስተጓጎል ተጋላጭ ነው።
የአቅርቦት ሰንሰለቱን መረዳት ድርጅቶች ወጪን የት ጋር መቀነስ እንደሚችሉ እና እንደ እቃ እጥረት ወይም የትራንስፖርት መዘግየት ያሉ ስጋቶችን እንዴት መቆጣጠር እንደሚችሉ ለመረዳት ይረዳል።
om: Sifayee dhiyeessii (Supply chain) albuuda dheedhii kan akka kobaaltii fi liitiyamii baasuu irraa jalqaba; isaan kun baatirii bilbilaatiif barbaachisoodha.
Kutaaleen teeknoolojii ol-aanaa akka 'processor' biyyoota akka Taaywaan yookiin Kooriyaa Kibbaa keessatti oomishamuun gara bakka walitti hidhamuutti ergamu.
Walitti hidhuun (assembly) dhumaa yeroo baay'ee warshaalee gurguddoo Chaayinaa keessatti raawwatama; achitti kutaaleen kumaatamaan lakkaawwaman walitti hidhamu.
Loojistiikiin addunyaa xiyyaaratti fi dooniitti fayyadamuun oomisha sana gara giddu-galeessa raabsaa biyyoota akka Itoophiyaatti geessa.
Sifayee dhiyeessii baasii kuusaa hir'isuuf 'Just-in-Time' fayyadama; garuu kun yeroo weerarri dhukkubaa yookiin waraanni uumamu gufuu ta'uu danda'a.
Sifayee dhiyeessii hubachuun daldaltoonni bakka baasiin itti hir'atuu fi akkamitti gufuuwwan dhiyeessii to'atan isaan gargaara.

en: How do global oil price fluctuations affect the cost of electronics in Ethiopia?
What is 'Vertical Integration' in a supply chain?
How are supply chains becoming more sustainable and environmentally friendly?
Transitioning from subsistence to commercial farming requires treating the farm as a business entity, starting with a clear, written business plan.
Strict record-keeping of all expenses (seeds, labor, fuel) and income is essential to calculate true profitability and identify financial leaks.
Market research involves identifying buyer needs before planting; for example, growing high-value vegetables for urban hotels instead of low-margin cereals.
Innovation can include adopting small-scale irrigation or greenhouse technology to ensure year-round production and higher market prices during the off-season.
Managing cash flow is critical; an entrepreneur must ensure they have enough cash on hand to cover operating costs during the long months before harvest.
Diversification into value-added activities, such as milling your own grain or making cheese from milk, increases the total return on the farm's assets.
am: ከራስ ፍጆታ አልፎ ወደ ንግድ እርሻ ለመሸጋገር እርሻውን እንደ አንድ የንግድ ድርጅት መቁጠር እና ግልጽ የንግድ እቅድ ማዘጋጀት ያስፈልጋል።
ትክክለኛውን ትርፋማነት ለማወቅ እና የገንዘብ ብክነትን ለመለየት ሁሉንም ወጪዎች (ዘር፣ ጉልበት፣ ነዳጅ) እና ገቢዎችን በጥብቅ መመዝገብ ወሳኝ ነው።
የገበያ ጥናት ማለት ከመዝራትዎ በፊት የገዢዎችን ፍላጎት ማወቅ ነው፤ ለምሳሌ አነስተኛ ትርፍ ካላቸው ሰብሎች ይልቅ ለከተማ ሆቴሎች የሚሆኑ ውድ አትክልቶችን ማምረት።
የፈጠራ ስራ ማለት ዓመቱን ሙሉ ለማምረት እና ምርት በሌለበት ወቅት የተሻለ ዋጋ ለማግኘት አነስተኛ የመስኖ ወይም የግሪን ሃውስ ቴክኖሎጂዎችን መጠቀምን ይጨምራል።
የገንዘብ ፍሰትን (cash flow) መቆጣጠር በጣም አስፈላጊ ነው፤ አንድ የንግድ ሰው ምርት ከመሰብሰቡ በፊት ባሉት ወራት ውስጥ የስራ ማስኬጃ ወጪዎችን ለመሸፈን የሚያስችል ገንዘብ መኖሩን ማረጋገጥ አለበት።
ወደ እሴት መጨመር ስራዎች መግባት (ለምሳሌ እህልን ፈጭቶ መሸጥ ወይም ከወተት አይብ መስራት) ከእርሻው የሚገኘውን አጠቃላይ ትርፍ ይጨምራል።
om: Qonna nyaata maatii qofa irraa gara daldalaatti jijjiiruuf, karoorra daldalaa ifa ta'e qabaachuun barbaachisaadha.
Baasii (sanyii, humna namaa, boba'aa) fi galii hunda sirriitti galmeessuun bu'aa argattan adda baasuuf murteessaadha.
Qorannoon gabaa utuu hin dhaabin dura fedhii bittootaa adda baasuudha; fakkeenyaaf midhaan gabaa gad-aanaa qabu dhiisanii kuduraa hoteelaaf ta'u dhaabuu.
Kalaqni jallisii xixinnoo yookiin 'greenhouse' fayyadamanii waggaa guutuu oomishuun yeroo gabaan barbaadutti gatii gaariin gurguruu dabalata.
Sochiin maallaqaa (cash flow) murteessaadha; oomishni sassaabamuun dura kaffaltii hojjettootaa fi baasii biroof qarshii qabaachuu mirkaneeffachuu qabdu.
Oomisha qonnaa gara meeshaa birootti jijjiiruun (fkn. aannan gara ayibbiitti) galii keessan dachaan dabaluu danda'a.

en: What are the best methods for small farmers to conduct market research in Ethiopia?
How can I use a SWOT analysis (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats) for my farm?
How do I apply for an 'Agri-Business' loan from a commercial bank?
A stock market is a public marketplace where people buy and sell ownership shares in companies, allowing businesses to raise capital for expansion.
Investing in 'Equity' or shares means you own a small piece of a company; if the company profits, you may receive a portion called a 'Dividend'.
The Ethiopian Securities Exchange (ESX) is a new platform designed to modernize Ethiopia's financial system by allowing citizens to invest in local companies.
Capital gains occur when you sell your shares at a higher price than what you originally paid, representing a profit on your investment.
Diversification is the strategy of spreading your money across different companies or sectors (like banks, manufacturing, and agro-industry) to reduce risk.
Investing involves risk; the value of shares can go up or down based on the company's performance, management quality, and the overall national economy.
am: የአክሲዮን ገበያ ሰዎች በአንድ ድርጅት ውስጥ ያለውን የባለቤትነት ድርሻ የሚገዙበትና የሚሸጡበት የሕዝብ የንግድ ቦታ ሲሆን ድርጅቶችም ለሥራ ማስፋፊያ ካፒታል እንዲያገኙ ይረዳቸዋል።
በአክሲዮን ወይም በድርሻ ላይ ኢንቨስት ማድረግ ማለት የድርጅቱ በከፊል ባለቤት መሆን ማለት ነው፤ ድርጅቱ ትርፍ ሲያገኝ 'ዲቪዴንድ' (dividend) የተባለውን የትርፍ ድርሻ ሊያገኙ ይችላሉ።
የኢትዮጵያ ሰኩሪቲስ ኤክስቼንጅ (ESX) ዜጎች በአገር ውስጥ ድርጅቶች ላይ ኢንቨስት እንዲያደርጉ በመፍቀድ የኢትዮጵያን የፋይናንስ ሥርዓት ለማዘመን የተቋቋመ አዲስ መድረክ ነው።
ካፒታል ጌይን (Capital gains) የሚከሰተው አክሲዮንዎን ከገዙበት ዋጋ በላይ በሆነ ዋጋ ሲሸጡ ነው፤ ይህም ከኢንቨስትመንትዎ ያገኙትን ትርፍ ያሳያል።
ኢንቨስትመንትን ማከፋፈል (Diversification) ማለት ስጋትን ለመቀነስ ሲባል ገንዘብዎን በተለያዩ ዘርፎች (እንደ ባንክ፣ ማኑፋክቸሪንግ እና ግብርና) ላይ ማፍሰስ ማለት ነው።
ኢንቨስትመንት ስጋት አለበት፤ የአክሲዮን ዋጋ እንደ ድርጅቱ አፈጻጸም፣ እንደ አመራሩ ጥራት እና እንደ አጠቃላይ የሀገሪቱ ኢኮኖሚ ሁኔታ ሊጨምር ወይም ሊቀንስ ይችላል።
om: Gabaan Akshiyoonaa bakka namoonni qooda abbaa qabeenyummaa dhaabbataa itti bitanii fi gurguraniidha; kunis dhaabbanni kaappitaala akka argatan gargaara.
Akshiyoona bitachuun abbaa qooda dhaabbataa ta'uu jechuudha; yoo dhaabbanni bu'aa argate, qooda bu'aa 'dividend' jedhamu argattu.
Gabaan Akshiyoonaa Itoophiyaa (ESX) sirna faayinaansii biyyaa ammayyeessuufi lammiileen dhaabbata biyya keessaa irratti akka invast godhan gargaara.
Bu'aan kaappitaalaa (Capital gains) kan uumamu yeroo akshiyoona keessan gatii bitattan irra ol-kaastanii gurgurtaniidha.
Invastimeentii raabsuun (diversification) balaa kasaaraa hir'isuuf maallaqa keessan dhaabbata adda addaa (baankii, warshaa, qonna) irratti ramaduudha.
Invast gochuun balaa qaba; gatiin akshiyoonaa akka hojii dhaabbataa, dandeettii hooggansaa fi haala dinagdee biyyaatti ol yookiin gadi bu'uu danda'a.
